name: Dandelion Butter
notes: Pollen, Dandelion Greens, Yellow Dandelion, Snapped Stem, Milky Sap, Salted Butter, Dandelion-stained Chin
style: Floral, Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Milky, Unusual / Unexpected, Warm
description: The boundlessly creative noses behind Clue draw fragrant inspiration from every nostalgic and evocative aspect of the American midwest, and for their fifth fragrance, they've targeted nostalgia itself- Dandelion Butter takes its name from a classic schoolchildren's game that goes back centuries. A plucked dandelion is held under someone's chin as they're asked, "Do you like butter?", as they turn their face to the sky to see if the flower casts a yellow glow on their chin. In some versions, the head of the flower is rubbed into the chin ("Chin Up, Buttercup!"), leaving a bright yellow streak that indicates, however silly the idea, that  the bearer of the mark has an obvious love of butter. It's the kind of whimsically illogical tradition that survives countless generations precisely because it doesn't quite make sense- except, perhaps, in the wonderfully playful and boundlessly curious world of childhood.

name: Pear Pavlova

style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Pear Pavlova is crafted with some of perfumeryâs most exceptional ingredients. It opens with Pink Peppercorn CO2, one of the most refined and precious extractions, known for its bright fruitiness and sparkling freshness. This is paired with Bitter Almond Oil, one of the rare natural materials that gives a true fruity note, where most creations would rely on a synthetic accord. At the heart, Indian Jasmine Sambac Absolute adds radiance, richness, and that unmistakable floral diffusion. But the star of the formula is Ambrette Seed Absolute: a vegan natural musk of extraordinary quality, rarely showcased so boldly. Extracted from Hibiscus Abelmoschus, itâs one of perfumeryâs most luxurious naturals. Pears naturally carry an ambrette facet, making the pairing effortless and addictive.

Naturally, we knew her signature fragrance would have to be more than a by-the-numbers celebuscent, but Little Flower is so much more than we could have expected- a disarmingly fresh, exuberantly sexy rose that feels youthful and provocative all at once.

Pas de Chat marked the end of my search for an everyday signature. Vanilla-scented skin as soft as a warm madeleine, kissed with clean, sweet muskâ simple, everyday luxury."

A tribute to my grand-mÃ¨re who called me Lapinou (bunny) and spending time baking in her kitchen in France together. Cups of steaming hot black tea, coconut sablÃ© cookies cooling on the marble countertop, bowl of lemon candies, and heaps of knitting yarn and velvet ribbon trimmed dresses."

description: This is the perfume of refusal. Nuit Ãlastique doesnât unfold, it haunts. It disturbs the air with a slow, dirty pulse, asking nothing, explaining less. A sensual rift that reveals more by what it hides. For those who donât want to be understood, only felt. It isnât worn. It inhabits.

Like velvet over fire, it captures the provocative delight of surrendering to too much. A hedonistâs manifesto, both seductive and unapologetically assertive.

The scent moves like a secret beneath a polished surface-serene, but vibrating with whatâs unsaid. A whisper of rebellion in formal dress.

Built upon a deep foundation of treemoss, the fragrance unfolds like a forest floor after rain; dark green, mineral, and quietly radiant. Threads of luminous frankincense rise through the composition, lifting the moss into shafts of light and boughs of cool cypress. At its heart is the golden richness of champaca and rose, softening the composition with natural floral warmth and a touch of absinthe lends an herbal bitterness.

The perfumeâs representation of the âBad Motherâ was created through the animalic darkness of suede.ââ Antoine Lie, Perfumer

It is like the quiet before a revelation; the calm that holds the promise of something greater. In that stillness, anticipation lingers, and the fragrance of what is to come drifts slowly toward us.

She drifts, as if weightless, into a realm where imagination and reality are one, the air laced with a bright, curious fragrance that seems to draw her forward. Thus begins Aliceâs journey into wonder, an endless cascade of surprises and enchantment, with no telling when it will end or what awaits.

Then, just beyond the crest of a sand dune, an oasis emerges, a stroke of luck you could never have imagined. The sight shimmers, almost too perfect to be real. An intoxicating, mysterious fragrance drifts on the wind, as if heralding a new blessing to come. Every moment here is a miracle born from the slimmest of chances.

A man approaches a woman and insists they met here last year. She smiles as if both remembering and forgetting. Truth and memory blur, and certainty dissolves into a maze of longing. Leather and civet anchor the fragrance in the sensual presence of the body, while shimmering aldehydes flicker like light across marble floors. Musk and frankincense deepen the atmosphere, joined by basilâs green spark. Orris, geranium, lavender, and jasmine drift through the composition like fragile recollections, brightened briefly by bergamot.

Snuggling head to head, they preen one another, their affectionate chirps muffled against velvety soft feathers. The setting sun captures the intimate encounter, washing the glorious hues of the lovebirdsâ intertwined plumage with a golden glow.

Across history, violets have symbolized a delightfully paradoxical bouquet of meaning, standing for both burning passion and wide-eyed innocence, steadfast strength and poetic delicacy, measured wisdom and persistent optimism.

Espresso martinis and Manhattans mingle with a voluptuous, silky, decidedly adults-only vanilla. Cherry and cinnamon catch the light, while saffron hums low and warm, softened by a whisper of leather underneath the surface.

A scent of tension, constructed like an invisible flower pulsing beneath the surface. The atmosphere becomes darker. An obscure iris mingles with underground roots, while velvety beetroot adds its deep red color and tactile presence.

Named after the Arabic word for strong, intense, powerful, Shadid is a bold oriental fragrance with depth, elegance, and an uncompromising character. Rich and expressive yet refined, Shadid explores contrasts such as darkness and light, power and restraint, sensuality and air. It is an oriental fragrance with a strong presence and a soul.

description: The wordAgraniholds many meanings: a leader, a pioneer, a founder and in Sanskrit, it signifies success. And indeed, Agrani is a fragrance designed to evoke all the qualities of a truly historic leader. Its unique aroma- spicy, leathery, animalic, yet sweet- reflects the piercing and bold essence of that leader, eloquently announcing its presence. Like the flow of the ocean, its powerful sillage comes in undulating waves, allowing for both impressive resonance and subtle moments of grace.

name: Iris Sura
notes: Cacao Pod, Butter, Orris Root, Vanilla, Orris Butter, Oak, Indonesian Oud, Peach, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Dark, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Iris Sura is inspired by the story of a 19th-century whiskey maker and his wife, Elena. She shaped every barrel with her exceptional nose, yet was forbidden from enjoying whiskey inside the saloons they supplied. To honor her, he secretly infused their finest whiskey with precious iris, adding touches of vanilla, oakwood, peach, honey, and walnut- creating something meant only for her.

name: Aghora
notes: Ghost Pepper, Hashish Accord, Marigold, Sage, Fig, Smoke, Frankincense, Galbanum, Oakmoss, Tobacco, Fir Balsam, Opoponax, Tree Moss, Hindi Oud, Sandalwood, Choya Ral, Guaiac Wood, Chocolate, Labdanum, Myrrh, Castoreum, Deer Musk Accord, Leather

description: Drawing inspiration from the mystique of the Aghora- an ascetic tribe that embraces life beyond all restraint- to craft a bold olfactory journey. This enigmatic brotherhood lives at the fringes of civilization, pursuing enlightenment through complete detachment from comfort and taboo. In that same spirit, Aghora captures a daring, boundary-defying artistry, while still delivering a scent that remains deeply wearable, captivating, and unmistakably unique.

name: Tabac Sura
notes: Cigar Tincture (2023), Vanilla Tincture (2022), Custom Amber Base, Ambergris, Deer Musk, Aged Castoreum Tincture, Oakwood, Cocoa Absolute, Tonka Bean Absolute, Special 2011 Batch Trat Oud Oil

name: Tiger Rouge
notes: Black Pepper, Paprika, Pimento Oil, Blood Orange, Lemon Myrtle, Mandarin, Cinnamon Bark, Bay Leaf, Cloves, Frankincense, Hainan Oud, Indian Vetiver, Cypriol Oil, Turkish Rose, Red Cherry, Almond, Pomegranate, Mineral Accords
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The Rouge Tiger tells the mythical tale of an ancient Red Tiger, a creature of legend whispered through generations- a divine guardian born of flame and forest, said to embody the wild soul of the Indian wilderness. With every stride, it stirred the land beneath it, and the air around it shimmered with its primal force.

name: Pushpak
notes: Osmanthus, Champaca, Vanilla, Amber, Khao Yai Oud, Peach, Apricot, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Inspired by the essence of first love,Pushpakameans "the season of flowers." It seeks to capture loveâs first touch, with a gorgeous bouquet of lush white champaca and osmanthus absolute blended perfectly with richly fruity notes of peach and apricot. The heart is dominated by warm, creamy vanilla and sensuous amber, evoking the enveloping comfort of a first embrace. In the base, tonka bean absolute and the finest Khao Yai Thai Oud take their place, adding a tender and lingering whisper of romantic devotion, laid on a soft pillow of powdery musk. As enduring as cherished memories of first love, Pushpak is a floral of rare beauty.

name: Vanilla Mystique
notes: Rum, Lavender, Saffron, Vanilla, Heliotrope, Jasmine, Musk, Oakwood CO2, Cedarwood
style: Boozy, Creamy, Floral - Light, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: Fomowa Paris

name: YSAYO
notes: Saffron, Galbanum, Blue Chamomile, White Artemisia, Celery Oil, Geranium, Jasmine, Thyme, Cistus Absolute, Patchouli Oil, Leather, Javan And Haitian Vetiver
style: Earthy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Antoine Lie grew up in Alsace in north-eastern France, surrounded by greenery. For this perfume, he travelled back to the depths and emotions of his younger years and unleashed his olfactory passion without any inhibitions or intellectual reasoning.

name: Discovery Set
description: The What We Do Is Secret discovery set is a curated invitation into a universe of fragrances by the worldâs best perfumers designed to create memorable scents that inspire emotion.  Worn intuitively, layered freely, and revisited often, each fragrance reveals a different mood and moment, inviting you to explore the collection's effortless and unforgettable scents.

name: Messy Sexy Just Rolled Out of Bed
notes: Bergamot, Peach Blossom, Rose, Heliotrope, Musk, Toffee, Amber, White Woods, Vanilla, Tonka Bean
style: Creamy, Floral - Citrus, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Everyone loves the smell of vanilla, and yet somehow the perfect, universally wearable vanilla seems elusively rare- mouthwatering bakery gourmands scare away lovers of wispier, more floral concoctions, and both varieties are often seen as too feminine for men to wear. This is why we're so enthused with Dominique Ropion's brilliant creation for WWDIS- a just-right vanilla musk that we think smells divine on just about anyone. This enchanting elixir is sweet without seeming gooey, compelling without shouting in your face, and romantic with enough restraint to wear well on men and women alike. A soft rose lends its velvety tones throughout, darting in and out among the star players of clean musk, rich tonka bean absolute, vanilla, and amber. The ever-so-slightly powdery almond notes of heliotrope are the perfect complement, softening and rounding out the sweet toffee and barely-there blonde woods. Messy Sexy Just Rolled Out of Bed is a season-spanning wonder, displaying a warming sweet coziness on cool fall days, while bergamot and peach blossom bring a fresh, light addition to summer sunshine. With versatility like that, it's no wonder that Messy Sexy Just Rolled Out of Bed is one of the best crowd-pleasing vanillas we've ever put our noses on.

name: What We Do In Paris Is Secret
notes: Bergamot, Honey, Lychee, Turkish Rose Essence, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Heliotrope, Tolu, Sandalwood, Ambergris, Musks
style: Creamy, Exotic, Floral, Powdery / Soft
description: What We Do Is Secret

name: And The World Is Yours
notes: Neroli, Cumin, Orange Blossom Absolute, Rose, Heliotrope, Sandalwood, Vanilla Pod CO2, Tonka Absolute, Tolu Balsam
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Citrus, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Few photographs capture the sumptuousness of celebrity more than the iconic photograph of Faye Dunaway by famed English photographer Terry OâNeill. The starlet sits poolside at the Beverly Hills Hotel at 6 a.m., hungover from winning an Oscar, sanguine in a pale silk robe, newspapers in a moat around her feet declaring her victor. And who better to pay homage to this most Hollywood morning-after, but Dominique Ropion, master of the doe-eyed and disheveled WWDIS classics What We Do In Paris Is Secret and Messy Sexy Just Rolled Out Of Bed?

name: Freckled and Beautiful
notes: Orange Flower, Neroli, Honeysuckle, Warm Milk, Pastry, Salicylates, Sandalwood, Vanilla Bean, Heliotrope
style: Creamy, Floral, Gourmand, Salty / Oceanic, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: What We Do Is Secret

name: Discovery Set
style: Gourmand
description: Lorenzo Pazzaglia

name: Olm
notes: Water Cave Accord, Limestone, Iodine, Algae, Soft Amber, Sandalwood, Oily Musks, Cashmeran, Iso E Super
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Fresh
description: Over millions of years, persistent rainwater gnaws at porous limestone, carving out karsts deep within the earth. Carried in droplets, sediment grows upon itself, forming misshapen statues. The stalagmites and stalactites reach for one another, patient in the knowledge that one day they will meet. No sunlight breaches these cavern walls, but something has. Somewhere in time, a family of olms, aquatic salamanders, wandered into the limestone cave and never re-emerged. Generations in darkness have stripped the olms of colour and sight. Pale and blind they wait, sometimes for years, for the subterranean river to deliver a meal of larvae or shrimp to their murky abode.

name: Fiery Passion - 75ml
notes: Musk, Pink Peony, Strawberry, Vanilla, Woods
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Born from the flames of love and desire, Melanie Martinez's fire-inspired entry in her Portals collection is a tantalizing blend of innocence and sensuality. Sparkling and seductive, Fiery Passion is a floral gourmand that recalls the delicious confections of youth with a mouthwatering strawberry candy opening, while a romantic pink peony infused with the warmth of avant-garde musks and woods create a complex and compelling bouquet for creative souls of all ages. The perfect companion for a summer fling or a lifelong love, Fiery Passion has everything needed to keep hearts aflutter.

name: Earthy Abundance - 75ml
notes: Green Tea, Jasmine, Turmeric, Lavender, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Inspired by all things green and growing, Earthy Abundance is a beautifully lush aromatic green floral that may well be the jewel of the Melanie Martinez Portals Collection. Infused with the leafy freshness of green tea and responsibly sourced aromatic herbs and flowers, Earthy Abundance is a captivating song in tune with nature, enhanced with the harmonizing richness of vanilla bean for a joyfully romantic and long lasting signature both playful and sophisticated.

name: Air of Clarity - 75ml
notes: Caramel, Coconut, Ambroxan, Musk, Tonka Bean, Sandalwood
style: Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Gourmand, Salty / Oceanic, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: Inspired by the Element of Air, Air Of Clarity is a bright, smooth solar gourmand with an irresistible aura of sheer tropical delight. Sun-kissed coconut drenched in delectable caramel emanates the golden glow of a radiant sun on a distant white sand beach, evoking relaxation, calm, and purity. Mouthwatering, romantic, playful, and deeply soothing, Air Of Clarity is more than just a "vacation in a bottle"- it's a journey to a higher plane of existence.

name: Water of Intuition - 75ml
notes: Sandalwood, Amber, Cedar, Musk, Vanilla, Cocoa
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Amber, Woody - Fresh
description: An elemental voyage into the realms of mist and rain, Water of Intuition is a soothing blend of gourmand and woody notes that creates an atmosphere of pure, ethereal bliss. At the heart of the composition lies a unique note of sand mango(XoÃ i CÃ¡t)- an emblematic fruit from the Hoa Loc province extracted using Jungle Essence technology by perfumer VÃ©ronique Nyberg of MANE. With facets of peach, banana, and apricot, this mango brings a generous fruitiness and sunlit tenderness. It is enhanced by vibrant spices, cardamom, and black pepper. style: Animalic, Boozy, Creamy, Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Warm, Woody - Spicy
description: Russian Leather: a legendary tanning process born from centuries of secret craftsmanship, producing leather of unparalleled strength and luxury. After the Russian Revolution, the knowledge of this ancient art was thought lost forever- until the discovery of a shipwrecked cache of perfectly preserved hides from the 18th century helped dedicated artisans reconstruct the old techniques and begin producing this treasured leather yet again. And now, for the first time, those artisans agreed to collaborate with Les Indemodables, who have used groundbreaking ultrasonic technology to extract the true fragrance essence of Russian Leather: woody tones of cork shavings, animalic notes of rawhide, smoky whispers of birch tar. Spicy warmth wrapping around the senses. Multi-faceted, unpredictable, alive, it stands apart from every synthetic leather ever used. To frame such an ingredient required a stage of equal power. That stage was Vanille Havane, a perfume of rich dualities: the gourmand roundness of vanilla, the warmth of Havana tobacco, the spice of rum-soaked fruits.

Though small and unassuming seeds in appearance, their subtle flavor and earthy aroma blend beautifully with sweet dishes, creating a soft and comforting harmony. In Korean, thereâs a charming expression used to describe affectionate lovers: âsesame seeds pouring.â It is a metaphor for warmth, sweetness, and love, like the cozy feeling of having a sweet dessert generously topped with black sesame: toasty, sweet, and endearing.

What once soaked the surface now lifts with the breeze, subtly tinting the air with its scent. A deep aroma, like the lingering trace of charred wood, feels light and fresh when carried by the wind. Monotone. Black and white in stark contrast. Yet still, something blurred, something slowly bleeding at the edges. It moves with weight, while leaving behind the lightest, most unpredictable traces.

Far from the familiar floral softness, it felt more at home in a winter city than a blooming garden. There was a quiet sharpness to the scent, as if each note danced like silver on the wind. Clean, crisp, and quietly bold. Not soft, not sweet, but layered with vivid tones and a distinct, confident character. This is a fragrance that travels far, lingering not just on the skin, but in memory.

description: The Wonderland II features a handmade extraction of fresh September plums. Originally crafted as an orris-centered, moss-laden chypre, The Wonderland was an ode to the beauty of Mount Rainier. Here, the orris has been drawn out into a full spectrum iris accord, utilizing higher quality orris butters, orris absolutes, orris resinoids and pure irones. The moss and cedar accords have been made more photorealistic as wellâ with an addition of an excellent batch of mitti. Youâll find wearing this perfume truly emulates an old growth forest.

style: Avant-Garde, Fresh, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Clean, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Based on the cult classic Concrete After Lightning scented candle, Concrete lightning is an EDP based on a unique an universally recognizable note called geosmin- the scent molecule released from bacteria in dirt after it rains. In the city, geosmin blends with the urban environment to produce the scent of hot asphalt and concrete quickly cooled by rain. It is as if the whole city is boiling, overlapping in scent, and when rain and thunder come, all is released into the air in an instant. It smells fresh, unique and only of summer in the city. Concrete Lightning is simple- you have the air, rain, steam, and some of the weeds that grow in the cracks of New York City.

M+ is the continuation of perfumer Geza Schoen's gift for impactful minimalism, an imagining of a unforgettable dance between Iso E Super and just one other beautiful, carefully chosen ingredient.

Gorgeous and confident, yet tastefully subtle, Meant to Be Seen is born from those moments- a scent that anchors the light when you feel unseen.

name: Discovery Set
description: Your chance to experience all five signature fragrances in the Toouch collection has arrived in the form of this elegant, uniquely presented Discovery Set, which reflects Toouchâs distinctive fashion-forward aesthetic. Featuring generous 5ml atomizers perfect for gifting or travel, this set captures the unique balance of ancient culture, natural beauty, and modern energy that define Vietnam.

name: Creamy Tide
notes: Lychee, Peach, Rice Milk, Apple Flower, Iris, Benzoin, White Musk, Vanilla
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Milky, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Creamy Tide feels like a slow, unhurried day in the Mekong Delta, where the sky and the water drift together in quiet harmony and everyone seems content to simply float along, unbothered by time. The fragrance opens with lychee and peach, fresh and juicy like biting into sun-warmed fruit. Their soft sweetness soon gives way to a smooth, milky rice accord that feels both creamy and serene. There is something deeply rustic in its heart: the scent of freshly cooked rice, a gentle sweetness lingering in the air, and the calm sensation of sitting on a small wooden boat as the breeze brushes your neck and the water laps softly against the hull.

name: Smoky Graze
notes: Cinnamon, Coffee, Almond, Cocoa, Turkish Rose, Honey, Suede, Amber, Vanilla, Praline
style: Floral, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet
description: Smoky Graze is the very essence of a just-waking Saigon at dawn. With the first mist in the air, it feels as though youâre seated in an old cafÃ©, surrounded by the rich aroma of coffee intertwined with a quiet touch of warm cinnamon. Itâs that fleeting moment when you feel you could hold the entire morning in your hands, bustling yet unhurried, where every sound is wrapped in a creamy sweetness of almond, chocolate, and freshly bloomed Turkish rose.

name: Heritage Nuzzle
notes: Pear, Osmanthus, Green Tea, Camellia, Muguet, Jasmine, Vetiver, Cashmere Musk, Rosewood
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Light
description: There are Hanoi mornings when the sky still drifts in clouds, yet the Old Quarter already carries a soft, translucent nostalgia, as if every narrow corner holds the lingering warmth of green tea, gently entwined with the whisper of white blossoms brushing past your shoulder. In that delicate haze, time seems to slow: a cup of tea infused with jasmine, camellia, and lily of the valley, pure, serene, and tender, like someoneâs smile on the cusp of winter. It is this ethereal olfactive memory that Heritage Nuzzle so perfectly captures- a gentle, peaceful, and richly spiritual stillness that connects city, earth, and soul in sublime harmony.

name: Deep Lullaby
notes: Pine, Lavender, Mojito, Mulberry, Wild Rose, Mimosa, Tobacco Leaf, Charred Wood, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Woody - Fresh
description: If any scent could capture the essence of a highland afternoon just turning cool, it would be Deep Lullaby. Even before you take a full breath, it feels as if youâre quietly walking up a mist-covered hill, hearing the soft whisper of pine trees and feeling the chill slip through your sleeves.

name: Dreamy Nautica

style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Metallic, Salty / Oceanic
description: Carefree, bright, and invigorating, Dreamy Nautica is the kind of aquatic scent that turns any day into a joyful adventure. It opens with a refreshing splash of crisp apple juice chilled over ice, brightened by slices of fresh grapefruit that lend a sweetâtart sparkle to the senses. The first breath tingles at the back of the throat, like sipping a sunlit cocktail by the shore.

name: Lu Bu
notes: Clove, Gunpowder, Armenian Paper, Iris, Blood, Black Vanilla Absolute, Tonka Absolute, Amyris Essence, Guaiac Essence, Almond, Cashmere Wood, Virginia Cedar Essence, Tolu Balsam, Hot Metal
style: Metallic, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Black and grey descend upon the plain. In the shadows of falling mists that cling to the hills, LÃ¼ Bu appears. He stands apart, a folded shadow, sublime fog at the end of battle. Nearly dead, once the most feared man of the Empire, son of iron and fire, betrayed by his own and traitor to the Kingdom, he is consumed by his own legend.

name: Resplendent
notes: Saffron, Olibanum, Absinthe, Egyptian Jasmine, Chinese Osmanthus, Indian Tuberose, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Labdanum, Amber
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Amber, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Resplendent is just as the name describes- a lustrous veil of shimmering intrigue, incense and rose. It's an elixir made of rare and exquisite ingredients smoldering in an imagined stone palace high in the mountains, a labyrinth of scented rooms and whispering voices. Secrets float on floral draughts. A woman in dark red silk, her face hidden by threads of gold and crimson looks out from a high balcony, behind her, shadows gather, woven from ghosts of scented love and the resistance of control. She is resplendent in her contemplation, her skin diffusing dewy white flowers and the piquancy of ancient spices. She may be a Queen or the phantom of one who still walks the floors of her sprawling palace.

name: Lannosea

notes: Ozone, Acidic Ocean, Camphor Crystals, Blackcurrant, Pine Absolute, Alien Minerals, Vetiver
style: Avant-Garde, Green / Herbaceous, Metallic, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Cor Serpentis, âThe Heart of the Snakeâ, is the brightest star in the constellation of Serpens. In Ivan Yefremovâs novella of the same name, the planet revolving around ?or holds a cool, shimmering, radioactive biome of purple icebergs and acidic oceans that is beautiful but nothing like ours â in fact, deadly to humans. What would a living forest smell like in a world unimaginably distant and savage, powered by the light of a strange star? Would it have any resemblance to the smells of the Earth, be somehow relatable to us, earthlings? These questions are answered in Cor Serpentis, an alien woody fragrance from another solar system.

style: Avant-Garde, Floral - Light, Metallic, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Light

That very emotion â the need to go higher, further, faster than everyone else, to step where no man has stepped before â is what fuels Moon Child, a perfume faced upwards like the blooms of a Stargazer lily.

style: Boozy, Floral - Light, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: In chess, a gambit is a strategic move where a player sacrifices a piece to gain advantage and, eventually, take control of the board. In Rose Gambit, the conventional prettiness of a rose is given up in order to achieve something more ambitious â a fragrance charged with electricity, strong and precise like the ticking of a mechanical clock in a chess game.

style: Floral - Spicy, Powdery / Soft, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Light

A rare combination of beauty and utility, each tansu carries the history of the family it belongs to. The scent it exhales upon opening â the warmth of precious textiles kept fresh by incense â is at the core of Tansu Silk, a perfume imbued with golden patina of the past.

style: Floral - White, Smoky
description: Thereâs an otherworldly quality to night-time Moscow, an eerie landscape of light and shadows, of sweeping towers and imposing facades â a black and white empire not built to human scale. Its dramatic character is reflected in Empire T, a fragrance straight from a noir film, conjured up from night air and cigarette ash.

In Sylhet, Italian perfumer Antonio Gardoni creates a turbulent, earthy counterpoint to Asharâs glimmering rainshower flowers and greenery.

description: A radiant celebration of citrus and resin, Yuzu Cologne captures the brightness of dawn with the depth of natural materials. The opening shines with the sharp, sparkling freshness of Japanese yuzu, softened by the balsamic clarity of elemi. This luminous accord sets the stage for a fragrance that is both invigorating and refined. At the heart, the rare marine-mineral facets of ambergris meet the golden sweetness of Siam benzoin, creating a sensual warmth that contrasts beautifully with the brightness of the top notes. The base reveals a sophisticated depth: the resinous mystery of Trat oud blended with the soft, comforting roundness of vanilla. description: Vanilla Haze just got louder. This "XDP" extrait is the after-hours version of the EDP. It is stronger, bolder and unapologetically intense. Things get warmer when smooth vanilla meets smoky tonka, clove, and the sensuality of cashmeran. It all melts down to a base that lingers like a saffron, caramel, musky skin with a final touch of bourbon-laced vanilla. This isn't your typical vanilla. Lush notes of nectarine and ripe apricot envelope the senses with enchanted magic while juicy sweet orange nuances lend delicate brightness with a sophisticated embrace; a memorable opening that instantly transports you to carefree moments, running with unbridled joy through illuminated gardens, plucking ripe mellow apricots warmed by the sunâs golden rays. At the heart of Apricot Innocence lies a radiant bouquet of creamy sambac and luscious osmanthus expertly blended with delicate rose petals and vanilla hints capturing a sense of childlike wonder and innocent joy. Like stumbling upon along-forgotten treasure from youth, this harmonious composition unfolds like a symphony, revealing layers of complexity with each passing moment; soft amber and velvety white musk create a long-lasting shelter of unspoiled bliss.

Dangling beneath the ghostly vessel, a curtain of lethal tentacles sways menacingly in the swell. The Portuguese man oâ war drifts, letting its unwitting prey approach. Up to 100 feet long, their lacy tentacles exude crippling venom with the merest touch. In an instant, the prey is paralyzed, and as its organs slowly liquify, the colony of zooids begin to feed.

Soft words sprinkled in a whisper of floral whiteness. Dainty, delicate. A bouquet's embrace in a whirlwind of petaled perfection. Close at last. A powerfully tender declaration of love.

An addiction to skin, its essence, the desire to devour this ambery vanilla. An elixir-in-the-rough swoons with carnal proclivities. A concentration of voluptuousness overwhelms me. Eternal beginnings, here we go again.

style: Avant-Garde, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected
description: The newest release from one of the most unique and creative voices in niche perfumery, COME is Antonio Gardoni's olfactory exploration of all things green. COME explores the full spectrum of green odors: fragile, layered, elusive, complex, and ever-shifting. It welcomes us with the bright lights of bergamot and helichrysum (immortelle flower), evoking the dewey-fresh natural green of a wet lawn in the early glow of sunrise. It takes shape in a thicker green, that of fig leaves falling from the tree, the darker tones of tea lives and animalic civet, the green oxidization of exposed metal, or the deep, shimmering green lacing across a pool of petrol, smoky and resinous. COME vibrates between contrasts and harmonies: the balsamic sweetness of benzoin and hte earthy intensity of oud, outlining a rich emerald green, unveiled against the dustier nuances of tonka bean and musk. And COME is a palpable green: the patchouli note mimetic and vegetal, the honey melting into a celadon-green pool of vanilla and jasmine, milky and lithe, vast and luminous.

description: Que Chimba: bold and sensual, capturing the essence of life, the essence of passion. A warm Colombian afternoon, the sun dancing among the palm leaves. A chalice of aguardiente rises, an ideal companion to parties and celebrations, a symbol toasting to successes, to the bonds that tie us together, to the beauty of a shared moment. A bouquet of fresh notes of star anise invites us to let go, to totally immerse ourselves in the vibrancy of this beautiful countryâ¦each sip is a journey: notes of guava, passionfruit and Cataleya orchid make it even more lively and engaging.

description: In a world where each soul drifts silently like a solitary planet through the stillness of the cosmos, "Les Luminaires Silencieux" was created. Drawing inspiration from the solitude of modern life, Sylhouette borrows the imagery of the moon, the star, and the depths of darkness to portray three distinct shades of loneliness, each a fragile echo from within. Yet amidst the darkness, "Les Luminaires Silencieux" becomes a journey seeking the faintest shades of light, small, trembling, yet achingly real, quietly casting their glow across the solitary universe.  Upon touching the skin, the fragrance no longer lingers only on the surface; it transforms into a soft, glowing aura like a celestial body quietly shimmering in the silent universe.

description: The inspiration behind Obvious Parfums' new Kakigori series- a unique trio of distinctive fragrances- draws from the Japanese art of finding beauty in the ephemeral nature of the present moment. Andkakigoriis a perfect representation of the fleeting nature of all things: a traditional Japanese frozen dessert that long predates refrigeration, made from snow carefully collected from the heights of Mount Fuji topped with syrups, fruit, or tea, available only as a treasure to those lucky enough to afford such a rarity. Designed to layer together or wear individually, this collection invites you to craft an olfactory moment all your own- one that's all the more meaningful in its transience.

description: The inspiration behind Obvious Parfums' new Kakigori series- a unique trio of distinctive fragrances- draws from the Japanese art of finding beauty in the ephemeral nature of the present moment. Andkakigoriis a perfect representation of the fleeting nature of all things: a traditional Japanese frozen dessert that long predates refrigeration, made from snow carefully collected from the heights of Mount Fuji topped with syrups, fruit, or tea, available only as a treasure to those lucky enough to afford such a rarity. Designed to layer together or wear individually, this collection invites you to craft an olfactory moment all your own- one that's all the more meaningful in its transience.

These everyday spaces, charged with raw energy, secret romances, and spontaneous creativity, serve as the unlikely muse for this joyful new scent. Rich, bright fruit and a dynamic and evocative bubblegum accord burst off the skin, evoking the spontaneous thrill of instant attraction, while a clean, fresh laundry accord reminds us of the setting, and a comfortingly musky, gently woodsy base lingers like the buzz of a newfound infatuation.

Sweet, herbal and spicy, Kagamigoshi is a scent that evokes an impulse to do something special. A remix of Reminisce from EDIT(h)'s original collection, perfumer Leslie Gautier created a new scent with the idea to reflect its formulation. Each ingredient mirrors an ingredient of Reminisce, like a reflection of Reminisce. The world in the mirror. As if something exists although it should not exist at all. This scent may cause confusion in your memory.

This bright opening sets the stage for a heart of lush santol notes, with a touch of jasmine that adds a soft, floral dimension, mirroring the delicate complexity of the dish.

This fragrance reflects the profound beauty of light and the relentless vitality of life.

The rustling of leaves, the distant birdsong, the golden warmth of sunlight- they form a quiet symphony. And in the stillness, a cup of tea rests in your hand.

description: Dimlight is a scent that transports you into the cozy allure of a dimly lit bar where time feels suspended and secrets are shared over cocktails. Inspired by the charm of a shadowed bar scene, this fragrance begins with an inviting splash of rum blended with a touch of spicy cardamomâa warm, intriguing start thatâs as alluring as the first sip of a finely crafted drink. The heart reveals the rich warmth of almond and smoky tobacco, mingling with the ruggedness of oak to evoke the scent of wooden shelves stacked with bottles, aged with stories and memories.

description: Golden Hour is inspired by the famous golden-yellow fruits of Thailand- mango and durian, which both reach coveted peak season during the height of the sweltering summer months. Plucked right from the tree, the ripe fruit is enjoyed with sweet coconut milk and Thai sticky rice- a memorably delectable balance of textures and flavors equally beloved by adults and children alike.

description: The fragrance Star Trails draws inspiration from the song âSparkle,â a soundtrack from the Japanese romantic fantasy anime film âYour Name."Star Trails begins its journey with the refreshing and vibrant scent of warm Coca-Cola, blended with the sweet and tangy notes of lime, creating a lively sparkle. This is complemented by the warmth and complexity of anise and cinnamon, intertwined with the fresh essence of geranium, sustaining the bright middle notes. Violet adds a layer of complexity and a base note, alongside the sweet warmth of amber and cedar, enriching the fragranceâs depth in the final notes.

description: Fluffy Cake is a fragrance inspired by the cherished Thai dessertkanom thuay foo, celebrated for its delicate, airy texture and gentle sweetness. Rooted in Thai tradition, this dessert is one of the nine auspicious sweets symbolizing prosperity and joy. But it also holds a deeper connection to the Chinesefa gao(?? or ?? or ??)âa dessert known as the âcake of rising fortunes,â crafted to convey blessings of growth and good luck. Fluffy Cake captures this essence, intertwining rich cultural heritage with the warmth and sweetness of a treasured treat.

The backdrop of sunlight reflecting off the surface of the pool creates a beautiful scene, evoking the feeling of stepping into a world filled with shimmering light and laughter. The fragrance was created to capture these memories and sensations through its fresh and enchanting scent.

This fragrance opens with the intense, earthy scent of coffee, a deep and inviting bitterness that perfectly complements the fruity sweetness of juicy plum. This opening sensation is only the beginning, setting the stage for a sophisticated heart where dark chocolate and vibrant raspberry come together as the stars. Here, jasmine adds an ethereal layer, a delicate floral backdrop that enhances the raspberryâs brightness and rounds out the chocolateâs depth with a refined balance, creating a luxurious middle that deepens with every inhale.

description: Born from the flames of love and desire, Melanie Martinez's fire-inspired entry in her Portals collection is a tantalizing blend of innocence and sensuality. Sparkling and seductive, Fiery Passion is a floral gourmand that recalls the delicious confections of youth with a mouthwatering strawberry candy opening, while a romantic pink peony infused with the warmth of avant-garde musks and woods create a complex and compelling bouquet for creative souls of all ages. The perfect companion for a summer fling or a lifelong love, Fiery Passion has everything needed to keep hearts aflutter.

Composed around a comforting cloud of creamy and sustainably-sourced sandalwood, this dreamlike fragrance floats in a soft haven of amber and musk, which merge with lush swirls of vanilla and cocoa to create the perfect sensual elixir.

Sun-kissed coconut drenched in delectable caramel emanates the golden glow of a radiant sun on a distant white sand beach, evoking relaxation, calm, and purity. Mouthwatering, romantic, playful, and deeply soothing, Air Of Clarity is more than just a "vacation in a bottle"- it's a journey to a higher plane of existence.

description: If you weren't around for the Spice Girls revolution of the 1990s, it's hard to explain just how big a moment it truly was. Vibrant, joyful, stylish, and cool, Scary, Sporty, Posh, Baby, and Ginger were a global sensation, with singles and albums at the top of the charts, millions of screaming fans turning out for globally sold out world tours, and ear-catching pop music that still gets played every day. But the best part of all is how they did it- by celebrating solidarity among women and promoting a vision of Girl Power that, despite the carefree fun of the music itself, conveyed a powerful message about confronting misogyny and rejecting the patriarchal control over female autonomy and friendships. In other words, it wasn't just fun music- it was music that raised a generation of girls to believe in themselves.

Amidst this untamed wilderness, golden herbs glimmer nestled within rocky crevices along precipitous cliffs, as if placed by the mountain's own spirit.

Its velvety, slightly translucent skin reveals a melting heart that evokes sunny days in Japanese orchards. The olfactory journey begins here, carried by the pure, gourmand essence of this exceptional peach.

Literally translating to "evening talk," it evokes the warmth of shared stories and laughter, of intimate conversations unfolding late into the night around a crackling fire under the stars, where time stands still and lifelong relationships are made ever more precious.

It evokes the moment of spiritual breakthrough, when mental barriers are burned and the mind connects to the broader, more expansive universe of multidimensional consciousness. A gateway to understanding that physical existence is but one dimension of a much larger reality.

With Power Self, Initio takes that mandate to a higher plane, introducing a unisex musky floral consciously designed and scientifically formulated with ingredients known to have positive aromatherapeutic influence on self-confidence and emotional strength. In other words, Power Self is a real-life vitality potion to reveal the inner power within us all.

After copious research and experimentation, Marlou and StÃ©phanie found inspiration in the sun-kissed tiare flower, also known as the Tahitian gardenia--a richly fragrant flower that combines delightfully tropical sweetness with a lushness made all the more compelling for its subtle undercurrent of indole, the natural component of white florals responsible for heady, dirty, animalic sensuality.

Like a radiant morning when the air is filled with light and promise for the day to come, it opens with the juicy sparkle of grapefruit and the floral tenderness of orange blossom--an invigorating and refreshing duo that mesmerizes from the first sniff. Then, jasmine sambac unveils its hypnotic trail, caressed by the airy elegance of white tea, as light as a spring breeze. With every inhale, its luminous aura pulls you in deeper--impossible to forget, impossible to resist.

description: Close your eyes and imagine walking a jungle path alive with the perfume of untamed plants and ripe tropical fruits. Tulum Junglescape transports you to a place of lush natural wonder in the unforgettable Yucatan Peninsula. Refined and vibrant, this dynamic scent opens with a fresh citrus burst of minty lime, blended with invigorating sea salt and smooth, gently earthy green tea. Delicate tiare and sweet ylang-ylang flowers join natural green and floral oils in an olfactory trek through the verdant tropical jungle along the azure sea. As you inhale the heady floral notes, you can feel the warmth of the Mexican sun on your skin and hear the calls of the exotic birds in the treetops. In the warm,  long-lasting base, the precious aromas of rare woods ground you and instantly lift your mood, whisking you to a place of pure tranquility and joy, far removed from the stress of everyday life.

This enchanting scent opens with a sweet and inviting blend of loukoum and crisp red apple, instantly evoking the lush gardens of the imperial palace and the vibrant energy of a thriving court. The initial burst of sweetness is further enriched by the exotic warmth of palm dates, which adds a rich, almost decadent note reminiscent of the sumptuous feasts enjoyed by the sultan and his guests.

The fragrance opens with delicate notes of fenugreek, black currant, lavender, and blue chamomile, evoking a sense of calm and introspection. This is the inspiration for EUCALYPTUS 20, the unambiguous scent of vastness, where the freshness of eucalyptus and cedarwood is softened by the leathery warmth of labdanum and grounded on a bed of musk notes and frankincense. description: Sun-drenched spring air infuses the tangle of timbers the beavers call home, inviting the family to venture from their cozy den. A sparse winter diet of dry buds and twigs gives way to a juicy salad of fresh waterlilies and leaves. The drive to build is awakened and soon the industrious carpenters are hard at work. Yet over the rustle of branches and the slapping of tails on wet mud, a hammering is heard. In a nearby maple forest, farmers tap thick trunks, creating channels through which sugar-laden sap can flow. Unfazed, the beavers toil on. In tandem they work, the beavers crafting lodges while farmers harvest sweet sap, guiding it to a sugar shack where alchemy will transform it to a rich, golden syrup.

This initial spark gives way to a heart of richness, where the deep, succulent aromas of dried fruitsâraisin, Davana and Black Teaâintertwine with the bold and intoxicating scent of aged tobacco. Here, the smoky, earthy nuances of fine cigar leaves meld seamlessly with the warm, spiced embrace of rum, creating an alluring accord that is both seductive and enveloping.

description: While frankincense draws its origins trees found in South Asia, the Middle East, and the Horn of Africa, it takes its Latin name of Boswellia from a source thousands of miles away- Scottish botanist William Roxburgh, who named it in honor of his friend Dr. John Boswell. With that unlikely connection in mind, Boswellia Scotia is a uniquely Scottish take on incense, built for the bracingly crisp air of autumn and the deep cold of winter in Edinburgh. Atmospheric, with enough warm richness to provoke a nuzzling sensation but also a striking inherent undulating freshness, Omani-harvested Hojari frankincense is the star ingredient, presenting a silvery incense profile that feels worlds apart from the cold austerity of ceremonial or church-y incense fragrances. Instead, Boswellia Scotia is both dense and warm but simultaneously weightless, with aromatic, amber, and woodsy elements providing layers of luxurious smoothness that only serve to highlight the exceptional quality of the frankincense. Rich, deep, and ethereal, Boswellia Scotia is a superior incense for those looking for a truly exquisite experience.

Each spritz transports you to a patisserie, where rich, edible aromas dance through the airâa truly luxurious and sensual gourmand experience.

style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Why does debauchery get such a bad reputation? Sure, it's defined as "excessive" indulgence in sensual pleasures, but when it comes to pure, unadulterated pleasure, isn't indulgence kind of the point? And while every delectable fragrance in the Kyse collection offers a mouthwatering gourmand experience, there's truly nothing quite as unapologetically indulgent as Vanille Debauche, a fabulously rich and warm vanilla perfume only available in a single small release once per year. Why? Because all that intense vanilla presence is painstakingly developed over the course of a long and exacting process- first, vanilla bean pods are sliced, soaked, and carefully macerated for a staggering five months, producing a vanilla tincture of unparalleled depth and sophistication. Once complete, that pure vanilla tincture is blended with davana- known for its sweet, boozy, dried fruit characteristics, enriching the vanilla's tropical and epicurean facets. Styrax resin lends its warm, vanillic, sensual touches, and a beautiful beeswax absolute in the base rounds out all the edges. Could you get by with a vanilla fragrance less meticulously constructed, less excessive, less indulgent? Sure, we suppose you could. But where's the fun in that?

Early releases need to be painstakingly shepherded through concept and development to ensure that they shape a strong, identifiable brand that will resonate with the sophisticated and demanding niche community. But for the few houses dedicated, talented, and lucky enough to achieve this success--what comes next? How does a house maintain their hard-earned identity while still breathing fresh life into their creations? Perhaps, if that identity is distinctive enough, the next big thing will simply find you.

name: Vivid Discovery Set
description: Explore the sunny side of Liis with this specially curated collection of their most luminous, playful, and bright fragrances- if you love fruity, fresh, clean, or sparkling scents, don't miss it.

name: Unseen Discovery Set
description: Discover the sultry, sensual side of Liis with this specially curated collection of their deepest, most mysterious scents- fans of all things woody, resinous, musky, and spicy, this one's for you.

name: Osmo
notes: Orange, Marine, Pink Pepper, Jasmine, Orris, Cedar, Oakmoss, Musk
description: Osmo is inspired by Reynisfjara Beach, with its distinctive black sands, huge basalt columns and massive waves crashing onto the shore. Osmo has a marine strength that makes you feel invigorated, like after a walk on the beach with the base notes bringing a sense of comfort. Wild nature and the power of the elements are captured in this contrasting fragrance. Starting with the water elements, marine accord enhanced with orange and pink pepper. The floral heart has a discreet touch, ending with a woody backdrop reminiscent of the wildness of the Icelandic landscapes that contrasts the marine top with an energizing breeze.

name: Oud Boost
description: Oud Boost is the best kept secret to elevate your perfume to new heights of sophistication and distinction. This fragrance enhancer from our Xponential range is much more than just an additive. It is an olfactory experience that transforms and elevates the elegance and longevity of any fragrance to the maximum.

It is thanks to a contact of the founder â sourcing expert â that we were able to evaluate a piece of extremely rare Oud heartwood, from the cellar of a collector in the Middle East, and originating from a private plantation in Cambodia.

style: Boozy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: New York Cityâs Studio 54 has become the symbol of the â70s club scene, the pinnacle of hedonism where the jet-set and celebrities mingled with uproarious results. The Fifty Four eau de parfum from Jusbox pays homage to this era of bacchanal abandon, the scent crafted as a collaboration between master perfumer Julien Rasquinet and The Perfume Guy as an example of what olfactory indulgence might be worn to the club today. Creamy piÃ±a colada accord blends with cardamom and davana for a sweet blast of excitement, while the strong, weighty notes of rhum, vanilla, sandalwood, tobacco and patchouli transform the bass vibrations of the underground scene into an energetic aroma.

As we cross these tropical expanses, each note of this unique fruit is imbued with the essence of the place, promising an explosion of exotic sweetness that will mark the beginning of our sensory escapade.

name: Sniff Sniff: Exploring Asian Fragrance Houses
description: The Perfumed Pages debut series takes you on a sensory exploration into the world of Asian fragrance houses, featuring 6 select samples:

name: APOM
notes: Orange Blossom, Lavender, Ambery Woody Accord
description: Maison Francis Kurkdjian

name: Mojave Ghost Absolu
description: BYREDO

name: Oud Indochine
notes: Cardamom, Red Saffron, Vanilla, Frankincense Sacra, Labdanum, Myrrh, Beeswax, Guaiacwood, Oud Hindi, Oud Kinam, Oud South Thailand, Chocolate, Cocoa, Tar, Ambergris
description: An olfactive tribute to French Indochina, Oud Indochine brings together perfumers Maksim Bortnikov and Rajesh Balkrishnan to recreate the smell of sea bound voyages from ports like Saigon in the late 1800s when ships would be laden with treasures from the east heading to western shores of Paris. The scent combines eastern spicy notes and western aromatic and gourmand notes in a deep woody base accentuated with precious oud from Thailand and  Vietnam to create a deep mystical aura, an unforgettable scent of a bygone era of long haul voyages of trade ships from the east to the west.

name: On A Cloud
notes: Peppermint, Vanilla, Sugar, Milk
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: J-Scent

name: Dolce Sonata
notes: Apricot, Raspberry, Lime, Sweet Orange, Bergamot, Osmanthus, Lily Of The Valley, Jasmine, Incense, Rose Petal, Patchouli, Musky Notes, Face Powder, Cotton Candy
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Dolce Sonata pays homage to the enchanting world of classical music and the resonance of a captivating voice, beckoning you on a sensory journey that transcends the ordinary. Step into a sunlit haven, secluded from the bustle, where apricot and raspberry trees sway in harmony, their melodies harmonizing with zesty notes of lime, sweet orange, and bergamot. Within this tranquil oasis, the fragrance unfurls its captivating tale, echoing the timeless allure of a musical masterpiece.

name: Desert Dawn
notes: Cardamom, Rose Petals, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Carrot Seeds, Papyrus, Vetiver, Silk, Musk
style: Floral - Spicy, Spicy, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: Creativity can thrive in isolation. Like in nature, the imagination ebbs and flows. Desert Dawn transports the wearer to the open terrain of the vast expanse â a place one can visit in their mind, where a new idea comes forth at any given moment just as the dawn.

name: Fleur Eclair

style: Floral, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Inspired by the longing between what we crave and what we savor, Fleur Eclair delights and tantalizes with every elegant note.

name: Yue Tu
notes: White Tea, Jasmine Tea, Sweet Orange, Osmanthus, Mandarin, Peach, Cedar, Musk, Mango, Iris, Grass, Lily Of The Valley, Pomelo, Bitter Orange, Chrysanthemum, Chamomile
style: Floral, Floral - White
description: Osmanthus holds mythological significance as the Tree of the Immortals in some cultural narratives. The Tree of the Immortals is a concept found in various mythologies and folklore, symbolizing eternal life, wisdom, and spiritual transcendence. Yue Tu is a fragrance that draws inspiration from the captivating tale of Changâe, the moon princess, and the mythical rabbit residing on the moon. This perfume aims to encapsulate the essence of the moon, osmanthus flowers, and the enchanting atmosphere associated with the lunar realm.

name: Concrete Forest
notes: Hassaku Orange, Galbanum, Concrete, Mint, Mandarin Orange Blossom, Japanese White Magnolia, Green Tea, Angelica Seed, Lily Of The Valley, Mountain Air, Orris, Cucumber, Cedarwood, Gingko Leaves, Ivy Leaves, Bamboo, Moss, Camellia
description: Concrete Forest transports you to the heart of Tokyoâs urban landscape, where the juxtaposition of nature and city life creates a unique harmony. It is an olfactory journey that embodies the spirit of seeking spirituality amidst the chaos of a busy lifestyle. Concrete Forest opens with a luminous combination of greenness notes derived from Ginkgo leaves, bamboo, and galbanum. These fresh and vibrant notes evoke the image of bright green foliage along the streets, infusing the scent with revitalizing energy. As the main star, Ginkgo leaves have a unique fragrance that can be described as both herbal and slightly nutty. The scent carries a subtle hint of sweetness, reminiscent of freshly cut grass or green foliage. The base notes of âConcrete Forestâ feature a blend of concrete and moss. This combination represents the harmonious coexistence of nature and the urban landscape, creating a captivating contrast.

name: Melipona
notes: Bourbon Vanilla, Cashmere Wood, Amber, Crystal Amber, Musks, Vanilla Sugar
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: Vanilla originated in Mexico, where the Aztecs used it to soften the bitterness of chocolate. There were many European attempts to cultivate the pods outside of its original cradle. Louis XIV fell in love with it and wanted to cultivate it on Bourbon Island, in Reunion. But all attempts under his reign failed. No one knew how to fertilize vanilla outside its native range. Europeans were unaware that the Mexican bee Melipona was responsible for pollination. Indeed, thanks to it, the orchid provides a long, green fruit commonly called a vanilla pod.

description: SuprÃªme Nectar is a fragrance with almond as its main note. Native to Western Asia, the almond tree has been cultivated for 5,000 years. Between February and March, the buds open and form magnificent white and light pink flowers.

name: Untamable
notes: Leather Saddle, Tonka Resin, Saguaro Blossom, Texas Yellowstar, Cumin, Tumbleweed, Paso Fino
style: Animalic, Earthy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Have you ever had a love so wild that you couldnât hold on? At its core, Untamable is a love story born in the springs, waterfalls, and Indian Paintbrush covered fields of Texas Hill Country. Itâs a classic western told through the lens of the new west, about the kind of love that stays up late after the honky tonk on Saturday night and is still up early for church on Sunday. Itâs a story populated by modern day rabble-rousers, bandits, and outlawsâa compassionate waitress, an indigenous rodeo star, a bluegrass playboy, a female long-haul trucker, an up-and-coming rap artist, a queer sheriff, mischievous bachelorettes, and German tourists looking for the ârealâ Americaâall of them with one thing in common: theyâre each untamable in their own way. When the sun sets on this cautionary tale, it wonât be hard to see yourself in each of them.

description: When AurÃ©lien Guichard first conceived of Extrait versions of the most popular entries in the Matiere Premiere collection, he knew that they had to be more than your average flankers. After all, the originals are already known for being built around a generous dosage of a precious natural central ingredient. So for the Extrait Collection, in addition to an increased concentration of both the overall fragrance and a specific increase in the dosage of the main ingredient, each Extrait has been given a bold new twist of a carefully selected new guest ingredient, chosen to work specifically with those characteristics enhanced by the stronger concentration to create something distinctive and unforgettable.

name: Saint Honore
notes: Bergamot, Pepper, Hazelnut, Orange Flower, Milk, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Musk, Dry Amber
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Sweet, Woody - Amber
description: A captivating perfume inspired by the delicacy and sophistication of the famous French pastry, Saint-HonorÃ© is an invitation to happiness. With its refreshing character, the perfume is unveiled by bergamot opening like a sunrise on a garden of citrus trees â a citrus note skillfully enhanced by a spicy touch of pepper. A symbol of purity and beauty, orange blossom brings a floral sweetness transporting us to the heart of a flowering orchard. Hazelnut, with its warm roundness and a milky chord, recalls childhood memories of freshly made pastries. The lingering trail of the perfume is a deep, rich balance in which musk pairs with vanilla to offer a creamy, enveloping texture. With its bittersweet nuances, the tonka bean adds a fascinating complexity and a last hint of sweetness.

name: Macaron Bourbon
notes: Bitter Almond, Davana, Rum, Rose, Cinnamon, Clove, Caramel, Patchouli, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Musk
style: Creamy, Floral, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Macaron Bourbon is an exquisite, fragrant creation, an ode to sensuality and sophistication. From the very beginning, it seduces you with a gourmand note of bitter almond with a sweet rum facet, softened by caramel, whose smooth, comforting sweetness creates a veil of delight on the skin. Cinnamon and clove intertwine, offering a spicy warmth reminiscent of spellbinding aromas of pastry coming out of the oven. Davana, its nuances both sweet and slightly tart, adds a fruity and high-quality aspect. Macaron Bourbon also reveals an intoxicating mix of patchouli, vanilla and tonka beans, creating an addictive velvety feel. This smooth, powerful combination is enhanced by the subtle presence of rose which adds an elegant, refined floral touch, perfectly balancing the indulgent, sweet notes.

name: Pavlova
notes: Pineapple, Passionfruit, Rum, Peach, Coconut, Raspberry, Cedar, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Musk
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: A daring, innovative scent inspired by the lightness and delicacy of the famous dessert of the same name, Pavlova is a celebration of sweetness and freshness, evoking the grace of a dance between sweet and sour flavours. Pavlovaâs theatrical opening is an invitation to discover the tangy gourmet notes of sparkling pineapple, passion fruit and coconut, creating an unapologetic sense of the exotic. There is also a raspberry note whose rich, fruity nuances have a surprising depth. This sweet and slightly bitter red berry adds a fascinating intricacy, balancing the lightness of other fruity notes such as peach. Pavlova is a fragrance enhanced by a combination of woody notes like cedar and sandalwood, a reassuring contrast to the light, fruity notes. Vanilla and musk harmoniously entwine to sign this original composition recalling the airy, melting meringue of the Pavlova.

name: Palatine
notes: Mandarin, Bergamot, Pear, Violet Petal, Lavandin, Musk, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Floral, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft
description: Palatine is an audacious feminine scent that will revolutionize the way you smell violet petal. Sophisticated yet playful, delicate yet radiant, this tribute to the legendary 18th century royal pays tribute to her legacy as the "Grandmother of Europe" by presenting a fragrance that embraces a traditional ingredient- violet- and turns it into something dynamic, invigorating, and modern.

name: Glow
notes: Pink Pepper, Rose, Incense, Benjoin, Vanilla
style: Warm, Woody - Amber, Woody Ambery Floral
description: GLOW is Akro's addictive party fragrance. One of the reasons we go to parties is the chance to be noticed, admired, or possibly seduced. At their best, parties allow us to become movie stars for the night, bringing people into our orbit and watching them gaze adoringly at us. To attract people, you need to dress beautifully and style your hair perfectly, but the truth is, nothing pulls others towards you like the power of scent.

People stand up for their ideals in here, drawing a better future. A warm voice moves the heart and prays for freedom, accompanied by shrill notes of harmonica.

Music soundtracks the emotion of the moment and gives life to memories. A reggae groove brings body and mind into the same rhythm and reinforced by the pulsing downbeat creates an evanescent, impalpable atmosphere. A gentle breeze brings the memory of distant blues; the unbearable lightness of being.

name: Cheeky Smile

style: Avant-Garde, Woody - Amber

DJs are the spiritual guides of this cultural movement, a youth revolution that is consecrated during musical liturgies that are synthesized and reproduced on a TB-303 base. House musicâs rituals take place in spots chosen by its disciples, the young. The Word: everlasting fun.

It is the birth of the Bossa Nova. Not just new harmonies but an attitude, a way of being, in which melancholy is beauty and life.

description: Oud Malinau is crafted using wild agarwood from the island of Malinau in Indonesia. This wood is not plantation-grown but sourced from the wild, making it rare and special. The Indonesian oud aroma is distinct from its counterparts from other parts of Southeast Asia. The oil used in this perfume is distilled from wild agarwood trees, which are gradually disappearing. In the coming years, sourcing such wood will become impossible, so Bortnikoff is stockpiling it to continue creating this unique scent.

notes: Grass, Peach, Bergamot, Lily Of The Valley, Hay, Leather, Metal Tack, Vetiver, Amber, Musk, Fir, Tobacco

Then the reward of a sun-ripened peach, hoofs crunching the sea of wild lily of the valley beneath the tree. Never far from an illicit tryst in the stables on a bed of hay.

description: Discover the fresh, joyful, unique compositions of Le Jardin Retrouve with this exclusive discovery set collecting 2ml mini sprays of the following scents:Violette Kew, Osmanthe Lin Yuan, Mousse Arashiyama, Verveine d'Ete, and Citron Boboli.

name: Osmanthe Liu Yuan
notes: Mandarin, Blackcurrant, Green Notes, Osmanthus, Jasmine, Iris, Peach, Apricot, Patchouli, Leather, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus
description: You stroll along the galleries of this millenium garden, savouring the different landscapes that reveal themselves to you as you move forward. You approach the water and encounter upright rocks with evocative shapes. On one of them stands a precious bottle. When you open it, a scent escapes. Its notes of osmanthus, peach, leather, jasmine and iris fill your heart with memories and stir your imagination Life here takes on its true meaning.

notes: Bergamot, Frankincense, Lentisque, Aquatic Notes, Fig Accord, Oakmoss, Vetiver, Cedar
style: Earthy, Fresh - Aquatic, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: You walk in this forest as in a sacred place. Cradled by the softness of the moss, your steps obey an old instinct, a deep intuition. At the bend of the trail, your eyes finally meet this powerful tree you know, but whose name you do not remember. Your soul, freed from gravity, subtly separates itself from the ground and lingers to savor the scents of oak moss, patchouli, lentiscus and frankincense.

When you smell them, the scent of violets is revealed. Like a second skin, mysterious accords of cumin, sandalwood and cardamom envelop you in their sweetness. The caress of the air smells like rediscovered childhood.

name: Neroli Botanica
notes: Turmeric, Ginger, Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Neroli, Jasmine, Orange Blossom, Vetiver, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Spicy, Floral - White, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Essential Parfums has become an instant legend in the world of niche fragrance for delivering dynamic, artistic, alluring fragrances that feature impressively high-quality and eco-friendly materials at an unbeatable value. And for their 10th creation, they invited master perfumer Anne Flipo to create a new take on one of the most iconic flowers of perfumery: orange blossom. And what a take it is- inspired by the thousand subtle nuances of orange blossom, Neroli Botanica is a thrillingly androgynous floral perfume, spicy, vibrant, and full ofjoie de vivre.

Inspired by their intimate connection, it captures the essence of long summer days, a warm leather saddle, and the sweet meadow breath of her horse. The fragrance intertwines notes of leather, opoponax, labdanum, and vetiver to evoke the rich scent of a well-worn saddle and the sensual aroma of a horse's coat. With a subtle hint of saddle soap accord, reminiscent of the tender care lavished upon a faithful companion. Epona is a nostalgic ode to the timeless bond between horse and rider held in nature's embrace.

name: Thailand

description: Green and red, neon or spice, Thailand is always summer. The riverside night market at the wharf sells cheap snacks and hot soup, and the spoons from the boat river are poured on the freshly cut spice leaves. Tourists with sore necks hang their cameras on the avenue, and teenagers in undershirts follow the tails of their families.

Always positive though, with some of the most commonly encountered being: breath (humanâs breath with the help of lungs), pleasant air current, force of wind and also inspiration.

description: Laid back and sensual, Soft Focus invites you to lounge by the pool on a perfect summer day. A juicy splash of guava and pineapple kicks off the opening, with lime and a hint of chili keeping things interesting, like the best tropical drink at a sophisticated resort.

description: Jeroboam

name: Escentric 05 Body Lotion
description: Escape to an island getaway with the Escentric 05 Body Lotion. Experience the radiant warmth of Cashmeran intertwined with pine resin, bergamot, orange, rosemary, and delicate fig notes. Immerse yourself in the essence of Mediterranean summers with every application, and let this fragrance-rich lotion transport you to sun-drenched vistas.

name: Escentric 04 Body Lotion
description: Elevate your senses with the Escentric 04 Body Lotion. Enriched with refreshing pink grapefruit peel and juniper notes, its hydrating formula deeply nourishes the skin, leaving behind a subtle scent of lime zest, pink pepper, and rose. Experience the invigorating psychedelic freshness of Escentric 04 Body Lotion, a perfect blend of fragrance and hydration for your skin.

name: Escentric 03 Body Lotion
description: Immerse yourself in the luscious scent of Escentric 03 with our luxurious Body Lotion. Crafted around a smooth, woody aroma-molecule Vetiver and invigorating grapefruit accent, it's infused with fresh lime peel, ginger, green peppercorn, and musk, enveloping your skin in the herbaceous notes of our greenest scent offering.

name: Escentric 02 Body Lotion
description: Feel the revitalising touch of Escentric 02 Body Lotion, centered around Ambroxan, a  sensual amber molecule that exudes a clean, mineral freshness. Enriched with green jasmine bud (hedione) and a sparkling 'gin + tonic' accord, this ultra-crisp lotion offers all over rejuvenation for a truly revitalizing experience.

name: Escentric 01 Body Lotion
description: The cult-favorite Escentric 01 Body Lotion is as sensual as you'd imagine, and the scent likely needs little introduction. This Escentric 01 Body Lotion blends Iso E Super with the warmth of spicy pink pepper, the zesty freshness of lime, and a hint of gentle balsamic notes that linger gracefully on your skin, resulting in a long-lasting and intoxicating veil of  scent.

name: Elle Anniversary
notes: Bergamot, Green Apple, Lychee, Jasmine, Peony, Cashmere Wood, Musks, Amber
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Fruity, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A celebration of the much beloved XJ Elle, the very first perfume created for the legendary Xerjoff 17/17 collection, Elle Anniversary is an enchanting and richly sensual feminine floral that captures the true spirit of the original.

name: Al-Mendoos
description: After close to 4 years of aging our very own extraction of osmanthus blossoms, it's time to share it with the world and unleash one of the most beautiful fragrances Agar Aura has ever created. If Layali reshaped what people think of the oud-rose combo, Al-Mendoos defines the oud-osmanthus love affair. You haven't smelled something like this, guaranteed. A "mendoos" in Arabian tradition is a chest of gifts presented to the bride. Our Al-Mendoos extrait is the spray version of our popular oil attar with the same name from a decade ago.

name: Private Teahouse

style: Earthy, Floral - Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh

description: Embrace the artistry of Musk Couture, a fragrance that adorns the skin with a rich, textured mosaic of scents, inviting you to discover the profound beauty and complexity of the worldâs natural wonders and artisanal traditions. With Musk Couture, every moment becomes an opportunity to explore the depths of your own sensuality and the boundless possibilities of fragrance.

name: Cafe Mystique
notes: Bergamot, Kopi Luwak Coffee, Black Pepper, Frangipani, Cardamom, Ylang-ylang, Labdanum, Vetiver, Myrrh, Frankincense, Vanilla, Oud, Turkish Coffee, Beeswax
description: Discover a coffee fragrance like no other with the complex, mysterious, and utterly captivating CafÃ© Mystique. A bright and exotic opening whisks you away to the sun-kissed citrus groves of Calabria, where Bergamot sparkles with a light, effervescent quality. The journey takes an intriguing turn with Kopi Luwak Coffee, offering a unique coffee accord that pays homage to Indonesiaâs rich coffee culture. The introduction of Black Pepper adds a spicy spark, reminiscent of the vibrant markets of Southeast Asia, setting the stage for an enticing adventure. The heart notes unveil a bouquet where the tropical Frangipani reigns supreme, its tender blossoms collected in the lush, sun-drenched tropics. Cardamom weaves its spicy threads through the heart, a prelude to adventure from the dense forests of Guatemala. Yiang-Ylang, with its exotic floralcy from the Philippines, and Mediterranean Labdanum, with its resinous depth, interlace to create an enchanting heart, rich with complexity and warmth.

name: Amber Balsam
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, Clove Leaf, Gurgan Balsam, Cinnamon, Ylang-ylang, Ruh Khus Vetiver, Green Team, Copaiba Balsam, Tolu Balsam, Peru Balsam, Ambergris, Oud, Labdanum
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: Discover Amber Balsam by Maksim Perfume, a fragrance that embarks on a journey through the worldâs natural wonders, from the sun-kissed citrus groves of Calabria to the spiritual depths of Thailand. Each note tells a story, and every accord reveals a discovery. The fragrance unfolds with a bright burst of Calabrian bergamot, carried by winds from the southern shores, while spicy Guatemalan cardamom and Indonesian clove leaf add a spicy warmth, reminiscent of the first rays of the morning sun. An adventurous heart reveals the woody tones of Gurgun balsam from the wild Australian outback and refined cinnamon from Sri Lankaâs spice gardens. Ylang-ylang and Ruh Khus (Vetiver) add earthy and warm notes, while Chinese green tea enriches the composition with its freshness and depth. The drydown immerses the wearer in a mysterious world with rare and precious ambergris, adding a unique maritime saltiness and earthy sweetness that perfectly harmonizes with the aromatic Copaiba balsam from the depths of the Amazon, sweet Tolu balsam, and vanilla hints of Peru balsam. Oud Siam and musky Labdanum lend this rich bouquet a distinctive depth and longevity, reminiscent of mysterious rituals and ancient ceremonies.

name: REA
notes: Valencia Orange, Chocolate, Indian Night Tuberose, Spanish Carnation, Sandalwood, Vanilla Planiflogia, Ambrette Seeds
style: Woody - Dark, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Mallo

name: Blu Mare

description: Blu Mare captures the invigorating essence of the Mediterranean coast. Imagine the sparkling ocean waves crashing against the shore, the scent of salty air mingled with the freshness of pine trees and the vibrant energy of a sun-drenched day. This fragrance evokes a sense of escape and connection with the natural world.

name: Dream Sequence
notes: Petitgrain, Bergamot, Lilac, Neroli, Ambrette, Musk, Tonka, Vanilla, Soil

description: Dream Sequence is a tornado of lilacs, a swirling rush of greenery, earth and purple petals, painting the dark technicolor of an August sky. As the tornado approaches, it looks like a stunning arabesque and there is the impulse to dance alongside it. In the wake of the storm, you are left soporific and in awe of this natural phenomena, as this ecstatic experience has suddenly gone.

name: Promises, Promises
style: Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Amber
description: Kerosene, will you please make a vanilla scent?!A - Vanilla scent? It's been done a million times!Kerosene, I don't care, please make one!

Harmonizing citrusy bursts, calming lavender, and an herbal embrace, the top notes set the stage for an aromatic overture. As the composition progresses, a crescendo of floral blooms, luscious fruits, and a hint of spicy allure forms the heart notes, echoing the rich melodies of a captivating performance.

This mixed sanctuary is jealously guarded by juicy pear and sweet plum. Sicilian Bergamot extends its hand, leading you into a fruity and edible experience.

The second chapter of the almighty collaboration between the greatest riff master of all time, Black Sabbathâs legendary guitarist and rock composer, Tony Iommi and Xerjoffâs esteemed founder, Sergio Momo.

name: Smile
notes: Bergamot, Raspberry, Sage, Musk
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: SMILE is an addictive fragrance inspired by the pursuit of joy and born out of a unique family connection. Many years ago, as a young girl, Akro founder AnaÃ¯s Cresp asked her father, the Master Perfumer Olivier Cresp, to create a perfume just for her, one that nobody else in the world would have. Olivier set about creating a scent that was as powerful as it was personal, a bottle full of joy for his daughter to carry through life. To do this, he combined notes of Sage, Bergamot, and Raspberry, building a bright and vivid fragrance that could work at any time and any place.

Hypnotic Lotus and dilated pupils, there comes from my fingers like a moan of Geranium, a desire to taste you like a sip of Orange juice. Green.
