To this day, he travels as much as he can, constantly finding inspiration and community in every part of the globe. One of Olivierâs favourite places to go is the United Arab Emirates, a place of deep intrigue and power - and one which comes with its distinct set of scents. For Olivier, this part of the world is forever connected with the scent of oud, the rich and mysterious woody oil that is burned all over this region.

For ComÃ¨te Paradis, both a new interpretation of Milky Musk and a unique collaboration between all three perfumers in the legendary Almairac family (Parle Moi founder Benjamin, his father Michel, and brother Romain), our scent journey spans the globe, building a delightfully cozy blend of New Caledonian sandalwood, West African cacao, and Venezuelan tonka bean atop the signature musk base to create a totally new, blissfully warm olfactory experience. An elegant coconut finish pairs gorgeously with the lactonic sweetness at the core of this almost entirely basenote-driven fragrance, ensuring a gently tropical touch of relaxation.

This exotic botanical is one of the most mysterious and revered essences in perfumery. Meticulously crafted with fig, saffron, orris, and syrupy balsam to reveal both the complex heart of agarwood and its verdant foliage, this woody and gourmand perfume is rich with luxurious intensity and sensuality.

description: Babylon Ballad (No.10) centralizes on labdanum, one of the most prized and earliest incenses of all time. When we started to plan our ballads, we had many raw materials to consider, we wanted to showcase their beauty in new ways that were rarely done in modern perfumery. Labdanum was a bit of challenge to make central because usually in perfumery it is used as a fixative or a very slight trail of amber presence in the dry-down. Here it takes a larger role, central to Babylon, it is a very vivid costar.

People went nuts (pun intended) for it, and now Pistachio is available for fragrance lovers everywhere to enjoy. D.S. & Durga doesn't tend to go gourmand, but this delightful treat is not to be missed.

She embarks on a perilous odyssey to the sea for food. He begins his own monotonous march, packed tightly in a circle of trudging penguins. The Sun governs gold, the precious metal above all others, which symbolizes perfection, the goal to be attained, an image of a new life.

In the hands of Profumum Roma, the creators of some of the most precious and enduring niche gourmand scents of all time, we knew that name suggested something special- and Gioiosa does not disappoint. It's an invigorating, complex, and sensuous gourmand, featuring an intriguing blend of notes both bright and rich, comforting and invigorating, floral and gourmand, all to create a delightfully unique fragrance that spreads happiness wherever it goes.

A gift made from the heart, the big heart of Lorenzo Pazzaglia: a perfume, to little Sveva, on October 12th, the day of her eighth birthday. A gourmand fragrance that portrays with its harmonious olfactory symphony the most beautiful and pure characteristics of childhood: Fior di latte, sweet orange peel and delicate vanilla leave room for cocoa flowers, chocolate, fior di panna, becoming velvety and even more delicious thanks to the tonka bean and toasted hazelnut.

Majestic, it invites you on an olfactory journey between warmth and sensuality. It melts into a trilogy of Indian tuberose, Egyptian jasmine and orange blossom. To this harmony of white flowers is added a spicy facet of pink berries to give way to the addictive notes of Indonesian patchouli and oak wood. An intoxicating and audacious trail with leathery and smoky facets.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540 - Scented Body Oil
description: BYREDO

style: Woody - Fresh
description: Step into the mystique of Chapel Factory's OUD PAGODE, a fragrance that transports you to the tranquil heart of a distant pagoda. The scent reveals an unexpected interpretation of Oud wood, venturing beyond Middle Eastern influences into the solemnity of a Kodo ceremony. Notes of black tea mingle with the delicate florals of lotus and chrysanthemum, crafting an air of serene spirituality.

name: Trompette 8

description: The "extrait de musique" collection aims to describe with incense the many sounds of the registers of the Great Organ of Notre-Dame Cathedral in Paris. Trompette 8 speaks synaesthetically of the trumpet register, belonging to the reed family, one of the oldest organ registers. The first documented attestation of this register is found in a description of a large organ from the first century B.C., placed in a gladiator arena. Reed registers the sound due to the vibration of a tab (the reed) on two walls.

name: Ne Il Giorno Ne L'ora

description: The twelfth fragrance in the monolithic UNUM collection is designed to confront the most heightened of emotions: fear. Almost as per tradition, the starting point inspiring it is an extract from the Gospel of Matthew, the parable of the ten virgins. The story â which also gives the fragrance its name â is that of ten women who prudently save oil so they can burn their lamps as they await the bridegroomâs arrival. We know that of the ten, only five â described as very wise - participate in the wedding party; the others, having gone to find more oil for their lamps, find the door closed to them. âLord, open to usâ, they say upon arriving, receiving the response: âTruly I say to you: I do not know youâ. We also know that, while they were awaiting the groomâs arrival, they too fell asleep, but were ready to wake up and rejoice: "stay awake, therefore, because you know neither the day nor the hour", we read in Matthew.

name: Risk

description: I love Oudâ says Husen Baba, the maker of the Azman house of uber unique scents. âI have been in the business of Oud for so many years and have always been a big fan of what perfume houses have been creating with this fabulous, incredible substance.â

This fragrance is a unique coconut symphony, far from the ordinary sweetness, offering a delightful twist. It reveals the islandâs secretsâthe sun-drenched shores and lush tropical fruitsâall anchored in the grounding depth of sandalwood and precious woods. The perfumeâs essence is a sensual dance, an enchanting interplay of jasmine and grapefruit, evoking the allure of carefree island escapes. It begins with sweet, grassy Pandan leaves, while Nom Maew flower blossom, a sweet and predominantly floral aroma, infuses the scent with a crisp and exotic allure. As the fragrance evolves, mung bean lends a comforting, powdery sweetness, seamlessly blending with the seductive richness of jasmine to create a heart both familiar and tantalizingly opulent. The base rests upon the creamy opulence of coconut milk, a true homage to the Thai desserts that inspired this creation. Sandalwood adds depth and sophistication, anchoring the fragrance in a harmonious balance of sweetness and earthiness.

At the heart, Clary Sage and French Lavender provide fougÃ¨re-like aromatic freshness, seamlessly leading to a suave floral blend (Mimosa, Broom, Jasmine Sambac). In the base, earthy ingredients (Patchouli, Oakmoss, Oakwood, Vetiver) support the composition, while the gourmand vibe is reinforced by Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, and Madagascar Vanilla.

name: Initiation Coffret
description: Dive into the world of Initio Parfums PrivÃ©s through its collections and explore the power of their 6 most emblematic essences, all in generous 10ml travel-suitable atomizer sprays:

name: Damier
notes: Black Pepper, Pink Pepper, Aldehydes, Milky Accord, Jasmine, Cashmeran, Patchouli, Cedar, Sandalwood, White Musk
style: Creamy, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Moving, dancing, playing, pursuing on the giant checkerboard at Les Bains Paris. A mythical place. A trail of perfume. Dance floors, playgrounds. A treasure hunt.

name: Wild Summer Crush
notes: Pink Grapefruit, Red Mandarin (Italy), Green Tea Blend, Fruit Peels, Uhuru Rose Otto (Africa), Neroli (Morocco), Yuzu (Japan), Coconut, Silky Woods, Tobacco
style: Floral - Fruity, Tropical / Beachy
description: "Remembering my summer crushâ¦ Oh, that memory of a hot, sultry, summer night in the fruit orchards of southern Italy. We escaped the crowded party and found refuge amongst the citrus trees and rose bushes that grew in luxurious abundance. All of them were at their peak and exuded intoxicating fragrance into that glorious night. It was an unforgettable encounter; a connection that remains with me." - April Aromatics perfumer and founder, Tanja Bochnig

name: Fall into Stars Oil
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Fall Into Stars is a meditation on the universe itself: dark, mysterious, yet leaving a trail of powerful illuminations. The scent contains a core of pure oud, which gives fallintostars a deep, primal quality, emphasized with amber and labdanum notes. It's complemented by ingredients like pink peppercorn and rosewood, which make the scent dreamlike and ethereal.

name: Bon Viveur
notes: Lime, Lemon, Orange, Mandarin, Bay, Basil, Lemongrass, British Gin, Clove, Pepper, Watermelon, Cedar, Patchouli, Oakmoss, Haitian Vetiver
description: Naughton & Wilson

name: The Lover's Tale
notes: Bergamot, Honey, Mimosa, Egyptian Jasmin, Bulgarian Rose, Peach, Iris Butter, Heliotrope, Leather, Castoreum, Labdanum, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Oakmoss.
description: Francesca Bianchi

name: Anti-Blues
notes: Dark Chocolate, Saffron, Grapefruit, Incense, Resin, Amyris, Cacao Wood, Hay, Tobacco, Vetiver, Leather, Vanilla
description: "In the paintings of Jacques Monory, blue forgives everything. It makes the crime aesthetic, the threat fascination. Bathed in shades of highly desirable blue, urban and contemporary violence paradoxically becomes hypnotic."

name: Trimerous
notes: Carrot Seed, Bergamot, Nectarine, Thyme, Cicely, Pink Pepper, Juniper, Cloudberry, Angelica Root, Orris Butter, Kombucha, Centaury, Suede, Oud, Musk, Ambergris, Styrax, Vanilla, Incense
description: Trimerous is a funny little thing. A triptych of veils shading the finest facets of prized orris root.

name: Bee
notes: Orange, Ginger Syrup, Royal Jelly Accord, Broom, Heliotrope, Mimosa, Orange Flower, Benzoin, Labdanum, Musks, Sandalwood, Tonka, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Exotic, Floral - White, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: We donât usually play favorites. We love all of our perfumes, and their creators, equally. Trust us, we really do. But when a perfume comes along thatâs such a unanimous hit with Luckyscent staff, then we feel obliged to mention it. Bee is just irresistible! Opening with a luscious, jellied orange and a smattering of meadow flowers, the honey accord is both extremely realistic and un-animalic â a rare feat that makes Bee a real contender for the title of the baby bearâs porridge of the honey fragrance genre.

name: Elae
notes: Moroccan Neroli, Apple, Ylang-ylang, Egyptian Jasmine, Loatian Benzoin, Australian Sandalwood
style: Floral, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft
description: Trudon

name: Chinese Tobacco
notes: Bergamot, Tobacco, Red Pepper, Lemon, Ginger, Coriander, Incense, Cedarwood, Vanilla, Tar, Oud, Vetiver
style: Earthy, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: âThere are elements of different legendary movies like Indochine in the fragrance Chinese Tobacco. A reflection of East meets West taking place in the 30âs to 50âs colonial French Indochina. Iâm often captured by these strong contrasts and different ambiances when travelling in Asia. The old and the new. A major influence for the scent was the powerful scene in the movie âApocalypse Nowâ featuring Aurore Clement and Martin Sheen smoking opium.â -Johan Bergelin

name: Capri
notes: Mandora, Bitter Orange, Sweet Orange, Chamomile, Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Sichuan Pepper, Juniper Berries, Mandarine Oil, Mandarine Leaves Oil, Grapefruit, Galbanum, Jasmine, Osmanthus, Ylang Ylang, Orris, Ambroxan, Angelica Seeds, White Musk
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus
description: "I have always been captivated by legendary, trendsetting films. The movie Le MÃ©pris from 1963 featuring Brigitte Bardot and Jack Palance is both iconic and stylish. The fragrance of Capri reflects the ambience of the movie. There are elements of wild citrus trees, orange blossoms, green olive groves, blue skies and the endless ocean that encircles the island." -Johan Bergelin

name: 1900 L'Heure de Proust
notes: Bergamot, Blueberry, Grapefruit, Violet, Black Tea, Tuscan Leather, Mate, Gaiac, Praline, Vanilla, Amber
style: Fruity, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Les Bains Guerbois

name: Adameku
notes: Sweet Orange, Osmanthus Absolute, Jasmine Sambac, Benzoin, Frankincense
description: Di Ser

name: Venom of Angel
notes: Coconut, Olibanum, Black Pepper, Aloe Vera, Sugar Cane, Rum, Ivy, Cedar, White Chocolate
description: Ex Nihilo

name: Vanilla Cake
notes: Almond Powder, Butter Cream, Milky Mousse, Caramel, Yogurt Cake, Meringue, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Montale

name: Silence the Sea
notes: Ambergris, Oud, Tuber, Jasmine, Tuberose, Angelica
style: Earthy, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic
description: Silence the Sea is the true essence of the sea. Forget the horrors of Calone and sweet aquatics â this scent captures all the stony, mineral silence of a deserted beach in winter. Because it is a brand deeply invested in organic, sustainable raw material production, Strangelove NYC was able to source an ethically-harvested (beach cast) piece of ambergris and use it as the star in this composition.

name: Blue Cypress
notes: Blue Cypress Australia, Lavender Bulgaria, Patchouli Indonesia, Clove Indonesia, Star Anise India
style: Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: A sophisticated fragrance of rich woods and exotic spices that is at once invigorating and grounding, Blue Cypress is a journey through a sun-speckled Northern Australian forest as the morning dew evaporates from the soft new leaves of the towering cypress and gum trees.

name: Revolution
notes: Elemi, Angelica, Cedar, Papyrus, Patchouli, Cade, Incense, Cistus, Opoponax
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Spicy
description: Inspired by the chaos in the streets of Paris during the French Revolution, Revolution is a fragrance full of the smells of danger â the peppery smoke of gunpowder mingling with raging fire, leather riding boots, and spilled musket oil. Such accords have the potential to come off as harsh or extreme, but in the experienced hands of British perfumer Lyn Harris, they convey the excitement of battle with a buttery smoothness that makes the scent a breeze to wear.

name: Cedar Woodpecker
notes: Cedar, Citrus, Iris
style: Woody - Fresh
description: The amusingly-named Cedar Woodpecker is a spicy, citrusy cedar fragrance with impeccable taste and noble lineage. At once robust and refined, the rich Virginian cedarwood forms the glowing brown heart of the fragrance, displaying a stoutness of character you just know you can rely on. On top, a turbo-charged cedrat fizzes and snaps like a cable wire loose in a storm â this note is exciting and has movement, charging the sturdy cedar underneath with electricity. The contrast between the sourness of that green citrus and the warmth of the cedar is both exhilarating and comfortable. It just works.

name: Iris Cendre
notes: Bergamot, Tangerine, Orris Butter, Violet, Amber, Cistus, Tobacco
style: Creamy, Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice
description: Enigmatic, elegant and enchanting, the iris is one of perfumery's most treasured ingredients- and also one of its most challenging. So when we heard that Naomi Goodsir's first-ever floral was to be named Iris CendrÃ© (or "Iris Ash"), our hearts began to flutter with anticipation of an Iris fragrance that might transcend convention and offer a bold new portrait of this beloved material. And even beyond our wildest dreams, Goodsir and perfumer Julien Rasquinet have delivered a bona fide masterpiece- a lush, warm, buttery interpretation of iris with a gorgeously restrained hint of smokiness that feels both wonderfully creative, and quintessentially Naomi Goodsir.

name: Italian Citrus
notes: And Oakmoss, Blood Orange, Chinotto, Cold Pressed Lemon, Copaiba Balsam, Green Mandarin, Incense, Musk Ambrette, Violet Leaf
style: Classic Masculine, Fresh - Citrus
description: D.S. and Durga

name: Burning Barbershop
notes: And Hay., Burnt Oil, Hemlock Spruce, Lavender Absolute, Lime, Spearmint, Turkish Rose, Vanilla
style: Classic Masculine, Fougere, Powdery / Soft, Smoky, Sweet
description: D.S. and Durga

name: You Or Someone Like You
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: If Etat Libre d'Orange had set out specifically to make a fragrance that would delight us here at Luckyscent, they still probably couldn't top You Or Someone Like You. Dedicated to our hometown of Los Angeles? Check. Creative directed by our good friend and collaborator Chandler Burr and named after his L.A.-based novel? Check. And most importantly, the kind of fresh, crisply cool niche scent that's oh so wonderfully easy to wear in any situation, yet distinct and head-turning? In a city where deals are made poolside and boardroom meetings might feature more denim than Italian wool, that's a big, important check. While they're keeping the official notes a secret, we're buzzing off You Or Someone Like You's sharp, fruity opening and ultra-fresh mint and floral body--it really does evoke one of our favorite L.A. experiences- sipping a drink on the wraparound balcony of a party palace in the hills, taking in our big, weird, wonderful city.

name: Oud Orange Intense
notes: Coconut, Fruits, Bourbon Vanilla, Oud, Musk
style: Boozy, Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected
description: A beautiful rendering of a dark chocolate Mounds bar in perfume form. The opening notes of Oud Orange Intense are smoky and nutty, bringing to mind a pile of coconut husks smoldering in the ashes of a fire. Creamy musks and bourbon vanilla bring a cocoa-tinted softness to the mix, restraining the beachy exuberance of the coconut, and also its sweetness. What emerges is a dry, woody vanilla with a luxuriously boozy touch, like a log of driftwood rubbed lightly with coconut liquor.

name: FRANK No. 1
notes: Lime, Bergamot, Tomato Leaf, Berries, Juniper, Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Clove; Violet, Iris, Geranium, Lavender, Clary Sage, Mate; Licorice, Labdanum, Atlas Cedar Wood, Costus, Moss, Leather Accord
style: Fougere, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Spicy
description: Frapin

name: Kai - Perfume Oil
notes: Notes Of Gardenia And White Exotic Florals
style: Floral
description: Kai

name: Kai - Eau de Parfum
notes: Notes Of Gardenia And White Exotic Florals
style: Floral - White
description: Kai

name: Kai Rose - Perfume Oil
notes: Gardenia, White Flowers, Rose Absolute
style: Floral
description: Kai is a true phenomenon unlike any other, known for the lush yet clean scent of gardenia, effortlessly captivating. This newly developed scent is Kai's fresh take on the classic rose, and as one would expect, blooms gorgeously on skin.

name: Kai Rose - Eau de Parfum
notes: Gardenia, White Flowers, Rose Absolute
style: Floral
description: Kai is a true phenomenon unlike any other, known for the lush yet clean scent of gardenia, effortlessly captivating. This newly developed scent is Kai's fresh take on the classic rose, and as one would expect, blooms gorgeously on skin.

name: Perfect Veil
notes:
Top: Lemon, Bergamot
base: Musk, Vanilla, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: This was created to smell like clean, naked skin, but honestly, we have yet to meet anyone whose skin smelled this good all on its own. Maybe the skin of an angel? Maybe the skin of a fallen angel, looking for a little trouble? Warm, soft, subtle and extremely sexy, this very wearable fragrance is wonderful on its own and perfect for layering under other scents, as well, to make them warmer and more enduring. A staple on many Hollywood vanities.

A staple on many Hollywood vanities.

style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - White

notes: Blood Orange, Cocoa, Tahitian Vanilla
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Parfums Mercedes

name: Mure et Musc
notes: Wild Blackberry, Musk, Citrus
style: Fruity, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: L'Artisan Parfumeur

name: Noir Exquis
notes: Chestnut, Orange, Orange Blossom, Coffee, Maple Syrup, Ebony, Heliotrope, Vanilla, Tonka, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: The Parisian patisserie is so much more than a simple shop- it's a place of wonder, where exquisite pastry and invigorating coffee aromas set the backdrop for timeless friendships, fierce intellectual debates, lazy afternoons, and chance romantic encounters. It was the last of these things, the idea of love blossoming over eclairs and cafÃ© au lait, that inspired Bertrand Duchaufour to create Noir Exquis, a wondrous new gourmand that combines the mouthwatering scents of a patisserie with a deep, sophisticated, and luminous base of woods and floral amber that sings of attraction, connection and delight.

name: Venenum
notes: Masala Chai, Rice, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Exotic, Gourmand, Spicy
description: Somewhere between exotic and comforting, light and dark, lies Venenum, the Natura Fabularis collection's ode to the beautiful aromas and ingredients of India. Blending captivating notes of deep, smooth sandalwood, milky and spicy chai tea, and steamed rice, Venenum is an intriguing chameleon, oscillating between the mouthwatering and the romantic with delightful playfulness, conjuring broadly painted visions of sunsets over Lake Pichola and elaborately lovely high tea ceremonies, adventures as relaxing as they are exciting. We may not be able to precisely categorize Venenum, but there's one word that perfectly describes it: beautiful.

name: Mirabilis
notes: Ambrox, Incense, White Musk Vulcanolide
style: Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, White
description: Elegant in its simplicity, Mirabilis is the Natura Fabularis collection's and perfumer Daphne Bugey's attempt to tackle one of man's deepest questions- nature vs science- with a clever, fragrant twist. Here, the debate between the rational and the spiritual plays out in Bugey's choice of ingredients, with the natural world represented first via a rich, gently earthy incense, the most fundamental of all perfume ingredients, recalling ancient devotionals and primal understandings. Then, the scientific comes into focus, combining the comforting cleanness of Ambrox with Vulcanolide, a cutting edge synthetic musk with earthy and amber facets. The result is a fragrance that wears lightly, but not weakly- there's an elemental power beneath the surface, humming with clean energy, but also just enough earthiness to never fully leave the natural realm. Part rational, part spiritual, Mirabilis is a true reconciliation between reason and belief.

name: Arcana Rosa
notes: Rose, Cedarwood, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Cade, Labdanum
style: Floral, Floral - Spicy, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: There's no shortage of pithy phrases involving roses and thorns, but you'd never know it by smelling the bland softness of most mass market rose fragrances. Luckily, Arcana Rosa's thorns are front and center, hardened over an open cedar fire and spiked with rooty vetiver and prickly cade. Through the smoke, a lush, beautifully full bodied Bulgarian rose still asserts its beauty, but the woods and resins transmute its strength into something of awe and danger, a rose equally at home on a man or woman. We're not surprised that the Natura Fabularis collection needed a rose. We're simply grateful that they decided that the same old rose just wouldn't do.

name: Tenebrae
notes: Incense, Resin, Sap
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Tenebrae, as the official text from the Natura Fabularis collection describes it, is the scent of a "dark and shadowy forest" so overgrown that light barely peeks through the treetops, and we certainly wouldn't disagree. But in true fairy tale fashion, this forest hides not only mysterious dangers, represented with dark resins and woods, but also mystical wonders, in the form of a marvelously sweet and complex crystallized sap note that combines with a not-too-heavy dose of incense. The result is a fragrance that lifts us upwards, letting us know that the sun is still there, even if we can't quite see it.

name: Histoire D'Orangers
notes: Neroli, Orange Blossom, White Tea, Musk, Tonka Bean, Ambroxan
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean
description: This newest offering from LâArtisan Parfumeur is a radiant tribute to the perfumer Marie Salagmagneâs travels in the valley of Souss, at the foothills of the Anti-Atlas in Morocco. Remembering the sunset atop the earth walls of the Taroudant, the warm light intensifying the colors of the raw land, she remarks, âEach time I think of this majestic landscape, I think of orange tree flower water. A delicate and delicious water, ultra-refreshing and incredibly luminous.â

name: Le Chant de Camargue
notes: Bergamot, Carmargue Rice, Sandalwood Milk
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Light
description: The desalinated marshes of the Camargue region of France are known for the treasured "wild" red rice cultivated there- and the gorgeous pink flamingos drawn to the amber-colored plants. Le Chant de Camargue, the newest from L'Artisan and perfumer Alberto Morillas, captures the unique character of this magical location, delivering a subtle and beautiful fragrance  that evokes the delicately floral, subtly earthy, soothingly creamy aromas one might experience on a stroll through a real rice paddy.

name: La Chasse Aux Papillons Extreme
notes: Linden Blossom, Lemon Tree Blossom, Orange Blossom, Jasmine, Tuberose
style: Floral, Floral - White
description: April Aromatics

description: BORNTOSTANDOUT

style: Floral
description: L'Artisan Parfumeur

name: Iris de Gris
notes: Galbanum, Iris, Pea Accord, Ambroxan
description: A hymn to green in all its forms. "How many times, while shelling fresh peas, have I dreamt of this new green fragrance?" asks perfumer Quentin Bisch. A dream shaped around galbanum, whose scent evokes that of the pea.

name: Vetiver Ecarlate
notes: Grapefruit, Galbanum, Bergamot, Black Currant, Tomato Leaf, Ginger, Vetiver
description: Vetiver Ecarlate showcases the warm summer memory of tomato leaves crumpled between the fingers. A contrast between this green, acidic and fruity scent and the dark, racy notes of vetiver.

name: A Fleur de Peche
notes: Peach, Jasmine, Patchouli
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: J-Scent

style: Exotic, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Costes

name: Loukhoum
notes: Bulgarian Rose Absolute, Comores Flowers, Hawthorn Blossom, Musk., Precious Woods, Vanilla, White Almond
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: A deliriously sweet and addictive fragrance inspired by the Turkish delicacy rahat loukhoum-- a confection of rose petal jam, noor dates and white almonds. Luxurious and dreamy, conjuring up visions of flying carpets, rose-colored clouds and opulent palaces. Rich vanilla and precious woods ease into a soft, powdery drydown that is hypnotically soothing. Warning: this fragrance is habit-forming.

name: Clair Obscur
notes: Absolute Jasmine, Sicilian Night Blooming Jasmine
style: Floral - White
description: A stunning rendition of the one of the world's best loved flowers. Nothing harsh or strident here -- this is a light, transparent jasmine. Ethereal. Lyrical. With a breathtaking purity and simplicity. Enchantment in a bottle.

name: Hanae
notes: Crystalline Musk, Japanese Grapefruit (yuzu), White Petals, Wildberries
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light
description: Keiko Mecheri

name: Sanguine
notes: Citrus, Mediterranean Blood Orange, Musk, Orange Rind
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity
description: Keiko Mecheri

style: Fruity

name: Ume

style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity
description: Keiko Mecheri

name: Loukhoum Parfum du Soir
notes: Benzoin, Oud, Patchouli, Rose Absolute, Tonka Bean, Vanilla Madagascar Absolute, Wardia Rose, White Almond
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: A sensuous take on Loukhoum's blend of rose, almond and vanilla. Loukhoum Parfum du Soir is a distillation of the original scent â like wine made into brandy.  A stunning rose absolute blooms magnificently on the skin, warmed with creamy vanilla absolute and white almond and deepened with tonka bean and benzoin. While the original scent has a cozy, comforting quality, this version feels elegant and more than a little dangerous. The rose is sultrier and spicier and the vanilla is tinged with hypnotic oudh. The powdery aspect is much less pronounced than in the original, although it is still here, giving a velvety softness to the intricate blend as it melts into your skin with a subtle, bewitching sweetness. Seriously addictive.

name: Loukhoum Eau Poudree
notes: Crystalline Musk, DragÃ©e (candied Almond) Notes, Green Of Violets, Narcissus, Orris Powder, Vanilla Madagascar, White Rose
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Whispers and giggles and marabou slippers  â this charming variation on the Loukhoum theme is as unabashedly feminine as a classic pin-up girl. The soft and powdery aspects of the original are heightened and fluffed in this light, vibrant scent.  A fresh bouquet of white rose, narcissus and piquant green violet leaves is sprinkled with candied almond, and cushioned in a pillowy bed of gentle vanilla and musk. Soft enough for any occasion, light enough to wear in warmer weather â this delightful puff of powder and rose petals gives a lovely dose of glamour that makes any day a little nicer. Sweet and soothing and just plain pretty.

name: Datura Blanche
notes: White Datura, Indian Tuberose, Heliotrope, Bitter Almond, Tonka Bean, Vanilla Madagascar
style: Creamy, Floral
description: Keiko Mecheri

name: Makassar (formerly Bois de Santal)
notes: Ambergris, Sandalwood Of Mysore, White Chinese Osmanthus
description: A subtle sandalwood that has all the personality of the wood softened with osmanthus, Makassar is a soft sandalwood with a floral-meets-incense feel that renders it perfectly wearable no matter the season or time of day.   The Indian sandalwood is slightly smoky and perfectly offset by the crisp lightness of osmanthus, while ambergris and tonka lend a touch of sweet warmth.  Never heavy or complicated, Makassar is one of those rare sandalwoods that can be enjoyed in the height of summer or the depths of winterâ¦a truly beautiful fragrance that announces its presence with subtlety and playful sensuality rather than blatant beat-you-over-the-head raw sexuality.

name: Isles Lointaines
notes: Benzoin, Gardenia, Jasmine, Rose Absolute, Sweet Almond, Tahitian Tiare, Tuberose, Vanilla
style: Floral - White

name: Gothic I - Perfume Oil
notes: Indian Patchouli, Madagascar Vanilla, Spice Accord, Tunisian Patchouli, Vanilla Pod
style: Earthy
description: A moody vanilla shrouded in a mist of light woods and patchouli. Sensuous and unrepentant. We picture long hair whipping in the wind, a search by candlelight and a man driven half mad by love. Still, for all of its gorgeous drama, we could wear this everyday. It has the luxuriant skin-caressing softness of a vintage silk velvet cape. Worn over nothing. Voluptuous and mesmerizing.

name: Gothic I - Eau de Parfum

Over time, Iâve experimented with everyone elseâs version of Rose, and even got sidetracked by some others along the way. Now Iâve arrived back at the point I first started, with Rose. Except this time, itâs my Rose.â â Grace CoddingtonAnd what a rose Grace has brought us. Fiesty and flirty, but with a dash of elegance, Grace by Grace Coddington opens with a wondrously fresh, delicately edgy opening of citrus and aromatics, all the while anchored by a youthful but deep rose supported with fruity depth. Vetiver and smooth, musky woods lend character and strength, but this is rose's party, and the lush, fresh, sexy florals are front-and-center to the very last compelling sniff. An icon like Grace deserves no less.

Dry and calm, the cedar note in Kyoto is evident, swirling with the earthy scents of spicy, smoky vetiver and the juniper-meets-evergreen aroma of cypress. Serene and earthbound, Kyoto's quiet power is never harsh; it's a meditative scent, bringing to mind relaxing in one of Kyoto's legendary rotenburo (outdoor hot spring baths) nestled among the legendary cypress trees.

A delicate sparkle, added to the composition by bergamot and peony, is utterly charming. L'Inspiratrice is bound to please even the most sophisticated of seductresses. Very chic. Truly Divine.

name: Molecule 01
style: Avant-Garde, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Molecule 01 is unlike anything you will ever wear. It is one of the most mysteriously alluring scents wrapped in simplicity. For us, the phenomenon of Molecule 01 came completely out of left field. When we first encountered it in 2005, our first impression was that we couldn't smell a thing.  We weren't sure what to think, but we wore it just as the description urged us to do, and didn't really notice the subtle scent on ourselves. The response from others, however, was undeniable.  Each time we wore it, somebody would ask what we were wearing. It was astonishing how predictably this occurred.

name: Escentric 01
notes: Lime Peel, Orris Incense, Pink Pepper
style: Fresh - Citrus, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Second only to its sister scent Molecule 01, Escentric 01 boasts the highest concentration of the aroma chemical Iso E Super ever to be used in perfumery (65%).  The woody nature of this note is joined with top notes of pink pepper, lime peel and orris incense to create a moving fragrance intent on taking you right from the opening to the base in one sweeping, dramatic move. The tart lime and zesty pink pepper are a sparkling shot into the dark heart of Escentric 01's moody, soft wood nature, while orris incense adds a dash of smoky incense and turns up the heat.  Emotional and dazzling.

name: Molecule 02
notes: Ambroxan
style: Avant-Garde, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Ambroxan is the ingredient around which Molecule 02 orbits around exclusively (sister scent Escentric 02 blends the note with others). Natural ambroxan is one of the lusted after components of ambergris, the prohibitively costly, rare excretion of a sperm whale.  To be absolutely honest, when we tried this, we were shocked by its subtletyâ¦and we mean subtle.  In fact, all we can smell is a smooth, skin-like, we-can't-put-our-finger-on-it fragrance afterthought that might as well be our own skinâ¦but it isn't. There is a slight mineral-like edge to it but it's transparent and mildâ¦if you're the type of person who can instantly tell the taste of plain water versus a mineral water like Evian, you'll instantly pick up on the gentle nuances of  Molecule 02. To sum it up, Molecule 02 is very light yet always present and hovering about four inches above where you applied it, especially after a few hours. The term âskin scentâ has never been more embodied than in this perfume and we bet it will both fascinate and confuse perfume lovers for a long time to come. If there's anyone in your life who âcan't stand perfumeâ, you've just found a little bottle of perfection for them.

name: Escentric 02
notes: Ambroxan, Elderflower, Muscone, Orris, Vetiver
style: Boozy, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Salty / Oceanic, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: While its sister scent Molecule 02 is built around the single note of ambroxan (the manmade equivalent of costly natural ambergris), Escentric 02 blends the note with vetiver and the cruelty-free musk imposter muscone. Add just a touch of orris, elderflower extract and the sunny, jasmine-like feel of hedione and it's light, refreshing and yes, even brisk fragrance that sparkles and enchants from beginning to end.  It's the kind of brisk you think of when smelling a freshly poured gin and tonic over lots and lots of ice, only Escentric has a fascinating mineral-like finish that amps things up to super spectacular. It's a wear  anytime, go anywhere type of scent with a very relaxed, unassuming natureâ¦utterly at ease, totally uncomplicated and easy going, we find ourselves reaching for it over and over when everything else just seems not quite right that day.This one's too rich for the office, that one's too citrusy today, I'm not in a patchouli moodâ¦ahhh, here's the perfect one!Escentric 02 fits the bill every time.

description: Following on in the Escentric Moleculesâ tradition of focusing on one or more modern synthetics for the âmeatâ of a fragrance, Molecule 04 focuses entirely on Javanol, a powerful Givaudan sandalwood synthetic that replaces natural sandalwood oil. In the hands of anyone else other than Geza Schoen, this could have been a disaster â Javanol is so potent that even a touch too much is, well, too much.

name: Escentric 04
notes: Pink Grapefruit, Bergamot, Juniper Berry, Pink Pepper, Hedione, Freesia, Osmanthus, Orris, Rose, Javanol, Mastic, Labdanum, Iso E Super, Musk, Ambroxan, Castoreum, Vetiver
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Escentric 04 is very Geza Schoen. If youâre familiar with this perfumerâs work from Escentric Molecule and Anat Fritz to The Beautiful Mind series, then youâll know we mean this as a compliment. Escentric 04 contains Schoenâs signature of turning heavy materials like woods into gauzy, air bound creations with the thoughtful use of modern synthetics like Iso E Super and Ambroxan. Unlike other perfumers who use these materials simply to boost radiance or projection, Schoen uses them as the main building blocks for entire perfumes â and Escentric 04 is evidence, once again, that he is brilliant at it.

name: Molecule 05
notes: Cashmeran
style: Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Light
description: Cashmeran, the sole fragrant component in Molecule 05, has an unusually complex character for a single molecule. It combines a cocooning, musky softness with dry, aromatic woodiness, as well as a sweet and resinous note reminiscent of pine. Since its creation by IFF in the late 1970s, it's been the backbone of hit fragrances across the spectrum, with its sensuous versatility enhancing everything from fruity gourmands to boldly spicy ambers to musky skin scents. Indeed, it's almost hard to believe that Molecule 05, with its hypnotic radiance, is made of just a single aromachemical.

name: Escentric 05
notes: Fig, Bergamot, Orange, Laurel, Rosemary, Juniper, Basil, Hedione, Cypress, Freesia, Iris, Jasmine, Cashmeran, Cistus Labdanum, Musc, Ambroxan, Mastic, Iso E Super
description: "With Escentric 05 I wanted to create a different kind of summer fragrance. Instead of the usual aqueous notes, I was inspired by walking up from the sea on a hot afternoon through dry, aromatic Mediterranean herbs and trees." -Geza Schoen

name: Idole de Lubin - Eau de Parfum
notes: Amber, Bitter Orange Peel, Black Cumin, Doum Palm, Frankincense, Leather, Red Sandalwood, Rock Rose, Rum Absolute, Saffron, Smoked Ebony, Sugar Cane
style: Boozy, Exotic, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Olivia Giacobetti has created a new, adventurous fragrance for heroines who fear no danger and boldly explore hostile, foreign lands in search of unexplored horizons. Alexandra David-Neel, Mary Kingsley, Amelia Earhart, Charmian Kitteredge and Karen Blixen: these daredevil women, who never let fear get in the way of their curiosity, are guided only by their taste for excitement and exploit, their desire to explore the unknown.

name: Gin Fizz
notes: Benzoin, Bergamot, Galbanum, Iris, Jasmine, Juniper Berry, Lemon, Lily, Mandarin, Oak Moss, Orange Blossom, Rose Absolute, Vetiver, White Musk
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean
description: In 1955, one movie star captivated the crowds. To the entire world she was the embodiment of American elegance and her mysterious charm even captured the heart of a Prince. To honor of her extraordinary beauty, Lubin created a perfume which marked the decade: An extremely chic fragrance, sparkling and fresh, evoking that year's most fashionable cocktail, Gin Fizz. Gin Fizz is a fresh and flowery chypre with lemony top notes over an aldehyde and musky base.

name: Black Jade
notes: Galbanum, Bergamot, Cardamom, Rose, Jasmine, Incense, Cinnamon, Indian Sandalwood, Patchouli, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Amber
style: Floral - Ambery Spice
description: Marie Antoinette, the infamous young queen of France -- initially loved by the people for her charm and beauty, she became an international symbol of decadent luxury. Naturally her court had a royal perfumer, Jean-Louis Fargeon, and, naturally, he created an opulent, no-expenses-spared fragrance exclusively for her. Inspired by her rose-filled garden at Le Petit Trianon, this mysterious concoction was kept in a black jade flask which the queen kept with her at all times. Luckily for us, the perfumer had a young apprentice, Pierre Lubin, who paid closer attention to the formula for this elixir than perhaps he should have. Known in the House of Lubin for years as âjardin secretâ, the formula has been newly revived with the help of one of Marie's black jade bottles that had been hidden away by a confidante. Fittingly, it is now known as Black Jade.

name: Itasca
notes: Amber And Canadian Fir Balsam, Clary Sage, Clove, Ethiopian Myrrh, Geranium Flower, Itasca Red Pine (pinus Resinosa), Java Vetiver And Texan Cedar, Juniper Berry And Grapefruit, Mandarin, Marigold, Neroli, Nutmeg, Partak Incense, Tonka Bean
style: Woody - Fresh
description: The scent of North American forest. The Mississippi river finds its main source in the legendary Lake Itasca in the heart of Minnesota. Itasca is reminiscent of the forests covering the American landscape once inhabited by the Algonquin tribes and pioneers exploring the depths of the new continent.

name: Akkad
notes: Mandarin, Bergamot, Clary Sage, Cardamom, Elemi, Frankincense, Styrax, Amber And Cistus Labdanum, Vanilla And Patchouli
style: Exotic, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Akkad is a luminous amber perfume, mystical but also sensual, a descent into the profane pleasures of ancient tyrants, an exhalation of sacred oils and precious spices.

name: Korrigan
notes: Ambrette, Cedar, Cognac, Juniper Berry, Lavender, Leather, Musk, Oudh, Saffron, Vetiver, Whiskey
style: Boozy, Creamy, Exotic, Gourmand, Smoky
description: Korrigan is less harmless than it looks. This caramel wood is no perfume from childhood; it is a scent of intimacy, insidiously musky and irresistible on the skin of a desired being. It is the fragrance of the senses set free, to be shared or saved for intimate moments, when caresses follow on sweet whispers and bodies draw closer. It is an invitation to voluptuousness, to sensuous pleasures, and to fantasies of the most extravagant kind.

name: Grisette
notes: Amber, Bergamot, Cedar, Citrus, Grapefruit, Incense, Iris Concrete, Madagascan Vanilla Absolute., Musk, Rose Concrete
style: Classic Feminine, Floral, Floral - Citrus, Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: In the Belle Epoque, agrisettereferred to the stylish young women employed in droves in Paris' booming sewing workshops. A fixture in the bars of Montmartre and the guinguettes on the Marne, the grisette was flirtatious, fun-loving, liberated, and full of the joie de vivre that inspired so much of the era's famed art and culture. Now as the newest fragrance from the venerable house of Lubin, Grisette is poised to capture the essence of these beautiful, industrious coquettes with a crisp, lush, spirited fragrance that you can hardly sniff without a smile.

name: Kismet
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Petitgrain, Rose Centifolia, Bulgarian Rose, Patchouli, Labdanum Cistus, Opoponax, Vanilla
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Fruity
description: "Folly!" Thatâs how the elderly owner of the Lubin Perfume House, Monsieur Paul Prot, described the elephant-shaped perfume bottle that had appeared on his desk. It had been designed for a princess.  Spiritual and multilingual, Kismet cultivated the mystery surrounding her background. She reigned over the Parisian parties of the Roaring Twenties for a time, then one day slipped away, never to be seen again. All that remained was the memory of the scent that Lubin had created for her.

name: Number One Intense
notes: Cassis, Egyptian Jasmine, Indian Tuberose, Iris, Orange Blossom Absolute, Rose
style: Chypre, Classic Feminine, Floral
description: PARFUMS DE NICOLAI

name: Cap Neroli

name: Baikal Leather Intense
notes: Yuzu, Pepper, Saffron, Leather, Birch, Violet, Rose, Iris Butter, Gaiac, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Tonka Bean, Musk
description: In the seemingly endless expanse of the Siberian birch forests, the majesty and power of nature can leave one with a humbling and awe-inspiring new perspective on where they fit into the hierarchy of the natural world. This breathtaking natural beauty is the inspiration for Patricia and Axel de Nicolai's newest leather scent, a robust yet velvet-soft offering that eschews the garishness of brutal, flashy leathers for the smoothness of freshly-tanned suede, placed expertly in the midst of the crisp and invigorating scents of a wild Siberian birch forest.

name: Angelys Pear
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Cut Grass, Blackcurrant, Pear, Jasmine, Rose, Patchouli, Oakmoss, Musk
style: Earthy, Floral - Citrus, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: For Patricia de Nicolai, nature is the ultimate inspiration. And few fragrances are quite as regal, as inspiring, as downrightmouthwateringas the pear. Since its introduction to Europe from Asia during Roman times, this uniquely complex fruit has been treasured, considered a "fruit of the castle" and a sign of high social distinction. It's this inspiration, specifically as it relates to the Loire Valley of France, where both delicious pears and great castles abound, that serves as the focus of Angelys Pear, named for both the Loire city of Angers, and the lys, the symbolic flower of French kings.

name: Eau de Yuzu
notes: Yuzu, Lemon Leaf, Juniper, Grapefruit, Gaiac, Patchouli
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Gallivant

name: Deluxe 12-pc Discovery Set
description: For over two decades, Parfums de Nicolai has been a pioneer of high-end niche perfumery, producing meticulously crafted scents without compromise. Discover some of their most iconic creations, new and old alike, in this 12-fragrance collection of generous spray samples.

name: Poudre de Musc
notes: Petitgrain, Raspberry, Orange Flower, Hawthorn, Aldehydes, Musk, Sandalwood, Amber
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic
description: While the thought of a classical French powder musk might sound tailor made for retirement age and above, hear us out: Poudre de Musc Intense is so smooth, so airy, and so compellingly sexy that romantics of all ages had best take note. As only Patricia de Nicolai could create, Poudre de Musc Intense is a bouquet of musk on a floral heart of rose, hawthorn and orange blossom dressed in sandalwood. A cocktail of aldehydes stirs up the musky tones to make them more vibrant. Soft as a caress, enveloping as silk and with a bewitching trail, Poudre de Musc Intense is a sensual and comforting elixir for the grandes dames of every generation.

Carnation and violet take over from there, sustained by jasmine and rose absolutes. Musc Intense is an explosive cocktail of musk notes...

name: Rose Oud
notes: Agarwood, Amber, Davana, Lily Of The Valley, Musk, Osmanthus, Patchouli, Raspberry, Rose, Sandalwood
description: Rose Oud opens with a lush and spicy raspberry rose - at once opulent and playful.  The bright fruit, delicate florals, and musky castoreum deliver a scent royal enough for a queen, but a queen with a wild side and maybe a raucous pet tiger.

name: Amber Oud
notes: Agarwood, Amber, Castoreum, Cedar, Cinnamon, Lavender, Musk, Patchouli, Saffron, Sage, Sandalwood, Styrax, Thyme, Tonka Bean, Vanilla
description: PARFUMS DE NICOLAI

name: New York Intense
notes: Amber., Bergamot, Black Pepper, Cinnamon, Cloves, Oak Moss, Pimento, Sicilian Lemon, Thyme, Vetiver
style: Classic Masculine, Masculine, Spicy
description: PARFUMS DE NICOLAI

name: Cuir Cuba Intense
notes: And Civet., Cedar, Coriander, Cumin, Geranium, Hay, Lavender, Liatris, Licorice, Magnolia, Mint, Patchouli, Sicilian Lemon, Star Anise, Tobacco, Ylang Ylang
style: Animalic, Earthy, Exotic, Floral - Spicy, Smoky
description: Why name a fragrance Cuir Cuba Intense when a standard âCuir Cubaâ doesn't even exist? One sniff of Patricia de Nicolai's stunningly complex new tobacco and leather scent should clear that question up. Rich, spicy, floral and animalic, Cuir Cuba Intense is such a gorgeously constructed head-turner that a more modest name would have felt like an understatement.

name: Ambre Cashmere Intense
notes: Amber, Benzoin, Black Pepper, Clove, Labdanum, Lemon, Mandarin, Musk, Orris Butter, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Vanilla Absolute, Violet
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Warm, creamy and deliciously sweet, Ambre Cashmere Intense is a delectable gourmand that marks a bright new era for Parfums de Nicolai- the first scent created by Patricia de Nicolai in collaboration with her son, Axel. And lovers of the sweet will have ample reason to celebrate the new arrangement, as Ambre Cashmere Intense is a richly sugared lemon-vanilla delight with a heart of sophisticated, buttery iris and a warm amber drydown that has us swooning.

name: Incense Oud
notes: Artemisia, Davana, Ambrette, Oud, Coriander, Cypriol, Cedar, Rose, Patchouli, Castoreum, Amber, Styrax, Musk, Incense
style: Animalic, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: Not all oud is created equal. Some is cut with screechy, headache inducing synthetics, while others are harvested unethically, contributing to a potential future where this precious resource will be lost to the ravages of human consumption. But with Incense Oud, Mme. Patricia de NicolaÃ¯ has yet again delivered an exquisite oud fragrance of the highest order, rich with the deep, resinous and evocative aroma of sustainably harvested Cambodian agarwood, here paired against a divinely ethereal incense from the Kingdom of Oman, resulting in a compelling scent with powerful oud presence but a uniquely artistic complexity.

name: Haute Provence
notes: Petitgrain, Bergamot, Lavender, Iris, Musk, Cedar
description: P. F. Candle Co.

name: Le Maroc pour elle
notes: French Lavender, Moroccan Cedarwood From The High Atlas, Moroccan Jasmin Absolute, Moroccan Petitgrain (bitter Orange), Moroccan Rose Absolute, Patchouli, Red Mandarin, Sandalwood
style: Floral
description: Tauer Perfumes

name: L'Air du desert marocain
notes: Bergamot, Bourbon, Cedarwood, Cistus, Coriander, Geranium, Jasmin, Lemon, Patchouli And Ambergris, Petitgrain (Bitter Orange), Vanille, Vetiver
style: Exotic, Masculine, Spicy
description: 'Imagine finding peace in a room, lying on the bed, exhausted from the heat of the day, with the window open, letting the cool air in which still is very dry and  filled with the scents from the near desert and overlayed with the spicy scents of the streets below.'  - Andy Tauer

name: Lonestar Memories
notes: Birchtar, Carrot Seed, Cedar Wood, Cistus, Clary Sage, Geranium, Jasmine, Myrrh, Sandalwood, Tonka, Vetiver
style: Masculine, Smoky
description: Tauer Perfumes

name: Incense extreme
notes: Incense, Touch Of Spices, Powdery Orris, Cedarwood, Ambergris, Frankincense
description: Tauer Perfumes

name: Sundowner
notes: Citrus Sparkles, Cinnamon, Rose, Cocoa, Tobacco, Cypricol, Sandalwood, Tonka, Ambergris, Vanilla
style: Sweet, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Imagine sitting on the terrace on Elephantine Island in the middle of the river Nile, enjoying the warmth of the evening sun, with your cocktail glass bursting with the refracted orange glitter of the magic hour. There is sweet tobacco in the air, and the cozy woodsiness of the night envelops you as the sun dips below the horizon, leaving its dusky glow on archaeological sites that have stood for countless millennia.

name: Golestan
notes: Bergamot Essential Oil, Ylang Ylang Flower Extract, Lemon Peel Oil, Cinnamon, Rose Blossom Essential Oil (rosa Damascena), Absolutes Of Jasmine (jasmine Grandiflorum) And Orange Blossom, Tuberose, Cistus Essential Oil, Patchouli Essential Oil, Amber Gris, Vanilla, Powdery Sweet Woods.
style: Floral - Spicy, Floral - White
description: A striking and sophisticated experience of gracefully blended flowers blooming in timeless manner in a colorful place. The garden greets you with first impressions of fresh citrus and rich ylang. Rose absolute from Bulgaria softens the exuberant doses of white flower absolutes: sensual jasmine, lustful tuberose and erotic orange blossom. The dynamic complexion of these natural absolutes gives rise to an abundant and dynamic floral perfume. The base is rich, with creamy patchouli and amber notes blended into sweet and soft woods. Golestan refers the seductive classics, yet it is an uncompromising modern and original perfume.

name: Incense Rose
notes: Ambergris, Bergamot, Bulgarian Rose, Castor, Clementine, Incense, Labdanum, Myrrh, Orris, Patchouli, Texan Cedarwood
description: Tauer Perfumes

name: Orange Star
notes: Ambergris, Ambreine, Clementine, Lemongrass Essential Oil, Orange Flower, Patchouli, Red Mandarine, Vanilla, Violet Flower
style: Fresh - Citrus
description: There's a special corner of the fragrant firmament reserved for perfumes that go beyond the expected and transcend whatever notions pop into your head when you hear the name or read the notes.  Orange Star is one of those remarkable ones, a special fragrance bursting with twinkling citruses like clementine, red mandarine, lemongrass, and brought halfway down to earth with the barely reined-in lusty notes of ambergris, vanilla, patchouli and the resinous ambreine.  In between the heavens and earth are a clean and unfussy orange flower and a soft, powdered violet flower with just a tinge of wood.  Orange Star bursts with sunny optimism while staying out of airhead territory with a golden incense-like base. A vibrant (and unisex) perfume that's out of this world.

name: Cologne du Maghreb
notes: Ambreine, Bergamot, Cedarwood, Cistus, Citrus Accord, Clary Sage, Java Vetiver Oil, Lavender, Lemon, Neroli, Orange Blossom, Rose Absolute, Rose Essential Oil, Rosemary
style: Cologne, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Natural/Organic
description: Cologne du Maghreb is a robust fragrance that bridges occident and orient, giving refreshing and dynamic evidence that the scents of the Middle East are so much more than just oud and spice. Built around a dynamic citrus accord, fresh like the morning sun rising over a citrus garden in Morocco, Cologne du Maghreb calls on the finest grade of Bergamot and lemon essential oils, combined with other citrus treasures, such as luxurious neroli oil, the steam distilled essential oil of orange blossoms to deliver a refreshing and compelling opening that seduces and enchants in equal measure. Lavender and rosemary essential oils build a herbaceous contrast to the fresh airy citrus choir and join rose absolute, rose essential oil and clary sage, bringing in a green ambery floral line and adding depth and character.

name: PHI Une Rose de Kandahar
notes: Apricot, Cinnamon, Almond, Bergamot, Bulgarian Rose Absolute, Rose From Kandahar, Bourbon Geranium, Tobacco Leaf, Patchouli, Vetiver, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Musk And Ambergris.
style: Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Powdery / Soft, Spicy
description: Phi is a luxurious scent, inspired by a natural extract of roses produced in Afghanistan's rose region, Nangarhar. This rose oil is extremely rare and of highest quality. Inspired by these roses, growing in a dry and rough land, Phi is a rare gem, complementing contrasting lines, rich in natural raw materials that add depth and authenticity. Due to the limited amount of the rose oil, Une Rose de Kandahar is not guaranteed to be available all the time.

name: Au Coeur du Desert
description: If Andy Tauer's masterpiece LâAir du Desert Marocain evokes the open spaces of a boundless desert sky racing above our heads, then Au Coeur du Desert, based on the original cult classic, is its heart - a quietly beating center of gravity bound to the earth. Although it shares with its progenitor the same dry crackle of cedar and resin, Au Coeur is an altogether more intimate affair, with a melting softness that envelops rather than exalts.

name: L'oudh
notes: Laotian Oud, Cypriol, Castoreum, Java Vetiver, Mysore Sandalwood, Morel, Cistus, Musk
style: Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: When someone like Andy Tauer decides to do an oud, you sit up and pay attention. Unlike most other brands, Tauer never jumped on the oud wagon, because he disagreed with the way oud synthetics were being marketed to customers as the real thing. Now, having secured a sustainable source of real oud from a Laotian plantation, itâs time to show people what a Tauer oud smells like. Letâs cut to the chase: this is a smoky, leathery take on oud that illustrates the true darkness of the material without eating you for breakfast. Itâs not only wearable, but addictive and oh-so-sexy.

name: L'Air Des Alpes Suisses
notes: Amber Gris, Tonka, Fir, Birch, Dried Needles, Lily, Orchid, Wild Thyme, Basil, Rosewood, Nutmeg, Mountain Lavender, Lemon Balm
description: Andy Tauer has a singular gift for olfactorymise en scene: fragrances so majestically evocative that you feel transported not only to a location, but into an experience: strolling through a Rahat marketplace at sunset (L'Air du Desert Marocain), ripping down Route 66 in a panhead Harley-Davidson (Lonesome Rider), or looking up at the Southwest sky next to a crackling fire (Lonestar Memories). For his newest experience, Andy invites us to the country where he lives and creates amongst the pristine natural beauty of the Swiss Alps.

name: Phtaloblue
notes: Bergamot, Sicilian Lemon, Bulgarian Lavender, Sweet Fennel Essential Oil, Bourbon Geranium, Orange Blossom, Aquatic Fennel Chord, Gourmand Amber Chord, Dried Tonka Bean, Aquatic Cedar
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Woody - Fresh
description: While everyone loves the sparkling brightness of an aquatic scent, it's hard to deny that the vast majority of them are all a bit... repetitive. So when we say Phtaloblue, with its distinct and invigorating blend of herbaceous and woody aquatic accords, is a breath of fresh air, please understand that we mean that in every possible sense. We'd expect nothing less from one of the most uniquely creative perfumers we know.

name: Cologne Officinale
notes: Basil, Galbanum, Lavender, Rosemary, Sage, Amber, Oak Moss
description: An eau de parfum that captures the essence of a landscape that unfolds into the azure blue Mediterranean. Aromatic, green herbs, lavender, rosemary and sage are woven over a covering of dry woods, oak moss and amber evoke the fusion of Provence with a warm vibrance that is unequivocally Marseille.

description: Palm is truly intriguing and not your typical beach scent.  It is at once creamy and green, sweet and fresh, classic and cutting edge.  Think glamorous high-fashion resort wear spread in Vogue mixed with the lush and colorful tropical paintings of Henri Rousseau.  We know - it's that good.

style: Floral - Spicy, Floral - White, Spicy
description: Jasmine is one of James Heeley's fetish scents. However, it is notoriously ephemeral and the aim here was to enhance its intensity and longevity without altering its natural beauty. The concentration of jasmine absolute and tuberose give this scent underlying accents of red fruit, almost like strawberry. The scent is direct, intense and intoxicating like a sexual fantasy. Pure joy?.

description: In Japan, when the yuzu citrus ripens in winter, traditional baths are taken with the whole yuzu fruits floating in the water, imparting their delightful scent and invigorating the senses. Note de Yuzu, Heeleyâs collaboration with the Tokyo-Parisian fashion house and music label Maison KitsunÃ© takes the yuzu bath as the perfect point of departure to encapsulate British, French, and Japanese influences into a sparkling, soothing, sensual fragrance.

If the opening doesnât put you in an instant good mood, then we donât know what will. Itâs a familiar combination- rose, patchouli, vanilla- but so well rendered that it feels like youâre smelling the combination for the first time. The scent focuses on a bright raspberry rose immersed in a fume of incense and grounded by the warm, rich comfort of pure vanilla.

name: Rosae Mundi

style: Chypre
description: Sometimes a rose fragrance can take a quiet and docile path, blushing and giggling with an innocent and soapy freshness. Classic and traditional - she's a safe bet and a loyal friend. Rosae Mundi is not that rose fragrance, and prefers not to show up to her boring parties. If she did decide to show, she'd kick down the door in a low cut dress and demand a man and a martini.

name: Sorriso
notes: Bitter Chocolate, Bitter Orange, Exotic Woods
style: Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: A delicious and sophisticated gourmand scent built on the always-enticing combination of chocolate and orange. The bitter orange opening is bright and sharp and does not fade away, but melds beautifully with the intense and luscious chocolate note that dominates the blend.  The notes list bitter chocolate, but it does not have the aggressive bite of unsweetened baker's squares. Instead it reminds us of fine, European bittersweet cocoa powder â like Valrhona or Callebaut â rich and dark, with just a hint of sweetness.

name: Orangea
notes: Petitgrain, Bergamot, Mint, Cedar Leaves
style: Floral - Citrus, Sweet
description: Naturalistic, fresh, and yet subtly sensual, Orangea is the smell of a modern Italian Garden of Eden, where young lovers intertwine beneath an orchard teeming with bitter oranges, a passionate embrace devoid of self-consciousness or shame.

notes: Licorice, Bitter Orange, Cedar, Vetiver, Tonka Bean

name: Acqua e Zucchero Body Cream
description: From the house of Profumum Roma comes an exquisite collection of luxury body creams in some of their most beloved and venerable scents. Rich, nourishing and creamy, this lotion contains some of the most powerful and healthful moisturizing ingredients available. Shea butter soothes the skin and is an excellent natural ingredient with ant-wrinkle and and anti-aging properties for the face and body. It also contains Vitamin E, a natural antioxidant. Hyaluronic acid restores connective tissues and boosts hydration into the skin.

style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - White, Tropical / Beachy
description: Concentrated at a whopping 43% of pure perfume oil and playing host to some of the worldâs most exquisite natural floral absolutes, Sabbia Bianca is the Rolls Royce of the Big White Floral genre. The composition is uncluttered, with only four listed notes. Thatâs because when you go to the trouble of sourcing the best and most expensive tuberose, ylang, and tiare, you want their beauty to be able to shine uninterrupted.

name: Tubereuse Couture
notes: Green Jasmine Shoots, Indian Tuberose, Kalamanzi Oil, Papyrus., Sugar Cane, Sumatra Benzoin, Ylang-ylang
style: Floral
description: Created in the spirit of High Fashion, Tubereuse Couture is an exotic and elegant fragrance, which contrasts the creamy beauty of tuberose with the mouthwatering, green sweetness of kalamanzi and sugar cane. The striking juxtaposition starts in the top notes, where the tangy fruitiness of citrus is combined with the languorous floral notes of tuberose and ylang-ylang. Ylang-ylang is apparent at all stages of the scent's development and serves to emphasize and strengthen the velvety, enveloping quality of the tuberose. The sugar cane, on the other hand, adds a fresh aspect to the composition, keeping it from becoming overwhelmingly heady and buttery-sweet, as so many tuberose scents are prone to do. The base notes of Tubereuse Couture are resinous, a little powdery,  and like the rest of this fashionable blend, very refined.

notes: Aloe Wood, Cinchona Bark, Musk, Olibanum, Sky Aldehydes
style: Exotic
description: L'eau Guerriere (âwarrior waterâ) is a full frontal assault on shy little wimpy perfumes with no character.  Guerriere is full-on woody, blatantly sexy (musk) and unapologetically rich and resinous (olibanum).  But it never gets mired down in heavyâ¦ ozonic notes and the crunchy, dry notes of cinchona bark lend a fresh and modern feel to the fragrance and tame its wild nature.  The combination is almost like a fresh incense, and while that's a bit of an oxymoron, we think it suits this fantastic elixir to a T.

name: Alphaora
notes: Blood Orange, Albizia Blossom, Hinoki Sap, Assam Moss
description: Like luminous creatures undulating in the icy sky, the Northern Lights set the polar nights ablaze... Daughters of the solar winds and the Earthâs magnetic field, their ethereal glow gives lichen, moss and snowy vegetation an extraterrestrial aura... Seize this moment, imagine a tree moss metamorphosed by the strange glow of the Northern Lights.
