style: Animalic, Boozy, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: By Kilian

name: Rolling in Love
notes: Almond Milk, Iris, Musk
description: Kyse Perfumes

name: Roses on Ice
notes: Cucumber, Rose Juniper, Musk, Sandalwood
description: As a first-time collaboration with perfumer Franck Voelkl, Kilian Hennessy recreates his wifeâs favorite drink: a most refreshing elixir of gin over ice with a twist of lime.

name: Angels' Share
notes: Cognac, Tonka Bean, Oak Wood, Vanilla
style: Boozy
description: Kilian Hennessy pays tribute to his heritage, as heir to the renowned French cognac-making family and to his predilection for the aromatic intoxicants that keep our glasses chinking all night long. A first-time collaboration with French perfumer Benoit Lapouza, Angelâs Share is Kilian Hennessyâs most personal fragrance creation yet. Inspired by Hennessy's eighth-generation legacy of cognac making, the perfume goes deep into the cellars of the founderâs mind and memory, and into its most mysterious dimension: âla part des angesâ or âangelsâ shareââ a vaporescence of spirits in oak barrels that rises, with time, like a silent offering to the gods.

name: L'Heure Verte
notes: Absinthe, Violet Leaf And Patchouli
style: Fougere, Green / Herbaceous
description: LâHeure Verte is named after the traditional French equivalent of âHappy Hourâ and opens on notes of absinthe essence, with an instant head twist into a nostalgic heart of violet leaf and licorice root absolute. Its dry-down articulates a unique and precisely chosen facet of patchouli that resonates throughout, and blends into a trio of earthy woods along with vetiver and sandalwood.

name: Love, don't be shy - Extreme
notes: Neroli, Orange Blossom, Rose, Marshmallow
style: Floral, Floral - White, Gourmand, Sweet
description: A gourmet pleasure reserved for adults, the iconic Love (don't be shy) is pushed to its extreme with an overdose of Bulgarian rose.

name: Can't Stop Loving You
notes: Orange Flower, Labdanum, Honey, Incense, Vanilla, Jasmine
description: A perfumed celebration of love.

name: Back to Black
notes: Bergamot, Raspberry, Blue Chamomile, Cardamom, Coriander, Saffron, Cedarwood, Vanilla, Almond, Vetiver, Cistus Labdanum, Patchouli, Oakmoss.
style: Creamy, Exotic, Gourmand
description: When you call your scent âaphrodisiacâ, you'd better be fairly sure you're not overreaching yourself. This latest release from By Kilian, is the sixth composed for the house by Calice Becker, is as head-turning a love potion as you're ever likely to spritz on. That is, if you enjoy the velvet-smooth, burning liquid umber of a great cognac and the hay-like scent of tobacco steeped in fruit and honey, or sipping a fine amaretto on a bed of moss. Who doesn't?

name: Intoxicated
notes: Cardamom, Cinnamon, Mocha Coffee, Patchouli, Tobacco, Vanilla
style: Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: No coffee tastes as good as it smells: but this sublime fragrance tantalizes the senses. Addicts crave a substance either as a prop against the harshness of life or to enhance its pleasures.

name: Good Girl Gone Bad
notes: Amber, Cedar Wood, Jasmin Sambac, Musk, Narcissus, Osmanthus, Patchouli, Plum Accord, Rose, Tuberose, Vetiver, Violet Accord
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Fruity, Fruity
description: GOOD GIRL GONE BAD is a composition of fruits and flowers, a perfume as bewitching as bursts of laughter, a barrier moved beyond, a forgotten prohibition.

name: Flower of Immortality
notes: Blackcurrant Bud, Freesia, Iris, Rose Crystal, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, White Musk., White Peach
style: Boozy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity
description: With Flower of Immortality, Kilian pays homage to the Chinese tale âA Tale of the Fountain of the Peach Blossom Springâ. It is recounted that a fisherman from Wu Ling loses his way along a stream and, unexpectedly, finds himself rowing alongside a lush peach tree forest. He decides to explore further and, at the end of the forest, lands at the fountainhead of the stream. There, he disembarks and just steps beyond, discovers a haven of peace, a utopian paradise where people live apart from the exterior world.

name: Playing with the Devil
notes: Benzoin, Black Currant, Blood Orange, Cedar, Jasmine, Lychee, Patchouli, Pepper, Pimento, Rose, Sandalwood, Tonka, Vanilla, White Peach
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Spicy
description: Playing with the Devilis the fourth edition in Kilian's series of tributes to forbidden fruits. Here, as with the rest of the series, he uses the concept of good & evil as inspiration for a modern fruit-led composition. And as with the three previous scents in the series, naughty always wins out.

name: Apple Brandy on the Rocks
notes: Bergamot, Pineapple, Cardamom, Oak, Cognac, Apple Liqueur, Labdanum, Cedar, Vanilla, And Ambroxan.
style: Boozy, Exotic, Gourmand, Sweet
description: By Kilian

name: Vodka on the Rocks
notes: Ambroxan, And Sandalwood., Cardamom, Coriander, Lily Of The Valley, Oakmoss, Rhubarb, Rose
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Marc-Antoine Barrois

name: Mystic Sunset
notes: Cassis, Osmanthus, Jasmine, Saffron, Cane Sugar, Cedar Wood
style: Sweet
description: Setting behind the cliff on the right-hand side of the Positano bay, the view of the huge red disk of the sun has been a source of mystical inspiration for centuries. From Ancient Roman times to the more recent legend of the Divine intervention that created the hole in west-facing side of the Monte Pertuso, the setting sun has always had a mystical connotation in Positano, and this is perhaps one of the reasons it's considered one of the most beautiful sunsets in the world.

name: Eau d'Italie
notes: Accord Argile, Amber, Bergamot, Blackcurrant, Cedar, Citrus, Honey, Incense, Lichen, Magnolia, Musc., Patchouli, Tuberose, Yellow Sweet Clover
style: Fresh - Citrus
description: Eau d'Italie

name: Jardin du Poete
notes: Green Orange, Sweet Orange, Bitter Orange, Grapefruit, Blackcurrant, Petitgrain, Buchu Leaf, Basil, Angelica, Cardamom, Pink Bay, Cyclamen, Lily Of The Valley, Rose, Moss, Immortelle, Cypress, Hay, Musk.
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: Eau d'Italie teams up again with Bertrand Duchaufour for this lyrical interpretation of an al fresco dinner in a Sicilian garden. Orange in every tone â tart, bitter, sweet â is livened up with grapefruit, whose raspy, slightly sulfurous facets are underlined with cassis and the minty buchu leaf; basil conjures the aromatic herbal garden. These green facets, as well as the rosy undertones of the grapefruit segue into the green, watery, rose-like cyclamen, a natural companion to lily of the valley and rose providing a rich, moist, floral counterpoint to the sparkle of citrusâ¦ Immortelle, moss and hay conjure the heat exhaled by vegetation as the sun sets after a warm summer day.

name: Un Bateau Pour Capri
notes: Cedarwood, Freesia, Heliotrope, Musk, Peach, Peony, Rosa Centifolia, Sambac Jasmine, Solar Wood
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity
description: Positano's Hotel Le Sirenuse was by definition the place where la dolce vita was to be found on Italy's Amalfi Coast. For it's 60th anniversary they've created an Eau de Parfum inspired by the glamorous women who have stayed at the hotel. Think Grace Kelly or Liz Taylor on a cool summer morning, head tied in a printed silk scarf, large dark sunglasses, boarding a wooden Riva speedboat headed to Capri, Un Bateau pour Capri.

name: Acqua Decima
notes: Hedione, Lemon, Mandarine, Mint Leaves, Neroli, Petitgrain, Vetiver., White Wood
style: Fresh - Citrus
description: Acqua Decima, as its name indicates in Italian, is the tenth fragrance in the Eau d'Italie collection. Born nearly ten years ago as a celebration of Hotel Le Sirenuse's 50th anniversary, Eau d'Italie has become a collection of fragrances that evokes Italy's many seductive faces: not only summer in Positano, but also the roses of Paestum, winter in Tuscany and Umbria, the spirit of Venice, magnolias in Rome, a garden in Sicily, Capri and la dolce vita on the Amalfi coast.

name: Graine de Joie
notes: Cedar., Freesia, Musk, Pomegranate, Praline, Red Berries, Red Currant
style: Fruity
description: Eau d'Italie believes that the golden thread through Italy's history has always been love. Love for beauty, love for love's sake â and we know it's no coincidence that Rome's secret name at the time of its foundation was actually "Love".

name: Morn To Dusk
notes: Bergamot, Lily, Vanilla, Musk
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Courreges

name: Rosa Greta
notes: Lychee, White Tea, Rosebud, Damascus Rose Infusion, Cedarwood, Ambrox
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light
description: A hidden paradise away from prying eyes - a place to discover unknown possibilities of love and being. For the iconic actress Greta Garbo, this was a marvelous villa in Ravello, a picturesque town above the Amalfi coast, where she disappeared with her newfound lover in the spring of 1938. It was a place to escape the Hollywood paparazzi and fall madly in love.

name: Fior Fiore
notes: Lily Of The Valley, Jasmine Petals, Jasmin Sambac, Ambrette.
style: Floral - Light, Floral - White, Fresh - Clean
description: Alghabra Parfums

name: Easy To Love
notes: White Currant, Fig, White Peony, Honey, Tonka, Ambrette
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous
description: Eau d'Italie

name: Halfeti
notes: Grapefruit, Bergamot, Green Notes, Armoise, Lavender, Cardamom, Cumin, Nutmeg, Saffron, Violet, Cinnamon, Rose, Jasmine, Cypress, Muguet, Leather, Oud, Amber, Resins, Cedar, Patchouli, Tonka, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Musk
style: Floral - Spicy, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Penhaligons

name: The Tragedy of Lord George
notes: Brandy, Shaving Soap, Tonka Bean
style: Classic Masculine, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: "Lord George is a wealthy and respected man, the archetypical patriarch. He seems to emboy the noblest values of the aristocracy- virtue, respect, loyalty and faithfulness."

name: Much Ado About the Duke
notes: Pepper, Rose, Gin, Leather, Wood
style: Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Conforming to the expectations of his class, Duke Nelson married the most coveted girl in London: the Duchess Rose. Yet the Duke is eccentric and unusual, his whimsical airs set society tongues wagging. Rumors abound that his marriage is yet to be consumated!

name: The Coveted Duchess Rose
notes: Mandarin Orange, Rose, Musk, Woody Notes
style: Floral, Fresh - Citrus, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Daughter of Lady Blanche and Lord George, Rose married a Duke to escape the stifling rigidity of her family and to become the Duchess Rose. At first naively romantic, she has now become disillusioned and frustrated in an unsatisfactory marriage.

name: Blenheim Bouquet
notes: Lemon, Lime And Lavender, Pine, Musk And Black Pepper
style: Classic Masculine, Fresh - Citrus
description: A revolution in scent, its sophisticated sharpness cutting through the world of opulent amber-centric perfumes and weak colognes of the era.

name: The Bewitching Yasmine
notes: Cardamom, Coffee, Jasmine Sambac, Incense, White Vanilla, Tahitian Vanilla, Laos Oud
style: Exotic, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Gourmand, Woody - Spicy
description: The Bewitching Yasmine is by all appearances soft and quiet. Yet at the same time, she conducts herself with a rare force. Some, the less determined, would find her distant, maybe cold, but appearances are notoriously misleading.

name: Changing Constance
notes: Cardamom, Pimento, Salted Butter, Caramel, Tobacco, Vanilla, Cashmeran
style: Creamy, Fresh - Clean, Gourmand, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Sister to Lady Blanche, Constance is what one would call a very modern woman. Her opening blend of cool cardamom and hot pimento is modern, to say the least, and is bound to deliver a dynamically fresh and spicy thrill. Still possessing a mild affinity to her favourite childhood treat, Constance can always be found sucking on a butter salted caramel as she twirls her Turkish cigar, clad in perfectly tailored cashmere trousers. Irreverent, stylish, and unquestionably contemporary, Changing Constance isn't a fragrance for every woman, which is assuredly exactly the way she likes it.

name: Quercus
notes: Lemon, Lime, Mandarin, Bergamot, Jasmine, Lily Of The Valley, Cardamom, Oakmoss, Sandalwood, Galbanum, Musk, Amber
style: Fresh - Citrus
description: Named after the Latin for oak - strong and traditional, the symbol of Englishness. The alchemy of citrus and amber. Modern, light and very assured.

name: Babylon
notes: Saffron, Nutmeg, Coriander, Cypriol, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Vanilla
style: Woody - Amber, Woody - Spicy
description: Den of iniquity, or majestic wonder of the ancient world? No matter--Babylon's scent is simply divine. Warm vanilla, distinguished cedar and decadent saffron. Some mysteries are best left unsolved.

name: The World According to Arthur
notes: Incense, Ambrette Fir Absolute, Tonka Bean Absolute
style: Exotic, Smoky
description: Arthur sheaths his silver spoon and words like a sword. Now, fresh from the East, heâs mastered sage wisdom. So, that devil Lord George best keep his brother sweet. When incensed, he breathes fire.

name: Halfeti Leather
notes: Bergamot, Plum, Citrus Fusion, Lavender, Cardamom, Cumin, Nutmeg, Violet, Cinnamon, Incense Fusion, Leather, Oud, Patchouli, Cedar Fusion
style: Smoky
description: Penhaligons

name: Luna
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Bitter Orange, Rose, Juniper Berries, Jasmine, Balsam Fir, Musk, Ambergris
style: Citrus, Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus
description: Fascent

name: Solaris
notes: Blackcurrant, Ylang Ylang, Cedar
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Light, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Penhaligons

name: Endymion
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Lavender And Sage Geranium And Coffee Absolute, Vetiver, Nutmeg, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Musk, Leather, Sandalwood, Incense, Frankincense And Myrrh
style: Classic Masculine, Fougere, Woody - Fresh
description: The romantic, aromatic partner to Artemisia. Endymion in ancient myth was a mortal who was so loved by the Goddess of the Moon that she put him to sleep forever so she alone could visit him every night.

name: Juniper Sling
notes: Ambrox, Angelica, Black Cherry, Black Pepper, Brown Sugar, Cardamom, Cinnamon, Juniper Berry, Leather, Orange Brandy, Orris Wood, Vetiver
style: Boozy, Fresh - Citrus, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Introducing Juniper Sling, an intoxicating new fragrance inspired by the most iconic and atmospheric of spirits: London Dry Gin. Created for Penhaligon's by Master Perfumer Olivier Cresp, Juniper Sling is a playful, chilled and mysterious homage to the Bright Young Things of London's roaring twenties.

name: Empressa
notes: Blood Orange, Bergamot, Mandarin, Peach, Cassis, Dewberry, Rose, Neroli, Geranium, Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Vanilla Pod, Cocoa, Frankincense, Amber, Musk, Woods, Patchouli, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Fruity
description: As the British Empire expanded to the corners of the map in the 19th century, so, too, did the world of luxurious items available to delight the wealthy and adorn the powerful. As the most elegantly feminine of Penhaligon's new Trade Routes Collection, Empressa is a testament to the silks, baubles and delicacies then available to only a lucky few- those most exotic of imports that gave rise to the luxury goods we covet to this day.

name: Kiki - Voile d'Extrait
notes: Bergamot, Caramel, Cassis, Citrus, Geranium, Lavender Absolute, Musk., Opoponax, Patchouli
description: Vero Profumo

name: Mito - Voile d'Extrait
notes: Citrus Accord, Galbanum, Hyacinth, Labdanum, Magnolia Grandiflora, Musk, Peach, Tuberose, White Magnolia Champaca Absolute
style: Green / Herbaceous
description: Vero Profumo

name: Rubj - Voile d'Extrait
notes: Bergamot, Cedar, Jasmin, Mandarin, Mousse De ChÃ¨ne, Musk, Neroli, Orange Flower Absolute, Tuberose
description: Vero Profumo

name: Onda - Voile d'Extrait
notes: Basil, Bergamot, Citrus, Coriander, Ginger, Honey, Iris, Mandarin, Musk, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vetiver Bourbon, Ylang Ylang
description: Vero Profumo

name: Rozy - Voile d'Extrait
notes: Blackcurrant, Coriander Seed, Honey, Labdanum, Melon, Nutmeg, Rose, Sandalwood, Styrax, Tuberose, Vanilla
style: Animalic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Woody - Spicy
description: The fifth of Vero Kern's vibrant compositions, Rozy is a tribute to a formidable Roman she-wolf. Anna Magnani smolders in her role as the widow Serafina Delle Rose in the film adaptation of Tennessee Williams' The Rose Tattooâ a real woman, full-bodied and battered by life, but bursting with love and lust. And therefore, the ideal muse for Vero, whose scents are so lush, exuberant and vivid you can almost chew them: they're like taking a big bite out of the world.

name: Naja
notes: Osmanthus Absolute, Melon, Linden Blossom, Tobacco
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice
description: The new iPhone. Prince Charming. The window seat. A new perfume by Vero Kern. They say that the best things in life are worth waiting for, and Vero Kernâs Naja is no exception. Itâs been years in the making, but this is a perfume that proves that good things come to those who wait.

name: Jus d'Amour - Eau de Parfum
notes: Aqualeaf Accord, Cashmere Woods, Coco Palm, Night-blooming Jasmine, Sandalwood, Tahitian Vanilla, Violet
style: Creamy, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Serendipity 3

name: Jus d'Amour - Perfume oil
notes: Aqualeaf Accord, Cashmere Woods, Coco Palm, Night-blooming Jasmine, Sandalwood, Tahitian Vanilla, Violet
style: Sweet
description: Sarah Horowitz Parfums

name: Ambra
notes: Amber, Bergamot, Geranium, Incense, Labdanum, Lavender, Opoponax, Orange, Patchouli, Vanilla
description: Ibrahim Fuhaid

name: Madera
notes: Caramel, Coconut, Madagascar Vanilla, Peach Blossom, Tobacco Flower, Vanilla Pod, White Musk, Wildflowers
style: Boozy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Simone Andreoli

name: Rame
notes: Myrrh Extract, Sicilian Cedar, SALTED CARAMEL, Cocoa, Sugar, Amber, Sandalwood, White Musk
style: Gourmand
description: Aura Perfume

name: Platino
notes: Almond Milk, Caramel, Coconut, Jasmine, Mimosa, Vanilla, Whipped Cream, White Musk
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Eminence Parfum

name: Bell'Antonio
notes: Tobacco And Coffee
style: Exotic, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Milano Fragranze

name: Quin - Italian Meringa
notes: Sugar, Milk, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Hilde Soliani

name: New Sipario
notes: Rum, Coconut, Pineapple, Vanilla
style: Boozy, Sweet
description: Hilde Soliani

name: Drink Caffe
notes: Coffee
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: While everything from Chianti to Campari could stake a claim to being the national beverage of Italy, we'd humbly nominate a perfect shot of real Italian espresso. Steaming hot, rich with invigorating tones of earth and spice, realcaffeis the ideal drink to rejuvenate mind, body, and spirit. So when the Queen of Gourmand told us that her newest release was to be her vision of the quintessential cup of Italian espresso, we knew to expect nothing less than the best coffee scent we'd yet experienced.

name: Fraaagola Saalaaata
notes: Strawberry Salt
style: Fruity, Sweet
description: Hilde Soliani

name: Il Vs Iris
notes: Orris Root, Green Pepper, Almond, Sandalwood.
style: Floral - Light
description: Hilde Soliani

name: Crema di Latte
notes: Milk, Sugar, Vanilla
style: Gourmand
description: Hilde Soliani

name: Cristina
notes: Patchouli, Labdanum, Vanilla
style: Earthy
description: Hilde Soliani

name: Orgasmo
notes: Almond, Amaretto Liqueur Accord
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Profumum

name: Sweet Parmesan Violet
notes: Violet, Sugar
style: Floral, Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Hilde Soliani

name: Una Tira l'Altra
notes: Cherry
style: Fruity, Sweet
description: Hilde Soliani

name: Il Tempo delle Mele
notes: Milk, Apple, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand
description: Ask what region has the best food in Italy and you're bound to hear some profound disagreements- after all, we're talking about the gastronomic center of the universe- but we'd be willing to bet that Emilia-Romagna comes up more often than most. The northern region that contains Bologna, Modena, and Parma is certainly a culinary powerhouse, one that Parma native Hilde Soliani has visited in her work before, but with Il Tempo delle Melle, her ode to Emilia-born chef Igles Corelli, Soliani opts for a simple, mouthwatering local delicacy- the torta di mele ferrarrese, a basic but luscious apple cake enjoyed by everyone from kids to grandparents.

name: Hot Milk
notes: Milk, Hot Pepper
style: Gourmand, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: What, exactly, is Hot Milk? One sniff and you'll realize that's not an easy question to answer. Sure, there's an intensely electric burst of resinous black pepper, nose-tingling cinnamon, and even an undercurrent of insidiously scalding chili oil, but leave it to Hilde Soliani to balance all of that firepower on top of a pitch-perfect milk note that soothes the spirit and ignites our sense of childhood with a wondrously cool creaminess. And what do those two opposite elements add up to? It seems like each time we put it on our skin, we pick up yet another facet- sometimes the energetic pepper dominates, other times the smooth gourmand aspects, and often still the two synthesize into something that resembles a rich, fascinating woodsiness. What we do know for sure- this is undeniably a Hilde scent.

name: Buonissimo
style: Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Ask anyone what their fondest scent memory is, and chances are, the scent of baking bread will be invoked. For Luckyscentâs 15th anniversary, our most inventive gourmand nose, Hilde Soliani, created her loveliest, most nostalgia-inducing scent, exclusively for us - Buonissimo.

name: Donna Sentenza
notes: Banana, Cream, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Donna Sentenza was born of a joke Hilde Soliani shared with famed Italian butcher, Simone Fracassi, about her possibly slipping on a banana peel. Hilde Soliani slip on a banana peel? Never! Donna Sentenza, the perfume, has the same zany sense of humor and zest for life as Hilde Soliani herself. Known for her special touch with gourmandise, Soliani now turns her attention to banana, making a perfume thatâs so fun that we all want in on the joke.

name: Avatar
notes: Caramel, Sugar, Milk, Biscuits
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Hilde Soliani

name: Rose 31
notes: Amber, Cedar, Cistus, Clove, Cumin, Gaiac Wood, Grasse Rose, Nutmeg, Olibanum, Oud, Pepper, Vetiver And Animalic Notes
description: The perfumeâs aim is clear: to transfo the famous Grasse rose, a symbol of voluptuousness and unqualified femininity, into an assertively virile fragrance that can be worn by anyoneâ¦ The result is a model of its kind: alternating femininity and masculinity of the Centifolia rose, quickly picked up by a chorus of wa, spicy, and woodsy notes such as cumin, olbanum, cedar, and a touch of amberâ¦ In the background, the declared sensuality of GaÃ¯ac wood and cistus highlighted by distinctly musky notes, give this perfume a disconcerting sense of mystery.

name: Oud 27
notes: Atlas Cedar, Incense, Patchouli, Saffron, Gaiac Wood
style: Animalic, Avant-Garde, Spicy
description: The first new worldwide fragrance since Le Labo was created, Oud 27 uses its title note as a point of departure into the richly ornamented, dark and luscious world of amber perfumes, weaving a story so multi-faceted and vivid that it might be an olfactory equivalent of one of Scheherazade's tales. The vibrant darkness falls with the very first accord, an extravagantly opulent mix of Atlas cedar and incense. The dry, resinous blend is brightened and softly sweetened by saffron, the golden spiciness of which glistens within the nocturnal fabric of Oud 27 like a constellation of far away stars. Gaiac and patchouli further deepen and enrich the balsamic top notes and lead the scent into an even more sensual territory. At once expansive and wild,  yet surprisingly intimate and soft, the scent is beautifully androgynous and would befit both Scheherazade and Shahryar. The creators call Oud 27, One Thousand and One Nights, bottled. We are so mesmerized by this  masterpiece that we would wear it for one thousand and one nights in a row and not miss another perfume.

name: Ambrette 9
notes: Ambrette Seeds, Apple, Pear, Subtle Floral Notes
style: Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: AMBRETTE 9 is undeniably a rarity as it is based mainly on the ambrette seed, the only musky scent made by nature itself and almost impossible to find. Lightly perfumed, the signature of this foula is fresh and soft thanks to a combination of citrus and fruit that gives a very special fragrance...

name: Bergamote 22
notes: Amber, Aspic, Bergamot, Cedar, Grapefruit, Musk And Vetiver., Nutmeg, Orange Blossom, Petitgrain
style: Cologne, Fresh - Citrus
description: This dazzling bergamot combines freshness, sweetness, and sensuality with acrobatic talent. All these qualities were encompassed in the perfumeâs initial code name: âFire Cologneâ. Itâs the delicate floral character of petit grain, the bitterness of grapefruit, as well as the flamboyant sweetness of amber and musk with a virile touch of vetiver, which gives BERGAMOTE 22 its unique personalityâ¦

name: Iris 39
notes: And Civet, Cardamom, Ginger, Iris, Lime, Musk, Patchouli, Rose, Violet, Ylang Ylang
style: Animalic, Chypre, Earthy
description: Iris is one of the most precious essences in the world. Itâs the origin of the creamy and woodsy nobility of this exclusive fragrance.The best of the Patchoulis then waft in, bringing with them sensual depth. The perfume is reinforced by a musky base, our very own secret. The result is remarkable elegance.

name: Patchouli 24
notes: And Vanilla, Birch Tar, Patchouli, Styrax
style: Earthy, Smoky
description: Even though it is vital to the olfactory shock this perfume generates, patchouli is not easy to detect in this foula. The smoky, leathery character of birch takes over in the first few seconds, making this signature absolutely unique and difficult to situate. Fortunately, a touch of vanilla comes in to calm this little world, bringing peace, sensuality, and softness to these darker notes. A scent filled with danger for those of us who like to walk a tight ropeâ¦.

name: The Matcha 26
notes: Matcha Green Tea, Fig, Vetiver, Bitter Orange
style: Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Light
description: In the same way matcha tea is much more than just a drink in Japanese culture, THÃ MATCHA 26 is much more than a scent to us. It is a moment of introspection, a moment of self that offers a quiet inner celebration of grace and soulful beauty. A simple whiff takes us away from the hum of the outside and brings us back âinâ. Matcha tea accord is infused with a creamy fig note, grounded by soft vetiver and textural cedar woods, and uplifted by enticing bitter orange. Introverted and deep by nature, THÃ MATCHA 26 is a skin scent, something meant for, and only those individuals lucky enough to be very close to, the wearer. It carries a noble stillness. To us, it is a scented reminder of home, of welcomed solitude, and of all things familiar and treasured.

name: Vetiver 46
notes: Bergamot, Black Pepper, Clove, Cedar, Vetiver, Labdanum, Olibanum, Gaiac Wood, Amber, And Vanilla
style: Earthy, Smoky
description: The crÃ¨me de la crÃ¨me of vetivers, nurtured in Haiti and retired to Grasse in accord with local know-how, is the pillar of this perfume that, without a doubt, is one of the deepest and darkest of all Le Labo creations. Among the many essences, pepper, gaÃ¯ac, labdanum, and cedar lend themselves to the wicked moodiness of this perfumeâ¦ Each expresses strength of character in its own way, and the delicate accompaniment of olibanum, a mysterious incense, leaves an intriguing spiritual dimension in its wake.

name: Labdanum 18
notes: Castoreum, Labdanum, Patchouli., Tonka Beans, Vanilla
style: Animalic, Resinous / Balsamic
description: This fragrance is an enigmaâ¦It simply doesnât confo to any of the laws of perfumery. A strong concentration of ambery and musky notes, it remains a perfume thatâs discreet on your skin even though everythingâs combined to make it a power bombâ¦ Listen to it whisper to your nose and to the senses of those allowed to get close to your skinâ¦ Once you start, you wonât be able to stop listening.

name: Fleur D'Oranger 27
notes: Amber, Bergamot, Grapefruit, Musk And Vetiver, Petitgrain
style: Floral - White
description: A natural and one-of-a-kind orange blossom creation that took more than three years to compose. Its innate nobility is enhanced by fresh floral and lemony notes, rounded out by musk and the succulent, sunny touches of bergamot, petit grain, and lemon. This orange blossom has intensity and a delicious ambiguity that gives everyone the absolute power of sensuality.

name: Neroli 36
notes: Calone, Jasmine, Mandarin Orange, Musk, Neroli, Rose, Tonka Bean, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Tropical / Beachy
description: Neroli is another name for the essence of orange blossom. The unique quality of our Neroli is its sunny floral character with an extraordinarily wa, sensual base. Rose, musk, mandarin orange (slightly aldehydic), jasmine, and vanilla, among other essences, complete the portrait, bringing NEROLI 36 spikiness, ease, zest, and heatâ¦ Well-being, elegance, and cha all in a bottle!

name: Jasmin 17
notes: Amber, Bigarade, Jasmin, Musk, Neroli, Orange Flower, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - White
description: This natural jasmine is the floral perfume par excellence, and was created as a modern alternative to the old-fashioned traditional floral signatures. Its short foula gives it such a distinctive character that once you wear it, youâll never forget it. A unique floral impact whose sensuality and lure is amplified by a majestically haonious chord of musk, sandalwood, and vanilla. We refuse all responsibility for any havoc this perfume might create in your circle of friendsâ¦

name: Santal 33
notes: Ambrox And Leather Accord, Australian Sandalwood, Cardamom, Cedarwood, Iris, Violet
style: Spicy
description: Imagine sitting in solitude on theÂ rugged, wideÂ plainsÂ of the American West, firelight on your face, indigo-blue night skies above. There is nothing around save for the soft, desert wind. You. Are. Free.Â From this defining vision was born SANTAL 33: a perfume that touches the vast and wild universality of this dream... that intoxicates... It combines a mix of cardamom and notes of iris and violet, which crackle in the formula. Added to this smoking wood alloy (Australian sandalwood, cedarwood) are some spicy, leathery, musky notes, giving this perfume its signature and addictive comforting scent.Â Here is, in a few words, what SANTAL 33 is... An open fireâ¦The soft drift of smokeâ¦Where sensuality rises after the light has gone.

name: Lys 41
notes: Jasmine, Lily, Tuberose Absolute, Vanilla Madagascar And Musks., Warm Woody Notes
style: Floral - White
description: LYS 41 is an overwhelming white floral â a blend of jasmine, tuberose absolute, and lily, bewitching in its noble, wa, and sunny approach â yet treacherous once caught in its web of noble woods, vanilla Madagascar, and musks. LYS 41 rewards those looking for a statement with an addictive floral buzz that is as potent as its wake and as insistent as the people following you around. Good luck.

name: Ylang 49
notes: Benzoin, Oakmoss, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Tahitian Gardenia, Vetiver, Ylang Ylang
style: Chypre, Exotic, Floral, Floral - White
description: YLANG 49 is a chypre floral, where pua noa noa (gardenia from Tahiti) completes the floral voluptuousness of ylang ylangâ¦ Patchouli, oakmoss, vetiver, sandalwood, and benjoin follow to tip the blend into darker sensual undertones... YLANG 49 is a walk in the woods, a lush floral bouquet in your hand, listening to J.S. Bach's well-tempered clavier and realizing that a floral composition can go beyond flowers, in the same way a fugue in D minor is way beyond the D.

name: AnOther 13
notes: Apple, Green Citrus And Ambrette, Musk (Ambrox), Pear
description: In 2010, Le Labo was commissioned by AnOther Magazine to work on an exclusive scent. This project was born thanks to Sarah of colette who initiated the creative collaboration between Le Labo and Jefferson Hack, editor-in-chief of AnOther Magazine. The result of this collaboration is ANOTHER 13, a hypnotizing and unique scent. Itâs composed of ambroxyde, a synthetic animal musk, making ANOTHER 13 an addictive dirty potion blended with other carefully selected ingredients such as jasmine moss â which gives it spike and shine. As the entire planet knows, colette closed its doors December 2017, but luckily we were able to welcome ANOTHER 13 to our Classic Collection in our labs worldwide.

name: Tonka 25
notes: Atlas Cedar, Orange Flower Absolute, Tonka Bean Absolute, Styrax, Musks
style: Animalic, Floral, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Dark
description: This one is dark. A good, addictive, wa dark, as if the humid summer underwoods, their seeds and resins, were sprinkled with layers of musks and sweetened with drops of vanilla. It evokes the smell of wa skin and resinous wood. The perfumerâs notes say orange flower absolute, the unique cedar atlas, styrax resins, absolute tonka, and musks... We say TONKA 25.

name: The Noir 29
notes: Bay Leaf, Bergamot, Black Tea Leaves, Cedar, Fig, Musk, Vetiver
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: THÃ NOIR 29 is an ode to the noble leaf and the craft that surrounds it. THÃ NOIR 29 combines depth and freshness, softness and strength through peanent oscillation between the light of bergamot, fig, and bay leaves and the depth of cedarwood, vetiver, and musk. A special extraction of black tea leaves wraps up the composition by bringing to the foula a dry, leafy, hay, tobacco feeling in the dry down to transfo this creation into a sensuous and addictive essence.

name: Baie 19
notes: Juniper, Patchouli, Ambroxan, Cade, Musk
style: Fresh - Clean, Salty / Oceanic, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Truth isâ¦BAIE 19 should have been called Water 19. Not that it smells like nothing (though nothing smells like it), but it has this crisp, wet, drenched effect that water gives to the earth after the rainâ¦ And thereâs a word for that, by the way: petrichor. Itâs that magical feeling during heavy rain after a long dry spell, and itâs one of the most beautiful olfactive phenomena in nature. There are many reasons for this, including the ozone in the air, the negative ions, but most importantly the release of oil secretions from certain plants, accumulated after a long dry period. This is what BAIE 19 is about: the dry juniper berry, the patchouli, the green leaves... all soaked by a beautiful, luminous, magnetic rain after a long drought. And the joy that comes with itâ¦

name: Exit the King
notes: Timur JE, Soap Foam Accord (Aldehydes & Musk), Pink Pepper, Jasmine E-pure, Rose Superessence, Lily-of-the-valley Accord, Patchouli, Moss Absolute, Sandalwood Accord & Orcanox
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: Etat Libre d'Orange

name: The Ultimate discovery set
description: Entertain your senses with this incredible collection. The ultimate assortment of scents from the iconoclastic French house to help you discover your true fragrance spirit and style.

name: The Ghost in the Shell
notes: Aqual, Yuzu HE, Hexyl Acetate, Jasmin Absolute Mugane, Milky Skin Accord, Moss Accord, Vinyl Gaiacol, Orcanox
style: Avant-Garde, Floral, Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: The future of human identity in the face of biotechnology isnât necessarily the kind of subject that most fragrances consider, but Etat Libre dâOrange has never been too concerned with following convention. And weâre all luckier for that, because The Ghost In The Shell- a fragrance made in collaboration with legendary Japanese manga creator Masamune Shirow- dives headlong into the convergence between the natural and the artificial, using a unique blend of cutting edge synthetics and natural fragrant materials to achieve the flesh-and-machine synthesis that French philosopher Pierre Teilhard de Chardin (whose work inspired Shirow) envisioned as the next leap forward for humankind.

name: Bestsellers Discovery Kit
description: This selection of 8x2ml best-selling scents offers an ideal introduction to the audacious and seductive sides of Etat Libre d'Orange. Enjoy samples of the following scents:Sous le Pont MirabeauExperimentum CrucisHermann a Mes Cotes me Parassait Une OmbreI Am TrashRemarkable PeopleFrustrationThe Ghost In The ShellYou Or Someone Like You

name: Tilda Swinton Like This
notes: Yellow Mandarin, Ginger, Pumpkin Accord, Immortelle, Moroccan Neroli, Rose De Grasse, Vetiver, Heliotrope, And Musk
style: Avant-Garde, Gourmand
description: With Like This, Etat Libre d'Orange pays homage to the intelligent and surreally beautiful actress Tilda Swinton. Etat's challenge was immediate: to create a fragrance that reflects Swinton's uncommon grace and talent. Like Swinton, the fragrance needed to be unusual yet welcoming, delicate yet strong, seductive without being distracting, and full of radiance. With Like This, they succeeded. Like This is unlike any other fragrance we've smelled, and yet it is as comfortable and warm as a summer afternoon in the Scottish hillside.

name: Hermann
notes: Blackcurrant Buds, Black Pepper, Galbanum, Calypsone, Geosmin, Frankincense, Pepperwood, Petalia, Rose Absolute, Patchouli, Ambroxan
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: A fragrance of intense duality, Hermann a Mes Coates me Paraissait une Ombre (the unabridged name is a line taken from a Victor Hugo poem that translates to "by my side, Hermann seemed to me like a shadow") is an exploration of your alternative self, the person who rides beside you so closely in the darkness that their opposition seems not contradictory, but rather complimentary. To represent this in a fragrance, Etat Libre d'Orange has delivered an aromatic, woody enigma of a scent both hauntingly cold and surprisingly bright.

name: Remarkable People
notes: Grapefruit, Champagne Accord, Cardamom, Jasmine, Curry JE, Black Pepper, Labdanum, Sandalwood, Lorenox
style: Floral - Spicy, Spicy
description: What are the markings of a remarkable person? Perhaps characteristics like vibrant energy, an ability to get things done, with grace, and a magnetism that draws others like honey. Etat Libre DâOrange, known for their unusual offerings, takes on the challenge of creating the olfactive aura of charisma.

name: I Am Trash
notes: Bitter Orange, Apple, Lemongrass, Tangerine, Rose, Iso E Super, Wild Strawberry, Atlas Cedar, Sandalore, Akigalawood
description: Put aside the marketing for a minute - no, I Am Trash (or Les Fleurs du DÃ©chet) does not smell like trash! Etat Libre dâOrange is a brand known for making high concept art, and this is no exception. In I Am Trash, the idea is to raise awareness about the continued usefulness of the things that normally get thrown away, and find a way to upcycle these items to create something beautiful in its own right.

name: Eau des Sens
notes: Orange Flower, Bitter Orange, Juniper, Angelica, Patchouli
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Light, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Light
description: "A piece of music that breathes on the skin" is how Diptyque describes their new Eau des Sens, and while that might seem like hyperbole from another house, the decades-long run of uniform excellence from the storied Parisian house had us salivating to see how such a description might play out. Simply put, Eau des Sens is a masterpiece, a gorgeously fresh trip into the heart of a bitter orange tree that stuns the senses and induces genuine synesthesia. Like their earlier wonder Philosykos did for the fig tree, Eau des Sens is no mere one-note representation- this is bitter orange from ground to tree to blossom to fruit, with additional notes- juniper, angelica, patchouli- carefully chosen and applied to enhance every aspect of the composition, presenting a delicately floral, sweetly bright fragrance that sings with unexpected woody and spicy facets.

name: L'Art du Parfum Discovery Set
description: Discover the art of Parisian perfume as evolved by Diptyque, through these five legendary, best-selling scents. Each L'Art du Parfum Discovery Set comes with the following eaux de toilette in 7.5ml atomizers:

name: Vetyverio - Eau de Parfum
notes: Haitian Vetiver, Patchouli, Grapefruit, Turkish Rose
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Diptyque

name: Tempo
notes: Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Patchouli, Mate, Clary Sage, Violet Leaf
style: Earthy, Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: All too often, patchouli scents seem to be apologizing for their star ingredient. "It's patchouli," the refrain goes, "but it's nothippiepatchouli." Tempo, the wonderful new patchouli scent from Diptyque, defies such simple-minded rejection- after all, it's explicitly inspired by 60's counterculture- but those fearing unbearably thick earthiness and lack of nuance will surely be delighted by Tempo's complex, gorgeous subtlety, which weds three distinct types of patchouli to a perfectly balanced mix of mate and violet, delivering a scent both unapologetically patchouli-driven, yet undeniably sophisticated.

name: Fleur de Peau - Eau de Parfum
notes: Aldehydes, Pink Pepper, Rose, Iris, Ambrette, Ambergris, Musk
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: As part of Diptyque's 50th anniversary celebration, Fleur de Peau is meant to turn back the clock to the 1960's, and one of the counterculture's most beloved scents- musk. Warm, sweet, and deeply sensual, the musk oils of the 60's were more powerful than subtle, so how then to update that classic feeling for today's grown-up, yet nostalgic, audience? By wedding a gorgeous bouquet of various musks to a beautiful, iris-driven floral heart, Fleur de Peau has us in awe of its sophisticated, subtle, musky perfection.

name: Tam Dao - Eau de Parfum

style: Woody - Spicy
description: A familiar yet reinvented interpretation, with accentuated, enhanced major notes... the Eau de Parfum expresses itself with even more personality, audacity, intensity and tenacity. Here, with Tam Dao, the star ingredient, sandalwood from Mysore, is of exceptional quality. In the EDP version, Ginger, Tahiti lime, and the coconut accord emphasize the creamy smooth facet of Mysore sandalwood, resulting in a milky, woody creamy concoction.

For diptyque's founders, the Mediterranean was the "landscape of the soul". This is where they came in the summer, to relax and repose in the heart of unspoilt nature. Ilio is a tribute to this Mediterranean land bathed in light and fragrance.

name: L'Eau Papier

description: The image of Queen Boadicea raging across the battle field in her chariot driven by bounding stallions is without doubt an iconic one. Queen Boadicea's horses play an equally important part in this historical tale of heroism; for this reason we honour them in this extremely limited and exclusive perfume.

style: Floral
description: Boadicea the Victorious

notes: Pineapple, Plum, Fresh, Elemi, Raspberry, Peach, Apple, Cardamom, Balsam, Jasmine, Nutmeg, Rose, Musk, Cedar Wood, Amber, Guaiac Wood, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Mossy

description: Housed in Boadicea's signature falcon, is Glorious, a celebration of difference inspired by the warrior Queen and her unflinching determination to succeed. The desire was to create a non conventional fruity floral scent that would intrigue and bewitch the wearer.

name: Nemer
notes: Turkish Rose, Morrocan Rose, Saffron, Tiger Oud, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Amber
style: Woody - Dark
description: Determined to source a rare and precious Oud for the heart of this exclusive scent, the Boadicea perfumers discovered Tiger Oud. The Tiger Oud name derives from the variegated heart wood of a tree. When the wood is cut, as if by magic, the stripes of a tiger appear. The heart note also provided inspiration for the name of this precious scent â Nemer being the Arabic word for Tiger. Tiger Oud is copper distilled and is beautifully fluid â ensuring Nemers' sense of indulgent luxury and unmistakable quality.

style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice
description: Inspired by the 65th wedding anniversary of Queen Elizabeth II and Prince Philip, as well as the enduring legacy of Britain's ancient Queen Boadicea, Blue Sapphire is a stunningly beautiful symbol of elegance and royalty. Beneath a gorgeous royal blue glass flacon embedded with a certified blue sapphire gemstone, Blue Sapphire presents an exuberant, joyous, and larger than life celebration of monarchy- meant for the kind of noble, beautiful queens that storybook princesses grow up to become.

name: Aventus
notes: Ambergris, Apple, Bergamot, Birch, Blackcurrant Leaves, Jasmine, Musk, Oakmoss, Patchouli, Pineapple, Pinkberries, Vanilla
style: Classic Masculine, Fresh - Clean, Fruity
description: The exceptional Aventus was inspired by the dramatic life of a historic emperor, celebrating strength, power and success. Introduced in 2010 and crafted by the deft hand of Sixth Generation Master Perfumer Olivier Creed in collaboration with his son Erwin, this scent has grown to become the best-selling fragrance in the history of the brand. Olivier created its iconic name derived fromA("from")ventus("the wind"), illustrating the Aventus man as destined to live a driven life, ever galloping with the wind at his back toward success. Aventus is a sophisticated blend for individuals who savor a life well-lived.

name: Aventus For Her
notes: Green Apple, Pink Berries, Patchouli, Bergamot, Bulgarian And Turkish Roses, Sandalwood, Styrax, Musk, Sweet Peach, Cassis, Lilac, Amber, Ylang Ylang
style: Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Woody - Fresh
description: Creed

name: Aventus Cologne
notes: Ginger, Mandarin, Baie Rose, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Styrax, Birch, Musk, Tonka
style: Fresh - Clean, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: How does one go about reinventing a classic? If you're the house of Creed, you take everything that people loved about Aventus and Aventus For Her and bring it all together in a universal scent that can be enjoyed by men and women alike. Meet Aventus Cologne, a fresher, more modern complement to two iconic scents that provides an olfactive experience all its own.

name: Intelligence & Fantasy
notes: Bergamot, Cedar, Freesia, Hedione, Magnolia Bud, Mandarin, Musk, Osmanthus, Rose Oil, Sandalwood And Cashmeran, Schinus Molle (pink Peppercorn), TiarÃ© Absolute
style: Avant-Garde, Fruity
description: Fragrance and memory are intimately bonded, not only because a scent can summon an absent person or a bygone moment, but also because memory â the recollection of thousands of notes and accords â is an essential dimension of the perfumer's art.

name: Precision & Grace
notes: Amber., Bergamot, Egyptian Jasmine, Freesia, Lemon, Mandarin, Mimosa, Moss, Myrrh, Osmanthus, Pink Pepper, Plum, Rose, Sandalwood, Violet, Williams Pear
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Citrus
description: The Beautiful Mind Series

name: Aqua Universalis
notes: Bergamot, Sicilian Lemon, Lily Of The Valley, Sweet Mock Orange, Light And Musky Woods.
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean
description: The name is Latin forUniversal Water, and the scent does what it says on the bottle. Francis Kurkdjian calls it the missing link between skin, clothes, bed linen and the air and he's spot on. This light, sparkling eau de toilette could be spritzed by anyone, anywhere, anytime â but you'll probably want to save it for your skin, since you can scent your house with the Aqua Universalis candle or incense paper, and launder your clothes with the matching detergent.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540 - Candle
description: Born from the encounter of Maison Francis Kurkdjian and Maison Baccarat, the Baccarat Rouge 540 scented candle combines the magic of nature with legendary craftsmanship. It releases a graphic and highly condensed olfactive signature with a floral, amber and woody breeze.

Luminous, vibrant and comfortably addictive, 724 invites you to feel the city rhythm.

notes: Elemi Resin, Saffron, Atlas Cedar Wood, Patchouli, Oud
style: Earthy
description: It isn't because Francis Kurkdjian called this fragrance just plain Oud that he meant it to be a plain-vanilla oud. The man couldn't be pedestrian if he tried. And what he's gone and done is work what he calls âthe ambergris of the 21st centuryâ into a quintessentially elegant French perfume, taming the growling exotic beast until it purrs with pure bliss on a silk cushion.

name: Feminin Pluriel
notes: Iris, Violet, Rose, Jasmine, Lily-of-the-valley, Orange Blossom, Vetiver And Indonesian Patchouli Leaf
style: Chypre, Classic Feminine, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Light
description: Pluriel. A beautiful creation composed of a multitude of facets, designed to evolve with freedom and sensuality, unbound from fleeting fashions. A challenge to time and a search for timelessness, the recognizable quality of major classics.

name: Masculin Pluriel
notes: Lavender, Cedar, Patchouli, Vetiver, Leather And Woody Notes
style: Fougere, Masculine
description: A fougÃ¨re accord, the trademark of major men's classics, set off by the depth of lavender absolute from Provence and a soft leathery accord built on an architecture of Eastern red cedar, Indonesian patchouli and vetiver from Haiti.

name: Amyris Femme
notes: Californian Orange, Jamaican Amyris, Florentine Iris, Haitian Vetiver, Musky Amber
style: Classic Feminine, Floral, Floral - Citrus, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light
description: Francis Kurkdjian conceives his fragrances with people in mind, and what he wanted for Amyris femme was to express the quintessence of the Parisian woman, which he defines as primesautiÃ¨re, a word that means âperkyâ and âimpulsiveâ.

name: Amyris Homme
notes: Moroccan Rosemary, Sicilian Mandarin, Jamaican Amyris, Florentine Iris, Brazilian Tonka Bean Absolute, Modern Woods
style: Classic Masculine, Masculine, Woody - Fresh
description: Francis Kurkdjian conceives his fragrances with people in mind, and what he wanted for Amyris homme was to express the quintessence of the good-bad guy. He also conceives his collection as a fragrance wardrobe for every moment of the day and with the Amyris his'n'hers duo, he wanted scents that could be shrugged on for daywear: chic, but comfortable enough not to demand major commitment before spritzing.

name: Oud Silk Mood - Extrait de Parfum
notes: Bulgarian Rose, Camomille From Marocco, Oud From Laos, Papyrus
style: Floral - Ambery Spice
description: Kurkdjian imagined the OUD mood collection as feelings, sensations, rather like those one would have when wrapped in a fragrant stole. They play on shimmer, comfort and warmth. They are precious, intense and concentrated.

name: Aqua Vitae
notes: Lemon, Mandarin, Tonka Bean, Vanilla Infusion, Hedione And Guaiac Wood
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: It was one afternoon on Formentera, in the Balearic Islands, that the idea of Aqua Vitae came to my mind.

name: A La Rose
notes: Damascena Rose, Bergamot, Orange, Violet, Magnolia Blossom, Cedar, Musk, Centifolia Rose.
style: Classic Feminine, Floral, Floral - Citrus
description: Ã la rose is a declaration of love for all women captured in a fragrance. Queen of flowers, the rose knows no boundaries and has inspired those in the creative arts for centuries. Poets, painters, musicians... and perfumers alike. All have sought to capture its aura, its magic and its secrets.

name: Oud Satin Mood - Eau de Parfum
notes: Agarwood, Bulgarian Rose, Benzoin, Turkish Rose, Violet And Vanilla.
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Dark
description: In the expert hand of Francis Kurkdjian, oud is more than a trendy ingredient or predictable element- it's a fabric, to be spun into pillow-soft, dazzlingly sheer compositions that take our breath away. Oud Satin Mood, the newest from this master craftsman, weaves a shimmering robe of ambery spices, exquisite oud, elegant florals and a mouthwatering base that combine to flow across the skin in delicate ecstasy.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540 - Eau de Parfum
notes: Citrus, Jasmine, Saffron, Sage, Ambergris, Oakmoss, Cedar
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Dark
description: In the Fall of 2014, Baccarat, the most prestigious and opulent crystalworks in the world, celebrated the 250th anniversary of their founding by releasing an extraordinary crystal decanter containing a luminous, exclusive fragrance created by Francis Kurkdjian. Only 250 of these bottles were produced, for a price of $4000 apiece. Now, for the first time ever, this spectacular fragrance is available to the world as Baccarat Rouge 540, a gorgeously woody floral-amber equal parts transparent, dense, and intense.

name: Petit Matin
notes: Cubeb Pepper, Lemon, Lavandin, Orange Blossom, Hawthorne, Musk, Ambroxan
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Spicy
description: Maison Francis Kurkdjian

name: Grand Soir
notes: Labdanum, Benzoin, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Amber
style: Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Amber
description: Maison Francis Kurkdjian

name: Baccarat Rouge 540 Extrait
notes: Egyptian Jasmine Grandiflorum, Saffron, Moroccan Bitter Almond, Cedar, Musky Wood, Ambergris
style: Exotic, Gourmand, Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: In the Fall of 2014, Baccarat, the most prestigious and opulent crystalworks in the world, celebrated the 250th anniversary of their founding by releasing an extraordinary crystal decanter containing a luminous, exclusive fragrance created by Francis Kurkdjian. Released later onto the open market in a slightly more achievable presentation as Baccarat Rouge 540 EDP, the world quickly fell in love with the gorgeously woody floral-amber and its equal parts transparent, dense, and intense character. Now, Baccarat and M. Kurkdjian extend their partnership with a new Extrait concentration that intensifies the power and radiance of all aspects of the scent, all without betraying the original inspiration.

name: Oud Satin Mood Extrait
notes: Agarwood, Bulgarian Rose, Benzoin, Turkish Rose, Violet And Vanilla.
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Dark
description: Maison Francis Kurkdjian

name: Oud Silk Mood - Eau de Parfum
notes: Bergamot From Italy, Blue Chamomile From Morocco, Rose From Bulgaria, Hedione, Guaiac, Oud From Laos, Papyrus From India
description: Maison Francis Kurkdjian

name: Oud - Extrait de Parfum
notes: Saffron, Elemi From The Philippines, Ambrettolide, Cedar Wood From Morocco, Sweet Vanilla Accord, Oud From Laos, Patchouli From Indonesia
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Maison Francis Kurkdjian

name: Baccarat Rouge 540 Hair Mist
description: Parfums de Marly

name: Gentle fluidity Silver
notes: Juniper, Nutmeg, Coriander, Musk, Amber, Woods, Vanilla
style: Fresh - Clean, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Gentle fluidity â note the small f â is part of perfumer Francis Kurkdjianâs experiment to see what happens when you set out with an identical set of notes but head off in two separate directions. The result? A complementary (but utterly different) pair of fragrances - gentle Fluidity (Gold) and Gentle fluidity (Silver) â that prove that a painterâs palette is just a starting point and that the magic only happens when the painter picks up his brush. Two distinct forms emerge from the masterâs art â one for him and one for her. Both sharing the same DNA.

name: Gentle Fluidity Gold
notes: Juniper, Nutmeg, Coriander, Musk, Amber, Woods, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Light
description: gentle Fluidity â note the small g â is part of perfumer Francis Kurkdjianâs experiment to see what happens when you set out with an identical set of notes but head off in two separate directions. The result? A complementary (but utterly different) pair of fragrances - gentle Fluidity (Gold) and Gentle fluidity (Silver) â that prove that a painterâs palette is just a starting point and that the magic only happens when the painter picks up his brush. Two distinct forms emerge from the masterâs art â one for him and one for her. Both sharing the same DNA.

name: L'Eau A La Rose
notes: Lychee, Pear, Rose, Peony, Violet, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus
description: Maison Francis Kurkdjian

name: L'Homme A La Rose
notes: Grapefruit, Damascene Rose, Amber Woods Accord, Sage, Centifolia Rose, Labdanum
style: Floral, Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Maison Francis Kurkdjian

name: Sugarwood
notes: Bergamot, Cedarwood, Fig, Iris, Jasmine, Musk, Peony, Sugar Cane Pulp, Vanilla
style: Gourmand, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: Arte Profumi

name: Dulcess
notes: Almond Blossom, Coconut, Creamy Musk, Cyclamen, Mandarin, Muguet, Pear, Sandalwood, Vanilla Bean
style: Creamy, Sweet
description: Profumum

name: Beachwood
notes: Amber, Bergamot, Cedar Wood, Coconut, Jasmine, Mandarin, Musk, Neroli, Sandalwood
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Tropical / Beachy
description: Coqui Coqui

name: Gardenia Petale
notes: And Gardenia, Citrus Notes, Green Notes, Jasmine, Lily Of The Valley
style: Floral - White
description: Unabashedly lush and feminine, GardÃ©nia PÃ©tale is perhaps the truest recreation of the gardenia's sensuality we've encountered. If you've ever dipped your nose into a gardenia's creamy petals, you know the narcotic opulence this flower possesses. In GardÃ©nia PÃ©tale, perfumer Nathalie Feisthauer captures all the stages of gardenia's life, from its almost citrusy, green bud to the delicate freshness of a newly opened blossom to the fulsome headiness of the gardenia in full bloom.

name: California Reverie
notes: Beeswax, Frangipani, Jasmine Sambac, Mandarin Orange, Neroli, Vanilla.
style: Floral - White
description: Van Cleef & Arpels explores a wealth of inspiration derived from the majestic scenery of California, in a part-real, part-imaginary trip down the West Coast.

name: Uden
notes: Grapefruit, Lemon, Rum Absolute, Rose, Sandalwood, Gaiac Wood, Vanilla, Coffee Absolute, Musk
style: Classic Masculine, Fresh - Clean, Masculine, Woody - Fresh
description: Xerjoff classifies Uden as amarine fougere, meaning that it smells of lavender, oak moss, and the sea. To us, although accurate in some ways, it simplifies Uden's unique complexity. If Uden is a marine scent, then its waters surround the Bahamas, where ancient traders traveled weeks across the treacherous Atlantic to barter for coffee and rum, both of which give Uden a delicious warmth. The rum and coffee are then packed in rough wood crates, which pick up the salty scent of the ocean as the boat's wooden timbers rock on the waves for further journey in the New World. Uden's ocean is the world of the seamen who risked their lives traversing the seas to bring the pleasure of the exotic to long ago drawing rooms.

name: Xerjoff Discovery Set
description: Indulge in the newly updated discovery set complete with a curated selection of their best selling fragrances. Experience the soul and old world craftsmanship blended into each scent through rare raw materials and a contemporary artistic sensibility.

name: IOMMI
notes: Bergamot, Rum, Bulgarian Geranium, Passionfruit, Cinnamon, Patchouli, Leather, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Caramel, Labdanum, Musk
style: Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Xerjoff, luxury Italian Perfume house, well known for its unique and individual creations and collaborations in the fragrance world, are launching their latest venture â Xerjoff Blends, an experimental and experiential concept that creates multisensory experiences, blending fragrance with other sensory elements.  The first multisensory interactions primarily between perfume and music come together in an unexpected and uniquely modern way, merging the dark and Gothic notes of scent, sound and design in a unified perception.

name: Torino22
notes: Bergamot, Saffron, Eucalyptus, Clary Sage, Mate, Guaiac Wood, Musk, Dry Woods
description: A scent whose performance thrills and exhilarates the wearer both on and off the court, Xerjoff presents TORINO22, the invigorating perfume created to celebrate the Nitto ATP Finals for the second year running in Turin.

name: 1861 - Renaissance
notes: Bergamont, Mandarin, Lime, And Petitgrain, Rose, Lily Of The Valley, Mint, Cedar, Patchouli, Amber And Musk.
style: Exotic, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Formerly called 1861, now officially called 1861 Renaissance.

name: 1861 - Naxos
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Lavender, Jasmine, Cinnamon, Honey, Cashmeran, Tobacco, Tonka Bean, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Masculine, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: The most passionate and sensual area of a country that has never lacked for either, Sicily is a land of tradition and emotion, a rich Mediterranean island where nature and ancient history flow through every village and hillside. Naxos celebrates Sicily's deep and sensual heart with a rich, spicy, vital perfume, imbued with tradition but striving towards the contemporary.

name: Cruz Del Sur II
notes: Mango, Pineapple, Apple Blossom, Floral Bouquet, Green Leaves, Vetiver, Cedar, Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: Rogue Perfumery

name: Oud Stars - Alexandria II
notes: Apple, Cinnamon, Rosewood, Lavender, Cedar, Lily Of The Valley, Rose, Amber, Sandalwood, Musk, Vanilla, Oud
style: Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Spicy
description: Alexandria- the thousand-year capital, among the very greatest and most enduring cities in history, and a shining center of history, culture and wealth. Now, Xerjoff endeavors to rebuild Alexandria to the height of its Hellenistic glory, gifting us a fragrance that overflows with rich fruits, spiced woods, and sumptuous florals that sing with the stunning accomplishments of this jewel of the ancient world.

name: La Capitale
notes: Strawberry, Caramel, Peach, Labdanum, Leather, Saffron, Ginger, Rose, Amber, Benzoin, Vanilla
description: Refined and robust, La Capitale is a testament to Moscow in all of its glorious contradictions- the grandeur and grime, the charm and the chaos, the history and hipness- a true international metropolis. Any fragrance to do justice to this fascinating city must, of course, be as larger than life as the city itself, and so La Capitale bursts forth from the skin, a fruity, spicy, luscious, indulgent fragrance full of joy, zest, and the indomitable Russian spirit.

name: Accento Overdose
notes: Fruity Notes, Green Notes, Eucalyptus, Mediterranean Pine, Egyptian Jasmine
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Xerjoff

name: Patchouli Nobile
notes: Citrus, White Pepper, Frankincense, Patchouli, Gaic Wood, Cistus, Jasmine Moroccan Cedarwood, Amber, Oak Moss, Sandalwood, Tonka.
description: Let's face it: Patchouli can be maddening to describe because it smells like nothing else in the world but patchouli. Yes, it's earthy and rich, but those adjectives fail to conjure up the hypnotic, evocative qualities that make patchouli so distinctive. Luckily, if we simply state the obvious â Patchouli Nobile is a patchouli scent â we have a good place to begin because we all know that deep, highly recognizable note. The question is, is it a good patchouli scent?

name: Ambra Nobile
notes: Ambergris, Bergamot, Cedarwood, Labdanum, Neroli, Patchouly, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Vetiver
description: A classic amber scent, impeccably done. Warm, powdery and  soothing. A fresh citrus and orange blossom opening leads us to the heart of ambergris, labdanum and patchouli. There is a startling hint of salt and stone in the transition and, though we quickly move past that into a smooth and comforting blend of tonka bean, vetiver, cedar and sandalwood, there is something intriguingly solid and cool beneath all the warm elements.

name: La Stanza delle Bambole
notes: Mandarin, Bergamot, Milk, Hawthorn, Orange Blossom, Powdery Notes, Ylang Ylang, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Musky Notes
style: Sweet
description: La Stanza delle Bambole a sacred place and memory where baby dolls are looked after, pampered and loved; a projection of everyday life imagined in a fantasy world. Talking to an inanimate object is a way to express unconscious thoughts and inner dreams.

name: Nobile 1942 Discovery Set
description: A diverse atomizer set that gives a great insight to the magical world of Nobile 1942, one of our cherished Italian brands.

name: Levante
notes: Marine Accord, White Flowers, Patchouli, Cedar, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Caramel, Benzoin, White Musk
style: Floral - Light, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: 'Levante' in Italian is used to describe sunrise (directly translated means "to stand up"), and is also used in many allegories for countries east of the Mediterranean.

name: Le Petit Chocolatier
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Le Petit Chocolatier is a treasure trove for chocolate lovers, featuring 3 addictive and mouth-watering scents each built up around Cocoa.  If you suddenly feel like a Mayan god or goddess when you open the coffret and start experiencing the perfumes, don't worry, it's perfectly natural, as the scientific name for Cocoa means, "Food of the Gods." Even the bottles make a tasty statement-- artfully decorated with cunning blue velvet, they evoke the cozy luxury of the scents themselves.

name: La Danza delle Libellule
notes: Bergamot, Cinnamon, Cocoa, Musk, Red Apple, Vanilla And Cedar
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Since when did Italian fragrance become such a serious endeavor? We have to admit, we've been feeling a bit lost lately amongst all these challenging, avant-garde conceptual pieces- every now and again, don't you just want to wear something unapologetically luxurious? La Danza Delle Libellule (âthe dance of the dragonflies,â), a joyously self-assured fruity gourmand, is the answer to our casual, indulgent, dare-we-say-girly? prayers. Based on an operetta by the Austrian composer Franz Lehar, it's the kind bold, beautiful, and unapologetically feminine scent that's sure to conjure up fantasies of majestic castles and storybook romance to charm even the most jaded fragrance fan.

name: La Danza delle Libellule Exceptional Edition
notes: Bergamot, Cedar, Cinnamon, Coconut, Musk, Red Apple, Vanilla
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Spicy, Sweet
description: Nobile 1942

name: Sandalo Nobile
notes: Saffron, Cumin Seed, Iris, Fig Wood, Gurjum, Sandalwood, Benzoin, White Musk, Cedar
style: Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal, Spicy, Woody - Light
description: We've always loved Nobile 1942, but the venerable Italian house has been on a particular tear lately, releasing a series of inspired scents that pull off the impressive feat of being as wearable as they are strikingly original. So when we say that Sandalo Nobile is as comfortable and easy to wear as any sandalwood in recent memory, that's not faint praise- spicy yet smooth, robustly textured yet soft-spoken, Sandalo Nobile is a deliciously woodsy treat for the senses. Think of it as a just-stronger-than-skin scent that even the manliest of men could wear with confidence.

name: Perdizione
notes: Grapefruit, Bergamot, Lavender, Ylang-ylang, Rose, Orange Blossom, Neroli Petitgrain, Cedar, Vanilla, Musk
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Nobile 1942

name: Cafe Chantant
notes: Black Cherry, Laurel, Anise, Heliotrope, Altea, Iris, Benzoin, Vanilla, Patchouli, Musk
style: Creamy, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: The "Singing CafÃ©s" of the Belle Ãpoque- renowned venues of theatre, song and drink that played a major role in the revitalization of Paris in the late 19th century. Artists, socialites and revelers of every social strata flocked to these magical establishments in droves, cultivating an optimism and cultural explosion of unparalleled energy. With CafÃ© Chantant, Nobile 1942 pays tribute to the unique atmosphere of the Singing CafÃ©, from the elegant chypres worn by fashionable ladies, to the rich tobacco smoke of their gentleman companions, and even the delicacies on the tables and in the cocktail glasses, for a fragrance of rich, creamy, aromatic depth.

name: Bon Bon Trio
style: Creamy, Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Discover a world of gourmand delight with this playful trio of fragrances from Nobile 1942. Built around a central accord based on the confection that originated in the Royal Court of 17th century France, each of these three mouthwatering scents offers a uniquely candied experience with deep, sugary tones. Best of all, the three fragrances are specifically designed to be combined and layered in any configuration to create a sweet treat all your own- infinite possibilities await.

name: Rosa Incantevole Trio
description: A dynamic collection of scents based around a uniquely fragrant flower- the Turkish Rose, also known as the Damascan Rose. Cultivated in Bulgaria and Turkey, these flowers are prized for their beautifully pale petals and lush, powerful fragrance. In this wondrous trio, three unique scents showcase various aspects of the flower, and are designed to be worn individually or combined in an infinite spectrum of layers, combinations and configurations- a true invitation to make them your own.

name: Knize Ten
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Orange, Petitgrain, Rosemary, Geranium, Rose, Cedar, Orris, Carnation, Cinnamon, Orange Blossom, Sandalwood, Leather, Musk, Moss, Patchouli, Ambergris, Castoreum And Vanilla.
style: Classic Masculine, Masculine, Spicy
description: Joseph Knize, one of its inventors lived in Vienna and was a supplier to the Royal and Imperial Court. The fragrance we offer, Knize Ten, has been available since 1925. The great author Hans Habe once said that, if he were cast away on a desert island, he would take Knize with him, since, for a man using a toilet water, it was really not so much a matter of undermining the morale of a beautiful woman than boosting one's own.

name: Knize Ten Golden Edition
notes: Petitgrain, Orange, Rosemary, Bergamot, Lemon, Cedarwood, Sandalwood, Geranium, Iris, Rose, Carnation, Cinnamon, Leather, Ambergris, Musk, Moss, Vanilla, Castoreum
style: Classic Masculine, Masculine
description: Milano Fragranze

name: Two
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Petitgrain, Green Notes, Galbanum, Iris, Violet, Jasmine, Carnation, Rose, Aldehydes, Cedarwood, Sandalwood, Moss, Tonka Bean, Musk, Ambergris
style: Fougere
description: A floral addition to the Knize family, Knize Two, created in 1978, is a fresh floral chypre with a beautiful, cut violet-leaf note singing in its heart. Clean and fresh but with minor-key notes that keep its melody interesting, Knize Two could help usher in spring with its sunny disposition.

name: Knize Forest
notes: Orange, Lemon, Petitgrain, Bergamot, Lavender, Rosemary, Sage, Oregano, Basil, Geranium, Rosewood, Carnation, Vetiver, Patchouly, Sandalwood, Ambergris, Labdanum (Rockrose), Oakmoss, Musk
style: Fougere
description: Knize Forest is green and at the same time soft and balmy. It has a contingent of bergamot. The heart is aromatic, spicy and a little woody on a base of ambergris and musk. Memories of the wide, green grassland of Ireland awaken in us.

name: Craft
notes: Aldehydes, Elemi, Cold Metal, Ice, Cedar Wood, Patchouli
description: Andrea Maack

name: Ceramic
notes: Foliage, Apple, Freesia, White And Purple Flowers, Lily Of The Valley, Musk, Woody Amber
description: Andrea Maack

name: Lightsource
notes: Lemon, Green Fig, Petitgrain, Star Jasmine, Crystal Rose, Pink Pepper, Black Pepper
description: A very rare composition of a Crystal Rose. This never-smelled-before rose absolute was created especially for the artist and is based on her assertive paintings.

name: Pavilion
notes: Praline Accord, Honey, Saffron, Rose, Rose Essential, Patchouli, Vanilla, Amber, Oud Accord
description: A rich, warm and sensual blend of rose, oud, vanilla and honey, this extract scent is a luxurious and indulgent fragrance experience. With its powerful, intoxicating aroma, this scent is perfect for those who seek to make a bold and memorable statement.

name: Coven
notes: Woody Notes, Green Grass, Soil Tincture, Oakmoss, Whiskey And Spicy Notes
description: Andrea Maack

name: Soft Tension
notes: Freesia, Musk, Mate Absolute, Cedarwood, Moss
style: Floral, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Andrea Maack

name: Entrance
notes: Bergamot, Pink Berries, Nutmeg, Patchouli, Coriander, Geranium, Amber, Vanilla, Vetiver, Cedar
style: Avant-Garde, Creamy, Earthy, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: ENTRANCE X ANDREA MAACK is a collaborative project between ReykjavÃ­k based visual artist turned perfumer Andrea Maack and luxury fashion boutique Entrance in Bucharest.

name: Mediterraneo Eau de Parfum
notes: Citric Notes, Green Tea, Lemon Leaves
style: Fresh - Citrus
description: Dedicated to the cradle of the great civilizations of Europe, Africa and Asia, Mediterraneo is a sunny fragrance, ample and original, which blends the classic freshness of lemon leaves with the young sparkling notes of green tea. Sun-filled.

name: Fiori di Capri
notes: Ambergris, Carnation, Lily Of The Valley, Oakmoss, Sandalwood, Ylang-Ylang
style: Classic Feminine, Floral
description: This is the Capri perfume par excellence. The Mediterranean notes of wild carnation, still picked by hand on Capri's Mount Solaro, lily of the valley and oak are blended together with the enigmatic aroma of amber and sandalwood to recreate the original Medieval recipe from 1380.

name: Via Camerelle
description: Gendarme

name: Carthusia Uomo
notes: Cashmere, Cedar, Citrus, Kelp, Notes Of Sea Air And Essences Of Fruit
style: Classic Masculine, Fresh - Aquatic, Masculine, Salty / Oceanic
description: Carthusia

name: Numero Uno
notes: Bergamot, Sicilian Orange, Lavender, Thyme, Eucalyptus, Violet, Ylang-ylang, Patchouli, Vetiver, Myrrh And White Musk
style: Chypre, Classic Masculine, Masculine
description: Carthusia

name: Corallium
notes: Bay Laurel, Bergamot, Cedar, Musk, Myrrh, Patchouly, Sage, Sedum, Tangerine
style: Chypre, Salty / Oceanic
description: Try to imagine a fresh breeze on the Isle of Capri, crossed by inland winds carrying scents of perfumed wood, aromatic herbs, flowers, and fruits roughened by the salty air. And then they emerge: the sharp notes of Bay and Myrrh, of Mandarin and Bergamot combined with dense Patchouli and Cedar, masterfully balanced by a solid base of Sage, Musk and Tree Sedum. These are just a hint  of the sensations bursting forth from Corallium, created from the sea with its  astonishingly high quality  and remarkable persistence.

notes: Ambergris, Bergamot, Black Pepper, Cedarwood, Coriander, Frankincense, Iris, Lavender, Musk, Neroli, Petitgrain, Rosemary, Sandalwood, Tangerine, Thyme, Vanilla
style: Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: "The island of Capri in 1681. Under the reign of Charles II of Spain and the Bishop of Anacapri, fatalism, battles, brutal pirate attacks and intrigues within the church dominate everyday life. And yet, in the newly re-opened Carthusian monastery, germinate the seeds of a significant new era."

name: Terra Mia
notes: Bergamot, Neroli, Pink Pepper, Rose, Jasmine, Coffee, Hazelnut, Orange Blossom, Vanilla, Amber Woods
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Carthusia

name: Gelsomini di Capri
notes: Jasmine, Geranium, Cloves, Ylang-ylang, Orange Blossom, Cedar, Beeswax, Turkish Rose, Madagascar Vanilla
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - White
description: April Aromatics

name: M V2Q
notes: Orange Blossom, Pink Peppercorn, Lavender Essence, Cinnamon, Cypriol, Pine Tar, Jasmine Sambac, Patchouli, Vanilla, Labdanum, Tonka, Cedarwood
style: Masculine, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: New reimagined version: M V2Q

notes: Cassis, Fresh Tangerine Blossom, Jasmine, Magnolia, Natural Mimosa, Neroli Bigarade, Rose Wardia, Sweet Amber, Vetiver, White Musk
style: Classic Feminine, Exotic, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice
description: Puredistance

name: Gold
notes: Green Mandarin, Bergamot, Pink Peppercorn, Rosemary, Clove Buds, Jasmin Absolute, Ciste Absolute, Geranium, Cinnamon, Styrax, Benzoin, Myrrhe, Patchouli, Vanilla Green Beans, Tonka Beans, Castoreum Absolute, Vetiver
style: Floral - Spicy, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Elegant, chic, unforgettable- the latest Master Perfume from Puredistance is more than worthy of the name Gold. Inspired by a Mondrian-themed Gold, Black and White color palette meant to naturally harmonize with any surrounding, this fragrance finds creator Antoine Lie drawing on a rich trove of golden shaded fragrant materials to create a scent of warm, woodsy elegance- an ambery fragrance with impeccable balance, vintage flair, and a touch of modern chic.

name: No. 12
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Cardamom, Coriander, Ylang Ylang, Narcissus Absolute, Jasmin Absolute, Rose, Geranium, Lily Of The Valley, Orange Blossom, Osmanthus Absolute, Orris Butter, Heliotrope, Hedione, Vetiver, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Oak Moss, Tonka, Ambrette, Ambroxan, Vanilla, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft
description: A grand perfume that wraps around you like a cashmere veil, leaving a feminine, mysterious trail. A perfume like no other, in many ways timeless and hard to describe with words.

name: Perfume Sample Gift Set
description: Elegant gift box with white satin lining, including 12 x 2 ml Perfume Sprayers:

name: Opardu
notes: Bulgarian Rose, Carnation, Cedar Wood, Gardenia, Heliotrope, Jasmine Absolute, Purple Lilac, Tuberose Absolute
style: Classic Feminine, Floral - White
description: Jao

name: Sheiduna
notes: Lemon, Tangerine, Blackcurrant, Aldehydes, Bulgarian Rose Essence, Geranium, Clove, Vetiver, Patchouly, Woody Amber, Incense, Benzoin, Myrrh, Tonka Bean, Vanilla Pods, Musks
style: Earthy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Woody - Dark
description: Shei-du-na. Enunciate each syllable and all the right associations come to mind: she, sheikh, dunes. In his 1992 novelThe English Patient, Michael Ondaatje mentions that sand dunes in the Sahara resemble the dips and hollows of a womanâs back.
