Sheiduna perfectly captures that sense of duality between two things that look the same and yet are not the same â the shadowed softness of a womanâs hip and the dusty angularity of a wind-sharpened dune.

name: Black
style: Exotic, Spicy, Woody - Light
description: What does black mean to you? Is it the darkened room in which you dream, the glistening menace of a panther's fur, the nervous stab of a blot of ink? What do you think black smells like? The smoking screech of a rubber tire, the rainbow shimmer of an oil slick, the sweaty leather of a rebel?

name: Warszawa
notes: Galbanum, Grapefruit, Violet Leaf, Jasmin Absolute, Broom, Orris Butter, Patchouli, Vetiver, Styrax
style: Classic Feminine, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: Warsaw- one of Europe's largest, most historic, greatest capitals, teeming with culture, tradition, beauty and life. And through that hum of history, the women of Poland- beautiful, sophisticated, brilliant, resilient- have led the way. They are Puredistance and Antoine Lie's inspiration for Warszawa, a classically-styled knockout of a feminine scent, overflowing with floral warmth, vintage beauty and unparalleled depth.

name: White
notes: Rose De Mai, Tonka Bean Absolute, Orris Absolute, Sandalwood, Bergamot, Musk, Vetyver, Patchouli.
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Light
description: What does happiness smell like? Surely, there are a million individual answers, and yet White, the result of Puredistance and Antoine Lie's quest to create a fragrance that would instantly evoke intense joy, glows with an undeniable, universal radiance. Born from the uncompromising quality of vision and material that Puredistance has become renowned for, White is much more than an ordinary bright, lush floral: it's a genuine work of breathtaking, yet nuanced, beauty that's impossible to dislike.

name: Aenotus
notes: Orange, Mandarin, Lemon, Yuzu, Mint, Blackcurrant Bud, Petitgrain, Oakmoss, Patchouli, Musks
description: On a rocky bluff at the edge of the mythical isle of Aeolia, a mythic God tends to the divine winds. At a moment's notice, he is ready to release them in all their elemental force, to sweep across the lands of ancient Europe, carrying in their embrace the contrasting powers of creation and destruction. This is the power of Aenotus, itself a fragrance of contrast: freshness and warmth, comfort and primal power.

name: Rubikona
notes: Grapefruit, Bergamot, Mandarin, Rose, Iris, Ylang, Clove, Orange Blossom, Creamy Notes, Patchouli, Cedarwood, Vanilla, Solar Notes, Musk
description: Puredistance

name: Fougere Royale
notes: Bergamot, Mediterranean Herbs, Lavender, Chamomile, Rondeletia, Geranium, Rose De Mai, Cinnamon, Carnation, Amber, Oakmoss, Patchouli, Tonka Bean, Clary Sage
style: Classic Masculine, Fougere
description: First introduced in 1882, FougÃ¨re Royale completely revolutionized the world of perfumes and established modern perfumery as we know it today. FougÃ¨re Royale was the first âfougÃ¨reâ (or fern-like) perfume ever created, and it established a completely new fragrance family, which remains the most popular one in men's fragrances.

name: Mad About You
notes: Black Tea, Licorice, Red Fruits, Lipstick, Violet, Leather
style: Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Frapin

name: Animal Mondain
notes: Pear Tree Leaves, Turkish Tobacco, Mahogany
style: Animalic, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Mad et Len

name: A Une Madone
notes: Ugandan Vanilla, Neroli, Benzoin, Cardamom, Sandalwood, Castoreum, Civet, Myrrh, Styrax, Gaiac, Gurjum
style: Animalic, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: "Grown on the volcanic hills of Uganda, benefiting from two rainy seasons and two harvests in January and July, Uganda vanilla is a Plantifolia, broad and flat with a matte color.  Developing notes of animalics, leather, fruity cocoa, and peaty single malt, this vanilla is a tomboy!"

name: Myrrhiad
notes: Black Tea Absolute, Licorice, Myrrh, Vanilla
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: The amazingly prolific Pierre Guillaume adds a ninth scent to HuitiÃ¨me Art, a line dedicated to rare natural organic ingredients and original accords based on novel âplant capturesâ. But this time, instead of pear tree bark or organic Moroccan verbena, he tackles one of the most ancient and sacred aromatic ingredients known to mankind: myrrh.

name: Poudre de Riz
notes: Burnt Toast And Maple Notes), Cedar, Coconut, Damask Rose, Iris, Rice Powder Accord (caramelic, Sandalwood, Tiare Absolute, Tolu Balsam And Benzoin Resin, Tonka Bean, Vanilla
style: Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Inspired by a line in the 1908 novel L'Enfer by Henri Barbusse... âThe air in the disordered shuttered room was heavy with a mixture of odours: Soap, face powder, the sharp tang of cologne...â

name: Monsieur
notes: Patchouli, Cedarwood, Vetiver And Sandalwood, Absolute Of Poplar, Oakmoss, Incense Wood And Papyrus.
style: Woody - Spicy
description: Simone Andreoli

name: Aqaysos
notes: Lime, Coriander, Blackcurrant, Sansho Berry, Woods, Musks, Cocoa Beans
style: Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Spicy, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: What is the scent of crystalline wood? This concept, of the strange geometry that might exist somewhere between nature's most versatile material and one of it's most fascinatingly exact, is what inspired Pierre Guillaume to create Aqaysos, a scent which casts a fascinatingly illusive prism that alternates between spicy, fruity and woody notes. The result is an elusive, versatile and sneakily powerful fragrance that wears like a suave, modern, and refreshing take on a certain wildly popular fruit-inflected masculine.

name: Medie
notes: Grapefruit, Green Mandarin, Sambac Jasmine
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Light
description: Trudon

name: Mortel Noir
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: Mortel Noir unveils a more concentrated facet of Mortel's original formulation: the strength of black pepper from Madagascar blended with incense from Somalia, with the warm power of myrrh and benzoin revealing the erotic spell of pure cistus. A potent and spicy perfume, Mortel Noir has the mystical presence of an artist evolving between light and darkness. And it's dressed in attire to match- a matte black bottle and cap.

name: Vixi
notes: Cardamom, Natural Italian Petitgrain Essence, Natural Essence Of Balkan Sage, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Jasmine
style: Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Conceived as an initiatory journey toward lightness, VIXI is a luminous and fresh fragrance that truly smells like "a luminous ode to life." On skin, flickers of gentle warmth from sandalwood and cedarwood are complemented by the cool, smooth, green spiciness of cardamom and sage. A stunning and exciting addition to the woody-aromatic family of fragrance.

name: II (Deux)
notes: Green Leaves, Orange Bigarade, Pine, Pepper, Juniper, Cedar, Incense, Ambroxan, Cashmeran
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Spicy
description: II, or Deux (French for two), is all about new beginnings: the second act, rebirth, regeneration. Essentially, Deux is an aromatic scent filled to brimming with the piercingly green smell of regrowth â fig saplings, plants, and young conifers pushing their way up through layers of humus and pine needles to meet the sun. With lots of aromatic juniper and bitter orange, it is brisk and unsentimental, an impression confirmed by its salty, woody musk in the drydown. Like all the perfumes in the Cire Trudon range, it is perfectly unisex.

name: Mortel
notes: Black Pepper, Pimento, Nutmeg, Frankincense, Virginia Cedar, Cistus, Myrrh And Benzoin
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Spicy
description: Mortel proves thereâs a reason why incense has been burned in churches for thousands of years: it just smells darned good. Yes, incense is used to purify the air and to rid places of worship of bad spirits. But the truth of the matter is that the scent of frankincense, labdanum, myrrh, and benzoin is almost universally pleasing. The question then becomes how to build an incense fragrance in a way that it stands out from countless others in the genre. Some use room-filling synthetics to lift the resins, some are dense and airless, and some are airy, bright â almost soapy.

name: Bombay Bling
notes: Blackcurrant, Cardamom, Cedar, Cistus, Cumin, Gardenia, Jasmine Sambac, Lychee, Mango, Patchouli, Plumeria, Sandalwood, Tobacco, Tuberose, Turkish Rose, Vanilla, Ylang-ylang
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Fruity
description: "This joyful creation embodies every aspect of the very modern, colorful, eclectic, esoteric, ecstatic, liberal, happy side of buzzing India", Neela Vermeire explains. And what a buzz Bombay Bling is, starting with the bang of a huge, raspy green mango before exploding into a vibrant, tropical blend of jasmine, tuberose, ylang-ylang, plumeria and gardenia.

name: Mohur
notes: Almond Milk Accord, Amber, Ambrette, Benzoin, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Carrot, Coriander, Elemi, Hawthorn, Jasmine, Leather, Orris, Oudh Palao From Laos, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Turkish Rose Oil, Vanilla
style: Exotic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Fruity, Fruity
description: The name refers to the most valuable gold coin in India's history, the last of which was minted in 1918. A way, perhaps, of underlining the value given to perfumery during the Mogul era, an art so highly considered that the most powerful empress of the Mughal dynasty, Noor Jahan, devoted herself to perfecting it.

name: Trayee
notes: Amber Notes, Basil, Blackcurrant Absolute, Blue Ginger, Cardamom Absolute, Cedar, Cinnamon, Clove, Egyptian Jasmine, Elemi, Ganja Accord, Incense, Jasmine Sambac, Javanese And Haitian Vetiver, Myrrh, Mysore Sandalwood Oil, Oak Moss., Oud Palao From Laos, Patchouli, Saffron, Vanilla
style: Exotic, Fruity, Woody - Spicy
description: The name means "triad", an allusion to the sacred origin of the first three Vedas, the most ancient sacred texts in India. The notes are drawn from the ingredients used in religious rituals and ayurvedic medicine during the Vedic era. Rich in incense, myrrh and oud, the fragrance is a poignant blend of smoke, spices and resins that harks back to the very origins of perfumery â a burnt offering to the gods and an aid to meditation.

name: Ashoka
notes: Ambre Gris, Birch, Cassie Absolute, Cedarwood, Fig Leaf, Fig Milk, Fir Balsam Absolute, Geranium, Haitian Vetiver, Heliotrope, Incense Essence, Iris, Jasmine Sambac, Leather, Lotus, Myrrh, Osmanthus Absolute, Parsley Leaf, Rose, Sandalwood, Styrax, Vanilla Accord, Water Hyacinth, Ylang-ylang
style: Creamy, Exotic
description: Inspired by a legendary ruler, Neela Vermeire'sAshoka, is a tribute to an emperor who was conquered by his own compassion at the moment his victory was assured. He converted to Buddhism and devoted the rest of his life to spreading the Buddha's teachings, to truth, to justice and to compassion for all living creatures beneath the sun. His own evolution from ruthless conqueror to benevolent emperor is reflected in Ashoka's journey from the fierce opening to a softly floral heart & the gentle embrace of its richly complex dry down.

name: Mohur Extrait
notes: Agarwood (oud), Almond, Amber, Ambrette, And Tonka Bean., Benzoin, Cardamom, Carrot Seeds, Coriander, Elemi, Iris, Jasmine, Leather, Patchouli, Pepper, Rose, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Violet, Woody Notes
style: Creamy, Floral, Fruity, Spicy
description: Neela Vermeire Creations

name: Pichola
notes: Benzoin Absolute, Bergamot, Cardamom, Cinnamon, Clementine, Driftwood, Jasmine Sambac, Juniper, Magnolia, Neroli Oil, Orange Blossom Absolute, Rose Absolute, Saffron, Sandalwood, Tuberose Absolute, Vetiver From Haiti., Ylang-ylang
style: Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Lake Pichola is the crown jewel and central focus of the princely city of Udaipur. A myriad of colourful historic, architectural and spiritual reflections reflect from the surface of this ancient yet manmade treasure - the sunlight and moonlight of each season bringing out the eternal and timeless beauty of the lake and the Rajasthan region

name: Neela Vermeire Discovery Set
description: Journey into Neela Vermeire's world, where contemporary French perfumery as wielded by legend Bertrand Duchaufour gets free rein to illuminate Neela Vermeire's exploration into the history of India, across vast time periods and characters.

name: Niral
notes: Iris, Pink Pepper, Tea, Turkish Rose, Green Wine Lees, Cabreuva, Angelica Seed, Ambrette Seed, Cardamom, Leather, Magnolia, Jasmine, Sandalwood, Cedar
style: Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: Neela Vermeire has always been a line of unmatched elegance, where the rich cultural heritage of India and the refinement of western perfumery go hand in hand to create enchanting, delightful fragrances. Niral, from a Hindi word and name connoting uniqueness and serenity, is inspired by Sir Thomas Wardle, a 19th-century expert in the sericulture and the Indian wild silk trade, and so it's only appropriate that the fragrance is a stunningly smooth blend of florals, spices and musks that's as silky as they come.

name: Pluie de Soleil
notes: Bergamot, Freesia, Lemon, Musk, Pineapple, Sandalwood, Strawberry
style: Fruity
description: April Aromatics

name: Tabac Rouge
notes: Cinnamon, Ginger, Honey, Musk, Powdery Notes And Benzoin
style: Gourmand, Woody - Spicy
description: Maitre Parfumeur et Gantier

name: Rouge Avignon
notes: Cacao Pod, Hinoki Wood, Musk And Amber, Raspberry, Rose, Sandalwood, Tuber, Vetiver, Ylang-ylang
description: Maison Rebatchi

name: Le Vainqueur
notes: Ambergris, Bergamot, Calabrian Jasmine, Florentine Iris, Geranium, Ginger, Grapefuit, Italian Mandarin, Lavender, Leather, Lily Of The Valley, Melon, Musk, Nutmeg, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Watermelon
style: Classic Masculine
description: Jeanne Sandra RancÃ© has revived the name and prestige of the perfume âLE VAINQUEURâ, which was been presented by her great-great-grand-father FranÃ§ois to Napoleon the Great,  with an alluring creation made of exquisite ingredients.

name: Le Roi Empereur
notes: Amber, Anise, Cardamom, Cedar, Cinnamon, Iris, Lavender, Leather, Musk, Orange Flower, Violet
description: With his coronation as King of Italy on May 26th, 1805 in Milan, thus taking on the dual title of EMPEROR and KING, NAPOLEON reached the peak of his glory. Only Charlemagne, one thousand years before him, had succeeded in bringing the whole of Europe under his rule.

name: 1740 Marquis de Sade
notes: Bergamot, Davana Sensualis, Patchouli, Coriander, Cardamom, Cedar, Birch, Labdanum, Leather, Vanilla, Elemi, Immortelle
style: Exotic, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Spicy
description: Marquis de SadeBirth year of a Parisian gentleman, named Donatien-Alphonse-FranÃ§ois, which posterity remembers as the Marquis de Sade. For this man, whose licentious morals had him imprisoned many times, luxury rhymes with literature. The libertine writer would undoubtedly have enjoyed the audacity of this spiced wooded scent, an invitation to pleasure with its bergamot and Davana Sensualis hints, rounded with patchouli and everlasting flower.

name: 1828 Jules Verne
notes: Grapefruit, Citrus, Tangerine, Eucalyptus, Nutmeg, Pepper, Cedar, Incense, Vetiver, Pinecone
style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous
description: Penhaligons

notes: Cardamom, Chocolate, Clove, Coffee, Fruit Of The Sun, Patchouli, Peach, Rose, White Flowers, White Musk
style: Chypre, Fruity, Gourmand
description: The carnal sensuality of a voluptuous bunch of spices. In the trail of this leathery, peachy gourmand, mystery is tinted with eroticism that the mythical year of 1969 evokes without a blush.

name: Ambre 114
notes: Amber, Benzoin, Cedar, Geranium, Musk, Nutmeg, Patchouli, Rose, Sandalwood, Thyme, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Vetiver
description: Histoires de Parfums

name: 1899 - Ernest Hemingway
notes: Black Pepper, Cinammon, Florentine Iris, Italian Bergamot, Juniper, Orange Blossom, Vanilla, Vetiver, Yellow Amber
style: Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Born on the edge of a century that changed the world order, Ernest Hemingway was involved in the u-turn events of his era. From USA to Spain, from Italy, then Paris to Cuba, Hemingway's journeys tell a lot about his convictions.

name: This Is Not A Blue Bottle
notes: Aldehydes, Orange Zest, Honey, Geranium, Musk, Patchouli, Amber
style: Earthy, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Histoires de Parfums

name: 1969 Travel Spray
notes: Fruit Of The Sun, Peach, Rose, White Flowers, Cardamom, Clove, Patchouli, Chocolate, Coffee, White Musk
style: Chypre, Fruity, Gourmand
description: The carnal sensuality of a voluptuous bunch of spices. In the trail of this ambery gourmand, mystery is tinted with eroticism that the mythical year of 1969 evokes without a blush.

name: 1899 Travel Spray
notes: Italian Bergamot, Juniper, Black Pepper, Orange Blossom, Florentine Iris, Cinammon, Vanilla, Vetiver, Yellow Amber
style: Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Hemingway's passion was captured in this fragrance. From soldier, to adventurer, journalist and at last writer, his brilliant route invites us to travel, imagine and move to action. This is a tribute to a vibrant and raw man.

name: Honeysuckle / Caprifoglio Cologne
description: Santa Maria Novella

name: Russian Cologne
description: Long considered a typically male fragrance, this fresh and zesty scent with it's decisive aroma of bitter orange, bergamot, and musk is now being worn by men and women alike.

name: Tabacco Toscano Cologne
style: Classic Masculine
description: Santa Maria Novella

name: Rosa Gardenia Cologne
notes: Bergamot, Almond Blossom, Orange Blossom, Gardenia, Centifolia Rose, Fig Leaf, Jasmine, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Musk
style: Floral, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Rosa Gardenia, a new story of endless grace. A new creation, visionary and inspiring, which embodies the endless grace of wonderful flowers. Rosa Gardenia tells you a new story, inspired by 800 years of tradition, just waiting to become your story.The queen of all flowers, the rose, and the softness and creaminess of the gardenia come together to form a single fragrance.

name: Rosa Novella Cologne
notes: Lemon, Petitgrain, Centifolia Rose, Jasmine, Gardenia, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Musk
style: Floral - Spicy
description: Santa Maria Novella

name: Orange Blossom / Zagara Cologne
description: Santa Maria Novella

name: Pot Pourri Cologne
style: Earthy, Exotic
description: Santa Maria Novella

name: Musk / Muschio Cologne
style: Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Fashionable in the early part of the century and currently enjoying a revival, Musk has always been a favorite. The plant-based extracts in this fragrance come from Sumbul roots, found in the area around Samarkand in Uzbekistan. Exotic, slightly sweet with powdery undertones. Suitable for men or women, day or night.

name: Patchouli Cologne
style: Earthy
description: This perfume was met with great success in the late 1800s and early 1900s and has now become a classic. The plant from which the fragrance is made is grown in India and Malaysia and creates a warm exotic, ambery and musky scent. Perfect for men and women.

name: Pomegranate / Melograno Cologne
description: Santa Maria Novella

name: Spanish Leather Cologne
description: Masque Milano

name: Vetiver Cologne
description: Santa Maria Novella

name: Citta di Kyoto Cologne
description: Santa Maria Novella

name: Angels of Florence Cologne
description: Santa Maria Novella

name: Alba di Seoul Cologne
description: Santa Maria Novella

name: No. 1 for Women
notes: Pineapple, Plum, Mirabelle, Bergamot, Lemon, And Cardamom, Rose, Jasmine, Ylang Ylang, Orris, Orchid, Vanilla, Tonka Seeds, Cedarwood, Sandalwood, Musk, Amber
style: Floral - Ambery Spice
description: Undeniably feminine, with an olfactory arc that moves from transporting and fresh-aromatic to otherworldly, exotic and decadent, No. 1 for Women is a first-class perfume ticket to a floral wonderland. The best Indian jasmine, Tahitian vanilla, Rose Centifolia, carnation and ylang-ylang, make up No. 1's heart, helping to explain the perfume's designation as the world's most expensive, made without reference to cost. But this cost helps produce an intoxicating scent experience that is recognizably special at first spray.

name: No. 1 for Men
notes: Bergamot, Lime, Sicilian Mandarin, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Thyme, Lily Of The Valley, Rose, Jasmine, Ylang Ylang, Heliotrope, Cedarwood, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Ambery Woods, And Vanilla.
style: Masculine, Woody - Spicy
description: Wanting to push the parameters of what is acceptable, Clive Christian turned his creative design to having a fragrance for the night. No. 1 was created with passion. It has great personality; it is refined and without question highly distinctive and original. It is a perfume which stands out from the crowd; it is the fragrance of ultimate luxury.

name: 1872 for Men
notes: Amber, And Musk, Bergamot, Black Pepper, Cedarwood, Cyclamen, Freesia, Grapefruit, Jasmine, Lime, Nutmeg, Olibanum, Patchouli, Petit Grain, Sage, Tagete Oil
style: Fresh - Citrus, Masculine, Spicy
description: 1872 for Men is one of two perfumes Clive Christian named as tribute to the year Queen Victoria granted her crown to revered British perfume house Crown Perfumery, acquired by the English perfumer in 1999.

name: 1872 for Women
notes: And Moss., Bergamot, Blueberry, Cedarwood, Erogen Musk, Freesia, Jasmine, Lemon, Lily Of The Valley, Patchouli, Pineapple, Purple Violet, Rose De Mai, Rosemary, Sandalwood, Tangerine
style: Chypre, Floral - Fruity
description: Inside its verdant bottle originally designed inthe  momentous year of its name, 1872 for Women houses an effervescent rose whose clean, fresh and green notes burst forth as if from a popped champagne bottle. Interestingly, for a perfume named after the past, 1872 for Women recalls nothing of rose's usual conservative and stodgy reputation. This is a young and fresh rose, with top notes such as bergamot, tangerine and lemon and a light chypre dry down of patchouli, moss, cedar, sandalwood and musk.

name: Crab Apple Blossom
notes: Apple Blossom, Green Rhubarb, Bergamot, Sandalwood, Driftwood
description: ROJA London

name: Blonde Amber
notes: Sparkling Pink Pepper, Bitter Orange, Rum, Bold Blonde Tobacco, Tuberose, Sweet Dried Fruit, Sumptuous Tonka, Vetivert, Myrrh
description: A warm amber, spiced with aromatic and smokey blonde tobacco tells the story of Art Deco decadence. A riot of flourishing florals and dried fruits join the melee of fine ingredients, creating an indulgent blend.

name: Town & Country
notes: Bergamot, Clary Sage, Juniper, Lemon, Cardamom, Frankincense, Sandalwood, White Tea, Ambergris, Cashmere, Cedar, Patchouli
style: Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Warm, Woody - Spicy
description: Orto Parisi

name: X for Men
notes: Amber, And Juniper Berry, And Vanilla, Bergamot, Cardamom, Cedarwood, Cinnamon, Ginger, Jasmine Hedione, Moss, Orris, Pimento Oil, Sambac Oil, Spices, Vetiver Oil
style: Masculine, Woody - Spicy
description: Take the lushest jasmine and light it on fire with the warming spices of cinnamon, ginger and cardamom. Let it smolder on a bed of rich orris and vanilla as aromatic rays of cedarwood subtly radiate in the background, and you have Clive Christian's cuddly yet sexy X for Men.

name: Perfume Traveler Set for Men
description: For the discerning man on the go is the Clive Christian Perfume Spray Traveler Set for Men. Enjoy three signature Clive Christian fragrances in travel sizes. Natural ingredients blend the traditional with the rare and exotic. Includes 10ml each of No. 1 perfume spray (world's most expensive perfume), 1872 perfume spray in authentic green bottle and X perfume spray.

name: Perfume Traveler Set for Women
description: For the sophisticated woman on the go is the Clive Christian Perfume Spray Traveler Set for Women. Enjoy three signature Clive Christian fragrances in travel sizes. Natural ingredients blend the traditional with the rare and exotic. Includes 10ml each of No. 1 perfume spray (world's most expensive perfume), 1872 perfume spray in authentic green bottle and X perfume spray.

name: Black
notes: Birch Tar, Black Pepper, Black Tea, Incense, Pepperwood, Red Pepper, Thyme, Tree Moss, Violet
style: Avant-Garde, Smoky, Spicy
description: Comme des Garcons: PLAY

name: Red
notes: Cinnamon, Geranium, Myrrh, Osmanthus, Pink Peppercorn, Red Cherry Accord, Red Mandarin, Safraleine, Tolu Balsam
style: Floral - Fruity, Spicy
description: What's red? A cherry. But Antoine Maisondieu didn't want to resort to the usual tricks of the trade, so he conjured it from a quality of Tolu balsam with a cherry facet, added safraleine for shine â and a leather effect that keeps the sweetness in check --, a drop of red mandarin for sweet juiciness as well as osmanthus and myrrh for their fruity effects. The heart burns like a cinnamon candy, freshened with geranium.

name: Green
notes: Ambrette, Basil, Cedar, Jasmine, Juniper Berry, Lime, Mastic, Nanah Mint, Vetiver
style: Green / Herbaceous
description: HEELEY

name: Cuir Velours
notes: Leather, Tobacco, Rum, Cistus Labdanum, Incense, Fleur D'immortelle
style: Boozy, Resinous / Balsamic
description: An opulent and boozy leather scent that is as velvety and luscious as a fresh peach. The leather note is smooth and supple, almost creamy, and is generously laced with rich tobacco, decadent rum and the dark, rough sweetness of the immortelle flower. At its best, as it is here, immortelle strikes us as the olfactory equivalent of a cat's purr â hints of ripe fruit and fresh hay wrapped in cozy, honeyed warmth. It winds itself around the leather and tobacco in the most delicious way. Incense and cistus labdanum add complexity, but with gentle brushstrokes. This is not a fragrance that startles and challenges â this is a fragrance that beckons, inviting you to take a long, luxurious stretch before settling into the couch. Rich and satisfying -- as comfortable to wear as your favorite worn-in leather jacket.

name: Discovery Sample Set
description: A great way to experience Naomi Goodsir with this beautifully curated selection of 6 perfumes complete with smelling blotters, in a sleek package.

name: Bois d'Ascese
notes: Tobacco, Whiskey, Cinnamon, Amber, Cistus Labdanum, Oakmoss, Smoked Cade Wood, Somalian Incense
style: Boozy, Smoky, Woody - Spicy
description: A meditative swirl of serene incense, intensified by smoked wood. At first, this brings to mind a stark, secluded chapel and a life of plain and simple pleasures. But as it develops, notes of whiskey, tobacco and cinnamon begin to shimmer through the incense, and you start to think that perhaps these pleasures won't be quite so plain, after all. If you have ever enjoyed a fine Islay Scotch whiskey, such as Lagavulin or Laphroaig, you are familiar with the way the intricacies of smoke and moss add a complicated and enigmatic appeal â harsh and medicinal one moment, mesmerizing the next. The layers of smoked cade wood, oakmoss and whiskey have a similar effect here, as bracing jolts of smoke morph into the airy tranquility of incense, keeping us endlessly intrigued and hopelessly addicted.  A starkly elegant fragrance that puts us in a trance.

name: Or du Serail
notes: Amber, Apple & Red Fruit Effects, Bee Wax, Cedar Wood, Cistus, Coco, Davana, Geranium, Honey Effect, Labdanum, Mango, MatÃ©., Musk, Oak Tree, Rum, Sage, Sweet Orange, Turkish Tobacco, Vanilla, Ylang-ylang
style: Exotic, Fruity, Smoky, Sweet
description: Naomi Goodsir

name: Nuit de Bakelite
notes: Angelica, Violet Leaf, Galbanum, Orris, Karo Karounde, Tuberose, Leather, Davana, Styrax, Tobacco, Labdanum, Gaiac Wood
style: Floral - Spicy, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Alluring. That's the simplest way to describe Naomi Goodsir's latest masterpiece, Nuit de Bakelite, an otherworldly, intensely green interpretation of tuberose that's anything but simple. Drawing upon tuberose's most narcotic facets, perfumer Isabelle Doyen has crafted a stunningly bright, tantalizingly aromatic scent that ignites the senses and redefines what a floral fragrance can be.

name: Corpus Equus
notes: Black Rose Petal, Horsehair, Leather, Cigarette Ash, Tonkin Musk, Amber Infusion
style: Animalic, Avant-Garde, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected
description: ERIS Parfums

name: Tucson Parfum
notes: Strawflower, Thyme, Birch, Amber, Labdanum
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: A torrid desert of wild beauty, an impressive tide of deliriously shaped giant cacti, a fantastic rodeoâ¦

name: Elixir du Dr Flair
notes: Wormwood, Clove, Clary Sage, Lavender, Petitgrain, Brazilian Orange, Haitian Vetiver, Virginian Cedar
style: Fougere
description: Pierre Guillaume Paris, Parfumerie Generale

name: Commune de Paris - Cologne
notes: Italian Lemon, Rosemary, Bergamot, Pink Pepper Extract, Lavender Absolute, Labdanum, Benzoin, Patchouli, Vetiver, Cedarwood, Benzaldehyde, Coumarin
style: Woody - Fresh
description: For Commune de Paris â the rebellious and edgy label created by three Parisian creators of fashion and product design â Astier de Villatte and FranÃ§oise Caron have imagined Cologne 1871, a subversive Eau de Cologne.

name: Grand Chalet - Cologne
notes: Linden Blossom, Mimosa, Green Leaves, Bergamot, Heliotrope, Sandalwood, Musk
style: Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Astier de Villatte

name: Eau Chic
notes: Lemon, Lavender, Petitgrain, Ylang, Rose, Thyme, Orange Blossom, Tuberose
style: Floral - Ambery Spice
description: Astier de Villatte

name: Enchanted Forest
notes: Aldehydes, Amber, Blackcurrant Buds Absolute, Blackcurrant Leaf, CO2 Blackcurrant, Carnation, Castoreum, Cedar Notes, Davana, Effects Of Rum And Wine, Fir Balsam Absolute, Flower Cassis, Hawthorn, Honeysuckle, Musk., Oakmoss, Opoponax, Patchouli, Pink Pepper, Rose, Rosemary, Russian Coriander Seed, Siam Benzoin, Sweet Orange, Vanilla, Vetiverm
style: Fruity
description: Enchanted Forest is inspired by the endless sea of Russian forests and fairytales, as well as the most sensual ancient Slavic celebration named Kupala, rooted in the times of darkness, when all on the Earth knew its soul and its name (often too powerful to be uttered in vain or at all). French perfumer Bertrand Duchaufour, the famous creator of fragrances for L'Artisan Parfumeur, Comme des GarÃ§ons and Penhaligon's, built Enchanted Forest around black currant, the smell and taste of which are so beloved in Russia and many other countries where it grows.

name: Swan Princess
notes: A Touch Of Gardenia, Aldehydes, Bergamot, Fresh Citrus Accord, Iris, Jasmine, Lily Of The Valley, Mimosa, Peony, Pink Pepper, Rose, Sandalwood, Six Different Musks, Vetiver.
style: Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Light
description: As the old European fairy tale goes, a princess was turned into a beautiful white swan so resplendent in her plumage that anyone who touched her feathers was compelled to follow her wherever she went. Built around a lavish cocoon of six beautifully distinct musks, Swan Princess proves itself worthy of its namesake, delivering an enchantingly soft musky-floral that instantly puts you under its spell.

name: J'ai Fait Un Reve - Obscur
notes: Bergamot, Egyptian Jasmine Absolute, Moroccan Atlas Cedar And Cashmere Wood, Oud, Pink Pepper, Saffron, Vanilla Flower
description: Majda Bekkali

name: J'ai Fait Un Reve - Clair
notes: Castoreum, Cumin, Currant Leaves, Elemi, Guaiac, Incense And Papyrus, Jasmine, Labdanum, Leather, Lisylang, Orange Blossom, Petitgrain, White Cedar, White Musk
description: Majda Bekkali

name: Fusion Sacree - Clair
style: Gourmand
description: Majda Bekkali

name: Fusion Sacree - Obscur
notes: Ambergris, Benzoin Resinoid, Bergamot, Caramel And Musk, Cardamom, Cedar, Celery, Citron, Cloves, Davana, Geranium, Lavender, Liquorice, Neroli, Opoponax Resinoid, Rum, Sandalwood, Sweet Orange, Sweet William Pear, Tuberose Absolute, Vanilla, White Coffee
style: Boozy, Gourmand
description: Majda Bekkali

name: Mon Nom Est Rouge
notes: Amber, Cardamom, Cedar, Cinnamon, Cumin, Elemi, Geranium, Ginger, Incense, Labdanum, Lemon, Metallic Affect, Musk, Patchouli, Pepper, Pink Pepper, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Turkish Rose, Vanilla, Woody Balsamic
style: Exotic, Floral - Spicy, Spicy
description: Majda Bekkali

name: Tendre est la Nuit - Obscur
notes: Ambrette And Carrot Seeds, Benzoin, Cabreuva, Castoreum, Corsican Immortelle, Davana, Incense, Labdanum, Leather, Oakmoss, Patchouli, Pepper, Sichuan Pepper
style: Chypre, Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Soft, aromatic, and animalic, Tendre est la Nuit evokes a cozy and sweet atmosphere that may result in indolence and languor. Majda Bekkali, âwanted to tell what may be the opposite of the noisy and turbulent world where we live...but when we extract ourselves from the noisy world, some danger lurks around and reason falters, the animality emerges.â An homage to Zelda Fitzgerald (wife of F. Scott) who not only hid in the shadows of her husband, but also in her own cocoon of madness, Tendre Est La Nuit is a scent that references darkness' magnetic appeal and the sweet idleness of a wandering mind.

name: Ambre Premier
notes: Candied Orange, Rose, Patchouli, Amber, Vanilla
description: An amber perfume with an edge, Ambre Premier gets a dark and glittering dose of patchouli added to what FranÃ§ois HÃ©nin calls âits almost childish first notes that evoke cotton candy,â and maybe even a bit of chocolate.

name: 21 Conduit St
notes: Grapefruit, Lavender, Bergamot, Rhubarb, Fir Balsam, Amaretto Accord, Tonka Bean, Ambroxan, Modern Woods
description: When one talks about English traditional perfumery, lavender is the next word coming in the discussion. Whether you have the memory of dry flowers from Norfolk in a sachet or a bottle of authentic British cologne at home, lavender is to English perfumery what cakes and sandwiches are to a fine British afternoon tea.

name: Jovoy - Discovery Kit
description: A fine selection of some of Jovoy Paris most sought after perfumes in mini spray samples. Includes customized cards with visuals and notes on each fragrance.

name: Private Label
notes: Papyrus, Vetiver, Leather, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Cistus Labdanum
style: Earthy
description: If there were a dimmer switch on a perfume's notes, allowing you to turn the lights down and saturate its colors, perfumer CÃ©cile Zaroakian has used it with Private Label. Connoisseurs of leather scents will want to flock to this brooding yet seductive perfume.

name: Fire at Will
notes: Vanilla, Mimosa, Brown Sugar, Musk, Vetiver, Amber
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: In the beginning thereâs vanilla, of course, but itâs an unexpected vanilla â subtle, ethereal, as if suspended, with a unique note of honeyed, powdery mimosa. Next comes a vanilla thatâs gourmand but not heady, fruity but not baked, poised between a ârealâ vanilla ice cream and sweet promises that echo like languorous kisses. An unambiguous fragrance trail, conceived like a beckon, arousing the appetite, and casting a spotlight on whoever wears it. Whether your personality is discreet or, to the contrary, completely intense, this perfume is made for those who wish never to go unnoticed again.

name: Musc Pallas
notes: Calabrian Bergamot, Ambrette, Iris, Peach, Sea Spray, Tonka, Red Musk, White Musk, Powdery Musk
style: Animalic, Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Powdery / Soft
description: Rania J.

name: La Liturgie des Heures
notes: Cypress, Incense, Olibanum, Cistus, Myrrh, Musk
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: Combining the sacred and the profane, La Liturgie des Heures opens the doors of an old country cathedral, infusing the scent of burning incense with lush forest greens. The fragrant, smoky aridity of incense balanced by the rich verdancy of cypress, creates a scent at once voluptuous, mysterious, and meditative. Liturgy of the Hours' warm, resinous base embraces its incense and aromatic greens, softening their intensity and adding an element of seduction.

name: Psychedelique
notes: Citrus, Rose, Geranium, Amber, Patchouli, Cistus Labdanum, Vanilla, Musk
style: Earthy, Sweet
description: PsychÃ©dÃ©lique, Jovoy's magnificent ambered patchouli, largely stays in the shadows, meditating on the synergies between a cocoa-like amber and an inky-dark patchouli, although rose and geranium offer a touch of freshness to its earthy sexiness.

name: Les Jeux Sont Faits
notes: Angelica, Cumin, Dried Fruits, Gin, Labdanum., Patchouli, Petitgrain, Rum, Sandalwood, Tobacco Leaf, Vanilla
style: Boozy, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: In the 1960s,  a particular kind of rogue flourished in French cinema, exemplified by actors Jean Gabin and Lino Ventura. Their natural habitat was the smoky gambling den, the atmosphere thick with vice and retro masculinity. With Jovoy's woody aromatic perfume Les Jeux Sont Faits (âThe Bets Have Been Placedâ), FranÃ§ois HÃ©nin wanted to pay homage to those louche and romantic icons that marked an era.

name: L'Art de la Guerre
notes: Calabrian Bergamot, Rhubarb, Lavender Maillette, Immortelle, Nutmeg, Violet Leaf, Indonesia Patchouli, Sandalwood Australia, Leather, Oak Moss, Corsica Cistus
style: Fougere, Green / Herbaceous
description: There is an olfactive family, a perfume territory, which is traditionally emblematic of men; the Fern. This same fern that awakens in us the memory of the one who gave us our first romantic thrill, sometimes by stealing the fragrance of one of his elders.

name: Incident Diplomatique
notes: Mandarin Orange, Haitian Vetiver, Java Vetiver Oil, Nutmeg, Patchouli, Sandalwood
style: Smoky, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Incident Diplomatique is built on a brisk, striking patchouli base. Patchouli is one of the most provocative notes in all of perfumery and its dry headiness and undeniable earthiness are the centerpiece of this fragrance. Haitian vetiver and Java vetiver oil are employed as heart notes to give body to the composition â  a dry grassiness and a velvety texture. Juicy citrus and vibrant spice create a sweet, flirty opening.  The playful nod to geopolitical tensions in Incident Diplomatique's name suggests a tension of another sort - the tension of an attraction that is dangerous, but also too strong to resist.

name: Remember Me
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Cardamom, Tea, Frangipani, Ginger, Milk, Woody Notes, Cedar, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Exotic, Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: Remember Me is an olfactory aide-memoire of an inspiring trip to Qatar that perfumer Cecile Zarokian took with Jovoy founder, Francois Henin. While in Doha, Cecile fell in love with the scent of Karak, a local chai made with lots of lush, sweet milk, cardamom, and ginger, the steam of which mingled companionably with the exotic mukhallats and bakhoor she was sampling. Combined with wafts of frangipani coming from the shady avenues of Doha, Remember Me is a memory capsule of these exotic but comforting scents.

name: Pavillon Rouge
notes: Spices, Sesame, Whisky, Rum, Coffee, Tobacco, Tea, Leather, Vanilla, Ebony Wood, Benzoin
style: Boozy, Creamy, Gourmand, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: Arte Profumi

name: Hedonist
notes: Rum, Bergamot, Peach, Osmanthus Absolute, Jasmine Abolute, Orange Flower Absolute, Tobacco, Vanilla, Cedarwood, Vetiver
style: Fruity, Sweet
description: Remember when Rossano Brazzi sang âSome Enchanted Evening,â how he fell in love across a crowded room on a tropical Island? If you've ever want to be that girl that stops the party, this bold debut from Victoria Minya is your next must-have.

name: Hedonist Absolute
notes: Jamaican Rum, Jasmine, Orange Flower, Birch, Tobacco, Vanilla
description: One of the most sensuous and beloved niche scents of all time is reborn in the form of an Absolute of rare character. The exhilarating scent of Hedonist Absolute derives its magic from the heady aroma of rich, boozy Jamaican rum blended with lush jasmine and smooth, creamy orange flower. Smoky notes of birch and robustly sweet tobacco couple with lush vanilla to further enhance the depth and mystique of this enchanting creation, still every bit the head-turned as its EDP predecessor, yet rebalanced towards the warmest, richest elements in a way that accentuates its impressive potency and pushes it into impressively unisex territory for men who appreciate the power of sweet, boozy tobacco scent- of course, it's still devastatingly seductive on a woman, as well.

name: Hedonist Series Discovery Set
description: An elegant introduction to some of Viktoria Minya's most beloved fragrance. Each vial contains 2ml of perfume and comes with a pressure fit cap. Discovery set includes:

name: Jeke
notes: Amber, Benzoin, Caramel, Clove, Honey, Rum, Smoke, Tobacco, Vanilla, Whiskey
style: Smoky
description: JEKE 2022Jeke focuses on three main accords: whiskey, âamber+honeyâ and tobacco. The whiskey note comes from a booze accord Iâve worked on since 2014 (for those who have received prototypes of it over the last 8 years, this is the âWithnailâ perfume) that uses extract of whiskey along with a special rum material. These two materials pair up beautifully and are glued with a unique caramel note which buttresses up perfectly to the honey chord. To this boozy accord I added traces of a number of chemicals which add tones of reflective metal and âgolden flintyâ notes. I wanted the vaporous boozy aspect to really sparkle in the air. I wanted to create something like a whiskey/rum aldehyde, but one that was rooted in something a bit richer and more substantive. Not the faint ephemeral suggestion of alcohol but a massive golden rum/whiskey scent that billows into the air like a smokestack. The liquor aspect of Jeke is not reserved. It is very much front and center. Next to this are the honey and tobacco chords which are based on actual pipe tobacco casing syrup recipes and utilize not just real honey and real tobacco but the full array of aromatic curing materials used by tobacconists to flavor and scent tobaccos. It is a perfect balance of sweet, spicy, smokey amber tobacco within in a thick golden halo of whiskey and rum notes. This is the version of Jeke Iâve always envisioned in my mind.

name: Norne
notes: Fern, Fog Caked Needle, Hemlock, Incense, Lichen, Moss
style: Exotic, Fougere, Green / Herbaceous
description: Few locations on earth bridge the gap between the terrestrial and the supernatural like the forests of the Pacific Northwest. Dominated by towering old-growth trees, shrouded in fog and deciduous shadow, these forests represent the few remaining places where mankind's dominion over the planet is far from absolute, and the wisdom of nature still supersedes the passing concerns of civilization. With Norne, Slumberhouse aims to capture the essence of this mystical place, and the results are nothing short of extraordinary.

name: Grev
notes: Copaiba Balsam, Spearmint, Pine, Star Anise, Apple Peel, Fir Resin, Clove, Orris Root, Cedar, Sandalwood
style: Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Fresh
description: Gravel

name: Fjerne
notes: Milk, Honey, Hazelnut, Cedar, Musk, Wheat, Amber, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Feuilletine, Tonka, Carob, Vanilla, Cistus, Styrax
style: Floral, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Sweet
description: Anat Fritz

name: Mond
style: Fruity, Woody - Spicy
description: The crisp spice of autumn air. Marcescent hillsides aflame in auburn & gold. The purest essence of xanthophyll distilled down to a suaveolent umber-hued malabathrum eclegme. Formulated solely from an 'autumnal palette' of unique raw materials and accords designed over the last 8 years, Mond stands as one of the longest running Slumberhouse projects dating back to the family of creations like Zahd, Kiste, Sova and Jeke.

name: Sova
notes: Beeswax, Genet Flower, Golden Grains, Hay, Hops, Poplar, Sweet Clover, Tobacco
style: Gourmand, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: Liis

name: Ore
notes: Balsams Of Peru & Tolu, Benzoin, Cocoa, Fossil Amber, Guaiac, Milk & Bushman Candleresin, Muhuhu, Oak, Patchouli, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Woody - Dark
description: ORE 2022Most of the ingredients this time around are the product of special extraction methods which both remove much of the pigment from the materials and also results in highly âsculptedâ and curated aspects of each raw material, allowing the problematic elements to be discarded while retaining the aspects most desirable to the perfumer. Ore is a deep and dark pseudo gourmand. Itâs not overly sweet nor overly woody. It exists somewhere between those two, and in-between is a soft bed of sweet & smokey balsam & resin notes. Though with greater emphasis on a baritone throated olfactory timbre, this version is quite true to the original with the primary focus being on calibration and material improvement/quality.

name: Sadanne
style: Boozy, Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fruity
description: SÃ¥danne is the very first floral fragrance in the Slumberhouse collection, and marks a new direction for the creative Portland perfume house. Josh Lobb takes on roses, but gives them his signature twist. First, he drenches the flowers in fruited liqueur, then he adds a glossy sheen of candied syrup. He finishes it all up with streaks of green foliage, dark earth, forest notes, and leathery, balsamic resins. The end result is a rubied rose that glows and shimmers with an iridescent quality.

name: Kiste
notes: Honey, Patchouli And Elderberry, Pipe Tobacco, Scotch Heather, Spicy Peach, Tonka
style: Avant-Garde, Boozy, Gourmand, Sweet, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Slumberhouse's vivid, surreal creations always seem to give us a fairy tale vibe, but Kiste takes things a step farther and deposits us into Alice's Wonderland by way of the American South, complete with sticky pipe tobacco, sweet-drenched tea parties, and a courageous feminine heart that beats blissfully at the center.

name: Sibet
notes: Carnation, Mint, Ash, Leather, Iris, Cistus, Fur Accord, Moss
style: Animalic, Exotic, Woody - Light
description: What We Do Is Secret

name: Baque
notes: Apricot, Straw, Vanilla, Tobacco Leaf, Parchment, Amber, Honey, Cork, Davana Liqueur
style: Creamy, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: BORNTOSTANDOUT

name: 40 Knots
style: Creamy, Salty / Oceanic, Spicy
description: No ordinary aquatic, 40 Knots captures the essence of the famous Italian yacht club and the Mediterranean air.

name: Torino21
notes: Mint, Lemon, Basil, Thyme, Lavender, Jasmine, Blackcurrant, Rosemary, Lemon Verbena, Musk
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous
description: When the world's best tennis players met last November in Torino, Italy for the Finals of the ATP (Association of Tennis Professionals) season, Xerjoff was front and center for all the action, celebrating a partnership with the ATP Finals which will extend until 2025. In many ways, it's the ideal match of sponsor and event, as a fine niche fragrance displays many of the qualities of an elite tennis player- power and refinement, elegance and character. To commemorate this perfect pairing, Xerjoff's JTC line has debuted Torino21, a dynamic and distinguished unisex citrus-driven fragrance with the vibrant sophistication of a World #1.

name: Fabulous Body Spray
notes: Lavender, Clary Sage, Bitter Almond, Tonka Bean, Orris Root, Leather, Cashmeran, Amber, White Woods
description: Now, enjoy Tom Ford's most iconic fragrances in an invigorating body spray, delicately scented and perfect for everyday wear.

name: Neroli Portofino Travel Atomizer
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Mandarin, Lavender, Myrtle, Rosemary, Bitter Orange, Egyptian Jasmine, Neroli, Orange Blossom Water, Pittosporum, Woody Amber Accord, Ambrette Seeds, Angelica Root
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Sweet
description: Like a bespoke white shirt, Neroli Portofino takes the classic, citrus-driven lightness of the eau de cologne formula and amps up the quality of its ingredients and, as a result, their fit on the skin.

name: Oud Wood Travel Atomizer
notes: Oud, Chinese Pepper, Pink Pepper, Cardamom, Birch Tar, Cistus, Incense, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Patchouli, Cedarwood Atlas, Vanilla, Tonka Bean
description: Tom Ford's classic oud scent that started it all, now available in a grey and silver-tone atomizer with magnetic closure.

name: Soleil Blanc Travel Atomizer
notes: Amber, Coconut, Beachy Floral Notes
description: With Soleil Blanc, the newest scent from Tom Ford's Private Blend collection, the pure, indulgent pleasure of sunbathing on a pristine white sand beach is captured in a fragrance that effortlessly evokes the comforting coconut tones of suntan lotion and the floral-tinged warmth of beachfront breezes, all while adding Tom Ford's trademark touch of opulence.

name: Tobacco Vanille Travel Atomizer
notes: Tobacco, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Cocoa, Dry Fruit Accord And Sweet Wood Sap
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: Tom Ford's all-time classic men's gourmand, now available in a convenient brown and gold-tone travel atomizer with a magnetic closure.

name: Neroli Portofino
notes: Ambrette Seeds, Angelica Root, Bergamot, Bitter Orange, Egyptian Jasmine, Lavender, Lemon, Mandarin, Myrtle, Neroli, Orange Blossom Water, Pittosporum, Rosemary, Woody Amber Accord
style: Fresh - Citrus
description: Like a bespoke white shirt, Neroli Portofino takes the classic, citrus-driven lightness of  the eau de cologne formula and amps up the quality of its ingredients and, as a result, their fit on the skin. It opens with a luscious burst of neroli and layers of citrus notes, including bergamot, lemon and pittosporum, with its heady, jasmine-and-orange blossom-like bouquet. It then accents this bouquet with green and dusky herbs, including rosemary and lavender. This burst of freshness is warmed by an understated woody and amber base. Neroli Portofino doesn't reinvent the eau de cologne wheel, but it does take it for a spin along the winding roads of the Italian Riviera.

name: Fucking Fabulous Travel Atomizer
notes: Lavender, Clary Sage, Bitter Almond, Tonka Bean, Orris Root, Leather, Cashmeran, Amber, White Woods
description: TOM FORD Private Blend

name: Soleil Neige
notes: Bergamot, Carrot Seed, Rose, Jasmine, Orange Blossom, White Flowers, Labdanum, Benzoin, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Crystalline. Cool. Escapist.

name: Bitter Peach
notes: Peche De Vigne Accord, Blood Orange Oil, Davana Oil, Labdanum Absolute, Patchouli Oil Indonesia, Sandalwood Oil New Calendonia
description: Tom Ford Bitter Peach's PÃªche de Vigne and Sicilian Blood Orange Oil release the slick sweetness of nectar-filled flesh at its bursting peak, where sweet turns suggestive and addiction is inescapable.

name: Rose Prick Body Spray
description: Now, enjoy Tom Ford's most iconic fragrances in an invigorating body spray, delicately scented and perfect for everyday wear.

name: Rose Prick Travel Atomizer
notes: Bulgarian Rose, Turmeric Extract, Indonesian Patchouli, Sichuan Pepper, Roasted Tonka, Tolu Balsam
description: Atelier des Ors

name: Noir de Noir
notes: Saffron, Truffle, Rose, Patchouli, Tree Moss, Oud, Vanilla
style: Chypre, Floral - Ambery Spice
description: Certain scents smell like the (olfactory) lights are out, and you're walking into a room trying to see what's inside it. In Tom Ford's dark rose scent Noir de Noir, as the name suggests, black is indeed the name of the game. But once you adjust your eyes, the rose and its handmaidens glimmer like rich jewels glowing in the dark. This inky, goth, midnight rose is cloaked with mantles of oud, amber, and camphory patchouli. Saffron and truffle notes create a soft veil around this darkness, with a hint of vanilla, and tree moss adds a little more texture in the base. Noir de Noir is for the night owls of the perfume world.

name: Ebene Fume
notes: Palo Santo Wood Accord, Ebony Wood Accord, Rose
style: Smoky, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: ÃbÃ¨ne FumÃ© merges the purifying powers of Palo Santo with seductive ebony wood, arousing exquisite calm and heightened spiritual luxury. The scent conjures transcendent spiritual calm through the mystical powers of Palo Santo smoke â stoked by the warm elegance of cistus absolute, roses, and seductive notes of ebony wood and leather.

name: Bitter Peach Travel Atomizer
notes: Peche De Vigne Accord, Blood Orange Oil, Davana Oil, Labdanum Absolute, Patchouli Oil Indonesia, Sandalwood Oil New Calendonia
description: A voluptuous lure, Tom Ford Bitter Peach captures nectar-filled flesh at its luscious, bursting peak, where sweet turns suggestive and addiction is inescapable.

name: Electric Cherry
notes: Morello Cherry, Ginger, Jasmine Sambac, Ambrettolide Musk
description: ELECTRIC CHERRY merges the scent of Morello cherry with the warmth of musk and sultry jasmine, evoking a teasing flirt sparkling with playful effervescence.

name: Cherry Smoke
notes: Dark Cherry Accord, Saffron, Osmanthus, Smoky Woods
description: An experienced hedonist, CHERRY SMOKE plays with fire, bursting with the scent of dark cherry, ignited by seductive osmanthus and smoldering, smoked woods.

name: Tobacco Vanille
notes: Tobacco, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Cocoa, Dry Fruit Accord And Sweet Wood Sap
style: Earthy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: In the sumptuous and comforting Tobacco Vanilla, one of Tom Ford's Private Blends, a gourmand, marzipan-like fruit chewiness greets you at the gate â the combination of the scent's multi-faceted cinnamon-vanilla-like tonka note combined with vanilla, cocoa, and dried fruit. But as they hit you, they're joined by mellow, even aged tobacco notes that add a dry elegance and club room gravitas to its subtle sweetness. Just as soon as you almost feel like you can sink your teeth into it, it sinks its teeth into you, and you're a goner. Tobacco Vanilla is some heady stuff. Perfect for the gourmand perfume lover who wants a bit of an edge.

name: Tuscan Leather
notes: Leather, Olibanum, Night Blooming Jasmine, And Black Suede
style: Masculine, Smoky
description: In Tom Ford's Tuscan Leather, a smoky, bitter birch-tar leather accord combines with thyme, raspberry, and saffron to create a scent paradox: A perfume that's both clean and sultry, bone-dry and sweet. Although it remains a true leather scent through and through, Tuscan Leather shows its refined, softer side, by letting an herbal, fruity and sheer floral sweetness (night blooming jasmine) break its toughness like a leather jacket that gets softer and more supple with wear. A true unisex fragrance perfect for both day and nighttime.

name: Oud Wood
notes: Birch Tar, Cardamom, Cedarwood Atlas, Chinese Pepper, Cistus, Incense, Oud, Patchouli, Pink Pepper, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Vetiver
style: Woody - Dark
description: It was Tom Ford who pioneered the oud note in contemporary Western perfumery way back in 2002 during his tenure as the artistic director of Yves Saint Laurent, with the groundbreaking M7. In 2007, he was still one of the few to showcase it in his own Private Blends. Today, not only has Oud Wood become one of the brand's classics, but it has spawned the brand-new âOud Collectionâ, built around the original's core accord of oud, sandalwood and patchouli.

name: Soleil Blanc
notes: Amber, Coconut, Beachy Floral Notes
style: Floral - Citrus, Salty / Oceanic, Skin Scent / Minimal, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: What do your most luxurious beachside memories smell like? With Soleil Blanc, the newest scent from Tom Ford's Private Blend collection, the pure, indulgent pleasure of sunbathing on a pristine white sand beach is captured in a fragrance that effortlessly evokes the comforting coconut tones of suntan lotion and the floral-tinged warmth of beachfront breezes, all while adding Tom Ford's trademark touch of opulence. As the creaminess of the coconut begins to fade with the setting sun, a glow of floral amber intensifies, inviting us to savor the natural beauty of the golden hour at the edge of the world. As nostalgic as it is luxurious, Soleil Blanc is a day at the beach as only Tom Ford can do it.

name: Tobacco Vanille Body Spray
style: Earthy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Now, enjoy Tom Ford's most iconic fragrances in an invigorating body spray, delicately scented and perfect for everyday wear.

name: Tuscan Leather Body Spray
style: Earthy, Floral - Fruity, Smoky
description: Now, enjoy Tom Ford's most iconic fragrances in an invigorating body spray, delicately scented and perfect for everyday wear.

name: Oud Wood Body Spray
notes: Oud, Chinese Pepper, Pink Pepper, Cardamom, Birch Tar, Cistus, Incense, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Patchouli, Cedarwood Atlas, Vanilla, Tonka Bean
style: Masculine, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Now, enjoy Tom Ford's most iconic fragrances in an invigorating body spray, delicately scented and perfect for everyday wear.

name: Fabulous
notes: Lavender, Clary Sage, Bitter Almond, Tonka Bean, Orris Root, Leather, Cashmeran, Amber, White Woods
style: Fougere, Green / Herbaceous, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Vulgar, shocking, rude, funny, tongue in cheekâ¦.no matter what you think of the name, thereâs no denying that itâs got people talking. But in the kerfuffle over the name, has the fragrance itself been a bit overlooked? We think it might have been. The truth is thatFucking Fabulousis very good. Itâs an edible but fresh suede scent that borrows a bunch of bitter herbs from old school fougeres, scads of buttery tonka from the gourmand category, and wraps it all up in a musky cashmeran glow. And guess what? Totally works.

name: Eau de Soleil Blanc
notes: Citrus, Amber, Coconut, Beachy Floral Notes
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Aquatic, Tropical / Beachy
description: TOM FORD Private Blend

name: Thirty Three
notes: Soft Black Pepper, Candied Mandarin, Caoutchouc, Chinese White Tea, Chinese Rose, Taif Rose, Orris, Damascus Steel, Rare, Natural Vintage Ouds, Aged Patchouli, Heliotropin
style: Exotic
description: Eight and Bob

name: Ryder
notes: Amber, Boozy Notes, Dark Woods, Frankincense, Jasmine, Resins, Sweet Pipe Tobacco, Vanilla
style: Boozy, Floral - Spicy, Masculine, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: Ex Idolo

name: Lucid Dream
notes: Pink Pepper, Davana, Smoky Osmanthus, Rose, Incense, White Patchouli
style: Floral - Spicy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Woody - Light
description: Lucid Dream is an olfactory exploration of the semi meditative state in which a person is aware they are asleep but is able to control their surroundings, and an ode to the potential hidden in every one of us. Juxtaposing rich, bright notes of pink pepper and davana with smoky, meditative florals and incense, Lucid Dream truly feels like another plane of existence, an ethereal journey into a world where we follow our wildest artistic impulses and break through the creative blocks that may impede our waking lives. It's a vivid, yet ethereal, experience, simultaneously romantic and contemplative, with the outstanding ingredient quality and rich tonalities for which Ex Idolo is known. Will Lucid Dream make you a master of your own subconscious? While we can't guarantee it, with a scent this wonderfully evocative, you'll certainly be inspired to find out.

name: Love & Crime
notes: Red Mandarin, Classic Feminine Florals, Baking Sugar, Star Anise, Natural Cocoa, Vanilla Sponge Cake
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Nobile 1942

name: Eight and Bob
notes: Citrus, Spice Accord, Violet, Iris, Cedar, Sandalwood, Gaiac, Ambergris
style: Classic Masculine, Fougere, Fresh - Citrus
description: When American student John F. Kennedy met Parisian aristocrat Albert Fouquet on the Cotes d'Azur in the 1930s, not only was he charmed by the man, he was also intrigued by his hand-crafted scent. Upon his return to the US, JFK made a quirky request for eight samples â âand if your production allows, another one for Bobâ.

name: Egypt
notes: Cardamom, Lavender, Leather, Lemon, Moss, Nutmeg, Patchouli, Sandalwood
style: Exotic, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Although Albert Fouquet is best remembered for creating Eight & Bob's distinct flagship scent (and captivating one John Fitzgerald Kennedy in the process), his olfactory adventures did not begin and end there. Egypt, one of two stunning new fragrances rediscovered from Fouquet's private collection, is a testament to Fouquet's enduring legacy, a subtle, sophisticated and remarkably fresh woody eau de parfum inspired by (and conceived during) two sightseeing trips through one of the world's most fascinating, culturally rich countries.

name: Cap d'Antibes
notes: Mint, Violet Leaf, Birch, Cinnamon, Moss, Green Notes, Cedar, Incense And Vanilla.
style: Classic Masculine, Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Sailing in the picturesque waters of the Grande Bleue, taking in a golden sunset from the gardens of the Eden Roc, enjoying a cocktail in the refined company of European aristocracy: summer on the French Riviera in the 1930s was the kind of glamorous existence that simply has no equal in contemporary society. For Albert Fouquet, it was the very pinnacle of life, one he was inspired to capture in a fragrance that might help chase away the doldrums of the cold Parisian winter. The resulting fragrance was Cap D'Antibes, an enveloping, sophisticated fougÃ¨re that was exclusive to Fouquet's private collection- until now.

name: Champs de Provence
notes: Bergamot, Orange, Pear, Jasmine, Rose, Orange Blossom, Musk, Mate, Ambroxan
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: A new Eight and Bob scent is more than just a fragrance; it's a voyage to through the early 20th century's most beautiful and glamorous locales, through the eyes of perfumer and aristocrat Albert Fouquet. With Champs de Provence, Fouquet whisks us away to a charming stretch of French countryside, where Europe's rich and beautiful leave the bustle of city life behind to unwind in rustic villas, surrounded by the beautiful abundance of nature in full bloom.

name: Petra
notes: Bergamot, Yellow Mandarin, Pink Pepper, Sambac Jasmine, Rose Maroc Abs., Luqaimat Accord, Fruity Notes, Incense, Patchouli, Benzoin, Myrrh, Leather, Ambergris Infusion
description: April Aromatics

name: Madeleine
notes: Chestnut Accord, Chantilly Accord, Cumin, Tuberose Absolute, Cypress, Geranium, Tonka Bean, Milky Musks, Vanilla Pods Extract
description: Angelina means a lot to me. First of all, it was the name of my mother. And from my mother I inherited the passion for travels and for nice afternoon teas in fancy patisserie. So it was almost natural â when I started traveling frequently to Paris â to feel a strong attraction for this place in Rue de Rivoli. Every single business trip in the Ville Lumiere could not end without a stop at our favourite delicatessen place. And most of the times I ended up eating a chestnut dessert that my mother would cook for me when I was a kid, the Mont Blanc! â Alessandro  Brun of Masque Milano

name: Masque Milano Discovery Set
description: Discover the seductively sumptuous world of Masque Milano. This set features 16 x 2ml atomizer sprays of the following fragrances, in addition to an introductory brochure and tester strips:

name: Lost Alice
notes: Bergamot, Ambrette Seed, Clary Sage, Black Pepper, Carrot, Orris, English Tea, White Roses (Painted Red), Sandalwood, Broom Absolute, Fleur De Lait (Steamed Milk Accord)
description: âBack in 2010, a few days before launching MASQUE Milano, I was invited to the Premiere of Tim Burtonâs Alice in Wonderland. It was my first time in a 3D movie theater and the experience was so realistic that several times â unconsciously â I moved swiftly to the side, to dodge objects flying in the movie. Falling in the rabbit hole is something that still gives me the thrills. Ever since, I fancied we would develop a fragrance about this crazy tale! The inspiration for Lost Alice comes from Chapter Seven â A Mad Tea-Party, where one could almost smell the Hatterâs tea, milk, bread and butter, served in a bucolic setting. Add some scones to complete a very Brit cream tea, and the magic is complete.â â Alessandro, co-founder of Masque Milano

name: Sleight of Fern
notes: Bergamot, Lavender, Fig Sap Accord, Lentisk, Red Thyme, Tuberose, Geranium, Narcissus, Sandalwood, Birchwood, Patchouli, Oakmoss, Tonka Bean
style: Chypre, Fougere
description: Sleight of Fern has been created in respect to the historic construction of fougÃ¨re fragrances, in line with the most deep, unique and recognizable notes of the classic formulations, which also enhance a chypre signature.

name: White Whale
notes: Olibanum, Salty Rope Accords, Black Pepper Madagascar, Ambergris Accord, Osmanthus, Violet Flower, Orris Concrete, Cedarwood, Patchouli Indonesia, Vetiver, Cistus Labdanum
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Salty / Oceanic
description: âCall me Ishmael. Some years ago [â¦] I thought I would sail about a little and see the watery part of the world.â H. Melville

name: Tango
notes: Amber, Benzoin, Cardamom, Cedar And Melilotus., Cinnamon, Cumin, Guaiac Wood, Jasmine Sambac, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Turkish Rose
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Woody - Dark
description: As with all great stories, Tango immediately sets the stage: bergamot, black pepper and cardamom whisk us away to a sultry summer night in the Canary Islands, a party already in full swing. The music swells louder as you tip back another glass of local honey rum, heady, sweet and inebriating. You turn your head to catch the warm evening breeze, which carries the scent of night blooming jasmine mingled with the salty sweat of the revelers, and you catch the eye of a beautiful stranger. Another deep gulp of the rum, cool vanilla standing out against the rich, warm amber. You stand and offer your hand- you're not always this brave, but tonight, the rum and the rhythm will not be denied. And just as she smiles and rises to meet you, the music reaches crescendo, and the air seems to get even hotter.

name: Russian Tea
notes: Mint, Black Pepper, Raspberry, Black Tea, Magnolia, Everlasting Flower, Leather Accord, Incense, Birchwood, Cistus-labdanum.
style: Smoky, Woody - Fresh
description: Out there, the snow-covered Nevsky Prospekt, and a sumptuous Art Noveau building. Inside, a large bookstore. And, on the first floor, an elegant cafÃ¨. As water is poured in the cup, the infusion unleashes its most characteristic notes. Black tea, heavy and intense. A floral note, sharp and biting. And that unmistakably dry and smoky aftertaste given by the caravanserai campfires, meant to keep the precious tea cargo dry in the never-ending journey through Siberia. The fresh mint leaves give a pleasant fresh touch to the hot water. A teaspoon of raspberry preserve sweetens, without altering it, the bitter aftertaste of leather and birch. We sip it slowly, gazing out of the wide window, towards the beautiful cathedral of Our Lady of Kazan and beyond. The Russian Tea Ritual today carried us to an unexpected journey in remote lands, full of mystery and fascination.

name: L'Attesa
notes: Italian Bergamot, Moroccan Neroli, Champagne Accord, Italian Iris Absolute, Italian Iris Root Butter, French Iris Root Butter, Tuberose Absolute, Ylang Ylang Madagascar, Sandalwood Mysore, Oakmoss, Leather Accord
style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Floral - White
description: A celebration of the one of the most luxurious materials in the perfume world, L'Attesa explores iris and its many facets with an opulence that blew us away. Using three types of expensive iris, the star note is as creamy as buttered suede, and as plush as thick, silvered velvet, but also immensely floral in a way that is quite remarkable.

name: Hemingway
notes: Ginger, Rhubarb, Vetiver Heart LMR, Haitian Vetiver, Java Vetiver, Cedar, Patchouli, Leather
description: Masque Milano has gained a well-earned reputation as a launching pad for young talent- a brand that takes chances on up-and-coming noses and gives them the freedom to discover their creative voices. So when they met IFF trainee Fanny Bal, apprenticing under the legendary Dominique Ropion, and heard of her facility and ingenuity with vetiver, a seed was planted. And who better to dedicate a scent built around vetiver- rough and spicy, earthy and sweet, rich and complex- than Ernest Hemingway?

name: Love Kills
notes: Lychee, Rose Oxide, Ambrette, Geranium, Rose Oil Absolute, Green Notes, Patchouli, Ambrarome, Immortelle, Cedar, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: While the concept of a soliflore might suggest simpler, more linear scents, one sniff of Love Kills should quickly disavow you of that notion. Instead, Caroline Dumur has created a rose soliflore with luscious yet edgy depth, one that masterfully plays off of the well known phrase it takes its name from to present both the romantic and dangerous sides of the grand dame of perfume florals.

name: Suede Hand Lotion
notes: Bergamot, Fresh Aldehydes, Pear, Lily Of The Valley, Violet, Crisp Amber, Soft Musks, Velvet Plum
description: Federico Cantelli

name: La Selection Nomade
description: With the La SÃ©lection series, BYREDO allows you the opportunity to experience some of their most beloved scents, arranged in thoughtfully curated trios. Each fragrance comes in an ample 12ml travel-friendly spray.

name: La Selection Florale
style: Floral
description: With the La SÃ©lection series, BYREDO allows you the opportunity to experience some of their most beloved scents, arranged in thoughtfully curated trios. Each fragrance comes in an ample 12ml travel-friendly spray.

name: La Selection Boisee
style: Woody - Fresh
description: With the La SÃ©lection series, BYREDO allows you the opportunity to experience some of their most beloved scents, arranged in thoughtfully curated trios. Each fragrance comes in an ample 12ml travel-friendly spray.

name: Bibliotheque
notes: Peach, Plum, Peony, Violet, Leather, Patchouli, Vanilla, Musk
style: Creamy, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Rare is the scent that is equally perfect for the home and the body alike, but Byredo's ultra-popular Bibliotheque candle, with its sophisticated blend of fruit, leather and vanilla, has long left its many fans clamoring for a wearable version. We're pleased to say the wait is now over- at least for a limited time.

name: Gypsy Water
notes: Amber, Bergamot, Incense, Juniper Berries, Lemon, Orris, Pepper, Pine Needles, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: This entrancing shape-shifter is one of the most popular fragrances in the Byredo line, and we can understand why. The opening is crisp and outdoorsy â strong, vibrant citrus, cool juniper and sharp pine needles. Floating incense and the sweet earthiness of orris help to set the scene: camping under an inky deep blue sky studded with brilliant stars, surrounded by pine trees, with a hint of smoke cutting through the chilly night air. As this wears on the skin, warm elements begin to flicker beneath the cool and sharp ones like the glowing embers of a campfire â golden amber, creamy vanilla and luscious sandalwood. A warm, soft, dreamy skin scent emerges, still with lovely cool traces of juniper, lemon and incense wafting over the top.

name: Bal d'Afrique
notes: African Marigold, Bergamot, Black Amber, Bucchu, Cyclamen, Jasmin Petals, Lemon, Moroccan Cedarwood, Musk, Neroli, Vetiver, Violet
style: Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Bal d'Afrique is inspired by Paris in the late 1920's, when the city was infatuated with an idiosyncratic and fantastical vision of African culture, music and dance. Paris embraced the fabulous Josephine Baker as its muse and so does this enigmatic and playful scent.  Drawing on the euphoric mix of the avant-garde and exoticism that fueled the artistic life of the city, Jerome Epinette has created a fragrance with the exuberant sensuality of La Baker herself.

name: Blanche
notes: White Rose, Pink Pepper, Aldehyde, Violet, Neroli, Peony, Blonde Woods, Sandalwood, Musk
style: Floral - White, Fresh - Clean
description: An effortlessly lovely ode to the color white. This opens with the crystalline sharpness of aldehydes, and then eases into a gentle white floral washed with soft sandalwood and transparent musk. Blanche is as light as a bubble floating on a warm summer wind and as clean as the steam from a long, hot shower. This is definitely in the family of freshly laundered scents, but it has a delicious warmth at its core that sets it apart. The ephemeral sweetness of the violet is anchored with the delectable milky richness of the sandalwood.

name: La Tulipe
notes: Blond Woods, Cyclamen, Freesia, Rhubarb, Tulip, Vetiver
style: Floral, Floral - Light, Woody - Light
description: A graceful rendering of the scent of a single, perfect tulip. What's that you say? You don't recall tulips having much of a scent? You are not alone. According to Byredo creator Ben Gorham, âA lot of people say that tulips don't have a scent, so this is a fantasy based on the idea of a tulip.â And we agree that this exquisitely realized soliflore of the imagination is exactly what a tulip should smell like. Clean, modern and bright, with an intensely floral heart and a bit of green stem that has broken through the icy ground to start the spring.

name: Oud Immortel
notes: Limoncello, Incense, Cardamom, Patchouli, Papyrus, Brazilian Rosewood, Tobacco Leaves, Moss
style: Earthy, Exotic, Woody - Dark
description: Oud is often thought of as dark, brooding and mysterious. Even the way it comes into the world has a whiff of drama about it: When the Aquilaria tree is infected by a mold, it secretes a protective resin which eventually becomes the precious, fragrant oud wood note.

name: Black Saffron
notes: Pomelo, Saffron, Juniper Berries, Black Violet, Accord Cuir, Cristal Rose, Blonde Woods, Raspberry, Vetiver
style: Exotic, Fruity, Spicy
description: Saffron is a spice. Saffron is a color. Saffron is a way of life. Black Saffron pays tribute to the many facets of saffron, weaving a spell of a spice symbolic of India. A vibrant citrus opening belies the deeper heart of the perfume. The aroma of saffron starts to wrap around you like holy robes, earthy and unmistakable. A dewy rose emerges, tickling your nose with a soft sweetness. Then, there it is, the surprise of leather nestled among the woods and vetiver. At once ancient and modern, Black Saffron brings all the traditions of the East alive while winking at you from the seat of a sleek motorcycle.

name: Inflorescence
notes: Rose Petals, Pink Freesia, Magnolia, Lily Of The Valley, Fresh Jasmine
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Floral - White
description: A freshly cut bouquet of flowers that has been supercharged, as if struck by electricity or cross-bred with blossoms from another planet: radiant lily of the valley, honeyed freesia, creamy magnolia, incandescent jasmine â all captured at the height of their bloom, dazzling and stark white in contrast to glossy green leaves. The lily of the valley is especially vivid and luminous, giving this the heightened, otherworldly beauty of a perfect day in spring, with the skies a bright enameled blue and the new grass so vivid it is almost neon.

name: Rose Of No Man's Land Hair Perfume
notes: Pink Pepper, Turkish Rose Petals, Raspberry Blossom, Turkish Rose Absolute, Papyrus, White Amber
style: Floral
description: BYREDO presents a hair perfume collection that invites you to care for and delicately scent the hair in one sensuous beautifying gesture. Enjoy the uplifting power of long lasting scents as they subtly diffuse throughout the day, amplified by the natural movement of the hair. Each hair perfume combines one of BYREDO's signature scents with a unique silicone and polymer formula to create a light, invisible veil designed to leave the hair nourished and luminous whilst divinely scented.

name: Mixed Emotions
notes: Mate, Black Currant, Ceylon Black Tea, Violet Leaves, Birch Wood, Papyrus
description: PARFUMS DE NICOLAI

name: Mumbai Noise
notes: Davana, Tonka Beans, Coffee, Labdanum, Agarwood, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Sweet
description: BYREDO

name: De Los Santos
notes: Clary Sage, Mirabelle, Orris, Ciste Oil, Musks, Ambroxan, Palo Santo
style: Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: A scent created in celebration of life, De Los Santos incants memories and acknowledges the fleeting. An aromatic cloud of musk is pierced by the clarity of sage. The splendor of amber and incense is grounded by iris root and mirabelle.

name: Vanille Antique
notes: Freesia, Plum, Amber, Cashmere Woods, Madagascar Vanilla Beans, Cistus Oil
style: Gourmand
description: Mirroring the morning ceremony of applying scent, Night Veils are designed for the ritual of the night. Like flowers that release their headiest scent at twilight, these penetrating concentrates of perfume are made from noble raw materials chosen with meticulous care.

name: Sellier
notes: Cashmeran, Black Tea, Leather Accord, Tobacco Leaves, Birch Tree, Oakmoss
style: Woody - Spicy
description: Distilled into a pure essence, each Night Veils fragrance taps noble raw materials chosen with meticulous care. With its high concentration, this new trio reinvents a new perfume ritual. An essential ally of any equestrian, the saddle brings horse and rider together as one.

name: Eyes Closed
notes: Cardamom, Cinnamon, Carrot, Ginger, Orris Butter, Papyrus, Patchouli
description: An olfactory experience that emotes connection yet still confounds expectations. Eyes Closed echoes an idea of both the ancient world and the contemporary one in its construction.

name: Mojave Ghost Eau de Parfum
notes: Ambergris, Ambrette, And Cedar., Magnolia, Sandalwood, Sapodilla, Violet
style: Floral - Light, Skin Scent / Minimal, Woody - Fresh
description: In the xeric wilderness of the mojave desert, trees and vegetation more ancient than many civilizations defy conditions that prey on human vulnerability. The ghost flower is a rare species that dares to blossom above this baked, hard ground. Despite its arid surroundings and inability to produce nectar, the ghost flower, or mohavea confertiflora, maintains its perfect, majestic beauty and thrives year after year. In an astonishing feat of ingenuity, the flower uses mimicry to attract the pollinators of a neighboring plant species by developing markings that resemble those of a female bee, therefore attracting it and duping the male bee into following suit. This moving human-like behavior and captivating tale of survival lies in the foundation that inspired âmojave ghost', an homage to this most bewitching flower.

name: Gypsy Water Hair Perfume
notes: Amber, Bergamot, Incense, Juniper Berries, Lemon, Orris, Pepper, Pine Needles, Sandalwood, Vanilla
