description: Jeroboam

name: Vespero
notes: Bergamot, Apple, Pink Grapefruit, Cedarwood, Geranium, Leather, Jasmine, Patchouli, Ambery Woods, Musk
style: Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Jovoy Paris

name: Ambra
notes: Bergamot, Geranium, Incense, Peru Balsam, Patchouli, Vetiver, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Enigmatic Musks
style: Creamy, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Taking on an olfactory family this well known is no small feat. It's a testament of perfumer Vanina Murraciole's originality and creativity that Ambra manages to whisk amber away from the staid and into a sensual, modern, androgynous realm.

name: LAVS
notes: Jasmine, Cardamom, Black Pepper, Elemi, Coriander, Clove, Carnation, Labdanum, Opoponax, Palisander Rosewood, Amber, Oakmoss, Tonka Bean
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Enter the dream world of LAVS where purity and spirituality converge in the hushed recesses of a holy sanctum. White clouds embrace you with the cleanest incense that has been dusted with spices, warmed with amber and sweet myrrh, and then deepened with aromatic pine,  elemi, and dark resins. In its drydown, the clouds part to reveal ambered incense laced with a plush creaminess, soft woods, and hints of nutty sweet myrrh.

name: Opus 1144
notes: Elemi, Jasmine, Bergamot, Mandarin Orange, Iris, Orchid, Cashmere Wood, Musk, Ambergris, Vanilla, Leather, Sandalwood, Benzoin, Styrax
style: Fresh - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: All the drama of a diva, all the radiance of a legend, Opus 1144 comes bedecked with the glittering sparkle of citrusy gems atop an opulent, Shalimar-style ball gown of sumptuous vanilla and heady jasmine. A soft, lacy veil of benzoin and iris powder masks her eyes, while musky, sexy ambergris drapes around her shoulders, and ripples of smoky leather, dark resins, incense, and spicy sandalwood swirl at her feet.

name: Scusami
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Heliotrope, Grapefruit, Cassis, Ylang Ylang, Freesia, Royal Ice, Lily Of The Valley, Rose, Mirabella Plum, Amber, Ambrette, Creamy Sandalwood, Patchouli, Cedar Wood, Fruity Musks
style: Fruity
description: Don't forget to ask for forgiveness...

name: Reliqvia

style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: UNUM

notes: Lilac, Jasmine, Gardenia, Ylang-ylang, Iris, Tuberose, Carnation, Tolu Balm, Musk
description: âLet me cryâ is the eleventh fragrance by Filippo Sorcinelli,  praising the race towards one's freedom; the concept of the conquest of a precious gift that every human being possesses and which today more than ever becomes a fundamental value.

name: Ennui Noir
notes: Lavender, Myrtle, Cedar, Heliotrope, Patchouli, Vanilla, Vetiver
style: Creamy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Elixir Attar

name: Io Non Ho Mani Che Mi Accarezzino il Volto
notes: Petitgrain, Bergamot, Galbanum, Myrrh, Cedar, Geranium, Clary Sage, Cinnamon, Styrax, Ylang-ylang, Incense, Benzoin, Tonka Bean, Tobacco, Amber, Sandalwood
style: Avant-Garde, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Io Non Ho Mani Che Mi Accarezzino il Volto - "There are no hands / to caress my face." This is the beginning of a 1948 poem by Father David Maria Turoldo, which the Italian photographer Mario Giacomelli took as the name for a photography series in the early 1960s. It's these photos that serve as the inspiration for UNUMâs founder and artist Filippo Sorcinelli's new fragrance. The photos are striking: disarming images of young priests in states of joyous movement, dancing and playing. The fragrance is an olfactory rendering of the stunning imagery, capturing the humanity beneath the black cassocks.

name: But Not Today
notes: Metal, Lily, Jasmine, Leather, Castoreum, Carnation, Animal Notes
style: Animalic, Creamy, Floral - Spicy, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: UNUMâs But Not Today is named for that chilling moment in Silence of the Lambs when Dr. Hannibal Lecter sniffs Clarice Starling and leers, âYou use Evian skin cream, and sometimes you wear L'Air du Temps, but not todayâ. But Not Today is UNUMâs scented capsule of the tension of that moment, where the pearly innocence of LâAir du Tempsâ carnation and lily, as worn by the fresh-faced Clarice Starling, faces off against the depraved bloodlust of castoreum, blood, and metal knives slicing through air, as represented by Hannibal himself.

name: Bois d'Hiver
notes: Pink Pepper, Cardamom, Heliotrope, Cyclamen, White Cedar, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Cypriol, Musk
style: Earthy, Floral, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Spicy
description: "An iron fist in a velvet glove," Bois d'Hiver is a seductive ode to contrast, where spicy, powerful woods and powdery musks intertwine with astounding fluency to create a scent that can only be described as equal parts striking and smooth.

name: Fleur Narcotique
notes: Bergamot, Lychee, Peach, Jasmine, Peony, Orange Blossom, Wood, Moss, Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Skin Scent / Minimal, Sweet, Woody - Light
description: While the Left Bank gets all the traditional credit for being Paris' arts and cultural center, everyone knows that it's theRive Droite, with its bustle, style and know-how, where the new generation is coming to life. Fleur Narcotique, an airy, vibrantly juicy floral designed as Ex Nihilo's "interpretation of the new Rive Droite woman," is both sophisticated and seductive, indicative of the 21st century Paris, where tradition and modernity walk thrillingly hand in hand.

name: Explicite
notes: Nutmeg, Pink Pepper, Peony, Lily Of The Valley, Praline, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Amber
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: The epitome of all fantasies- a torrid summer night, full of unexpected temptations. An invitation to adventure that leads to forbidden pleasures. An unapologetically sensual encounter that awakens the senses and thrills the imagination. An exquisitely dreamy fragrance of sheer olfactory pleasure.

name: Gold Immortals
notes: Bergamot, Pear, Lysylang, Peony, Tonka Bean, Musk, Amber
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: The ambery-floral is a fragrance family that lends itself to opulence, romance, and indulgence- occasionally at the expense of trendiness and modernity. But as the brand that perhaps most captures the new millennium of Parisian chic, Ex Nihilo scents are nothing if not on trend. And thus, Gold Immortals is a sumptuous and dynamic interpretation of the style- a vivid and arresting combination of fruits, florals, and rich, warm amber that are as stylish and on-trend as they are opulent and indulgent.

name: The Hedonist
notes: Bergamot, Ginger, Cedarwood, Akigalawood, Vetiver, Musk, Tonka
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: As the newest entry into Ex Nihilo's bold and modern Iconoclaste series, the name The Hedonist perhaps shouldn't come as much of a surprise. But for perfumer Jordi Fernandez, hedonism is less about blurry nights indoors as a return to the root of the word- the pursuit of happiness. So while The Hedonist is indeed sexy, modern, and luxurious, this is indulgence in tune with the natural world, enjoying life to the fullest while surrounded with an intoxicating blend of spices, woods and musks that radiate seductive energy.

name: Iris Porcelana
notes: Violet Leaf Accord, Iris, Rose, Sandalwood, Musks, Cedarwood
style: Powdery / Soft
description: Ex Nihilo

name: Santal Calling

style: Creamy, Floral, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Australian Sandalwood Album is one of the most precious ingredients in high perfumery- an impossibly smooth, indulgently creamy, comfortingly warm raw material that elevates every composition it joins. Tasked with building a new Ex Nihilo fragrance around the unique properties of this exquisite wood note, Antoine Maisondieu gives us Santal Calling, a brilliant and captivating blend of contemporary Parisian inspiration and the timeless, mystical energy of sandalwood album, creating an addictive and compelling scent as invigorating as it is soothing.

name: Vesper Glitz
notes: Pink Pepper, Mandarin, Neroli, Ylang-ylang, Jasmine, Mimosa, Cedarwood, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Musk
description: Ex Nihilo

name: Vetiver Moloko
notes: Bergamot, Bulgarian Rose, Cypress, Milk Accord, Vetiver, Amyris, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Spicy
description: To the initiated, Moloko, the futuristic cocktail in A Clockwork Orange, conjures all sorts of associations: futuristic mod fashion, milky whiteness, and a dangerous, intoxicating vitality. With Vetiver Moloko, Ex Nihilo capitalizes on that imagery, delivering a fragrance on the one hand earthy and spiky, on the other soft and milky, which combine for an addictive, slightly unnerving symphony of scents that evolve on the skin with fascinating effect.

name: Venenum Kiss

description: Ex Nihilo

style: Chypre, Floral, Smoky, Sweet
description: French Affair pays tribute to the fiercely elegant chypres of Paris in the 1970âs â earthy, mossy affairs worn by the free-thinkers of the world who strolled through the Left Bank like they owned it. And they did. Women in Le Smoking tuxedos unbuttoned to the navel, men in full-on Oscar Wilde mode: nonconformists who smelled of Gauloises smoke, crushed velvet, and Aramis 900.

name: Viper Green

description: Ex Nihilo

name: Lust In Paradise

style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Clean, Spicy
description: A voyage to the French Riveria, by way of a blissful dream. That's the enchanting promise of Lust In Paradise, the newest entry in Ex Nihilo's exquisite Les Interdites collection- an undeniably dreamlike floral that weds lush white peony to a vibrant blend of spice, fruit and musk to create a hypnotically romantic journey to a fairytale destination.

name: Atlas Fever
notes: Pink Pepper, Incense, Narcissus, Cedarwood, Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Woody Accord (gaiac, Oakwood)
style: Creamy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Inspired by the intoxicatingly woody, incensey scent of the greatest vintage rosewood guitars in history, Atlas Fever combines French niche perfumery know-how with the devil-may-care spirit of rebellion that defines rock nâ roll. Its name â a clever twist on the name of its key raw material, Atlas Cedar â is a clue: this scent is not a collection of plain, inert wood but a scent buzzing with a sense of frenetic, barely-contained energy.

name: Accento
notes: Hyacinth, Pineapple, Iris, Jasmine, Pink Pepper, Vetiver, Musk, Patchouli, Amber, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Parfums de Marly

name: Basso
notes: Grapefruit, Mayflower, Carnation, Labdanum, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Celery Seeds, Black And Pink Pepper, Galbanum, Nutmeg, Guaiac Wood, Oakmoss, Cedar
description: The lights dim, the red curtains open, and the orchestra begin to play. The world stops breathing for a moment as the powerful basso profondo voice emerges and fills the air with its commanding splendor. A powerful combination of bright, aromatic top notes of Grapefruit entwined around a heart made of deep and leathery Labdanum, Spicy floral aroma of Carnation accent, and hints of Mayflower. A smothering and suave base notes of sandalwood, Pepper, Guaiac, Oakmoss and Cedar ooze between power and passion.

name: Vibrato

description: Nishane

name: Bel Canto
description: The quintessential voice of Opera. The sweetest level of expression. One that moves you to the core with its beautiful melodies, silvery voices, and streams of rich and juicy notes curling up and down the scale. A marriage of brilliance and beauty that unwraps to reveal a floral mÃ©lange of airy Jasmine and soothing Lavender that is cooled off with a tantalizing earthy and romantic core of Powdery, Violet, and Green notes. Warm base notes of Amber, Woody, Musk, and Sandalwood induce stunning aromatic airs with a grand finale of deep, herbaceous, and sweet notes of Vetiver, Earthy, Patchouli, and Vanilla that caress your senses.

description: When the orchestra commences, feelings and thoughts can be released to the music. Your senses are heightened, imagination awakened and a soothing breeze of relaxation flows through your body as you become receptive to experience all that life has to offer.

description: If the âxâ in ERIS Parfumsâ genderfluid fragrance Mx. marked the freedom to be who you want to be, the âtriple xâ of Mxxx. extends that invitation with the lights turned down low â and the animalic growl turned up.

name: Green Spell
notes: Italian Mandarin, French Black Currant Absolute, Iranian Galbanum (oil And Resinoid), Egyptian Violet Leaf Absolute, French Narcissus Absolute, Tomato Leaf Accord, Fig Leaf Accord, Haitian Vetiver, Ambroxan, Musk

description: ERIS Parfums is known for its animalic and sensual fragrances. Although a green fragrance may seem like a departure from that signature, Green Spell is in fact a continuation of ERISâs bold aesthetic. In perfumery, green describes the fragrance of leaves, meadows, and grass, and in Green Spell, just like in a sorceressâs hallucinatory elixir, Antoine Lie has layered these bracingly fresh and sparkling  green notes into a fragrance of vivid and spellbinding intensity and beauty.

name: ERIS Discovery Set
description: At long last, ERIS Parfums is offering its entire collection of daring and sumptuous fragrances composed by Master Perfumer Antoine Lie in one boxed Discovery Set. ERIS was founded in 2016 by Barbara Herman, vintage perfume lover and author of Scent and Subversion. Let ERIS take you for a whiff on the wild side!

name: Delta of Venus
notes: Italian Bergamot, American Grapefruit, Egyptian Jasmine Sambac, Egyptian Violet Leaf, Guava Accord, Iranian Galbanum, Haitian Vetiver, Sandalwood
description: DELTA OF VENUS is guava-centric floral that reimagines the Garden of Edenâs Forbidden Fruit. It opens with an effervescent burst of juicy bergamot and grapefruit, slinks toward a luscious guava accord created exclusively for ERIS by perfumer Antoine Lie, morphing into a kaleidoscope of carnal tropical fruit notes. DELTA OF VENUS's Garden of Eden is complete with a hissing serpent in the form of a gorgeously bitter green Galbanum note and the fallen, decadent sensuality of the indolic white flower, Jasmine Sambac.  Banishment from Paradise has never smelled so good.

description: "Would you be willing to sell your soul to the Devil to possess his perfume? This essence is part of his powers, of his eternal seduction."

name: By Any Other Name
notes: Bergamot, Lychee, Rose, Peony, Osmanthus, Cedar, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus
description: ALTAIA

name: Atacama
notes: Salt Grains, Freesia, Jasmine, Clary Sage, Tonka Bean, Cashmere Wood
style: Floral, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Fresh
description: Unique'e Luxury

name: Don't Cry For Me
notes: Jasmine Tea, Freesia, Cherry Flower, Heliotrope, Vegetal Amber, Cashmere Wood, Ambrette
style: Floral - Light, Floral - White, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous
description: Grandiflora

name: Yu Son
notes: Mandarin, Green Tea, Jasmine, Iris, Labdanum, Amber, Gaiac
style: Floral - Light, Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Woody - Light
description: Morning's first light shimmers over azure waters that reach into fragrant orange groves. A tale that began long ago turns into love, a promise of enchantment is fulfilled. It is with these words from an ancient Chinese love poem that the Altaia founders consider the magical providence of their own first meeting, amongst the fragrant Mediterranean orange groves of Southern Italy, 140 years after their ancestors first crossed paths in Argentina.

name: Wonder Of You
notes: Blackcurrant, Pink Grapefruit, Freesia, Watermelon, Ambrox, Musk
description: We all love gigantic, luxuriously romantic scents- the kind that evoke the feeling of love at first sight. But Wonder Of You, the newest from Altaia, evokes a more subtle, but no less powerful kind of love- the joy of everyday love, a celebration of all the special moments and beautiful details that sustain a lifelong romance. It's a sparkling, soothing cocktail of citrus and florals that will have you basking in the glow of love from morning to night.

name: Amber Room
notes: Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Cypriol, Cypress, Cedar, Patchouli, Iris, Oud, Vetiver, Amber, Musk, Labdanum, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: Parfum d'Empire

name: Carved Oud
notes: Oud, Cedar, Gaiac, Patchouli, Musk
style: Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Orto Parisi

name: Peregrina
notes: Rose Damascene, Lily Of The Valley, Gardenia, Jasmin, Vanilla, Amber, Caramel, Myrrh, Ylang Ylang, White Musk, Poudre
description: Even amongst the most famous precious stones in the world, La Peregrina stands out- a perfectly formed pear-shaped pearl, one of the largest in the world, with a stunning legacy that includes King Philip II of Spain, Napoleon III, and, more recently, Elizabeth Taylor. With a backstory like that, any fragrance to use the name had best be something special. Luckily, Peregrina, the newest from Thameen, is more than up to the challenge- a rich, warm blend of lush florals and spicy resins that exudes royal opulence and Old Hollywood glamour with equal abundance.

name: Thameen Discovery Set
description: Experience the hand-curated sample set of Thameen's most renowned fragrances to date.

name: Green Pearl
notes: Green Apple, Mandarin, Neroli, Bergamot, Green Tea, Artemisia, Tonka, Oakmoss, Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh
description: Memoirs of a Perfume Collector

name: Patiala
notes: Citrus, Aldehyde, Orange Flower, Rose, Moss, Amber, Musk
description: Created by Cartier in 1928 for an Indian Maharaja, the Patiala Necklace is an impossibly opulent piece of jewelry at the center of an unsolved mystery.  Containing 2,390 diamonds, the necklace disappeared in 1948, only to have bits and pieces reappear at various auctions over the years without explanation. To this day, the disappearance has never been explained. In this spirit of opulence and mystery, Thameen presents Patiala, a shimmering and sophisticated sweet floral too precious to misplace.

name: Coco Coco
notes: Coconut, Green Notes
style: Salty / Oceanic, Skin Scent / Minimal, Tropical / Beachy
description: Coqui Coqui

name: Maderas
notes: Sandalwood, Wood Notes
style: Earthy, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Coqui Coqui

name: Rosas Secas

style: Earthy, Floral - Spicy, Sweet
description: Coqui Coqui

name: Tabaco
notes: Tobacco
style: Classic Masculine, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Coqui Coqui

name: Flor de Naranjo
notes: Orange Blossom
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus
description: Coqui Coqui

name: Fleurs des Iles
notes: Tiare, Pitate, Plumeria
style: Exotic, Floral, Sweet, Tropical / Beachy
description: Coqui Coqui

name: Pink Me Up
notes: Bergamot, Orange Blossom, Blackberry, Champagne, Rose, Musk, Iris, And Patchouli
style: Fruity, Gourmand
description: Parfums MDCI

name: Lune Feline Extrait
notes: Cinnamon, Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Cedarwood, Ambergris, Styrax, Tahitian Vanilla, Peru Balsam, Musk
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: The Lune FÃ©line Extrait is an intense special edition that enhances all of the features of the original much loved fragrance. Lune Feline Extrait version remains a dark and animalic scent based on vanilla pods and sensual orchid, warmed with balsamic notes and musky accords. These notes convey a rich, gourmand trail. The Extrait version is blended at a 30% concentration that ensures a more seductive experience.

name: Lune Feline
notes: Cinnamon, Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Green Notes, Cedar, Ambergris, Woods, Styrax, Vanilla, Peru Balsam, Musk
style: Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet
description: There's nothing more alluring than defying expectations, and that's exactly what Lune FÃ©line does with exotic flair. Too sweet and creamy for a spicy amber, too smoky and balsamic for a gourmand, Lune FÃ©line is a genuinely delightful fulcrum between the styles- the kind of unexpectedly perfect balance that will make you delightedly return to your wrist again and again as you try to unravel its secrets.

name: Rose Omeyyade
notes: Raspberry, Rose, Pink Pepper, Patchouli, Gaiac, Brown Sugar, Amber, Sandalwood, Oud
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: Bewitching, beautiful, and a touch too beguiling to be completely safe, Rose Omeyyade is the very definition of a secret weapon. Named for the Umayyad dynasty, whose kingdom once stretched from Westernmost Europe to the Middle East, Rose Omeyyade is as expansive and cultured as its namesake- a truly extraordinary floral.

name: Bois Sikar
notes: Nutmeg, Precious Woods, Gaiac, Styrax, Cedar Leaf, Tobacco Absolute, Cedar
style: Boozy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Odyon

name: Riviera Drive
notes: Lemon, Marjoram, Rosemary, Cedar Leaf, Absinthe, Patchouli, Cashmeran, Cedar, Musk
style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: The mythical scenic drive along the coastline of the French Riviera, so vividly captured in Hitchcock'sTo Catch A Thiefwith Grace Kelly and Cary Grant, is the inspiration for Riviera Drive, a thrillingly fresh new scent from Atelier des Ors. Just as the breathtaking views of the winding Cote d'Azure roads combine sun, sea, and flora as they weave through Menton on the way to St Tropez, so do does this fragrance combine vibrant citrus, electrifying aromatics, and sexy, soothing woody notes to evoke this iconic route.

name: Issara
notes: Pine, Sage, Coumarin, Bourbon Vetiver, Tobacco, Musk, Amber, Oakmoss, Woods
style: Earthy, Fougere, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: As one of modern perfumery's oldest and most stalwart genres, the fougÃ¨re might seem immune to reinvention- what hasn't yet been done? At least, that's how we thought before we smelled Issara. At once fiercely natural and intricately refined, Issara is a fougÃ¨re beyond comparison, blending classic freshness with dynamic ingredients that add unprecedented smoothness and character.

name: Dusita Discovery Set
description: Discover the artistry of Dusita perfumes with this collection of 2ml atomizer samples. Discovery set includes:

name: Melodie de l'Amour
notes: Gardenia, Tuberose, Honey, Peach, Broom, Lily Of The Valley, Jasmine, Cedar, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - White, Sweet
description: A floral bouquet of overwhelming beauty, Melodie de l'Amour is another stunning example of Dusita creator Pissara Umavijani's impressive ability to make old concepts feel new again. Featuring one of the most arresting, gorgeous gardenia notes ever captured and supplemented with a delightful blend of over 150 varieties of wild white flowers, it is a truly unique scent that floral lovers should take care not to miss.

name: Anamcara
notes: Blood Orange, Orange Blossom, Freesia, Tea Accord, Peach, Apricot, Vanilla, Rose De Mai, Tuberose, Jasmine, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Cedar, Vetiver
description: Anamcara, or "soul friend" in Gaelic- a special bond between lifelong friends who provide one another life advice, spiritual guidance, and steadfast support. Created in collaboration with the uniquely positive and supportive Facebook Eau My Soul group, Anamcara is a scent meant to unite people in spite of borders or barriers, a fragrance to represent the grace, clarity and emotional bliss that comes from feeling wholly at ease amongst true friends.

name: Montri
notes: Saffron, Nutmeg, Coriander, Cinnamon, Oregano, Petitgrain, Dried Fruit Accord, Orris Butter, May Rose, Damask Rose, Jasmine Sambac, Ylang Ylang, Leather Accord, Tobacco, Oud Palao, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Cedarwood, Oakwood, Tonka Bean
style: Woody - Spicy
description: This new Eau de Parfum is named after the perfumerâs father, Thai poet Montri Umavijani (1941-2006), whose poetry has been in the core of every fragrance Mme Umavijanihas ever composed. Being a direct homage to her fatherâs personality, Montri conveys aspects of his character and idiosyncrasies, the things he loved and he believed in, as well as the fragrances he enjoyed the most. Wanting to reflect the soulâs eternal character, the perfumer went one step further: she imagined what kind of fragrance her father would have loved today, had he still been alive.

name: La Douceur de Siam
notes: May Rose, Frangipani, Champaca Flower, Clove, Ylang Ylang, Violet Leaf, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Amber
style: Floral - Ambery Spice
description: A perfume of strange, nocturnal beauty, La Douceur de Siam is like walking into a Thai spice garden overhung with night-blooming flowers. Creamy, dreamy, what could have been another pretty, classically composed white floral is sparked by vivid green notes and given a voluptuous exoticism with ylang-ylang, frangipani and champaca. La Douceur de Siam opens with a hothouse smell of stemmy greenery and a thorny rose so sharp youâd swear it had fangs. But soon, warm sandalwood arrives along with a soothing hint of vanilla to blanket the composition, and the rose becomes lush and welcoming.

name: Erawan
notes: Herbal Notes, Petitgrain, Lily-of-the-valley, Haitian Vetiver, Hay, Clary Sage, Liatris (deertongue), Cedar, Oakmoss, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Erawan is the scent of late summer tipping into fall. It is the smell of the harvest, with fields of aromatic barley, hay, and oats waiting to be brought in, the earthy goodness of nuts, flour, and honey stacked high in the larder, and the wholesome, leaf-brownness of tobacco leaves drying on barn floors. It is not an uncommon theme in indie perfumery, but Erawan stands proud of other examples by way of two things. First, Dusitaâs sophisticated style of making perfumes puts a high-definition gloss on the rustic theme, making it the perfect choice for a young Paris or New York sophisticate who wants real, but who also wants polished. Second, whereas most fragrances with a countryside bent are loaded with syrupy sweetness, booze, or fruit, Erawan boasts only the gentle sweetness of nuts, hay, and herbs, thus making it an airy, elegant wear.

name: Splendiris
notes: Bergamot, Mandarin, Orange, Violet Leaf, Fig Leaf, Carrot Seed, Sweet Orris Butter, Iris, Violet, Rose De Mai, Jasmine Sambac, Vanilla, Vetiver, Cedar, Ambergris
style: Creamy, Earthy, Floral, Fresh - Citrus, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Light
description: With the tremendous visual and olfactory beauty of the iris comes a unique challenge- how does one create an iris scent that improves upon what nature has already perfected? In the case of the truly magical newest release from Dusita, the answer lies in the subtleties- Splendiris showcases an utterly breathtaking orris absolute in all of its cool, purple, rich, and powdered glory, with just the right amount of fresh, dark, and gourmand supplemental notes to modernize, brighten, and smooth the whole experience into the realm of the sublime.

name: Elysium Pour Homme
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Litsea Cubeba, Rose De Mai, Jasmin De Grasse, Cistus, Galbanum, Celery Seed, Pink Pepper, Caraway, Nutmeg, Pepper, Oakmoss, Vetiver, Cedarwood, Cedar Needles, Guaiac Wood, Amyris, Labdanum
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Woody - Fresh
description: Elysium Pour Homme Parfum Cologne is the original Elysium extrait in a linen summer suit, an eau de cologne-soaked kerchief tucked into the shirt pocket. Forming part of Roja Doveâs "Parfum Cologne" collection - a new category invented by Roja Dove to give clients the luxuriousness of an EDP concentration (between 15% and 20%) but with the freshness of an eau de cologne - Elysium Pour Homme Parfum Cologne is pure summer bliss in a bottle, bathing the wearer in a cloud of sparkling, sun-lit citrus and vetiver that lasts all day long.

name: Creation-E Parfum Cologne
notes: Bergamot, Geranium, Rose De Mai, Neroli, Jasmin De Grasse, Heliotrope, Cardamom, Ginger, Pepper, Patchouli, Cognac, Tobacco, Sandalwood, Benzoin, Vanilla, Ambergris
style: Boozy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: Rojaâs much loved Creation-E, or Enigma as itâs known over the pond, is probably the ne-plus-ultra of private menâs club genre - a heady swirl of cognac, rum, cane sugar, cigar tobacco, vanilla, and gingery aromas that wraps around its wearer like an ermine cloak custom-made in one of Londonâs Saville Row tailors. But maybe â just maybe â you canât wear an ermine cloak of a scent every day (though Roja would probably argue with us on that one).

name: Vetiver Parfum Cologne
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Litsea Cubeba, Rose De Mai, Jasmin De Grasse, Cistus, Galbanum, Celery Seed, Pink Pepper, Caraway, Nutmeg, Pepper, Oakmoss, Vetiver, Cedarwood, Cedar Needles, Guaiac Wood, Amyris, Labdanum
style: Fougere, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: With its new iteration as a Parfum Cologne - a new category invented by Roja Dove to give clients the luxuriousness of an EDP concentration (between 15% and 20%) but with the freshness of an eau de cologne â Roja once again proves that thereâs nothing on the market today that comes close to the sheer purity and quality of his Vetiver par excellence. Indeed, weâre rather relieved to report that this iteration of Vetiver is very close in character to the genre-defining eau de parfum, especially in its focus on the bright, sparkling qualities of vetiver over its oft-times danker, rootier aspects.

name: Elixir Essence De Parfum
notes: Bergamot, Lily Of The Valley, Geranium, Rose De Mai, Jasmine, Ylang Ylang, Heliotrope, Violet, Raspberry, Peach, Violet Leaf, Cinnamon, Cedar, Cashmere Wood, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Orris, Ambrette, Musk
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: "A rich bouquet of Lily of the Valley, Geranium, Rose, Jasmine, Ylang Ylang, Heliotrope, and Violet is made fruity through the inclusion of Raspberry and Peach, underscored by the warmth of Cedar, Sandal and Casmir Woods, and lively Cinnamon, softened by Vanilla, Orris, and an unusual note of Orris Sur CÃ¨dre, the whole counterpointed by costly Violet Leaves and citrus Bergamot, where whispers of Musk and Ambrette add sensuality to the base." -Roja Dove

name: Burlington 1819
notes: Grapefruit, Lime, Mandarin, Bitter Orange, Mint, Ginger, Cinnamon, Cumin, Saffron, Patchouli, Oakmoss, Rum, Tobacco, Cedarwood, Casmir Wood, Benzoin, Vanilla, Labdanum, Ambergris, Musk
style: Boozy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: â1819 celebrates 5 years of Londonâs Burlington Arcade being home to the flagship Roja Parfums boutique. An iconic British institution for over 200 years, the Burlington Arcade is an unparalleled destination for the discovery of opulence. Every step down the Arcade is a chance to discover something new. 1819 â the year it opened to the public â pays homage The Burlington Arcade being the perfect home for our award-winning perfumery, where the finest fragrances in the world wait to be discovered.â - Roja Dove

name: Apex
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Mandarin, Orange, Jasmine, Cistus, Pineapple, Galbanum, Elemi, Patchouli, Oakmoss, Rum, Tobacco, Cypress, Fir Balsam, Juniper Berry, Casmir Wood, Sandalwood, Benzoin, Amber, Frankincense, Labdanum, Leather, Ambergris, Musk
style: Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Celebrating the natural wonders of the world and all who roam it, Apex is fresh, fruity chyprÃ© accord with spiritual and sensual undertones.

name: A Midsummer Dream
notes: Grapefruit, Rose, Orange Blossom, Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Oakmoss, Tree Moss, Benzoin, Vanilla, Carrot Seed
style: Chypre, Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: ROJA London

name: Isola Blu
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Lime, Lavender, Thyme, Apple, Blackcurrant, Pink Pepper, Coconut, Orange Blossom, Jasmin, Lily, Champaca, Cut Grass, Mate, Galbanum, Aniseed, Patchouli, Oakmoss, Cedar, Juniper, Vanilla, Tonka, Amber, Orris, Birch, Ambergris, Musk
description: ROJA London

name: Elysium Eau Intense
notes: Bergamot, Grapefruit, Lime, Rhubarb, Lavender, Thyme, Artemisia, Musk, Lily Of The Valley, Orange Blossom, Rose De Mai, Jasmin De Grasse, Tuberose, Apple, Blackcurrant, Galbanum, Black Pepper, Cypriol, Vetiver, Cedarwood, Dry Woods, Violet Leaf, Juniper Berry, Benzoin, Vanilla, Labdanum, Leather, Ambergris
style: Classic Masculine, Fresh - Citrus
description: An iconic word in the perfume world, Elysium has remained an international success since launching in 2017.

name: Amber Aoud
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Lime, Fig, Jasmine, Rose, Ylang Ylang, Ambergris, Aoud Wood, Birch, Cinnamon, Civet, Musk, Oakmoss, Orris, Patchouli, Saffron, Sandalwood
style: Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Spicy
description: A Rolls Royce in a sea of Volkswagens, Roja Doveâs Amber Aoud sets out to best every other rose-oud out there by sheer dint of superior raw materials and blending. Expensive this may be, but Roja Dove puts his money where his mouth is. Taking a regally sour, spicy Indian oud, he buries it deep within the folds of a jammy rose, and then tucks the whole thing into the pulpy insides of a Moroccan fig. Almost obscenely rich and opulent at first, it wears like the inside of a red velvet cloak lined in ermine.

name: Ambre Loup
notes: Clove, Spices, Balsam Peru, Labdanum, Vanilla, Agarwood, Gaiac, Cedar
style: Earthy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Spicy
description: We know what youâre thinking. Amber - been there, done that, got the t-shirt, yadda yadda. Well, weâre here to tell you that Ambre Loup is different and that you need it. Because this wild thing with a tarry, smoky twist is the amber that touches the primal part of your hunter-gatherer soul that other ambers failed to reach.

name: Jasmin Kama
notes: Bergamot, Rosa Damascena, Jasmin (Jasmin Absolute, Egypt), Patchouli, Sandalwood, Heliotrope, Vanilla, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - Spicy
description: Jasmin Kama is an excellent showcase for Egyptian jasmine, which is richly animalic, slightly coarse, and fruity. The word Kama brings to mind thoughts of the Kama Sutra, and why yes, this is one seriously carnal scent!

name: T. Habanero
notes: Pink Pepper, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Black Tobacco, Sandalwood, Agarwood, Incense, Myrrh, Leather
style: Exotic, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: T. Habanero stuns with its unique portrayal of what happens when a fruity, stinky Cambodi oud meets a dark, nutty tobacco leaf. Imagine a thick stew of chocolatey spices fermenting in an oak barrel, and a man pouring in handfuls of dry tobacco leaves and oud wood chips, dark with resin. After a long soak, the drenched woods and tobacco leaves are spread out to bake under a hot sun, releasing a host of fruited, dark, fermented aromas. One doesnât know where the oud begins and the tobacco ends.

name: Lavande 44
notes: Bergamot, Petitgrain, Lavender (Essential Oil And Absolute), Agarwood
style: Green / Herbaceous
description: If you think you smelled every possible variation on the lavender theme, then think again. Rania J.âs Lavande 44 is a wholly unique take on the genre, mixing one part aromatics (green, fresh lavender bud) with one part animalics (oud, musk) and two parts resinous  (labdanum, tonka, patchouli).

name: Oud Assam
notes: Bergamot, Sweet Orange, Bitter Orange, Oud From India, Cedar, Vetiver, Frankincense, Black Pepper, Tonka Bean, Musk.
style: Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: Oud virgins, look away now â Rania J.âs majestic Oud Assam features an authentic Indian oud oil that doesnât pull any punches. The juicy, bitter orange framing the opening notes only serves to highlight the creamy bleu cheese feel of the oud. But give it a moment to settle, and youâll begin to understand why Indian oud is considered the most spiritually uplifting type of oud. As the nose adjusts and the oud note begins to soften, one begins to discern the complex aromas of deep golden spice, leather, and fermented, creamy woodiness. A smell as ancient as time itself.

name: Shah'ryar
notes: Bergamot, Osmanthus, Caramel, Labdanum, Plum, Vanilla, Oud, Sandalwood, Oakmoss, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Hay, Musk, Beeswax
description: Rania J.

description: Jovoy Paris

description: Mad et Len

description: Mad et Len

style: Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Fresh

name: Minuit et Demi

description: Master Perfumer StÃ©phane Bengana has worked exclusively with Demi Rawling and the Fragrance Du Bois team to create a masterpiece which we believe contains Demiâs love and passion for perfume to perfection.

name: Secret Tryst
notes: Bergamot, Saffron, Cardamom, Rose, Jasmine, Cedar, Vetiver, Patchouli, Frankincense, Cistus, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Floral, Fresh - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: Bon Parfumeur

name: London Spice
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Spearmint, Lavender, Jasmine, White Flowers, Marine Notes, Patchouli, Cedar Wood, Nutmeg, Cardamom
style: Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Bogue Profumo

name: PM
notes: Tuberose, Secret Florals, Juniper Berry, Cardamom, Menton Lemon, Indonesian Patchouli, Italian Leather, Cedarwood, Orris Root, Labdanum, Woody Notes, Benzoin, Amber
style: Floral - Spicy, Woody - Light
description: A true âPower Scentâ that harkens back to heady days when perfume could be made with real and powerful ingredients, and not guided by budgets and constraints, PM is the new signature scent in the world of haute perfumery.

name: Oud Jaune Intense
notes: Tahitian Gardenia, Ylang-ylang, Pineapple, Jasmine, Orange Blossom, Oud, Vanilla, Lactones, Musk
style: Animalic, Creamy, Floral - White, Fruity, Sweet
description: Wow! One hit of Oud Jaune Intense and we are floating in away in a pool of tropical island bliss, our senses lulled by the heady aroma of pikake and gardenia petals soaking in coconut oil. This is one big-bosomed island girl of a perfume and we love it. Juicy pineapple and monoi oil form a fruity, creamy grin that lifts the corners of the scent at both ends.

name: Santal Complet
notes: Lemon, Coconut, Violet, Black Pepper, Musk, Sandalwood, Amber, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: Tantalizingly tropical yet softly sensual, Santal Complet is a gorgeous new sandalwood scent that proves that Fragrance du Bois can do far more than just oud scents. In fact, by emphasizing the smooth, creamy, indulgent side of sandalwood with coconut, musk and vanilla, Santal Complet is a world away from the house's previous offerings, one that has us dreaming of white sand beaches and undisturbed crystal clear turquoise waters at the edge of the world.

name: Contre Bombarde 32
notes: Elemi, Juniper, Bitter Orange, Cedar, Sandalwood, Amber, Caramel, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Gourmand
description: Filippo Sorcinelli

name: Unda Maris 8
style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Powdery / Soft, Salty / Oceanic, Smoky
description: Filippo Sorcinelli

notes: 11 Select (but Undisclosed!) Notes That Evoke Vegetable Tanned Horse Leather
style: Animalic, Avant-Garde, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Boris Bidjan Saberi has never been known for conservatism- his edgy, modern designs and provocative collections have raised eyebrows and thrilled fashion-lovers, all while maintaining an exceptional level of detail-oriented artisanal craftsmanship. So it's only fitting that for his debut fragrance 11, Saberi, in collaboration with Geza Schoen, has created a vibrant, stylish scent bursting with creativity. Inspired by Saberi's leatherwork studio, where he hand-constructs intricate horse leather jackets, this scent reflects the care, personality, and style that Boris imprints into every item he produces.

name: Bat
notes: Fig, Passionfruit, Pink Guava, Soil Accord, Hay, Incense, Mineral Notes, Night-blooming Jasmine, Animalic Notes, Leather, Mossy Stone, Teak, Vetiver
style: Earthy, Fruity, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Spicy
description: Mystical, mysterious murmurings glide upon a blanket of inky sky. Shadows smear across the moonlight, their darting journey shrouded in darkness. Bats, the only mammal capable of true flight, are enigmatic and alien.Zoologist Bat escorts you on an odyssey through the night. This unique olfactory experience carries you with the fruit bat to a sumptuous feast in a lush tropical jungle, before whisking you down to the recesses of its cavernous home. Sweet guavas and passion fruits ensnare you with addictive notes, then beckon you deep with primordial mineral scents that evoke a rugged enclosure redolent with hints of damp soil and vegetal roots. Allow yourself to hang, draped in pitch black, as alluring musk wafts over you with every unfolding of the thousands of leathery wings that surround you.

name: Civet
notes: Bergamot, Black Pepper, Lemon, Orange, Spices, Tarragon, Carnation, Frangipani, Heliotrope, Hyacinth, Linden Blossom, Tuberose, Ylang, Balsams, Civet, Coffee, Incense, Labdanum, Musks, Oakmoss, Resins, Russian Leather, Vanilla, Vetiver, Woods
style: Animalic, Floral, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Spicy
description: An homage to the ingredient that gave that deliciously naughty, animalic note to the great elegant perfumes of the 30s and 40s, such as Rochas Femme and Schiaparelli Shocking, Civet is a gorgeous retro-style chypre. Civetâs zingy opening makes her seem like a modern gal, thanks to a vigorous citrus-pepper top note and herbal bite. Then, a plethora of heady floral notes swan in: heliotrope, linden, and hyacinth, creating a perfume of almost unbearable loveliness.

name: Squid
notes: Pink Pepper, Solar Salicylate, Incense, Black Ink Accord, Salty Accord, Opoponax, Ambergris, Benzoin, Musk
style: Salty / Oceanic, Smoky, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: The vast ocean swells and contracts, caught in the relentless tug of the moon. Beneath the surface, a school of squid emerges. Strange, elastic forms propel from the deep in a frantic search for sustenance. They are not alone. Their predators lunge, only to be foiled by blinding jets of murky ink. A massive sperm whale dives, leaving a temporary peace bobbing in its wake. Lumps of ambergris, expelled by the whale and polished by the salty currents, wash ashore. Waste? Flotsam? To the perfumer, this elusive substance is nothing less than treasure.

name: Musk Deer
notes: Cardamom, Calamus Oil, Rose, Jasmin Sambac, Patchouli, Cedar, Labdanum, Ambrette, Orris, Oud, Sandalwood *Musk Deer Does Not Use Any Animal Products
style: Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Fresh
description: Brutal winter winds buffet the Siberian forest. The tall trees long for summer's return, short though it may be. But at the base of several bare trunks, invisible love notes call to a would-be mate. The fragrant missives are secretions left by the male musk deer. Long fangs give the buck a demonic appearance, but they too play a role in the mating ritual â weapons in the tussle with rivals for a doe's love. The dream of a mate sustains the lonely musk deer as it searches out scraps of lichen and moss among cold, barren roots.

name: Snowy Owl
notes: Snow Accord, Lily Of The Valley, Mint, Coconut, Iris, Snowdrop, White Rose, Mate, Frankincense, Galbanum, Ambrette, Cedar, Civet*, Musks*, Vanilla, Oakmoss, Tonka *Zoologist Does Not Use Animal Products
style: Floral, Floral - White, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: "A thick carpet of silver envelops the landscape, untouched but for the dazzling reflection of the sun. Snow stretches as far as the eye can see, while a bitter wind rolls silently across the sky, its hush barely broken by the powerful beat of an ivory wing. Despite the stillness of the arctic, the snowy owl senses a flutter beneath the icy crust far below. Through snowy tunnels voles scamper, oblivious to their fate. A warm glow stirs within the breast of the majestic bird as it dives, confident in its mastery over the frigid kingdom."

name: Chipmunk
notes: Nutmeg, Cardamom, Quince, Blood Mandarin, Pink Pepper, Hazelnut, Oak, Balsam Fir, Chamomile, Earthy Notes, Amyris, Benzoin, Opoponax, Vetiver, Cedar, Gaiac Wood, Patchouli, Animal Notes
style: Earthy, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: The lush green of the treetops fades to a dull gold. What seems a peaceful transition actually raises a blaring alarm to the creatures below. Time is running out. But for generations, mighty oaks have fulfilled a promise to provide, and leaves are not the only bounty tumbling to the forest floor. Chipmunks scurry among the detritus in their quest to collect the plumpest acorns. They eagerly gather what they can and, cheeks bulging with nuts, scamper home to line their snug burrows before falling leaves give way to biting snow.

name: Macaque - Yuzu Edition
notes: Cedar, Green Apple, Red Mandarin, Frankincense, Galbanum, Honey, Rosewood, Ylang, Jasmine Tea, Cedarmoss, Green Tea, White Oud, Musk
style: Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: Against the backdrop of a mountainous terrain, two communities share a peaceful coexistence. Yet despite their proximity, the societies are distinctly unique. Macaques cavort among the trees, grasping with delight at natureâs bountiful pleasures. From the quiet solemnity of a nearby temple, their human neighbours regard them, coveting the monkeysâ playful abandon. The macaques are all but oblivious, sparing only the briefest of curious glances at the pensive faces below before surrendering once again to their carefree revels.

name: Seahorse
notes: Fennel, Ambrette, Guatemalan Cardamom, Clary Sage, Neroli, Tuberose, Algae, Ambergris, Vetiver
description: Balmy sunlight trips across foamy turquoise waves, sending rippling haloes onto the coral below. On the lagoon floor, anemone and seaweed sway in unison, limbs pumping to the rhythm of the current. Hovering among the coral branches, a group of seahorses gazes shyly on. The pulsating beat calls to them and two pair off, their tails entwined in a delicate waltz. Soon their passion is spent, but the memory of the dance lives on. For the pouch of the male seahorse tenderly cradles a precious clutch of eggs. Zoologist Seahorse invites you to wade through a vibrant coral garden.

name: Cow
notes: Sage, Apple, Milk, Lily Of The Valley, Heliotrope, Violet, Jasmine, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Benzoin, Musks, Amber
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Woody - Light
description: Lush green pastures tumble toward the horizon, arching beneath the imposing silhouette of a mountain range. Cumulus clouds roll across a bright blue sky, their massive shadows gliding over a peacefully grazing herd. In a corner of the meadow, a tiny calf braces quivering limbs and, with a mighty lurch, stumbles up to take its maiden steps. Its velvet snout prods, rooting at its mother, until the release of warm milk signals a satisfying welcome to this vast new world.

name: Sacred Scarab
notes: Aldehydes, Lemon, Blue Lotus Accord, Civet, Wine Accord, Plum Accord, Raisins, Olibanum, Myrrh, Galbanum, Cedar Wood, Juniper, Wine, Styrax, Benzoin, Oakmoss, Labdanum, Musk, Amber
style: Animalic, Chypre
description: The dogged prospector strikes gold. Upon discovering a payload rich with nutrients, the scarab returns home. Face down, guided by the sun, it propels the tightly-packed dung backwards to a burrow lined with dusky spheres. Underground, it tunnels into the ball to deposit a precious egg. In time, the larva hatches and feeds, until it emerges, fully formed, and instinct drives it down the same dusty trail to repeat the cycle.

name: Cockatiel
notes: Champagne, Raspberry, Rhubarb, Acacia, Powdery Notes, Cashmeran, Guaiac, Patchouli, Vanilla, Musk
style: Avant-Garde, Powdery / Soft
description: Australian spring arrives, bearing dazzling frocks of yellow blossoms to dress the bare golden wattle trees. Clouds of sweet honeyed fragrance, caught upon the breeze, carry an invitation inland, where a flock of cockatiels happily take up the celebration. Emerging from dusty nests, the birds are ready to preen and prance. On a wobbly stage of branches, vivid crests bop to the rhythm of their joyous songs. After a final encore, the flock takes flight. Alighting in a nearby field they share a delightful brunch, buzzing with the thrill of their stunning recital.

name: Northern Cardinal
style: Spicy
description: Branches lay bare against a grey sky. The gaiety of summer has given way to doldrums of fall, and as winter settles in, flocks take flight, like guests from a dwindling party. But one pair of revellers lingers on, he in crimson finery, she in demure tones. Among tattered streamers of copper leaves, they warble a merry duet. Around the cardinals' nest, tinsel icicles may have replaced vibrant blooms of roses, but as they feast on scarlet berries that dot the snowy landscape, this feathered brood's festive spirit refuses to be chilled.

name: Macaque Fuji Apple Edition
notes: Fuji Apple, Olibanum Oil, Juniper Berry, Myrrh, Hinoki Wood, Hydro Carbon Resin, Oakmoss Absolute, New Caledonia Sandalwood, Olibanum Hyperabsolute
description: Against the backdrop of a mountainous terrain, two communities share a peaceful coexistence. Yet despite their proximity, the societies are distinctly unique. Macaques cavort among the trees, grasping with delight at natureâs bountiful pleasures. From the quiet solemnity of a nearby temple, their human neighbours regard them, coveting the monkeysâ playful abandon. The macaques are all but oblivious, sparing only the briefest of curious glances at the pensive faces below before surrendering once again to their carefree revels.

name: Harvest Mouse
notes: Bergamot, Cloves, Roman Chamomile, Orange Blossom, Davana, Hay Absolute, Benzoin, Opoponax, Rose Absolute, Beer Extract CO2, Fir Balsam, Oak Moss, Cedarwood, Sandalwood, Peru Balsam, Vanilla
description: Autumn winds skip across golden wheat fields. As the tall grasses billow, the rattle of husks beats a soft prairie lullaby, signalling to the weary sun to rest. In the fading light, tiny harvest mice venture forth, scrambling to gather seeds and fruits. For once the sun sinks fully beneath the horizon, its rule of the sky is bestowed on another. And when the coo of the owl breaks the night, the mice dash, trembling, back to their nests.

name: Specimen Anthology Box Set
description: A deluxe box set of 30 Zoologist fragrance samples (1.5 ml each), perfect for any collector or as a delightful gift. Each fragrance sample is placed in its own card sleeve with scent description and artwork. Two cardboard envelopes, each holding up to 15 samples, present the collection elegantly. Please Note: The selection of these 30 scents will change as the library of Zoologist perfumes grows.

name: Tiger
notes: Kumquat, Cardamom, Saffron, Sambac Jasmine, Incense, Carrot Seeds, Vetiver, Ebony Wood, Papyrus
style: Earthy, Spicy
description: The frail glow of the waning moon dwindles until only impenetrable blackness persists across the grasslands. A herd of deer venture tentatively into the expanse. Though their long necks dip to feed, their dainty legs remain tense, poised to flee. Nearby, gleaming gold eyes pierce the gloom, and silky ears stiffen, attuned to the softest tremor. The tiger advances haltingly, intent on its prey, anticipating a moment of vulnerability. In a seamless motion, it leaps and descends upon its victim, its razor-sharp fangs sinking deep into the deerâs throat. As the deerâs life fades, its herd is already gone, evaporating into the night.

name: Nightingale
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Saffron, Japanese Plum Blossom, Rose, Violet, Oud, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Moss, Frankincense, White Musk, Labdanum, Ambergris
style: Floral, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Light
description: If the thickest fuchsia silk could be encapsulated in perfume, it would smell like Nightingale, Zoologistâs floral chypre. A startlingly beautiful Japanese plum blossom top note is supported by a deeply lush rose and fresh green violet. Balanced by spritely citrus and woody notes, Nightingale soars between airy and opulent.

name: Hummingbird
notes: Apple, Cherry, Citrus, Lilac, Muguet, Plum, Rose, Violet Leaf, Honey, Honeysuckle, Mimosa, Peony, Tulip, Ylang, Amber, Coumarin, Cream, Moss, Musk, Sandalwood, White Woods
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Sweet
description: Nectarous honeysuckle and yellow mimosa flutter in the air to the beat of a thousand tiny wings, their honeyed bouquet summoning tiny, extravagant birds to feed. Moments later, crystalline muguet, lilac and peony begin to float around trees heavy with fruit, as birds and insects buzz dizzily in the morning heat.

name: Panda
notes: Apple, Magnolia, Mandarin, Lily, Osmanthus, Ozone, Tea, Amber, Earthy Notes, Jasmine, Orris, Patchouli, Civet, Musk, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Earthy, Floral - Light, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Zoologist

name: Rhinoceros
notes: Pink Pepper, Whiskey, Coffee, Rum, Basil, Leather, Incense, Tobacco Absolute, Flouve, Ylang Ylang, Laos Oud, Patchouli, Nargamotha, Oakmoss, Amber
description: Under the searing gaze of an unrelenting sun, the ornery rhinoceros surveys his dusty territory. A tough, battered hide is his armour against the erosive onslaught of sand, whipped into a frenzy by a hot, merciless wind, as he stands strong, defending his domain.

name: Dragonfly
notes: Grapefruit, Basil, Angelica Seed, Ginger, Rice, Aquatic Florals, Geranium, Jasmin Sambac, Mimosa, Orris, Rose, Violet Leaves, Rainwater, Moss, Patchouli, Tonka, Vetiver, Benzoin, Cashmeran
description: Giant lotus pads part to make way for buds that pierce the surface of the jade green pond. They raise their faces to the sun, their delicate fragrance floating around them. In the shadow of the flowers, tiny dragonfly nymphs also emerge from the shallows. They spread their fragile wings and shyly take flight, ready to explore a world beyond the water. Shimmering pools of nearby golden rice fields call to the dragonflies. Their long, quivering bodies flit across the cascading terraces to alight upon swaying stalks, sparkling with sunlight caught in droplets on iridescent wings.

name: Elephant
notes: Tree Leaves, Darjeeling Tea, Magnolia, Cocoa, Coconut Milk, Incense, Jasmine, Woody Notes, Amber, Musks, Patchouli, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Floral, Unusual / Unexpected, Woody - Dark
description: Huge trees quake at their approach, vulnerable leaves shuddering as the ground rumbles under heavy footsteps. They come with appetites as massive as their lumbering bodies. Nothing is spared from their bottomless hunger â trees stripped bare, roots upturned, even the tiniest blooms cannot escape their grasp. When the behemoths move on, they leave behind a path of destruction. Yet what often looks like carnage is actually a renaissance. The elephants fulfill a vital role- purging the delicate ecosystem, allowing new life to flourish.

name: Camel
notes: Dried Fruits, Frankincense, Palm Date, Rose, Amber, Cedar, Cinnamon, Incense, Jasmine, Myrrh, Orange Blossom, Civet, Musk, Sandalwood, Oud, Tonka, Vanilla, Vetiver
style: Animalic, Exotic, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Resinous / Balsamic, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Camel is a series of elegant contradictions. It retains a surprisingly brisk, fat-free mien. It features a plethora of rich, sticky notes like dates and dried fruit, but is as dry as a glass of champagne. Frankincense, musk, and oud lend a sinuous exoticism that speaks to the East; yet Camel has a distinctly retro flourish that places it firmly among the flanks of classic French perfumes such as My Sin and Arpege.

name: Moth
notes: Black Pepper, Cinnamon, Clove, Cumin, Lemon, Nutmeg, Saffron, Heliotrope, Iris, Jasmine, Mimosa, Muguet, Rose, Ambergris, Honey, Resins, Gaiac, Musk, Nagarmotha, Oud, Patchouli, Smoke, Vetiver
style: Earthy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: Their days are spent secluded in camouflage, the intricate pattern of their wings disguising them against a coarse backdrop of barks and rocks. When they finally stir, even their flight is concealed, shrouded beneath the cover of night. Moonlight ripples off a delicate coating of tiny hairs as their feathered antennae guide them in their search for a mate. Only one temptation can lure them from their quest. Should they succumb to the attraction of the flame, their urge to procreate may be quashed in a wisp of smoke and a smattering of ashes.

name: Hyrax
notes: Blackberry, Elemi, Pink Pepper, Saffron, Turkish Rose, African Stone, Hyacinth, Styrax, Whiskey, Amber, Benzoin, Musks, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Tonka

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
notes: Bergamot, Black Pepper, Fir, Laurel Leaf, Neroli, Nutmeg, Champaca, Geranium, Jasmine, Osmanthus, Rose, Ylang, Resins, Cade, Cedar, Civet, Frankincense, Leather, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vanilla
style: Animalic, Earthy, Exotic, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Unusual / Unexpected
description: A sultry heat wafts across the land, lapped up greedily by the abundant flora that thrives in its midst. Trees soar to majestic heights and plants flower for the first time, their petals spreading to give birth to a world rich in diversity. The Cretaceous period comes of age against a backdrop scorched by wildfire and lightning strikes. Over this turbulent landscape, a massive predator looms. Giants rule the earth, but even giants can be cut down within the powerful jaws of the fearsome tyrannosaur. Standing tall, the terrifying beast fears nothing, until that pivotal moment when a fire in the sky signals the end of their deadly reign.

name: Chameleon
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Madagascar Ylang Ylang, Mango, Pink Pepper, Star Fruit, Violet Leaves, Cashmeran, Clove, Coconut, Frangipani, Jasmine, Saffron, Salty Skin Accord, Sea Breeze, Amber, Woods, Musks, Opoponax, Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Vetiver
style: Floral - Fruity, Tropical / Beachy
description: Like the luminescent skin of a reptile, fiery scales of sunlight ripple across the surface of the Indian Ocean, fading slowly to gold and finally sapphire as the sun sinks and disappears. The sea exhales, its gentle tide caressing the beach of an island paradise. The salty breath combines with the narcotic aromas of the ylang and frangipani trees in an intimate kiss, sending shivers through the branches. Something stirs â an eye pivots, a tail grips a slender bough. Will the creature vanish among the leaves, or flirt with a daring display of colour? No one knows. The secrets that lie beneath the skin of the chameleon keep Madagascar guessing. What we do know, however, is that Zoologist Chameleon is a deliciously elusive blend of bright florals, hypnotic musks, and exotic fruit that can turn the wearer into anything they want to be.

name: Sloth
notes: Chamomile, Acai Berry, Lavender, Violet Leaf, Marigold, Beeswax, Anise, Jatamansi, Jasmine, Cumin, Hay, Frankincense, Myrrh, Mushroom, Oakmoss, Vanilla, Tonka
style: Animalic, Earthy, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: With its vibrant, sun-dappled hues, the dense rainforest beckons invitingly. Yet within its misty depths, countless dangers lurk, slinking across the forest floor. Dangling high among the treetops may seem a dubious defence against peril, but for leisurely sloths the forest canopy offers a protective shroud. Safe in their leafy fortress, the sluggish creatures move so slowly even moss overtakes them. They snooze in a cradle of moist green aromas, oblivious to the chaos below.

name: Koala
notes: Eucalyptus, Menthol Honey Gumdrops, Mimosa, Black Tea, Geranium, Incense, Spices, Vetiver, Musk, Amber, Oakmoss, Vanilla, Sandalwood
style: Green / Herbaceous, Natural/Organic, Woody - Fresh
description: A cloak of rich green velvet sweeps across the Australian horizon, the majestic eucalypt forest flattering every curve of the undulating landscape. Tucked high in the crook of a tree, the koala is oblivious to the mesmerizing views. It would rather curl into a ball and sleep off a feast of oily eucalyptus, the aromatic leaves that sustain it. Despite their sleepy demeanour and friendly expression, koalas are territorial creatures. Males mark the soaring trunks with their musk, establishing their dominance.

name: Carnicure
notes: Orange Blossom, Violet, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Civet, Vanilla, Musk, Ambergris, Labdanum
style: Animalic, Creamy, Exotic, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Wow. Carnicure is one naughty little kitty. In case youâve been looking for it, Carnicure is the sweet spot between the ferocious dirtiness of Serge Lutens Muscs Kublai Khan, the smutty florals of Kiehlâs, and the milky innocence of Helmut Lang EDP. In other words, this one is not only gorgeous, not only elegant, but above all exceedingly sexy.

name: Corpalium
notes: Iris, Ambrette, Fenugreek, Gaiac, Cedar, Castoreum
description: âAccording to the inspiration of every day, discoveries and travels, I collect materials, prepare macerations and infusions. I order new extracts. This allows me to make first mixes to define blends to work with. These become the skeleton of a project that I propose to a perfumer. A prolific dialogue then takes place with perfumer StÃ©phanie Bakouche over several months to develop a extraordinary formulaâ on based on high quality raw materials that require long maceration periods.

name: Ambilux
notes: Pink Peppercorn, Cumin, Incense, Ylang, Dune Plants, Castoreum, Costus
style: Animalic, Earthy, Floral
description: Ambilux is ambiguous only in the sense that it is puzzling that a list of largely plant-based spices, resins, and florals adds up to something so unapologetically animal. The first blast has our eyes rolling back in pleasure: a thickly furred musk redolent of warm animal, dripping tallow candles, and the salty skin of a loved one. That there are new perfumes out there that dare to challenge the great Muscs Khoublai Khan and Musc Tonkin is a pleasant surprise. Although Ambilux is quite different to these perfumes, it possesses the same earthy, no-holds-barred sensuality and a texture that is distinctly retro in its velvety thickness.

name: Poudrextase
notes: Rice Powder, Dried Rose, Cypress, Civet, Musks
style: Animalic, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Marlou

name: What About Pop
notes: Salty Popcorn, Hawthorn, Caramel, Lunar Flower, Milk Cream, ExaVanilla, Amber, Ebony, Vetyver, Benzoin
style: Creamy
description: 4160 Tuesdays

name: BonBon Pop
notes: White Peach, Bergamot, Coconut, Vanilla, Jasmine, Patchouli, Brown Sugar, Precious Woods, Dry Amber, Musk
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Maison Mataha

name: Dates Delight
notes: Peony, Dates, Coumarin, Caramel, Tonka, Cinnamon, Honey, Labdanum, Benzoin, Vanilla, Sugar
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Are you the kind of person who looks at the dessert list before choosing the appetizers? Well, then welcome to the most sumptuous dessert trolley youâve ever set eyes on â Dates Delight. Imagine a gold dish piled high with sticky RiyÃ  dates as plump as a babyâs fist and dripping with raw honey and caramel. Now picture them dunked into a bath of the silkiest crÃ¨me brulee, thick with vanilla bean underneath and crackling with melted brown sugar on top. Visualize all this dusted with a thick layer of spicy cinnamon. Are you salivating yet?

name: The Time
notes: Bergamot, Wormwood, Chamomile, Oolong Tea, Iris, Lemon Verbena, Cedar, Musk, Amber, Black Tea
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky
description: What a beautiful, refreshing tea scent! Fans of tea scents know that a good one is difficult to find; well, House of Oudâs The Time is a good one. The opening of bergamot, chamomile, and wormwood note creates a superb green tea impression, uniquely fresh and bitter, but with a nutty hay-like undertone. Slowly, other types of tea notes start to feed into the scent, helping to round out the picture and fill in the gaps. Oolong tea adds a milkiness that softens the astringency of the green tea, rendering it cloudy, while a black tea note lends a smoky leathery nuance. Together, the combination of the different teas gives the scent a subtle âroastedâ undertone.

name: Keep Glazed
notes: Frozen Lemon, Mango, Strawberry Leaf, Chantilly Cream, Grated Coconut, Ginger Crumble, Fruity Musk, Precious Woods
style: Fruity, Gourmand, Sweet
description: Patisserie and perfume- two art forms dedicated to sensory pleasure and indulgence, where skilled execution and artistic vision are equally important if one is to create a masterpiece. Keep Glazed, THoO's collaboration with Canadian Patisserie's Ksenia Penkina, is indeed a perfect fusion of talent and technique, as delectable flavours of tropical fruit and rich pastry are blended with a deft and delicate touch, creating a mouthwatering yet complex gourmand scent of rarified sophistication.

name: Milk Musk - Eau de Parfum
notes: Elemi, Musk, Ambroxan, Vanilla, Benzoin And Tonka Bean
style: Powdery / Soft, Woody - Light
description: Quiet morning light gently trickles in through glazed sash glass. Billowing freshly pressed sheets cocoon skin on soft skin, nestled into the solacing embrace of milky notes. Comforting, warm cashmere whispers soothingly of silvery white musk as a melody of fluttery piano chords tinkle from the record player. Purely connect with profound love in a private haven.

name: Brooklyn
notes: Bergamot, Squeezed Lemon, Orange Juice, Incense, Cardamom, Fresh Air, Ozonic Notes, Magnolia, Orris Root, Transparent Flowers, Musks, White Woods, Benzoin, Amber.
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus, Woody - Fresh
description: The beating creative heart of the East Coast, Brooklyn is a borough crackling with excitement and youthful joy. Power walking to a breakfast meeting over the Brooklyn Bridge. Life on the sidewalk, early summer breezes, the glow from the lighting in bars and diners, bright apartments stuffed with books. Cocktails with friends. A lazy May afternoon in the sun at Park Slope, warmth on the skin. Small flowers in the grass. Fresh air.

name: Tokyo
notes: Yuzu, Bergamot, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Wasabi Accord, Hinoki, Cedarwood, Nutmeg, Iris, Rose, Incense, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Patchouli, Musk, Amber
style: Floral - Light, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Itâs 6 am in Tokyo as you make your way home through the quiet back streets, the air humid with early morning mist. As the electric cables above your head crackle and snap, a strange peace descends on the scene. Tokyo is finally at slumber, or at least in brief repose before gathering itself up again into the manic energy that courses through the city like a pulse. Gallivantâs Tokyo captures the moment when Old Tokyo meets New, the sweet smokiness of Japanese incense of Kodo ceremonies spilling out of small wooden temples to meet the sweet-and-sour pungency of izakaya street food.

name: Naples
notes: Bergamot, Ginger, Pink Pepper, Sea Notes, Ozonic Notes, Olibanum, Incense, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Labdanum, Vetiver, Guaiac Wood, Clearwood, Patchouli, Birch, Amber
style: Smoky, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Gallivant

name: Istanbul
notes: Bergamot, Cardamom, Red Thyme, Lavender Absolute, Egyptian Geranium Essence, Patchouli Heart, Sweet Myrrh, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Amber, Musks
description: Gallivant

name: Gdansk
notes: Plum, Honey, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Saffron, Cistus Absolute, Sandalwood Oil, Patchouli, Incense Resinoid, Rose, Tobacco, Cypriol, Styrax, Vanilla, Musks, Ambergris
style: Woody - Dark
description: Says  creator  Nick  Steward: âPoland  is  a  country  close  to  my  heart. I  admire  the character  of  the  people  and  the  place: strong, warm-hearted, independent-minded. Thatâs the emotion I wanted to conjure up with this perfume. Gdansk is a beautiful and memorable city on the Baltic âfamed for its amber and its intrepid history of seafaring. I wanted to pay tribute to this city with its surprising and fascinating history."

name: Accra
notes: Passionberry, Eucalyptus, Hot Pepper, Mango, Papaya, Davana, Cognac, Carrot Seed, C02 Coffee Exract, Saffron, Cocoa, Tobacco, Styrax, Leather, Cedarwood, Patchouli, Vinyl, Liatrix, Musk
style: Fruity, Spicy, Woody - Amber
description: Gallivant

name: London
notes: Cucumber, Violet Leaves, Rose De Mai, Rose Oil, Orris Root, Leather, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Cedar
style: Earthy, Floral, Smoky, Woody - Fresh
description: London- a massive city that sometimes feels like a small town. Soaring buildings abut down-to-earth pubs. Overwhelming, but inexplicably addictive. And, as much as the Brits have a well-earned reputation for stuffiness, it's all tied together with a wicked sense of humor. Where else can you find such a sea of humanity, east end boys and west end girls in second-hand leather jackets, the creative, the new, old, the beautiful, the ugly, the rich and the poor, all just rubbing along and making their way in one of the world's true capitals?

name: Tel Aviv
notes: Clementine, Bergamot, Blackcurrant Bud, Jasmine Sambac, Ylang Ylang, Rose Oil, Freesia, Sandalwood, Musks, Benzoin
style: Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Spicy, Tropical / Beachy
description: Pierre Guillaume Paris, Parfumerie Generale

name: Berlin
notes: Grapefruit, Clementine, Lemon, Schinus Molle Co2 Extract, Black Pepper, Black Tea, Haitian Vetiver, Cedarwood, Patchouli
style: Fresh - Citrus, Woody - Fresh
description: Itâs Berlin - think carefree summers, swimming at the Strandbad Wannsee with fresh water hitting the skin. Gritty urban living in brutalist apartment blocks, concrete, elegant parquet floors. Modern bohemians in leather, smoke, spices, cups of black tea, inside and underground. A city where you can be decadent, poor-but-sexy.

name: Nomad Discovery Set
description: Pierre Guillaume Paris, Parfumerie Generale

name: Los Angeles
notes: Eucalyptus, Clary Sage, Mandarin, Pineapple, Tuberose, Narcissus, Cade, Gaiac, Nagarmotha, Musk, Heliotrope
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Smoky, Woody - Fresh
description: A perfect day in Los Angeles might start early, as a sparkling ray of morning sunlight illuminates an abundance of flowering native florae. That same day might end late, but not too late, as the last notes of your favorite band echo off the starlit hills surrounding the Hollywood Bowl. Sure, L.A. may not have much of a claim to being The City That Never Sleeps, but with beginnings and endings as beautiful as ours, who says that's a bad thing?

name: Une Tonne de Roses
notes: Rose, Patchouli
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - Fruity
description: So called because it takes 3.5 tons of rose petals to make just one kilo of rose essence, Une Tonne de Roses has a natural delicacy that belies its hefty name. It opens with a fresh, soft pink rose glistening with the wet sparkle of fruit â green apple or an Asian pear, perhaps. There is also, briefly, a hint of something winey and truffled playing around the edges of the rose, but it never commits to darkness. This is an innocent little rosebud of a rose, just about to burst into being.

name: Guimauve de Noel
notes: Orange Blossom, Vanilla, Sugar
style: Creamy, Floral - Citrus, Gourmand, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Selected by Denyse Beaulieu to feature in her top 10 of 2016 for Grain de Musc, Guimauve de NÃ¶el is a pillowy marshmallow scent flavored with orange flower water and dusted in enough powdered sugar to make your teeth ache. But while it reminds us most pleasurably of fougassette, a type of bread fragrant with orange flower water sold in every market in Provence, this is not at all a heavy, gluttonous fragrance. Rather, it is a tender puff of orange flower-scented air with the sparkle of sugar crystals.

name: Haute Provence
notes: Lavender, Melon, Watermelon, Narcissus
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Woody - Fresh
description: The Provence region of France is known for both bucolic beauty- think rolling fields of purple lavender- and also for the glamorous, sun-drenched good life of Riviera enclaves like Saint-Tropez. With Haute Provence, Parle Moi de Parfum delivers a summer-perfect ode to this slice of paradise, a bright, refreshing, seductively smooth lavender scent that's as head-turningly stylish as it is easy to wear.

name: Wake Up World
notes: Bergamot, Green Apple, Turkish Rose, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Ambroxan, Benzoin
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Clean, Woody - Fresh
description: It's all too easy these days to feel like the entire world has gone mad. Even fragrance, our escape from the actual problems out there, has fallen victim to outlandish and unprovable claims of life-changing benefits, planet-saving virtues, or inscrutably high-minded artistry. At the risk of sounding overly simplistic, whatever happened to just smelling great?

name: Totally White
notes: Lilac, Wisteria, Hawthorn
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal, White
description: Totally White captures the ethereal, foggy dew of a spring morning in a Parisian city park. It smells like a field of wildflowers waking up en masse. The delicate, slightly honeyed scent of lilac and wisteria mingle with the intoxicatingly bitter, leathery scent of the hawthorn bushes, creating an effect so pollen-rich and watery-cool that youâd forgive early morning joggers for looking dazed and slightly drunk.

name: Milky Musk
notes: Sandalwood, Musk, Fig
style: Creamy, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal, White, Woody - Light
description: In the late 1990âs and under the direction of Tom Ford, Michel Almairac created one of the most iconic perfumes of the 20th century: Gucci Rush. A massive lactonic peach with a voice like a foghorn, it wore like the tightest, shiniest red vinyl dress ever created. Now twenty years later, Michel picks up the reins again to create a softer, muskier version that explores the same theme of milk and fruit, but this time with an indoors voice.

name: Tomboy Neroli
notes: Neroli, Orange Blossom, Amber
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean
description: Tomboy Neroli is a paradox: sexy and clean. It smells like a freshly-laundered cotton t-shirt stripped off a hot, young body that has been wearing a classic eau de cologne all day. Male or female? Doesnât matter. When itâs this good, itâs for everyone.

name: Woody Perfecto
notes: Coffee, Vetiver, Leather
style: Earthy, Gourmand, Masculine, Smoky
description: Woody Perfecto is a seemingly simple mix of coffee, vetiver, and leather, but there is something so nailed about this fragrance that itâs hard to keep a grin off our face. Coffee is a difficult note to pull off; in Woody Perfecto, you get a perfectly dark, roasted bean with no off notes or milkiness to distract from the main event. Just damn fine coffee, as Agent Cooper would say.

name: Orris Tattoo
notes: Orris Root
style: Creamy, Earthy, Floral
description: Orris Tattoo pays tribute to one of perfumeryâs most incredible raw materials â orris root. While florists adore the delicate, arching flowers and tall green stems of the iris, perfumers are far more interested in the unprepossessing-looking root underneath. The process of making orris butter is a real labor of love. The iris roots, or rhizomes as they are known, are left to grow underground for three years, and then left to dry out in a cool storeroom for another three years. The result is the most expensive butter you will never find on any supermarket shelf â a silvery substance that Chandler Burr once referred to as âliquid good tasteâ.

name: Chypre Mojo
notes: Bergamot, Carnation, Mango, Patchouli
description: In 1917, there was a new shape in the air when Coty launched its now legendary Chypre de Coty. Putting forth the idea that a perfume could smell as indefinably complex as the person who wore it, this landmark scent swept away the cobwebs of the simpler floral perfumery of the previous century. In the century that followed, the chypre idea proved to be an enduring one, its seemingly endless permutations of bergamot, labdanum, and oakmoss giving rise to some of the most meaningful perfumes in the world, like Mitsouko, Tabac Blond, and Pour Monsieur.

name: Papyrus Oud
notes: Papyrus, Incense, Patchouli, Oud, Musk, Chocolate, Ginger
style: Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: In 2003, Michel Almairac released the instantly iconic Gucci pour Homme, a boldly warm and woodsy men's scent featuring a proprietary "papyrus wood" accord that defied the fresh, synthetic trends of the time to become a modern classic. Now, almost two decades later, Almairac returns to his beloved creation through a niche fragrance lens- with an emphasis on smoky, spicy complexity- and the result is Papyrus Oud, a vision of masculine elegance and warm sophistication.

name: Gardens of India
notes: Jasmine, Tuberose, Sandalwood
style: Floral, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Some fragrances achieve sophistication via complex arrangements of dozens or even hundreds of notes; others, however, know that a simply perfect ratio of a few simply perfect materials has the same capacity to astound. It's this latter philosophy that guides Gardens of India, a deeply romantic scent that deploys three wonderful ingredients- jasmine, tuberose, and sandalwood- to magnificent and unforgettable effect.

name: Mile High
notes: Immortelle, Tonka, Patchouli, Pineapple
style: Floral - Spicy, Fruity, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: Immortelle flowers don't get their name by accident- these lusciously sweet-smelling members of the Helichrysum family blossom in places lesser florals fear to tread. It's both their intoxicating aroma and their striking fortitude that inspire Mile High, a dynamic, sexy, modern unisex fragrance dedicated to those who thrive no matter what challenges life has to offer.

name: Satori
notes: Bergamot, Coriander, Cinnamon, Clove, Cacao, Vanilla, Frankincense, Sandalwood, Oak Moss, Agarwood (oud)
style: Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Rosendo Mateu

name: Mizunara
notes: Galbanum, Rosemary, Clary Sage, Lavender, Cognac Oil, Juniper, Cypress, Patchouli, Blue Chamomile, Labdanum, Tulu Balsam, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Parfum Satori

name: Iris Homme
notes: Lemon, Cardamom, Orange Flower, Iris, Violet, Jasmine, Amber, Sandalwood, Light Musk
style: Floral - Spicy, Fresh - Citrus, Woody - Fresh
description: The traditional arts of Japan are permeated with a dedication to simplicity- the idea that the more diligently and deliberately a flower is placed, or a brushstroke applied, the more significant it becomes. As a guiding principle for perfumery, it represents a departure from the operatic construction of European classics, and it is this principle that makes Iris Homme a deeply distinguished masculine of powerful subtlety.

name: Hyouge
