notes: Green Tea, Sage, Jasmine, Violet, Patchouli, Woods, Iris
style: Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: 6th century tea master Oribe Furuta fiercely adhered to the teaching of Sen Rikyu to âalways be different from othersâ and injected a fearless and liberated sense of beauty into the world of the tea ceremony.  His Hyouge (humor) pottery, called Oribe-yaki, with its characteristic dark green and black designs, appears modern, even by todayâs standards.

name: Altruist
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Ginger, Watery Notes, Rose, Orange Blossom, Nutmeg, Black Pepper, Cedar, Vetiver, Patchouli, Ambrarome
style: Fresh - Citrus, Spicy
description: This is the new Eau de Parfum version of Altruist, originally released in 2016 as a collaboration between J.F. Schwarzlose and the Berlin artist Paul deFlorian. The result of a series of intense conversations between perfumer VÃ©ronique Nyberg and deFlorian, every note in Altruist represents a color or brushstroke from one of deFlorianâs paintings. It is an unusual concept for a perfume, but one that works so beautifully itâs been shortlisted for the Independent Perfume category in the Art and Olfaction Awards 2017.

name: Leder 6
notes: Osmanthus, Saffron, Leather, Milk, Vanilla, Incense, Styrax
style: Animalic, Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Leder.Even the sound of the German word for leather sounds Ã¼ber naughty, doesnât it? But if youâre worried that Leder 6 is a hardcore leather with the full-on kink factor of a Berlin night club, then rest easy â itâs not. With its notes of hot milk, candy, and rubber, Leder 6 is more rakish than kinky. More importantly, itâs gorgeous and all kinds of addictive.

name: Fougair
notes: Fern Accord, Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Boxwood, Artemisia, Grafted Cypress, Patchouli, Fir Balsam, Amber
style: Fougere
description: Fougair raises its green fist in a revolutionary greeting and takes us into open spaces where nothing is clear-cut. Anything can be. Identity becomes fluid and a playground for self-confident interpretations begins. With a resinous, fresh fern explosion, Fougair with its gender-neutral composition is given contour by refined urban jungle essence and clean chords of pink pepper. A menage Ã  trois of patchouli, fir and Lorenox pulsates sensually within its depths.

name: Rausch
notes: Red Pepper, Sandalwood, Cypriol, Patchouli, Vanilla Bean, Amber, Oud
style: Earthy, Exotic, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Rausch meansrushin German, and boy, they werenât kidding - this is one powerful rush to the head that you wonât forget in a hurry. One spritz of this stunning fragrance and you are ready for a night of Berlin-style debauchery that even Baudelaire would be proud of.

name: IA-33
notes: Mandarine, Pink Pepper, Spree River Accord, Jasmine Sambac, Lime-tree Blossom, Magnolia, Cedarwood, Iris Powder
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Fruity, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity
description: Named for the original car license plate of pre-war Berlin, 1A-33 is J. F. Schwarzloseâs first modern retooling of one of their heritage perfumes. If youâre thinking thereâs a classic tone to this perfume, then youâd be right, especially with the scentâs emphasis on the rich aroma of linden blossom trees in full bloom along the famous Unter den Linden Boulevard in Berlin. It draws the mind immediately to the bourgeois pleasures of sipping tea and reading the morning news in a cafÃ© in the dappled shade.

name: Discovery Set
description: A set of ten fragrances by J.F. Schwarzlose. 1.5ml atomizer sprays presented in a coffret:

name: Patchouli in Perfumery
description: NEZ

name: Vetiver in Perfumery
description: Originating in India and cultivated principally in Haiti, vetiver is a topical grass whose tangled roots contain a fragrant essence that can be extracted via steam distillation.

name: The Big Book of Perfume
description: The team from Nez, the olfactory magazine invites you on a very special journey to explore perfume in all its facets, delving into the heart of a fascinating yet little-known world. This book lifts the curtain on the best kept secrets of perfumery, answering all your questions about the world of smell.

name: Armoressence
notes: Sandalwood, Vetiver, Methaflor, Cypress, Clary Sage, Styrax, Birch Tar, Tumeric Leaf
style: Smoky, Spicy, Warm, Woody - Dark
description: NEZ

name: Calamus
notes: Young Bamboo Leaf, Celery Grains, Angelica Root, Rose Berries
description: Les Bains Guerbois

name: Palisander
notes: Brazilian Palisander Wood, Virginian Red Cedar, Japanese Red Chili Peppers, Saffron From Iran, Myrrh From South Yemen
style: Masculine, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Scents of Wood

name: Soda
notes: Aldehydes, Lime, Citral, Pimenal, Lilial, Iso-eugenol, Galaxolide, Acetal Rum
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Spicy
description: Juniper Ridge

name: Tar
notes: Town Gas, Vapours Of Bitumen, Bergamot, Earth Notes, Opoponax, Styrax, Grilled Cigarettes, Pyrogenic Notes
style: Avant-Garde, Black, Earthy, Resinous / Balsamic, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Puredistance

name: Nomad Tea
notes: Wild Mint, Artemisia, Geranium Leaf, Burmese Green Tea Leaves, White Sugar, Smoked Woody Notes
style: Fresh - Citrus
description: HEELEY

name: Sticky Cake
notes: Almond, Honey, Dates, Pistachio, Iris, Milk And Brown Sugar Infusion, Ambrette Seeds, Cereal Notes, Myrrh
style: Gourmand, Sweet
description: Omnia Profumo

name: Concrete
style: Avant-Garde, Creamy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: The maestros of the unexpected have again tackled a quotidian material and managed to tease apart the surprises that lie within the banal. Comme des Garconsâ Concrete is, straightforwardly enough, housed in a grey shell of poured concrete, but uniquely hand-formed. Freed from the streets beneath our feet, concrete becomes a material worthy of observation and appreciation. And the enclosed scent, too, reveals in its first puff what happens when stereotypes are shattered.

name: Hundred Silent Ways
notes: Mandarin, Tuberose, Peach, White Jasmine, Gardenia, Orris, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Vetiver
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - White, Gourmand
description: Inspired by a line in a poem by Rumi, the 13th century Sufi poet, âI closed my mouth and spoke to you in a hundred silent ways", Hundred Silent Ways communicates love wordlessly through a series of little flourishes of fruit and flowers as tender as the skin of a loved one. There is an undeniably girlish flirtatiousness about Hundred Silent Ways, but it is also very elegant.

name: Fan Your Flames
notes: Coconut, Rum, Tobacco, Tonka, Oakmoss, Cedarwood
style: Boozy, Gourmand, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: Inspired by the Sufi poet Rumiâs exhortation to; "Set your life on fire. Seek those who fan your flamesâ, Fan Your Fames is a fiery, semi-gourmand fragrance that is all about the kind of passion that spills over into obsession. Featuring a haze of white shisha smoke over a mÃ©lange of woody coconut husks, booze, and a mossy, balsamic base, Fan Your Flames is a stunning take on tobacco that extends the material in several different directions at once.

name: Ambra Calabria
notes: Bergamot, Galbanum, Green Leaves, Jasmine, Coriander, Sweet Amber, Musk, Vanilla
style: Creamy, Fresh - Citrus, Gourmand, Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft
description: Ambra Calabria is an unusually fresh, leafy-green amber that departs from the standard model of vanilla and resin so thick you could stand a spoon up in âem. The sour bite of Calabrian bergamot and the smoky greenness of the galbanum cut a swath through the amber, blowing it up with salt and air. This is what makes Ambra Calabria such a fantastic wear in hot summer weather.

name: Ani
notes: Bergamot, Green Notes, Blue Ginger, Pink Pepper, Blackcurrant, Turkish Rose, Cardamom, Patchouli, Cedarwood, Vanilla, Benzoin, Ambergris, Musk, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Spicy
description: Sospiro

name: Safran Colognise
notes: Cedrat, Passion Fruit, Pink Grapefruit, Saffron, Magnolia, Pink Pepper, Musk, Ambergris, Leather
style: Cologne, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Since its debut last year, Nishane's Colognise- a lovely and invigorating re-imagining of the fresh lemon cologne kept on-hand in most Turkish households- has been an office favorite, a striking yet casual scent perfect for any situation. Now, with Safran Colognise, they've brought back the core of the fragrance with a pronounced dash of fiery saffron, and the result is strikingly unique- a fragrance with the delightful energy of the original, but a robust, exotic character all its own.

name: Nishane Discovery Set - 12 piece
description: A beautiful introduction into the world of Nishane - experience their artisanal talents in this discovery set, complete with a curated selection of their best-sellers featuring unisex (Ani, Wulong Cha, Fan Your Flames, Ambra Calabria - to name a few), masculine (Hacivat, Colognise, Sultan Vetiver) and feminine (Tuberoza) atomizer samples -- all in one stylish coffret that doubles as a perfect gifting opportunity.

name: Sultan Vetiver
notes: Java Vetiver, Anise, Pink Pepper, Bergamot, Bourbon Vetiver, Haitian Vetiver, Neroli, Tonka Bean, Amber, Leather, Brazilian Vetiver
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Light
description: Sultan Vetiver recalls the former glory of Guerlain Vetiver before it was gutted by reforms - earthy, rich, and woody, and with a bitter anisic bite that will make you think of the blackest of licorice. It is a particularly toothsome, rugged example of vetiver, and one that true vetiver enthusiasts should make a point of seeking out.

name: Ani & Hacivat
description: Nishane

name: Nishane Discovery Set - 21 piece
description: A beautiful introduction into the world of Nishane - experience their artisanal talents in this discovery set, complete with twenty-one (21) 1.5ml vial sprays of their bestselling scents, including:

name: Hacivat X
notes: Bergamot, Pineapple, Pepper Pink, Lime, Jasmine, Orange Flower, Patchouli, Cedarwood, Vetiver
description: Nishane

name: Hundred Silent Ways X
notes: Tuberose, Mandarin, Peach, Gardenia, Orris, Jasmine, Heliotrope, Vanilla, Leather, Patchouli
description: One of the top 5 bestsellers of NISHANE in global markets, Hundred Silent Ways X was designed to maintain the overall mood that the original fragrance (launched in 2016) offers. The leathery notes were refined to add an even more elegant touch to the original formula. Hundred Silent Ways X is a deliciously captivating fragrance that combines the elegance of floral notes with the richness of gourmand accords.

name: Fan Your Flames X
notes: Coconut, Rum, Lentisque, Tobacco, Tonka Bean, Thyme Oil, Carrot, Cedar- Oakmoss, Patchouli
description: Inspired by the quote âSet your life on fire. Seek those who fan your flamesâ by Rumi, FAN YOUR FLAMES, launched in 2016, is another global hit of NISHANE. Underlining the desire of people to be surrounded by the friends who would encourage them no matter what they want to do with their life, the original formula offers a blend of notes that evoke a warm and inviting atmosphere. The new offering FAN YOUR FLAMES X is designed to soften the flames of the original bestseller by a gentle touch of tropical flavors.

name: Wulong Cha X
notes: Bergamot, Yuzu, Litsea, Mandarin, Magnolia, Thyme Oil, Green Tea, Musk, Fig
description: Nishane

name: Ani X
notes: Bergamot Oil, Lemon Oil, Watery Notes, Honeydew Melon, Cardamom Oil, Blue Ginger, Pink Pepper, Lavender Oil, Sage, Green Apple, Blackcurrant, Rose, Patchouli, Cedarwood, Cashmere Wood, Vanilla, Ambergris Infusion, White Musk, Sandalwood
style: Sweet
description: ANI was the first reference launched in 2019 under the new theme âNO BOUNDARIESâ that aimed to eliminate all emotional boundaries between people. The fragrance immediately became a global hit being often mentioned as the best vanilla scent ever. With ANI X, NISHANE wanted to enhance this mystical journey through time that the fans had with ANI, a fragrance that pays homage to an ancient metropolis that now stands as a monument to the might of empires and the inevitability of time. Just like the original bestseller, ANI X aims to break down boundaries and to empower the wearers to build their own empire from the ruins. In an attempt to reach the perfume lovers who specifically seek for the refreshening aspect of the scent, ANI X was designed to open with a richer burst of juicy citrus than the original formula of ANI. The freshness that the wearer will feel with the new ANI X on top of the well-known vanilla excellence of the original ANI will be a nice surprise for the perfume lovers.

name: Tuberoza
notes: Ylang Ylang, Orange Blossom, Artemisia, Tuberose, Jasmine, Marigold, Amberwood, Vetiver, Sandalwood, Musk
style: Floral, Floral - White
description: If Tuberoza had a color, it would be a mixture of yellows and golds. Know why we like this one? Because unlike most tuberose fragrances that try to restrain the natural fleshiness of tuberose, Tuberoza sets it free to be its gorgeous, sunny self. Framed by sweet orangey notes, ylang, and honeyed orange blossom, the tuberose smells magnificent here: a flashy explosion of creamy, tropical sweetness, with an undercurrent of fuel, banana custard, and rubber.

name: Wulong Cha
notes: Bergamot, Orange, Lychee, Mandarin, Oolong Tea, Nutmeg, Musk, Fig
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Oolong
description: Wulong ChÃ¡ is a vibrant, woody fig tea with a refreshing twist of citrus to give it sparkle. It opens with an Earl Grey type of freshness, with black tea leaves oily with bergamot, orange, and an exotic, fruity lift that is not immediately identifiable (that would be the litchi). But the heart is pure Oolong: a smoky tea full of delicate, nutty roasted flavors, and a slight but noticeable milkiness. The introduction of the fig note in the heart adds to this impression of milkiness; it smells beautifully like a freshly snapped fig leaf, green and oozing with fig sap.

name: Hacivat
notes: Bergamot, Pineapple, Grapefruit, Jasmine, Patchouli, Cedar, Woody Notes, Oakmoss
style: Chypre, Classic Masculine, Fruity, Masculine, Smoky, Woody - Fresh
description: Move over, because thereâs a new masculine in town, and guys, youâre going to love this one. With tart, sparkling citrus draped over a backbone crisp with forest woods, oakmoss, and white jasmine, Hacivat recalls the oakmoss-laden glory of woody chypres like Pour Monsieur that once populated menâs perfumery. Despite the solidly classical lines of the scent, Hacivat feels entirely modern, with a juicy pineapple note aerating the damp mosses and woods, and a touch of blackcurrant leaf keeping the tone fresh and outdoorsy.

name: A City On Fire
notes: Cade Oil, Spikenard, Cardamom, Clearwood, Dark Berries, Labdanum, Burnt Match
style: Black, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: âWhen I saw you, all I saw was a swirl of smoke in the streetlight. Elusive. Sinister.  Spectacular.â-Machus

name: Bull's Blood
notes: Patchouli, Rose, Costus Root, Tobacco, Black Musk, Bullâs Blood
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Spicy
description: âA man who has killed is a man who knows passion.â-Devante ValÃ©reo

name: Cape Heartache
notes: Douglas Fir, Pine Resin, Western Hemlock, Vanilla Leaf, Strawberry, Old Growth, Mountain Fog
style: Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Dark, Woody - Fresh
description: âIf you are looking for the pieces of a broken heart, you might try rifling through the twigs and needles on the forest floor.â-Philip Sava

name: Fox in the Flowerbed
notes: Jasmine, Tulips, Frankincense, Wildflower Honey, Pink Peppercorns, Silver Thistle, Alpine Air
description: Imaginary Authors

name: In Love With Everything
notes: Neon Raspberry, Citrus Pulp, Coconut Palm Sugar, Sandalwood, Tropical Punch, Stardust
style: Fruity, Sweet
description: "Written in 1982, this electrifying novel about sex, drugs, and decadence in pre-Miami Vice Florida, follows a delinquent clique of teenage girls through nightclubs, roller discos, and seedy South Beach bars in search of anything to keep the party going."

name: Every Storm A Serenade
notes: Danish Spruce, Eucalyptus, Vetiver, Calone, Ambergris, Baltic Sea Mist
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: âI patter on the typewriter all day but the letters on the page are like raindrops on a window. I fear I may be losing my mind.â-Niels Bjerregaard

name: Falling Into The Sea
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, Grapefruit, Lychee, Tropical Flowers, Warm Sand
description: âCaught in the undertow of his salty lemon lips I caught myself drifting helplessly into a soundless summer unconsciousness.â-Nica Gala

name: Memoirs of a Trespasser
notes: Madagascar Vanilla, Guaiacwood, Myrrh, Benzoin Resin, Ambrette Seeds, Oak Barrels
style: Creamy, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: âWho needs love when there is still cognac in the glass?â-Philip Sava

name: Slow Explosions
notes: Saffron, Rose Absolute, Leather, Apple, Benzoin, Cashmeran, Arpora Night Market
style: Floral, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Spicy, Spicy
description: âI was lost, aimless, and depressed. Now Iâm only two of those things.â-Gwen K. Vroomen

name: The Cobra & The Canary
notes: Lemon, Orris, Tobacco Flowers, Leather, Hay Fields, Asphalt
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy
description: âWe were driving faster than dammit, headed due west for a place called Anywhere But Here.â-James Spundt

name: The Soft Lawn
notes: Linden Blossom, Laurel, Ivy Leaves, Vetiver, Oakmoss, Fresh Tennis Balls, Clay Court
description: âThey hopped the fence of the Governorâs Mansion, laid side by side on the cool grass tennis court, and invented constellations until the sunrise usurped their astral empire.â-Claude LeCoq

name: Yesterday Haze
notes: Fig, Iris, Cream, Tonka, Tree Bark, Walnut Bitters, Orchard Dust
description: âJust as sunsets are more beautiful on hazy days so, too, are the memories of yesterday.â-Lenora Blumberg

name: Saint Julep
notes: Sweet Mint, Tangerine, Southern Magnolia, Bourbon, Grisalva, Sugarcube, Crushed Ice
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: âTomorrow I will fight but tonight I recline into a sweet dream of muddled mint and ice.ââ Milton Nevers

name: Sundrunk
notes: Neroli, Rhubarb, Honeysuckle, Rose Water, Orange Zest, First Kiss
description: "Woozy and warm from the sun, we shared an orange pop and watched the surfers' last lines of the day."Amy Obisbo

name: Whispered Myths
notes: Natural Cambodian Oud, Cantaloupe, Cedarwood, Muskdana, Honey, Salvaged Shipwreck
style: Sweet, Woody - Dark, Woody - Fresh
description: When the long hours Azzam Issa pulls at his familyâs bakery begin to interfere with his day-job as a security guard at The Louvre things turn bizarre. Angelic creatures move from one painting to the next and statues speak to him in cryptic whispers. In the frantic search for the true identities of these lost souls, Azzam discovers something far more remarkable, his own.

name: Telegrama
notes: Talc, Lavender, Black Pepper, Teak, Amyris, Vanilla Powder, Fresh Linen
style: Fresh - Clean, Powdery / Soft, Sweet, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Imaginary Authors

name: Bouquet of Miracles
description: "Dolores Barefield had no idea who left the mysterious gift on her doorstep nor how it held such magical powers, only that its effects were undeniable. To infer she had fallen on hard times would be an understatement, but things were turning around in ways she hadnât dreamed imaginable. It was springtime in Portland, Oregon and the city was bursting back to life after the wettest winter on record. Life felt possible again. But with newfound strength comes newfound desires, and a perilous search for understanding will lead her to a bizarre world she never knew existed."

name: Ambre Royal
notes: Green Notes, Orange Absolute, Bergamot, Jasmine, Orchid, Osmanthus, Rose, Amber, Orris, Cedar, Ambroxan, Tonka, Patchouli, Musk
style: Floral - Spicy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Ambre Royal is a resinous ambery floral whose golden shimmer is amplified in the base by the hot, salty rasp of ambergris. To wear it is to feel dipped in liquid gold and then rolled in fleurs de sel, the floral salt winnowed from the marshes of Brittany. Sappy green herbs and juicy orange announce the house signature, their peppery brightness sending a shaft of light through the structure, cheerfully prepping the way for the resins and flowers that follow.

name: Champaca
notes: Neroli, Pink Pepper, Bamboo, Champaca Absolute, Basmati Rice, Freesia, Musk, Green Tea
style: Floral, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean
description: Centered on a green tea accord with a squeeze of zesty lemon, Champaca is as squeaky clean as a freshly-scrubbed face. It is especially good in hot weather, when the papery coolness of the neroli, bamboo, and green tea steps forward to soothe ruffled tempers and restore internal peace. Stirred into this frosty glass of ice tea is a scant teaspoonâs worth of basmati rice: subtle but present, it provides just enough cloudy milkiness to take the sting out of the green tea.

name: Ormonde Man
notes: Juniper Berry, Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Cardamom, Coriander, Agarwood, Black Hemlock, Vetiver, Cedar, Sandalwood, Musk
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: Ormonde Jayne Man takes the bracing coniferous freshness of Ormonde Jayne Woman, and spins it in a slightly different direction, peppering the topnotes with a sparkling lemon and juniper pairing, and giving the basic structure a drier, cleaner feel, with plenty of cedar and agarwood in the drydown for muscle. Juniper, coriander, and a clever use of cardamom up front give the opening a turbo-blast of luridly green, almost fruity spice that propels the scent forwards, as if tied to a jetpack.

name: Ormonde Woman
notes: Cardamom, Coriander, Grass Oil, Black Hemlock, Violet, Jasmine, Vetiver, Cedar, Amber, Sandalwood
style: Floral, Resinous / Balsamic
description: Ormonde Jayne Woman is one of those fragrances that are almost impossible to describe using the listed notes, because it only makes sense when explained as an atmosphere or a feeling. For example, we might be able to tell you that this scent contains cardamom, coriander, and the witchy-sounding black hemlock, but weâre at a loss as to explain how or why the sum of this simple list of materials is a whole forest from The Brothers Grimm, complete with Hansel and Gretel, and Baba Yaga waiting in her smoky gingerbread house. And yet, it truly is.

name: Signature Collection
description: Discover the true artistry of Ormonde Jayne. Housed in a luxurious, gold embossed box containing seven of the brands most coveted fragrances. Set includes:

name: Verano
notes: Air Note, Orange Absolute, Bergamot, Grapefruit, Juniper, Clary Sage, Cardamom, Magnolia, Rose, Violet, Tea Notes, Cashmeran, Tobacco Leaf, Iso E Super, Suede, Sandalwood, Moss, Tonka, Ambergris
style: Fresh - Clean, Woody - Fresh
description: Previously called Montabaco Verano, the newly re-named Verano is part of Ormonde Jayne's Four Corners collection.

name: Ta'if
notes: Saffron, Dates, Pink Pepper, Freesia, Taâif Rose, Jasmine, Orange Blossom, Broom, Amber
style: Floral
description: Taâif roses have to hustle to survive in a hostile growing environment, high up on the plains of a rocky region near Mecca in Saudi Arabia. Mirroring its harsh environment, the Taâif rose yields oil that is almost as extreme in its biting greenness and peppery spiciness. To complement its obstinate and proud character, Linda Pilkington chose to surround the rose with an array of exciting Arabian âflavorsâ, such as saffron and dates - the saffron adding a mysterious, iodine-like touch of leather, the dates adding a juicy sweetness that gives the texture a satisfying, toffee-like chew.

name: Montabaco - Intensivo
notes: Air Note, Orange Absolute, Bergamot, Juniper, Clary Sage, Cardamom, Magnolia, Hedione, Rose, Violet, Tea Notes, Tobacco Leaf, Iso E Super, Suede, Sandalwood, Moss, Tonka, Ambergris
style: Masculine, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: Inspired by the rugged exoticism of the Argentinean plains, Montabaco is a towering crescendo of rich tobacco, leather, tea, suede, and wood notes, each nuance overlapping the last so that an almost 3D picture of a cowboy appears, smoking a cigarette over a dwindling fire after a long, hard day corralling cattle. All this on top of a bed of airy florals puffed out with Iso E Super and Hedione for a bright, silvery-woody radiance perfectly equipped to carry the heft of the leather on its shoulders.

name: Nawab of Oudh - Intensivo
notes: Green Notes, Bergamot, Orange Absolute, Cardamom, Aldehyde, Rose, Magnolia, Orchid, Pimento, Bay, Cinnamon, Hedione, Ambergris, Musk, Vetiver, Labdanum, Oudh
style: Exotic, Floral, Floral - Ambery Spice, Floral - Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Nawab of Oudh is, essentially, the spirit of a traditional Indian attar wrapped up in the format of a Western spray fragrance. Think a mass of jammy rose petals, fermented magnolia blossoms, and pandan leaf over a warm, spicy amber mercifully free of any vanilla that might weigh it down. The traditional Indian attar tends towards the lean and spicy rather than sweet or fatty, and this is a style carried through very faithfully to Nawab of Oudh.

name: All The Queen's Men
notes: Dried Fruit, Honey, Rum, Vanilla, Cinnamon, Fir Balsam, Woods
style: Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: Dedicated to her majesty, they are born to serve their posts. Nursed and fed until ready to do the work of collecting nature's dust and converting it to liquid gold, they now nurse and feed the next generation. Striped and fit for the many tasks to keep the castle strong, they assemble and carry out her will.Converting flower dust into natureâs greatest elixir is not as hard as it seems. The great nectar bar of spring unfolds its brilliant colors, giving out samples to its busy customers. Buzzing and bum ping from bloom to bloom, piggybacking Springâs bold bouquet, these busy workers inspire a scent worthy of the queen herself. Rich, floral, fresh. It takes all the Queenâs Men to produce such an immaculate fragrance.

name: Harem Rose
notes: Amber, Benzoin, Vanilla, Rose, Cashmere Woods, Vetiver
description: A soliflore is a big test for a young perfume house- when the adornments of complicated genres and endless ingredient lists are stripped away, when the goal is to deliver one simple, beautiful floral, how will it deliver? With Harem Rose, a gorgeous rose soliflore with gently ambery elements, we have our answer.

name: Fumabat
notes: Green Tea, Galbanum, Mint Absolute, Bulgarian Black Pine, Carnation, Somalian Frankincense, Vetiver Root, Leather, Oakmoss, Patchouli
style: Classic Masculine, Earthy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Fougere
description: Fumabat: an unusual name for unusual perfume. Parid Cefa takes familiar materials â pine, carnation, frankincense, patchouli â and rearranges them in a novel way that that you donât smell what youâre expecting to smell. Expectations are upended. For example, despite the presence of mint, green tea, and galbanum in the topnotes, Fumabat is neither green nor particularly fresh.

name: Ummo
notes: Virginia Tobacco, Jasmine Tobacco, Styrax, Tonka Bean, Juniper
style: Boozy, Earthy, Floral - Spicy, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Tauer Perfumes

name: Aguamadera
notes: Agave, Lime, Guaiac Wood, Cedar
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Aguamadera is an amalgamation of two words in Spanish: agua for water, and madera for wood, thus Aguamadera meaning âwaterwoodâ. This name makes sense when you consider that this is a scent based on the scent of agave, a tough succulent native to Mexico whose hard, spiky leaves give us both agave syrup and mezcal.

name: Copala
notes: Pink Pepper, Copal, Mesquite, Mexican Vanilla
style: Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy
description: Copala focuses on copal resin, used as incense by the indigenous peoples of Mexico and Central America since the time of the Mayan civilization. Black copal is heavy and rich, known for its bittersweet bay leaf scent; golden copal is as smooth and sweet as honey.

name: Monstera
notes: Leaves And Fruit Of Monstera, Sacred Ear Flowers, White Datura, Bullhorn Orchid
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous
description: Monstera pays tribute to the scent of Monstera Deliciosa (âDelicious Monsterâ), a lush plant native to the tropical rainforests of Southern Mexico. Although Monstera produces fruit, the focus here is on the green, aromatic scent of the leaves, stem, and plant itself.

name: OroNardo
notes: Mock Orange, Floral Notes, Marigold, Tuberose, White Nerium Oleander
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - White, Woody - Light
description: OroNardo is a word that combines two Spanish words: nardo, which means tuberose, the famously fleshy white flower thatâs native to Mexico, and oro, meaning gold, hence OroNardo (âGolden Tuberoseâ).

name: Sasora
notes: Yuzu, Agarwood, Camphor, Jatamansi (spikenard), Palisander Rosewood
style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Natural/Organic, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: Sasora, like all other fragrances in the Di Ser range, is 100% all natural, and features the finest absolutes and essences available in the world. Sasora is named for one of the 6 fragrant types of aloeswood (agarwood) traditionally used in the Kodo ceremony, the art of âlisteningâ to Japanese incense: sasora, kyara, manaban, rakoku, sumontara, and managa. Cool and sour, sasora is thought to be equivalent to the first and finest batches of wild Hindi oud brought out of the jungles of Assam, in Northern India, and distilled exclusively for the use by the royal families of the Arabian Peninsula. The sasora oud oil used in this fragrance is 100% pure and of the highest quality available. Its scent profile boasts a monastic purity that reminds some of kyara, especially in the first few moments when it is heated over ash and mica plates as incense. However, the main characteristic of sasora is a herbal sourness, and it is this quality that has been accentuated in Sasora, the perfume.

name: Tsuki
notes: Geranium, Grapefruit, Coriander, Basil, Lemon, Fennel, Juniper, Spicy Mint, Patchouli
style: Floral, Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Natural/Organic
description: Tsuki, meaning âmoonâ, is a wild green scent that captures the thrilling unfamiliarity of Japanese herbs and aromatics. Imagine crushing the leaves of some strange herb between your fingers in the dark and not knowing what it is, exactly. The minty, rosy sting of geranium is clearly identifiable, but you also smell something like crushed lemon balm and coriander beneath that. The aroma is green, minty, herbaceous, citrusy, and also gin-like thanks to a generous dose of juniper berry. But perhaps the most defining feature here is the fresh, vegetal scent of fennel, which gives the background of the scent a lingering anisic sweetness.

name: Kurokami
notes: Grapefruit, Rose Absolute, Rose Otto, Jasmine Grandiflorum, Rosewood, Sandalwood, Frankincense
description: Di Ser

name: Kagiroi
notes: Green Yuzu, Green Shikuwasa, Sansho Seed, Coriander, Ylang-ylang, Shiso, Rosewood, Vetiver, Hinoki, Cypriol, Patchouli, Agarwood
description: Di Ser

name: Hana Matsuri
notes: Yuzu, Tankan Citrus, Sansho Pepper, Sakura, Jasmine, Tadomatsu Hokkaido Pine, Kobushi Hokkaido Magnolia, Oakmoss, Violet Leaf, Vetiver, Patchouli, Agarwood
description: Di Ser

name: Tsuzumi Boshi
notes: Japanese Lemon, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Fennel, Geranium, Hokkaido Pine, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Rosewood, Agarwood
style: Natural/Organic, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Di Ser

name: Hikaru Daichi
notes: Agarwood, Lime, Geranium, Todo Pine, Oakmoss, Hinoki, Vetiver, Red Pine, Frankincense
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Fresh
description: Di Ser

name: Hoshi Tsukiyo
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Rosewood, Rose, Boronia, Frankincense, Hiba Wood, Hokkaido Pine
style: Floral - Citrus, Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Grandiflora

name: Hana no Oto
notes: Agarwood, Japanese Lemon, Hinoki Leaf, Rose Oil, Rose Absolute, Jasmine
style: Floral, Floral - Citrus, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: Di Ser

name: Izayoi
notes: Yuzu, Japanese Rose, Neroli, Nutmeg, Sansho Pepper, Rosewood, Ylang Ylang, Star Anise, Vetiver, Cypress, Agarwood
style: Fresh, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy
description: Di Ser

name: Shiragoromo
notes: Agarwood, Yuzu, Jasmine Sambac, Rose
style: Earthy, Floral, Floral - Citrus, Floral - Light, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Natural/Organic, Woody - Fresh
description: Shiragoromo is an amalgamation of two words, shira (meaning white) and goromo (meaning cloth). White is a sacred color in Japan, even appearing as the main color on the Japanese flag, because it stands for purity and childlike innocence. The fragrance itself also smells clean and pure. Predominantly a simple, natural blend of bright yuzu and earthy green woods, Shiragoromo manages to give the feel of a sun-dappled citrus grove that is nonetheless clearly a Japanese citrus grove.

name: Kyara
notes: Kyara Grade Agarwood, Cedarwood, Rose Otto, Patchouli, Sandalwood
style: Earthy, Green / Herbaceous, Natural/Organic, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: Japanese treatment of agarwood in perfumery is completely different from that of Middle-Eastern perfumery, so letâs take a minute to re-set expectations. Since the 6th century AD, the Japanese have used kyara agarwood in the Kodo ceremony (the way of incense), which is the art of âlisteningâ to scent. Kyara is a very special type of agarwood. It refers to wood from extremely old, wild-grown agarwood trees in mostly Vietnam, now rare to the point of being extinct. The word âkyaraâ is a description of a scent profile, but also used in grading to mean the highest quality of agarwood. Most authentic kyara pieces were sold to private collectors in Japan, which is how Di Ser came into possession of its own small collection of the precious wood. Kyara is normally heated gently over ash and mica plates as incense; due to its rarity and scarcity, it is never used for distilling oud oil.

name: Hasunoito
notes: Agarwood (oud), Sweet Orange, Boronia, Ylang-ylang, Jasmine Sambac, Lotus, Rose
style: Earthy, Exotic, Floral, Green / Herbaceous, Natural/Organic, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: Hasunoito is based on the lotus flower, the symbol of Di Ser and revered throughout Japan, India, and most Eastern Asian countries for its spiritual significance. The oil of both white and pink lotus is so costly and rare that Di Ser has chosen to focus mostly on the abstract idea of a lotus blossom shooting up through the soil, displaying the duality of strength and softness so characteristic of the flower.

name: Akanesasu
notes: Orange, Bergamot, Jasmine Sambac, Vetiver
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous
description: Akane sasu sora,a wonderfully evocative phrase used in traditional Japanese poetry to express the vivid red glow of a particularly beautiful sunset. It's a phrase imbued with splendor, suggesting that there are unique moments where the natural world drifts especially close to the supernatural realm, with awe-inspiring results. To be certain, a fragrance that draws on this lovely imagery must contain the same power, the same energy, the same reverence. Luckily, this eye-openingly bright, joyous and rich ode to citrus, jasmine and vetiver is every bit as compelling as its namesake.

name: Kazehikaru
notes: Yuzu, Neroli, Lavender, Shiso, Japanese Rose, Vetiver
style: Earthy, Floral - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous
description: Di Ser

name: Mizu
notes: Japanese Yuzu (Citrus Junos), Spearmint, Paper Pink, Cardamom, Rosewood, Vetiver
style: Fresh - Aquatic, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: Mizu, meaning water in Japanese, combines zesty yuzu with spearmint for an aqua seltzer opening that feels like ice water running down your spine. Itâs the perfect palate cleanser, especially on stupid hot days when your brain seems to stop working. Although Mizu is technically a woody-aromatic citrus, you wouldnât mistake Mizu for a French or American eau de cologne. Thereâs something intrinsically Japanese in its transparency, delicate sourness, and complex use of herbs.

name: Keman
notes: Rose, Geranium, Jasmine, Blue Tansy, Yuzu, Cherry Blossom, Shiso, Agarwood, Cypress
description: A Luckyscent limited edition exclusive that quickly sold out when it was introduced in November 2019, Keman is receiving a major recognition that will be announced publicly shortly. To celebrate and honor this as well as to fulfill the wishes of many fans who missed out on the original release, we are bringing Keman back for a special encore edition of just 33 more bottles. Keman evokes a sense of tranquility and hope in an increasingly chaotic world, don't miss out on this last edition of 33 bottles.

name: No.02 Le Long Fond - Eau de Parfum
notes: Hinoki Wood, Cedarwood, Patchouli, White Musk
style: Woody - Fresh, Woody - Light
description: Maison Louis Marie

name: No.04 Bois de Balincourt - Eau de Parfum
notes: Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Nutmeg, Cinnamon, Amber Wood
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Maison Louis Marie

name: No.09 Vallee de Farney - Eau de Parfum
notes: Grapefruit, Orange, Black Pepper, Cedarwood, Patchouli, Geranium, Vetiver, Amber, Musk, Benzoin
style: Woody - Fresh
description: Maison Louis Marie

notes: Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Vetiver, Nutmeg, Cinnamon, Amber Wood
style: Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Maison Louis Marie

notes: Grapefruit, Orange, Black Pepper, Cedarwood, Patchouli, Geranium, Vetiver, Amber, Musk, Benzoin
style: Fresh - Citrus, Woody - Fresh
description: Maison Louis Marie

name: Antidris Cassis- Perfume Oil
notes: Cassis, Bergamot, Black Pepper, White Rose, Oakmoss, Musk, Tonka
style: Fresh - Clean, Fruity
description: Maison Louis Marie

name: No.05 Kandilli- Perfume Oil
notes: Ylang, Jasmine, Tuberose, Sandalwood
style: Floral - Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Maison Louis Marie

name: Hinoki Noir - Pure Scent
style: Woody - Fresh
description: Breathe in the natural memories with Hinoki Noir. The scent of enchanted forests and sacred spaces is combined with plant-based ingredients to create an sense of peace unlike any other.

name: Lost In Flowers
notes: Indian Red Champaca Oil, Lily Of The Valley, Tagetes (marigold), Saffron, Gardenia Enfleurage, Oud
style: Earthy, Floral, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Spicy
description: If youâve ever tried out a bunch of floral perfumes and said to yourself, nope, just not floral enough, then let us introduce you to Lost in Flowers. Remember the scene from American Beauty when the cheerleader lying in the bath was showered with rose petals? Well, replace the roses with champaca, muguet, and gardenia petals, and thatâs what wearing Lost in Flowers feels like. Most aptly named, Lost in Flowers is a sublime experience akin to submerging oneself in a warm bath of heady, fragrant, life-giving flowers.

name: Lost In Flowers Oil
notes: Indian Red Champaca Oil, Lily Of The Valley, Tagetes (marigold), Saffron, Gardenia Enfleurage, Oud
style: Earthy, Floral, Powdery / Soft, Woody - Spicy
description: If youâve ever tried out a bunch of floral perfumes and said to yourself, nope, just not floral enough, then let us introduce you to Lost in Flowers. Remember the scene from American Beauty when the cheerleader lying in the bath was showered with rose petals? Well, replace the roses with champaca, muguet, and gardenia petals, and thatâs what wearing Lost in Flowers feels like. Most aptly named, Lost in Flowers is a sublime experience akin to submerging oneself in a warm bath of heady, fragrant, life-giving flowers.

name: Dead of Night
notes: Bergamot, Violet Leaf, Jasmine, Rose, Amber, Sandalwood, Incense, Oud
style: Floral - Light, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: Dead of Night is an oil-based fragrance featuring organic oud oil distilled from agarwood trees grown on a sustainably-managed 600-acre plantation in Borneo. Itâs the equivalent of the Slow Food movement, only in oud terms â no chemical inoculation, no rubbery oud aromachemicals, and little interference from humans. This slow way of farming agarwood produces oud oil that is authentically pungent at first, but quickly softens to reveal the supple, tangy aroma of lambskin freshly cured with hay, herbs, and tea.

name: Dead of Night Oil
notes: Bergamot, Violet Leaf, Jasmine, Rose, Amber, Sandalwood, Incense, Oud
style: Animalic, Floral - Light, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Woody - Dark
description: Dead of Night is an oil-based fragrance featuring organic oud oil distilled from agarwood trees grown on a sustainably-managed 600-acre plantation in Borneo. Itâs the equivalent of the Slow Food movement, only in oud terms â no chemical inoculation, no rubbery oud aromachemicals, and little interference from humans. This slow way of farming agarwood produces oud oil that is authentically pungent at first, but quickly softens to reveal the supple, tangy aroma of lambskin freshly cured with hay, herbs, and tea.

name: Silence the Sea Oil
notes: Ambergris, Oud, Tuber, Jasmine, Tuberose, Angelica
style: Earthy, Floral - White, Green / Herbaceous, Salty / Oceanic
description: Silence the Sea is the true essence of the sea. Forget the horrors of Calone and sweet aquatics â this scent captures all the stony, mineral silence of a deserted beach in winter. Because it is a brand deeply invested in organic, sustainable raw material production, Strangelove NYC was able to source an ethically-harvested (beach cast) piece of ambergris and use it as the star in this composition.

name: Melt my Heart
notes: Ginger, Bergamot, Nutmeg, Sage, Oud, Dark Chocolate, Orris Root
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: A gourmand loverâs dream, but really so much more than just a delicious smell, Melt My Heart is an oil-based fragrance that captures the dizzying sensation of falling in love. And if you imagine that to feel like falling slowly backwards into a featherbed filled with fluffy orris butter and dark chocolate, well, then your vision lines right up with that of Strangelove NYC. Creamy, soft, and utterly addictive, this scent combines the mouthfeel of powdered white chocolate and lipstick with the velvety bitterness of 85% cocoa.

name: Melt my Heart Oil
notes: Ginger, Bergamot, Nutmeg, Sage, Agarwood (oud), Dark Chocolate, Orris Root
style: Creamy, Gourmand, Sweet
description: A gourmand loverâs dream, but really so much more than just a delicious smell, Melt My Heart is an oil-based fragrance that captures the dizzying sensation of falling in love. And if you imagine that to feel like falling slowly backwards into a featherbed filled with fluffy orris butter and dark chocolate, well, then your vision lines right up with that of Strangelove NYC. Creamy, soft, and utterly addictive, this scent combines the mouthfeel of powdered white chocolate and lipstick with the velvety bitterness of 85% cocoa.

name: Perfume Oil Collection
description: Strangelove NYC

name: Fall Into Stars
notes: Daffodil, Pink Pepper, Ginger, Bergamot, Saffron, Rose, Henna, Oud, Rosewood Balsam, Benzoin
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Unusual / Unexpected
description: Fall Into Stars is a meditation on the universe itself: dark, mysterious, yet leaving a trail of powerful illuminations. The scent contains a core of pure oud, which gives fallintostars a deep, primal quality, emphasized with amber and labdanum notes. It's complemented by ingredients like pink peppercorn and rosewood, which make the scent dreamlike and ethereal.

name: Wood Infusion
notes: Australian Exotic Woods, Sweet Orange, Italian Iris, Agarwood, Lavender, Patchouli From Indonesia, Musk, Amber
style: Creamy, Floral - Ambery Spice, Woody - Dark, Woody - Spicy
description: Can nature be luxurious? Alive with vivid, natural elegance, Wood Infusion is a smooth unisex scent surrounded by an elixir of rich woods, buttery roots and aromatic notes.

name: Silky Woods
notes: Agarwood, Suede, Exotic Vanilla, Tobacco Leaves, Saffron, Incense, Ylang-ylang, Australian Sandalwood
description: Goldfield & banks is a tribute to the extraordinary beauty of Australia and an homage to Joseph Banks, the British botanist who was the first to introduce, after his great voyage with Captain Cook in 1770, the Australian native flora to Europe. The brand celebrates the beauty and the wealth of the countries native plants. With their newest Native Collection, Goldfield & Banks offers a luxurious collection of gender-free fragrances featuring pure and rare native Australian botanicals unexplored before in modern perfumery.

name: Sunset Hour
notes: Mandarin, Desert Peach, Coconut, Raspberry, Jasmine Sambac Absolute, Ginger, Pink Pepper, Sandalwood, Cashmere Wood, Benzoin
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity
description: As a blazing sun dips into the Indian Ocean, the scent of fragrant native fruit pervades the languorous evening breeze. A heavenly cocktail of citrus and spicy delights awaits, giving way to a deliciously gourmand and sensuous floral heart.

name: Purple Suede
notes: Tasmanian Lavender, Pink Pepper (Reunion Island), Hyssop Flowers (France), Wood, Leather, Patchouli (Indonesia), Oakmoss, Civet, Amber, Oud
style: Classic Masculine, Woody - Fresh
description: Goldfield & Banks

name: Ingenious Ginger
notes: Australian Ginger Flower Accord, Bergamot, Lemon, Magnolia China, Jasmine, Rose, Mandarin, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Vanilla, Musk, Cashmeran, Amber
description: Goldfield & Banks

name: Pacific Rock Moss
notes: Australian Coastal Moss, Lemon, Sage, Geranium, Virginia Cedar
style: Classic Masculine, Fresh - Clean, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Fresh
description: A bona fide fragrance sensation, Pacific Rock Moss had the internet abuzz before anyone outside of Australia had even had the chance to smell it.  But now that it's here, we'll be direct- the hype is real. Crisp, fresh and compelling, made with naturally harvested Australian coastal moss, Pacific Rock Moss is one of the drop-dead sexiest oceanic scents we've ever encountered, a fresh, sea spray scent that speaks of summer days diving into an azure sea.

name: White Sandalwood
notes: Australian White Sandalwood, Thyme Morocco, Amber, Rose Turkey, Pepper Comoros Islands, Saffron Spain
style: Floral - Ambery Spice, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Light, Woody - Spicy
description: A sophisticated scent that is at once both exotic and richly enveloping. White sandalwood and amber provide a comforting base, while saffron, pepper and thyme cast an exotic heat, tempered by a heart of sweet Turkish rose.

name: Goldfield & Banks - Discovery Set
description: A perfect way to get to know this exciting brand from Australia: Goldfield and Banks. Each fragrance is based on a unique ingredient indigenous to Australia.

name: Bohemian Lime
notes: Australian Finger Lime, Bergamot, Coriander, Atlas Cedar, Vetiver, Australian Sandalwood
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Tropical / Beachy, Woody - Fresh
description: As one of the easternmost points on the Australian mainland, the gorgeous beaches of Byron Bay are known as the place where Australia first meets the daily sun. It's also home to the Australian finger lime, a small, multicolored citrus fruit treasured for its potently tangy flavor and unique appearance. While the finger lime has long been a lucrative culinary crop, its distinctive citrus character and rich, fragrant oil has never been utilized in perfumery- until now. Featuring invigorating, sun-drenched finger lime as the focal point of a robustly fresh and spicy masculine, Goldfield & Banks has once again delivered a summer scent as strikingly unique as it is easy to love.

name: Eau de Cologne
notes: Ginger, Cardamom, Patchouli, Cedar, Papyrus, Musk, Amber, Frankincense
style: Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Les Bains Guerbois

style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Woody - Fresh
description: Widian

style: Floral - White, Fresh - Citrus, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Jeroboam

name: 2015 Le Phenix
notes: Ginger, Cardamom, Patchouli, Cedar, Papyrus, Incense, Musk, Amber
style: Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Subtle Bodies

name: 2018 Roxo Tonic
notes: Calabrian Bergamot, Calabrian Lemon, Ginger, French Gentian, Tunisian Neroli, Tea, Haitian Vetiver, Ambroxan, Musk
description: Roxo, the ultra-glamorous new restaurant in the latest reincarnation of Bains Guerbois, is more than just a dining room. It's a designer's delight, where organic shapes transform in space, where day meets night in a dance of light and shadow. And it's a party, where encounters of all kinds intoxicate oneâs senses as powerfully as their potent and whimsical cocktails.

name: 1979 New Wave
notes: Peppermint, Spearmint, Aldehydes, Orris Concrete, Virginia Cedar, Australian Sandalwood, Musk, Amber Wood
description: Les Bains Guerbois

name: 1986 Eclectique
notes: Davana, Apple, Yellow Mandarin, Cardamom, Black Pepper, Dried Fruits, Leather, Clove, Honey, Broom, Clary Sage, Geranium, Tobacco, Opopanax, Oakmoss, Patchouli, Musk
style: Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: The romantic contradiction of Paris is the push and pull between timelessness and trendiness, and in 1986, that beautiful contrast is perhaps nowhere more apparent than the stone-hewn entrance to Les Bains Guerbois, where Paris's hottest nightclub is always in full swing. Leather jackets, double-breasted suits, ripped jeans and endless necklines stir and cluster, awaiting entry to fashion's promised land, an exhilarating and endlessly diverse crowd of the most desirable people in the most desirable city in the universe.

name: Les Bains Guerbois - Discovery Set
description: Discover the 9 Eaux de Parfum collection of Les Bains Guerbois, and enter their Parisian olfactory world.

name: Raku
notes: Lemon, Black Pepper, Fig, Clary Sage, Texas Cedar, Ambroxan, White Musk
description: Nippon Kodo

name: Musc Eternel
notes: Bulgarian Rose, Paradisone, Iris, Egyptian Jasmine, Hawthorn, White Musk, Tonka Bean
style: Floral - Light, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal
description: Mizensir Musc Eternel is a sensual cocoon of air-whipped molecules that wrap around the wearer like the softest, purest-white cashmere onesie. Revolving around an abstract bouquet of creamy rose, jasmine, and iris poured over the same iced almond musks used in Morillasâ sadly discontinued Armani Sensi (2002), Musc Eternel feels almost excessively opulent and self-indulgent on the skin, like wearing a thick dusting of vintage body powder. Thereâs also a ghostly hint of the lipstick-amaretto accord from Morillasâ Le Baiser du Dragon (2003), albeit without any of that scentâs fruited heaviness.

name: Eau de Gingembre
notes: Calabrian Bergamot, Ginger, Tunisian Neroli, Petitgrain, Fig Leaf, Cypress, White Woods
style: Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Get your engines started, for this is a summer stunner with a twist! Eau de Gingembre cleverly combines the fresh bitterness of the classic eau de cologne (think 4177 or Eau de Guerlain) with the invigorating scent of raw, freshly-peeled ginger root, for a result that is simultaneously refreshing and hot. The opening alone would wake the dead: zesty, sour citruses competing with the pungency of grated ginger root fire into your synapses and send you shooting straight up into the air. Try it and see â the combination of sour and hot is nothing short of addictive.

name: Cologne de Figuier
notes: Bergamot, Grapefruit, Fig Leaf Accord, Ambroxan, Galbanum, Pink Pepper, Vulcanolide, Cetalox
description: Rosendo Mateu

name: For Your Love
notes: Raspberry, Exaltone, Cachalox (ambergris), Benzoin, Patchouli
style: Animalic, Fruity, Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Sweet
description: The Nue Co.

name: Tres Chere
notes: Orange Blossom, Ambroxan, Paradisone, Jasmine, Bourbon Vanilla, Exaltone, Sandalwood
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: "Dear Stranger, This letter might never reach you even though this is for you, just like this perfume. Our eyes have only met once but I feel like I have always known you. We were on the Paris-Venice train, that day when the train stopped in the middle of nowhere at night. You were leaving when I was just coming in for dinner. You brushed past me, I looked at you. You said 'Sorry!' My eyes stared at you, your profile, your eyelashes curves, the hem of your lips. One second which will last for eternity. One second, just enough time to create this perfume. It tells the story of this moment which has made such an impression on me. Everything was there. The sweetness of your voice, your gestures grace, which the musk roundness and the sandalwood and vanilla mellowness, seize so well here. Your silhouette outlined by the light, I see it as graceful as a white flower.

name: Mizensir Discovery Set
description: Discover the whimsical, wonderful, elegant world of Mizensir, from master perfumer Alberto Morillas. This specially priced Discovery Set contains generous 2ml spray samples of these ten enchanting scents:

name: Paragon
notes: Bergamot, White Sage, Lavender, Plum, Palo Santo, Black Pepper, Sandalwood, Agarwood
style: Creamy, Woody - Amber, Woody - Light, Woody Ambery Floral
description: Paragon houses the botanical soul of Palo Santo and white Sage whose use has been secretly passed down through initiation ceremonies dating back to the first lines of Inca shamans. Initio Parfums is interpreting this major accord in a contemporary formula that is potent and remanent.

name: Absolute Aphrodisiac
notes: White Flowers, Amber, Vanilla, Musk, Castoreum
style: Creamy, Floral - White, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Initio Parfums PrivÃ©s

name: Orange X Santal
notes: Bitter Orange, Egyptian Basil, Natural Oakmoss Absolute, Cypress, Australian Santalum Album
style: Fresh - Citrus, Salty / Oceanic, Woody - Fresh
description: Orange X Santal, literally orange crossed with sandalwood â simple, handsome, and to the point. A radiant composition, the scent focuses on the meeting of a remarkable bitter orange note with the authentic creaminess of santalum album grown sustainably on Australian plantations, the same species of wood that gave us the original Mysore sandalwood.

name: Rose Magnetic
notes: Grapefruit, Peppermint, Turkish Rose Absolute, Rose Extract, Lychee, Cedar, Vanilla, Tonka
style: Creamy, Floral, Floral - Fruity, Fruity
description: Rose Magnetic is a great example of what Essential Parfums sets out to do, which is to zone in on a great natural material and then hire great perfumers to create a simple but elegant structure where it can shine like a perfectly-polished stone. As addictive as its name suggests, Rose Magnetic takes us on a playful tour through all the fresh, sour, and fruity facets of the rose, before softening into the fluffy almond deliciousness of a Pierre Hermes Ispahan macaron.

name: Mon Vetiver
notes: Haitian Vetiver, Gin Accord, Mexican Lime, Juniper, Lavender, Gentian, Cashmeran, Indonesian Patchouli
style: Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Woody - Spicy
description: Mon Vetiver is a surprising and non-traditional vetiver, built on a series of contrasts between bright and dark, natural and synthetic, and modern and traditional, which serve to give this scent a truly distinctive character. Balancing its essentially serious character with the cheerful radiance of woody ambers, wearing Mon Vetiver feels like wearing a Savile Row suit with the lapels turned up.

name: Nice Bergamote
notes: Bergamot, Jasmine Grandiflora Extract, Natural Cedarwood Extract, Ylang Ylang, Tonka Bean
style: Floral - Citrus, Fresh - Citrus
description: Nice Bergamote is indeed a nice bergamot! In fact, we think the name might be underselling it a tad. The juicy sourness of the finest 100% natural Calabrian bergamot extract bursts out of the bottle like a firework, drenching the senses in an icy freshness that feels like liquid sunshine. Whatâs remarkable here is that all the other supporting notes match the bergamot in its naturalness, so they fade in and out of the picture depending on their volatility, as if designed by Mother Nature herself.

name: The Musc
notes: Ginger, Beeswax, Lavender, Sandalwood, Musks
style: Green / Herbaceous, Powdery / Soft, Skin Scent / Minimal, Spicy, Woody - Light
description: Every line needs a musk, and this is The Musc, a name that signposts both the brandâs sense of humor and the specialness of the scent. Calice Becker said she imagined this scent âas a cloud of enveloping and comforting muskâ, and thatâs a great way to describe its effect. Wearing The Musc is like stepping out of the freezing cold into a home filled with warmth and love.

name: Essential Parfums Discovery Set
description: Discover the creative, modern, surprisingly refined world of Essential Parfums with this specially priced discovery set featuring generous 2ml spray samples of the entire line:

name: Divine Vanille
notes: Clary Sage, Cinnamon, Black Pepper, Osmanthus, Incense, Pomarose, Vanilla, Tonka, Benzoin, Cedar, Musk, Patchouli
description: When you have a raw material as glorious as vanilla absolute from Madagascar, the smart thing to do is to let it shine. And in Divine Vanille by perfumer Olivier Pescheux, the costly but sustainable vanilla absolute reigns supreme â addictively soft and balmy, but with a darkly boozy amaretto tint in the topnotes that will tease your senses and make you want to drink it. A dulcet-toned, nutmeg-spiced tonka bean paste is dabbed on in places to give the vanilla a luscious depth, while a precious osmanthus absolute enhances the naturally leathery aspects of a black, woody vanilla pod. This is all tethered in the dry, slightly bitter smokiness of Texas cedar. But that lush vanilla rings out, as clear as a bell.

name: Bois Imperial
notes: Thai Basil, Nepalese Timut Pepper Absolute, Haitian Vetiver, Georgywood (new Variation On Cedar Wood), Akigalawood, Indonesian Patchouli, Ambrofix.
style: Spicy, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: Freshly crushed and spicy Thai Basil leaves meet the sparkling peppery and grapefruit facets of Nepalese Timut Pepper absolute. A brilliant combination that contrasts perfectly with the bold woody signature of the fragrance. A green, rich and earthy Haitian Vetiver oil echoes with Georgywood â an exclusive molecule with powerful cedarwood tones. This vibrating woody association is illuminated by the sophisticated floralcy of Petalia. Majestic Akigalawood elegantly rounds out the fragrance. This exclusive natural ingredient is upcycled from Patchouli through a biotechnology process. Its unique spicy-woody character is enhanced by a rich Indonesian Patchouli oil and a powerful, sustainably sourced note of Ambrofix.

name: Fig Infusion
notes: Orange Blossom, Black Tea, Sandalwood, Fig, Benzoin, Mandarin
style: Floral - Fruity, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Woody - Light
description: "I imagined a luminous fragrance full of joy and pleasure. The reminiscent smell of an afternoon dreaming in the orchard, comfortably installed under the fig trees."-Nathalie Lorson, Master Perfumer

description: A fragrance that traverses boundaries and continents and creates olfactory poetry. A collaboration between Dmitry Bortnikoff and Rajesh Balkrishnan spanning the careful collection and blending of finest natural absolutes over three continents , Sayat Nova is a composition inspired by the legendary traveling poet of Armenia whose visual poetry influenced generations of artists and visionaries.

description: Bortnikoff

name: Sayat Nova Attar
description: Experience the true depth and complexities of Bortnikoff's mastery in this rare collection of attars. These intense, concentrated oils provide hours of enjoyment even with the most minimal application.

name: Mysterious Oud Attar
description: Experience the true depth and complexities of Bortnikoff's mastery in this rare collection of attars. These intense, concentrated oils provide hours of enjoyment even with the most minimal application.

name: Musk Khabib Attar
description: Experience the true depth and complexities of Bortnikoff's mastery in this rare collection of attars. These intense, concentrated oils provide hours of enjoyment even with the most minimal application.

name: Oud Cologne
description: Oud Cologne opens with a burst of citruses: Bergamot, White Grapefruit, and Bitter Orange. The zesty aroma of their peel is prolonged by the freshness of Juniper Berries, Pink Pepper, and Ginger. The heart of the composition delves deep into a lush green accord made up of Pine Needles, Geranium, Rose, and Nutmeg. The base of the fragrance that lingers for hours, consists of White Ambergris, Benzoin from Siam, Wild Oud from Thailand, Tonka Beans, and Vetiver.

name: Tabac Dore
notes: Pink Pepper, Vanilla Absolute, Ambrette, Cinnamon, Tobacco Absolute, Benzoin, Fig, Cedar, Labdanum, Sandalwood, Tolu Balsam, Peru Balsam, Wild Oud From Thailand And Vietnam
style: Animalic, Fruity, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: In both history and perfumery, tobacco carries with it a beguiling duality. On one hand, it's an ancient form of commune with the spirits- rich, smoky, earthy, and deeply ethereal. On the other, it's a sweet, sexy, spicy example of modern sophistication and worldly vice. Luckily, Bortnikoff fragrances have always celebrated the totality of the exquisite nature materials they use, and so we're delighted to present Tabac Dore, a robust and regal tobacco scent that both commands attention with its power and presence, but also soothes the soul with its depth and beauty.

name: Lao Oud
notes: Pink Pepper, Magnolia, Peach, Frangipani, Beeswax Absolute, Cinnamon, Chamomile, Peru Balsam, Cacao Absolute, Oud From Laos, Tonka Beans, Crocodile Wood, Coffee, Oud From India, Vanilla Absolute, Birch Tar, Guaiac Wood
style: Animalic, Floral - Ambery Spice, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky, Spicy, Woody - Dark
description: Bortnikoff

name: Santa Sangre
notes: Pink Grapefruit, Tahitian Vanilla Flower, Jasmine Sambac, Himalayan Pink Lotus Absolute, Thailand White Lotus, Sandalwood (mixture Of Mysore And Indonesian), Dragonâs Blood Incense, Red Siam Benzoin
description: Bortnikoff

name: Lao Oud
description: Experience the true depth and complexities of Bortnikoff's mastery in this rare collection of attars. These intense, concentrated oils provide hours of enjoyment even with the most minimal application.

name: Scheherazade
notes: Black Currant, Bergamot, Apricot, Pepper, Cedar, Sandalwood, Wild Oud Oil
description: Bortnikoff

name: Le Voyage Orient
notes: White Grapefruit, Tangerine, Bitter Orange, Vanilla, Nutmeg, Clove Leaf, Siberian Deer Musk, Pink Pepper, Vetiver Sumatra, Agarwood Siam
style: Floral - Spicy, Woody - Amber, Woody Ambery Floral
description: The House of Bortnikoff is pleased to introduce the young talent of Maxim Bortnikov with his first release: Le Voyage Orient. Maxim is the son of Dmitry Bortnikov and trained with his father for several years as well as formally undertook training in perfumery in Bangkok, Thailand before launching his first scent. Maximâs individual eclectic style is evident in his first release. The scent is line with other offerings of the house but presents a slightly modern, bolder edge that sets it apart and makes things exciting for fans as well as newcomers alike.

name: Ombre Leather
notes: Violet Leaf, Cardamom, Jasmine Sambac, Black Leather, White Moss, Patchouli
style: Powdery / Soft, Resinous / Balsamic, Smoky
description: True luxury doesnât shout. If youâve been on the hunt for the perfect leather but been either smothered by an avalanche of powdery florals or slapped around the face by a Cossackâs oily winter boot, then breathe a sigh of relief because âyourâ leather has finally arrived. Wearing Ombre Leather is like slipping into a pair of the sleekest handmade leather Oxfords in the velvety hush of a store you have to ring a bell to get into.

name: Noir Extreme Parfum
notes: Amber, Cardamom, Ginger, Tonka Bean, Guaiacwood
style: Woody - Spicy, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A bold intensification of the original scent, Noir Extreme Parfum merges amber, spices and woods, evoking the private, daring aspects of the Noir man.Noir Extreme Parfum breathes a heightened concentration of spicy cardamom, spiked with the warmth of Shimoga ginger and the rich sensuality of tonka bean and guaiacwood.

name: Qahwa
notes: Arabian Coffee Distillation, Oud, Pepper, Cardamon, Clove, Orange, Bergamot, Labdanum, Frankincense, Patchouli, Vetiver, Birch & Sandalwood
description: The perfect reunion. Warm. Inviting. A rich and complex aroma inspired by centuries of wisdom and sharing. Only the finest beans are roasted over wood fire in the heart of the desert to produce the perfect cup of Qahwa â Arabic coffee. The staple of local hospitality.

name: The Oud Caravan
notes: Incense, Pepper, Tea, Clove, Saffran, Leather, Organic Thai Oud Oil, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Benzoin, Rose, Patchouli, 1979 Aged Cambodian Oud.
style: Woody - Dark, Woody Ambery Floral
description: A wanderlust of adventure reaching across time, this exclusive fragrance takes inspiration from the famed caravans crossing the worldâs greatest sea of sand. Bold shadows of camel trains cast wide against shifting dunes, marking every step with the distinct signature of aromatic Oud wood vapors. Ar Rubâ al Khali â The Empty Quarter. Mighty. Mysterious. Timeless.

name: Alghabra Discovery Set
description: Alghabra Parfums is a tribute to the Old City of Damascus, âThe City of Jasmineâ and a tribute to the perfumer Mohammed Khair Alghabra, one of the first âAttarsâ of the Middle East region.

style: Floral, Powdery / Soft, Sweet
description: Alghabra Parfums

style: Creamy, Floral - Light, Floral - White, Smoky, Woody - Light
description: Alghabra Parfums

name: Eye of Seven Hills
notes: Saffron, Nutmeg, Cinnamon, Whisky, Benzoin, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Orris, Patchouli, Tobacco, Amber, Sandalwood, Cedar, Oud, Woody Musk
style: Boozy, Resinous / Balsamic, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Dark
description: Alghabra Parfums

name: Neva Winged Lions
notes: Peony, Bergamot, Freesia, Turkish Rose, Jasmine Tea, Cotton Flower, Violet
style: Classic Feminine, Floral - Fruity, Floral - Light
description: Alghabra Parfums

name: Cuban Tobacco
notes: Mandarin Orange, Vanilla, Mojito, Jasmine, Plum Wine, Smoke, Tobacco, Tobacco Blossom, Woody Notes, Salt
style: Floral - Spicy, Smoky, Spicy, Sweet, Woody - Spicy
description: When Spanish sailors first explored Cuba in 1492, they returned with accounts of towering forests, exotic chattering birds, and men and women going about "from place to place with a firebrand of weeds in their hands to take in the fragrant smoke." Before long, Spanish colonists in the New World were growing and smoking tobacco, and as the demand spread, the curious weed became a global profit powerhouse- with all the historic and moral implications contained within.

name: City Of Jasmine
notes: Apple, Leather, Jasmine, Rose, Vanilla, Musk
style: Floral - Light, Fresh - Clean, Fruity, Sweet
description: Summer in Damascus, when the jasmine blooms from every corner of the city. Well-dressed men stop to beat the afternoon heat with cool fresh fruits, or perhaps an icy drink of lemonade near a courtyard fountain. This is the portrait of City Of Jasmine, a delightfully refreshing masculine scent that takes the beloved and renowned structure of the fruit-forward men's scent to a newly exotic destination.

name: Labyrinth Of Spices
notes: Turkish Coffee, Pineapple, Galbanum, Tobacco, Clove, Cinnamon, Nutmeg, Anise, Lavender, Tonka, Cardamom, Amber, Sandalwood, Cedar, Vetiver, Oakmoss, Woody Musk
style: Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Green / Herbaceous, Spicy, Woody - Fresh
description: Divine

name: Purple Haze
notes: Italian Bergamot, Corsican Cypress, Cannabis Accord, Ranesara, Ciste, Palmarosa, Thyme, Gurjum, Violet Leaf, Vanilla, Patchouli, Black Pepper, White Musk, Dry Woods
style: Earthy, Fougere, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: "The fragrance Purple Haze embraces the hippie movement and counterculture just like John and Yoko's bed-ins in Amsterdam and Montreal. Purple Haze is about the legendary Keenak who I met in Bahama Village, Key West. Guitar on his back, snakeskin boots, skinny jeans, and long hair. A sense of Woodstock. It is a tribute to creativity, freedom, and indulgence." -Johan Bergelin

name: Kasbah
notes: Sweet Orange, Lime, White Honey, Geranium, Amber, Patchouli, Vanilla, Tonka Beans, Guaiac Wood, Leather Accord, Sandalwood
style: Earthy, Smoky
description: âStories of how personalities like Talitha and Paul Getty, Paul Bowles, Mick Jagger, Veruschka and Yves Saint Laurent all resided in Marrakech during the 60s and 70s have always inspired me. I'm intrigued by how they used this place for influences and escapes of all kinds: clothes, colours, music, interior and drugs. So, the fragrance of Kasbah is an appreciation to the international party scene during this era. â -Johan Bergelin

name: Rainbow Bar
notes: Davana, Bergamot, Cypress, Wormwood, Cardamom, Marine Accord, Basil, Elemi, Artemisia, Grape Seed, Bourbon, Nutmeg, Vetyver, Clove, Guaiac Wood, Cedarwood, Pimento Seeds
description: "The notorious Rainbow Bar on Sunset Strip was founded when the word "rainbow" signified peace and freedom. Think Pamela Courson, sex, drugs and rockÂ´nÂ´roll. But there are also the other lighter dimensions like the sun, the blue skies and warm glow that embrace LA. As the lyrics in the famous song by America go: 'Driving on Ventura Highway, the free wind blowing through your hair.' It's all been captured in the fragrance Rainbow Bar.â -Johan Bergelin

name: Chronic
notes: Petitgrain, Bitter Orange, Bitter Grapefruit, Russian Clary Sage, Virginian Cedarwood, Cannabis Accord, Amber, Patchouli, Vetiver, Cashmere Wood, Moss, Musk
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Green / Herbaceous, Resinous / Balsamic
description: "In 1996, California became the first state in the US to legalize medical cannabis. But scratch the surface and there has always been a long history of cannabis cultivators and enthusiasts dedicating their lives to refining the herb. Chronic is a term for Cannabis and also alludes to 'The Chronic' - the debut album of Dr Dre. The Chronic was released in 1992, the same year as the Los Angeles riots." -Johan Bergerlin

name: Villa Nellcote
notes: Grapefruit, Bergamot, Petitgrain, Pink Pepper, Elemi, Lemon, Lemon Flower, Violet, Rose, Jasmine, Magnolia, Osmanthus, Black Tea, Cabreuva, Cedar, Patchouli, White Amber, Musk, Moss, Gaiac
description: "Never has a house been so closely associated with the creation of a rock album. This was a summer that would change the history of music forever. The fragrance Villa Nellcote is the embodiment of the magnificent garden and surroundings at the estate with the same name." -Johan Bergelin

name: Female Christ
notes: Eucalyptus, Patchouli, Pimento, Rhubarb, Thyme, Geranium, Berries, Vanilla, Ambergris, Benzoin, Cinnamon, Cashmere Wood
style: Earthy, Fresh - Citrus, Fruity, Woody - Fresh, Woody - Spicy
description: On 29 May 1969, a naked woman carrying a cross walked through the Copenhagen Stock Exchange- an iconic piece of performance art carried out by Danish artists Lene Adler Petersen and BjÃ¸rn Norgaard that gripped the culture with its transgressive nature and exploration of religion, eroticism, and capitalism. However, as with so much of the genre-defying protest art of the '60s, only a photograph remains to commemorate the accomplishment. By introducing Female Christ the fragrance, a powerful, thoughtful, and deeply sensual blend of patchouli and resin, 19-69 preserves the essence of the art piece for the next generation to discover and learn.

name: La Habana
notes: Aldehyde, Saffron, Elemi, Incense, Vanilla, Caramel, Ambroxan, Oud, Golden Stone, Amber Balsam

description: The nostalgic scent reminds you of the excitement when you pop open a ramune bottle sealed with a marble stopper at a summer festival.
